*Wayne King,Zeyue Xue,Yuxuan Bian,Jie Huang,Haoran Li,Yaowei Li,Yaofeng Su,Yuming Li,Haoyu Wang,Shiyi Zhang,Songchun Zhang,Yuwei Niu,Sihan Xu,Junhao Zhuang,Haoyang Huang,Nan Duan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Echo-Memory 通过控制变量实验，系统研究了动作条件世界模型中的记忆机制，发现原始上下文在开放域回访任务中表现强劲，而块状状态空间循环是最强的隐式记忆结构，且回放保真度不能作为记忆能力的充分代理指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有世界模型在相机离开并返回场景时会出现物体无声变化的问题，且不同记忆设计之间难以公平比较，因为增益常与骨干网络、训练、检索和评估差异纠缠在一起。

Method: 固定动作到视频的接口，在共享视频扩散骨干、优化器、相机动作表示、采样器和评估流程下，控制变量比较原始上下文、压缩记忆、空间摘要（不同读取路径）和状态空间循环四种记忆机制。评估采用三支路协议：回放质量、域内循环回访和开放域返回探测。

Result: 1）原始上下文是强大的容量基线，对开放域回访的提升远大于对回放指标的提升；2）紧凑性不能替代容量，激进的空间和混合压缩记忆会丢失关键证据；3）块状状态空间循环是开放域回访的最强机制，隐式记忆的结构与其使用决策同等重要。

Conclusion: 回放保真度不足以作为记忆能力的代理指标；记忆机制的研究需超越孤立的回放指标，采用多支路评估协议。

Abstract: We present \textbf{Echo-Memory}, a controlled study of memory mechanisms in action-conditioned world models. These models generate multi-segment videos from a first frame, text prompt, and camera-action sequence, but their central failure is often memory rather than local image synthesis: after the camera leaves and returns, the scene or salient object may silently change. Existing memory designs are hard to compare because gains are entangled with backbone, training, retrieval, and evaluation differences. Echo-Memory fixes the action-to-video interface and varies only how history is stored and read by the generator. Under a shared video diffusion backbone, optimizer, camera-action representation, sampler, and evaluation pipeline, we compare raw context, compression-based memory, spatial summaries with different read-out paths, and state-space recurrence. This matched matrix separates four otherwise conflated axes: \emph{capacity}, \emph{compression}, \emph{read-out}, and \emph{recurrence}. We also evaluate memory through a three-branch protocol: replay quality, in-domain loop revisit, and open-domain return probes. The branches routinely disagree, showing that replay fidelity is not a sufficient proxy for remembering a world. Three findings follow. Raw context is a strong capacity baseline and improves open-domain return far more than it improves replay metrics. Compactness is not a free substitute for capacity: aggressive spatial and hybrid-compression memories lose the salient evidence needed for return. Finally, block-wise state-space recurrence is the strongest open-domain return mechanism in our matrix, showing that the structure of implicit memory matters as much as the decision to use it. These results provide a compact protocol for studying memory in action world models beyond isolated replay metrics.

</details>


### [112] [TVI-CoT: Text-Visual Interleaved Chain-of-Thought Reasoning for Multimodal Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08464)
*Lianyu Hu,Xiaoyu Ma,Zeqin Liao,Yang Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出TVI-CoT框架，通过在多模态大模型中引入<THINK>、<LOOK>和<ANSWER>等可学习控制标记，实现文本推理与视觉特征提取的动态交错，解决了传统CoT方法在多模态场景下的"视觉盲区"问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多模态CoT方法存在根本性缺陷：在初始视觉编码后图像信息便不可访问，模型只能基于初始描述进行推理，形成"视觉盲推理"范式，限制了细粒度视觉提取、错误验证和自适应注意力。

Method: 提出TVI-CoT框架，通过可学习控制标记<THINK>（文本推理）、<LOOK>（视觉特征访问）和<ANSWER>（答案输出），实现文本推理与视觉特征提取的显式交错，使模型能根据推理状态动态关注相关图像区域。

Result: 在8个基准上达到MLLM-CoT方法的最优结果，相比基线提升：MMMU +6.1%，MathVerse +3.8%，MathVista +3.4%，ScienceQA +3.4%。

Conclusion: TVI-CoT通过文本推理与视觉特征访问的动态交错，有效解决了多模态CoT的视觉盲区问题，显著提升模型在需要细粒度视觉理解任务上的表现。

Abstract: Chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning has proven effective for enhancing problem-solving in large language models. However, when applied to multimodal LLMs (MLLMs), existing CoT approaches suffer from a fundamental limitation: they perform reasoning entirely in text without accessing visual features during the reasoning process. After initial visual encoding, image information becomes inaccessible, forcing models to reason based solely on whatever was captured in the initial description, which forms a `vision-blind reasoning' paradigm that limits fine-grained visual extraction, error verification, and adaptive attention. We propose Text-Visual Interleaved Chain-of-Thought (TVI-CoT), a framework that enables explicit interleaving of textual reasoning and visual feature access through learnable control tokens <THINK>, <LOOK> and <ANSWER>. These tokens allow dynamic switching between reasoning and visual grounding, attending to relevant image regions conditioned on the evolving reasoning state. Experiments on eight benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art results among MLLM-based CoT methods and notable performance boost compared to the baseline: +6.1% on MMMU, +3.8% on MathVerse, +3.4% on MathVista, and +3.4% on ScienceQA. Code is available at https://github.com/hulianyuyy/TVI-CoT.

</details>


### [113] [Look Less, Reason More: Block-wise Attention Skipping for Efficient Multimodal LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08511)
*Jie Ma,Zhike Qiu,Jiayi Ji,Xiaoshuai Sun,Rongrong Ji*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: V-Skip是一种无需训练的推理范式，通过跳过冗余的视觉自注意力模块实现块级结构化稀疏，在保持94.16%-100.31%性能的同时加速MLLM推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态大语言模型因视觉token序列上的自注意力二次计算成本面临推理瓶颈，而现有架构中存在视觉注意力饱和这一低效现象——视觉token在浅层就已建立空间结构，深层自注意力计算冗余。

Method: 提出V-Skip，一种无需训练的方法：1) 将空间交互与语义演化解耦；2) 选择性地跳过已饱和的视觉自注意力模块，实现块级结构化稀疏；3) 通过轻量级few-shot校准动态路由任务最优的稀疏路径。

Result: 在多种MLLM上保持94.16%至100.31%的性能保留率，有效识别并跳过了冗余的视觉注意力计算。

Conclusion: 模型不需要丢弃看到的视觉信息，只需在合适的深度"少看"——即跳过冗余的视觉自注意力，即可更高效地推理。

Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) face a significant inference bottleneck due to the quadratic computational cost of self-attention over long visual token sequences. However, we identify a critical inefficiency in current architectures: Visual Attention Saturation. Our analysis reveals that visual tokens rapidly establish their spatial structure and intra-modal relationships in early layers, rendering visual-to-visual self-attention in deeper layers computationally redundant. Conversely, Feed-Forward Networks (FFNs) in these layers remain essential for projecting visual features into the evolving textual semantic space. Leveraging this insight, we present Visual-Skip (V-Skip), a training-free inference paradigm that decouples spatial interaction from semantic evolution. Rather than discarding tokens, V-Skip imposes block-wise structured sparsity by selectively bypassing saturated visual self-attention modules. Furthermore, recognizing that varying downstream tasks demand distinct reasoning depths, V-Skip employs a lightweight, few-shot calibration to dynamically route the task-optimal sparsity path. Extensive experiments demonstrate that V-Skip effectively bypasses redundant vision attention to achieve block-wise sparsity, maintaining a 94.16% to 100.31% performance retention across diverse MLLMs. Ultimately, we prove that to reason more effectively, models do not need to discard what they see -- they simply need to "look less" at the right depth.

</details>


### [114] [See More, Think Deeper: Query-Expanded Visual Evidence and Answer-Clue Guided Reflection for Long Video Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09064)
*Shuning Wang,Zhiheng Wu,YiNuo Lu,Naiming Liu,Chen Jia,Bowen Liu,Shuo Nie,Weijie Zhu,Yumeng Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出CoVER框架，通过动态收集扩展查询的视觉证据和基于视觉反馈验证答案，提升Video-LLMs在长视频理解任务上的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Video-LLMs存在两个关键局限：证据获取依赖单一搜索意图，且答案生成缺乏有效的视觉反馈机制。

Method: CoVER框架包含两个核心机制：(1) See More——动态收集查询扩展后的视觉证据；(2) Think Deeper——通过答案特定的视觉反馈验证草稿答案，实现从答案中心到证据中心且视觉可验证的推理。

Result: CoVER-7B在同参数量模型中表现突出，某些指标上甚至超越SOTA闭源模型。

Conclusion: 长视频理解应转向证据中心和视觉可验证的推理范式，而非单纯的答案生成。

Abstract: Recent advances in Video Large Language Models (Video-LLMs) have enabled performance on long-video understanding tasks. However, existing methods still face two key limitations: evidence acquisition often relies on a single search intent, and answer generation lacks an effective visual feedback mechanism. To address these limitations, we propose \textbf{CoVER}, a Comprehensive Visual Evidence and Reflection framework for long-video understanding. CoVER enables Video-LLMs to \textbf{See More} by dynamically gathering query-expanded visual evidence, and \textbf{Think Deeper} by verifying draft answers with effective answer-specific visual feedback. Together, these mechanisms shift long-video understanding from answer-centric generation to evidence-centric and visually verifiable reasoning. Experimental results show that CoVER-7B substantially outperforms models with the same parameter scale and even surpasses state-of-the-art closed-source models on certain metrics.

</details>


### [115] [OmniTryOn: Video Try-On Anything at Once!](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08514)
*Changliang Xia,Chengyou Jia,Minnan Luo,Zhuohang Dang,Xin Shen,Bowen Ping*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出"Try-On Anything"任务，旨在单次推理中实现视频中多人/物的同时虚拟试穿。为此，构建了TryAny-Bench基准数据集与评估协议，并提出了无外部先验的生成框架OmniTryOn，采用首帧可穿戴缓存、STC-RoPE和渐进式训练策略，显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频虚拟试穿方法存在两大局限：一是仅支持单件衣物迁移，无法同时进行多物体试穿；二是过度依赖外部先验（如衣物掩码），破坏了物理动态并降低了视觉质量。

Method: 提出OmniTryOn框架，包含三个核心组件：(1) 首帧可穿戴缓存策略，直接从首帧提供多样可穿戴物体；(2) 时空一致RoPE（STC-RoPE），建立鲁棒的时空锚点以保持运动与背景一致性；(3) 渐进式试穿（GTO）训练策略，逐步学习多物体合成。

Result: 在TryAny-Bench上的大量实验表明，OmniTryOn显著优于现有专用视频虚拟试穿模型和通用视频编辑基线，为Try-On Anything任务树立了新标准。

Conclusion: 本文通过提出新任务、新基准和新框架，突破了现有视频虚拟试穿的单物体限制和对外部先验的依赖，实现了高效、高质量的多物体视频试穿，并为该方向提供了标准化评估体系。

Abstract: Although video virtual try-on (VVT) has achieved significant progress, existing methods still exhibit two fundamental limitations: first, they are restricted to single-garment transfer, rendering simultaneous multi-object try-on highly impractical; second, their heavy reliance on explicit external priors (e.g., garment masks) inevitably destroys crucial physical dynamics and degrades visual quality. To bridge this gap, this paper proposes the novel Try-On Anything task, which aims to simultaneously transfer diverse wearable objects onto a person in a video in a single inference pass. To support and standardize this paradigm, we introduce TryAny-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark encompassing a paired video dataset alongside a tailored evaluation protocol. Furthermore, we present OmniTryOn, an external-prior-free generative framework designed to tackle this task. Specifically, OmniTryOn employs a First Frame Wearable Cache strategy, which directly provides diverse wearable objects for the generation process through the initial video frame. To maintain consistency, we propose the Spatiotemporally Consistent RoPE (STC-RoPE), which inherently establishes robust spatiotemporal anchors to strictly preserve complex human motions and background dynamics. Optimized by the proposed Gradual Try-On (GTO) training strategy, our model progressively masters robust multi-object synthesis. Extensive experiments on TryAny-Bench demonstrate that OmniTryOn significantly outperforms existing specialized video virtual try-on models and general video editing baselines, establishing a powerful new standard for the Try-On Anything task. Our dataset, code, and models are available at https://github.com/xcltql666/OminTryOn.

</details>


### [116] [DriveReward: A Comprehensive Dataset and Generative Vision-Language Reward Model for Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08525)
*Qimao Chen,Fang Li,Yuechen Luo,Zehan Zhang,Haiyang Sun,Fangzhen Li,Bing Wang,Guang Chen,Yang Ji,Jiong Deng,Hongwei Xie,Hangjun Ye,Long Chen,Yi Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出DriveReward——一个基于时间视觉引导和反事实驾驶行为标注的推理轨迹评估数据集，并配套开发了专用视觉语言奖励模型（1B参数），在强化学习和多模态轨迹选择中达到与规则奖励计算相当的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的自动驾驶奖励模型依赖手工规则或感知真值，难以泛化到数据规模扩展；虽然VLM在其他领域被证明可作为奖励模型，但其在驾驶任务中的有效性尚未被充分探索。

Method: (1) 构建DriveReward数据集：基于时间视觉引导进行推理轨迹评估标注，并提出反事实数据标注方案，生成包含多种驾驶风格和错误行为的案例。(2) 开发1B参数的视觉语言奖励模型，专门针对任务奖励对齐进行训练。

Result: 现有开源和专有VLM均无法在所有任务上表现出色；本文定制的1B奖励模型在任务特定奖励对齐上超越了更大的VLM；将该奖励模型集成到RL微调和多模态轨迹评分中，在开环和闭环评估中达到与规则奖励计算相当的性能。

Conclusion: 通过反事实标注和专用小模型，可以有效弥补现有VLM在驾驶奖励建模上的不足，验证了VLM作为自动驾驶奖励模型的可行性和有效性。

Abstract: Reward models play a pivotal role in reinforcement learning (RL) and multi-modal trajectory selection for autonomous driving. However, acquiring such rewards typically relies on hand-crafted rule-based objectives or perception ground truth, which hinders generalization for data-scaling. While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated feasibility as reward models in other domains, their effectiveness in driving tasks remains underexplored. In this work, we bridge this gap by (1) introducing DriveReward, a reasoning trajectory evaluation dataset rigorously labeled via temporally-grounded visual guidance, and augmented with counterfactual driving behaviors., (2) alongside a specialized Vision-Language Reward Model. To address the scarcity of failure cases in conventional datasets, we propose a counterfactual data annotation scheme to construct cases encompassing diverse driving styles and erroneous behaviors. Evaluations on our proposed benchmark reveal that even leading open-source and proprietary VLMs fail to excel across all tasks, highlighting significant room for improvement in existing models. Building on these findings, we subsequently tailor a specialized 1B reward model that outperforms larger VLMs on task-specific reward alignment. Finally, we validate our reward model's effectiveness by integrating it into RL finetuning and multi-modal trajectory scoring across multiple baselines, achieving performance comparable to rule-based reward calculations in both open-loop and closed-loop evaluation.

</details>


### [117] [NGram-MoSE: Efficient Remote Sensing Super-Resolution via N-Gram Context and Mixture-of-Experts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08535)
*Yun-Hsuan Huang,Trong-An Bui,Chih-Hung Chuang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出NGram-MoSE，一种轻量级Transformer超分模型，通过N-Gram上下文注入和混合专家前馈设计，在保持高PSNR的同时将FLOPs降低14倍，并在滑坡分割任务上提升4.47% mAP@50。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 遥感图像存在时空分辨率权衡问题，现有Transformer超分模型计算成本高、对训练数据偏差敏感，导致在分布外场景下鲁棒性不足。

Method: 1) N-Gram上下文注入：增强跨窗口局部一致性，缓解窗口边界伪影；2) 混合专家(MoE)前馈设计：通过稀疏激活提升模型容量，不显著增加推理成本。

Result: 在地理分离的OOD测试集上PSNR达31.68dB，FLOPs降低14倍；滑坡分割任务中mAP@50提升4.47%，跨尺度泛化能力更强。

Conclusion: NGram-MoSE为资源受限的遥感管线提供了高效且鲁棒的超分模块，在OOD条件下表现优异。

Abstract: Remote sensing applications for environmental monitoring and disaster management are frequently constrained by a spatial--temporal trade-off: imagery with fine spatial detail is often acquired less frequently, whereas more temporally available observations are typically coarser. Single-image super-resolution provides a practical means to enhance coarse imagery without changing acquisition schedules, yet many Transformer-based SR models remain computationally expensive and can be sensitive to limited or geographically biased training data, which degrades robustness under out-of-distribution conditions. This paper presents NGram-MoSE, a lightweight Transformer architecture designed to improve both efficiency and texture continuity. NGram-MoSE introduces N-Gram Context Injection to strengthen cross-window local consistency and mitigate window-boundary artifacts, and incorporates a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) feed-forward design to scale capacity through sparse activation without proportional growth in inference cost. Experiments on a geographically disjoint OOD test set show that NGram-MoSE achieves 31.68\,dB PSNR while reducing FLOPs by \(14\times\) relative to a heavyweight Transformer reference. Downstream evaluation on a landslide segmentation benchmark further demonstrates that restoring degraded inputs to the detector training scale improves performance, yielding a 4.47\% absolute gain in mAP@50 over bicubic upsampling, and exhibits stronger cross-scale consistency under scale extrapolation. These results indicate that NGram-MoSE provides an effective SR module for resource-constrained remote sensing pipelines requiring robust generalization.

</details>


### [118] [Towards Accurate Emotion-Attributed Video Captioning via Fine-grained Emotion-Cause Pair Extraction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08566)
*Weidong Chen,Cheng Ye,Zhendong Mao,Liping Wang,Xinyan Liu,Yongdong Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文针对情感视频描述任务中全局情感挖掘导致信息冗余和情感线索不准确的问题，提出了一种细粒度情感-原因对提取框架。通过概念感知的视觉语义分解模块和视觉引导的情感可解释学习模块，实现两轮情感与原因特征对的提取与交叉耦合，显著提升了情感视频描述的准确性和丰富性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有情感视频描述方法依赖全局视觉特征挖掘情感线索，但视觉情感通常由核心视频片段中的特定动机原因触发，全局挖掘会导致严重的信息冗余和不准确的情感线索。因此，细粒度的视觉原因提取对情感感知和情感属性字幕生成具有促进作用。

Method: 1) 概念感知视觉语义分解模块（CVSD）：通过探索场景、物体和运动概念来增强视觉特征；2) 视觉引导情感可解释学习模块（VGEIL）：利用视觉时间动态引导情感精炼，并通过VAD向量约束增强可解释性；3) 两轮情感-原因对提取：通过交叉耦合视觉和情感特征，并利用对比损失实现语义强制对齐。

Result: 在三个挑战性数据集上取得了最优性能，例如在EVC-MSVD数据集上BLEU-2提升4.4%，ROUGE-L提升5.4%。

Conclusion: 提出的细粒度情感-原因对提取框架通过优化视频的复杂语义理解和情感感知，在情感视频描述任务中取得了显著优势，验证了各模块的有效性。

Abstract: Emotional Video Captioning (EVC) is a challenging task that aims to generate factually accurate and emotionally rich descriptions for videos. Existing EVC methods leverage holistic visual features to mine global emotional cues, and then aggregate multimodal features to guide the emotional caption generation, which ignores the critical characteristic of the EVC task. Visual emotions are evoked by specific motivational causes, which are usually only implied in core video segments. The holistic mining brings significant information redundancy and inaccurate emotional cues. Thus, fine-grained visual cause extraction has a facilitative effect on both emotion perception and emotion-attributed caption generation. To this end, we propose a fine-grained emotion-cause pair extraction framework for emotion-attributed video captioning. Specifically, we learn pair-wise emotion and cause features in two rounds: 1) We propose a Concept-aware Visual Semantic Decomposition module to augment visual features by exploring scene, object, and motion concepts. Besides, to enhance emotional features, we propose a Visual-guided Emotion Interpretable Learning module, which guides emotion refinement with visual temporal dynamics, and augments the interpretable refinement process by reliable VAD-vector constraints. 2) We achieve emotion-cause pair extraction by cross-coupling the visual and emotional features before and after refinement, and leverage contrastive loss to achieve semantic forced alignment. Overall, our approach optimizes complex semantic understanding and emotion perception of videos, leading to a promising performance in emotional captioning. Extensive experiments on three challenging datasets demonstrate the superiority of our approach and each proposed module, e.g., achieving the best performances with +4.4% and +5.4% w.r.t. BLEU-2 and ROUGE-L, respectively, on the EVC-MSVD dataset.

</details>


### [119] [OmniCap-IF: Benchmarking and Improving Instruction Following Abilities for Omni-Video Captioning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08572)
*Jiahao Wang,An Ping,Yanghai Wang,Yuanxing Zhang,Shihao Li,Hanyan Bian,Yichi Ren,Yize Zhang,Han Wang,Haowen Chen,Junze Li,Jiaqi Wang,Yiyang Hu,Zhuze Xu,Zijie Zhang,Jiaheng Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出首个评估全模态大语言模型指令跟随能力的基准 OmniCap-IF，包含50种约束类型和1,920个样本，揭示了"格式-内容权衡"现象，并构建了54K指令微调数据集和OmniCaptioner-IF模型以提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准主要关注整体视频理解或纯文本指令跟随，缺乏评估多模态与用户约束之间复杂交互的能力，因此需要专门评估全模态指令跟随能力的基准。

Method: 构建OmniCap-IF基准，从格式正确性和内容正确性两个维度评估字幕质量，覆盖纯视觉、纯音频和音视频三种模态的50种约束类型，并整合时间定位能力。

Result: 在1,920个高质量样本上评估主流模型，发现显著性能差异；揭示了"格式-内容权衡"现象，即格式复杂度增加会降低模型的全模态推理能力。

Conclusion: 构建了OmniCap-IF-54K指令微调数据集和OmniCaptioner-IF模型，在复杂指令遵循和全模态字幕生成任务上均取得了显著改进。

Abstract: While Omni-modal Large Language Models (OLLMs) have demonstrated impressive capabilities in jointly processing audio and visual streams, their ability to strictly adhere to complex, multi-faceted user instructions remains largely unexplored. Existing benchmarks primarily focus on holistic video understanding or text-only instruction following, failing to capture the intricate interplay between modalities and user constraints. To bridge this gap, we introduce OmniCap-IF, the first comprehensive benchmark specifically designed to evaluate instruction-following capabilities in omni-modal captioning. OmniCap-IF incorporates a systematic framework that assesses captions on two dimensions: format correctness and content correctness. Our benchmark encompasses 50 distinct constraint types across pure visual, pure audio, and audio-visual modalities, while integrating Temporal Grounding to assess spatio-temporal precision. Extensive evaluations of prominent models on 1,920 high-quality samples reveal significant performance disparities. Furthermore, our analysis uncovers a critical "format-content tradeoff", demonstrating that increasing formatting complexity directly degrades models' omni-modal reasoning abilities. Finally, to advance the field, we curate a 54K instruction-tuning dataset, OmniCap-IF-54K and present OmniCaptioner-IF, which achieves notable improvements in both complex instruction adherence and general omni-modal captioning performance.

</details>


### [120] [Facial Expression Recognition in the Deep Learning Era: A Systematic Multi-Criteria Review of Methods, Models, Datasets, Performance, Challenges, and Future Research Directions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08612)
*Spyridon Georgiou,Aggelos Psiris,Spyridon Evangelatos,Thomas Lagkas,Vasileios Argyriou,Panagiotis Sarigiannidis,Iraklis Varlamis,Georgios Th. Papadopoulos*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文全面综述了深度学习驱动下的人脸表情识别（FER）领域的最新进展，将其划分为五个发展阶段，提出了多准则分类法，整理了公开数据集与性能对比，并讨论了当前挑战与未来方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度学习FER综述仅沿狭窄的任务、架构或应用轴展开，缺乏整体性、系统化的梳理，因此本文旨在填补这一空白，提供一个与更广泛的人脸情感识别（FAR）领域明确关联的全面综述。

Method: 本文采用多准则分类法，从识别任务、输入模态、人脸预处理流程、网络架构、学习策略、采集设置和应用领域七个互补维度分析文献，并辅以阶段性演进描述、数据集整理和定量性能对比。

Result: 描述了FER从手工特征到基础模型的五个发展阶段；构建了七轴分类体系并进行了比较分析；整理了公开数据集及其标注方案、模态和评估协议；编译了代表性方法的性能指标与定量对比。

Conclusion: 总结了当前挑战（如野外条件下的鲁棒性、跨域泛化等），并指出了有前景的未来研究方向，为后续研究提供了系统化的参考框架。

Abstract: Facial Expression Recognition (FER) has advanced rapidly over the last decade, driven by the shift from handcrafted descriptors and shallow classifiers to deep convolutional, attention-based, vision-language, and foundation-model architectures, and by the parallel growth of large-scale in-the-wild benchmarks spanning categorical, dimensional, compound, micro-expression, Action Unit (AU), and intensity-estimation tasks. Yet the deep learning-based FER landscape has so far been reviewed only along narrow task-, architecture-, or application-specific axes, leaving a holistic, systematically organized account of its recent advances missing. This survey addresses that gap with a comprehensive review of recent deep learning-based FER, explicitly linked to the wider Facial Affect Recognition (FAR) domain. Its main contributions are: a) A description of FER's evolution into five distinct phases, from handcrafted features and classical machine learning to attention-based, vision-language, and foundation-model approaches, with the key milestone works of each, b) A multi-criteria taxonomy analyzing the literature along seven complementary axes: recognition task, input modality, face pre-processing pipeline, network architecture, learning strategy, acquisition setting, and application domain, c) A per-criterion comparative analysis, with critical insights into the strengths and limitations of each category under in-the-wild conditions, d) A task-organized review of public FER datasets, with their annotation schemes, modalities, and evaluation protocols, e) A compilation of performance metrics and a per-task quantitative comparison of representative state-of-the-art methods on widely adopted benchmarks, and f) A discussion of current challenges and promising future directions.

</details>


### [121] [SSAFE: Simple and Strong AI-Generated Image Detection via Frozen Vision Encoders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08634)
*Seunghyun Lee,Byoungkwon Kim,Jaehyun Nam,Kyungmin Lee,Jinwoo Shin*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文发现冻结的多模态视觉表示本身就能区分真实与合成图像，仅用10K张图片和线性分类器即可实现高效且鲁棒的AI生成图像检测，优于需要大量数据的现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度伪造检测方法依赖大量真实-伪造数据集，但随着生成器不断涌现，维护大规模数据集日益困难，亟需更高效、鲁棒的检测方案。

Method: (1) 利用冻结的多模态编码器提取图像特征，无需微调；(2) 提出representation-aware数据策展策略，仅选择少量代表性生成器；(3) 在嵌入空间上训练简单线性分类器。

Result: 仅用10K张图片（对比AIGIBench的288K和OpenFake的4M）即可实现强性能，对未见生成器和分布漂移具有更好的鲁棒性，并在多个基准上取得优异结果。

Conclusion: 冻结的多模态表示+精心策展的少量训练数据是一种简单有效的AI生成图像检测方案。

Abstract: The rapid advancement of generative models has blurred the boundary between synthetic and real imagery, creating an urgent need for reliable deepfake detection. Yet most existing approaches rely on massive real--fake datasets, which are increasingly difficult to maintain as new generators continue to emerge. In this work, we investigate how much information about image authenticity is already encoded in modern multimodal vision representations. We find that frozen multimodal encoders naturally separate real and synthetic images in their embedding space, enabling a simple linear classifier to achieve strong performance without task-specific fine-tuning. Motivated by this observation, we develop a representation-aware data curation strategy that selects a compact set of representative generators for training. The resulting training set contains only 10K images, compared to 288K in AIGIBench and 4M in OpenFake, while improving robustness to unseen generators and distribution shifts. We additionally introduce RealWorldBench, a benchmark consisting of modern camera photographs, contemporary stock images, and outputs from recent commercial generators. Experiments across multiple benchmarks show that combining frozen multimodal representations with carefully curated training data provides a simple and effective approach to AI-generated image detection.

</details>


### [122] [Learnable Token Sparsification for Efficient Gigapixel Whole Slide Image Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08641)
*Jingzhi Chen,Landi He,Zhuo Chen,Shawn Young,Lijian Xu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种可训练的稀疏化框架，通过可微分Soft Top-K和硬性Hard Top-K操作，将全切片图像的视觉token压缩至仅32个（原始长度的0.78%），在SlideBench (TCGA)上达到73.32%的准确率，同时实现零样本泛化，解决了计算瓶颈与稀疏诊断证据稀释问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法依赖空间下采样或启发式剪枝策略，这类无训练方法会丢弃散落分布但具有临床意义的病理模式，无法处理十亿像素级全切片图像中视觉token过多的问题。

Method: 将token缩减重构为可训练的稀疏化问题，提出解耦路由架构。训练时通过SparseLearn组件（包含方差保持噪声门控+可微分Soft Top-K算子+对角注意力去噪器）实现梯度传播；推理时丢弃SparseLearn，使用确定性Hard Top-K保留32个最高分token。

Result: SlideBench (TCGA)准确率73.32%，超越基于采样的基线和通用VLM；在SlideBench (BCNB)和WSI VQA*上展现强零样本泛化能力；压缩比高达0.78%。

Conclusion: 通过解决视觉上下文瓶颈并防止稀疏诊断证据稀释，为端到端十亿像素全切片图像推理提供了一种高效范式。

Abstract: The processing of gigapixel whole slide images within vision language models faces a major difficulty due to an excessive number of visual tokens. Existing solutions typically rely on spatial downsampling or heuristic pruning strategies that operate without training, and these methods often discard subtle but clinically meaningful patterns because pathological evidence is scattered irregularly across the tissue. To overcome this limitation, we reformulate token reduction in whole slide images as a trainable sparsification problem, allowing the model to learn an optimal selection strategy instead of following fixed heuristics. We propose a decoupled routing architecture. To enable gradient propagation through the nondifferentiable pruning operation during training, we introduce a component called SparseLearn. This component uses a variance-preserving noise gate that regulates the information flow of each patch via a differentiable Soft Top-K operator, together with a diagonal attention denoiser that recovers perturbed representations without leaking spatial information. At inference time, the SparseLearn module is entirely discarded, and the trained scorer applies a deterministic Hard Top-K operator to keep only the highest scoring 32 tokens, incurring no extra computation. By compressing the visual sequence down to a sparse set of just 32 tokens, which represents as little as 0.78% of the original length, our framework achieves 73.32% overall accuracy on SlideBench (TCGA), consistently surpassing sampling-based baselines and general-purpose vision language models. It also demonstrates strong zero shot generalization on SlideBench (BCNB) and WSI VQA*. By resolving the visual context bottleneck and preventing the dilution of sparse diagnostic evidence, this work provides a highly efficient paradigm for end to end gigapixel whole slide image reasoning.

</details>


### [123] [An Enhanced Geometric-Spectral Feature Learning Framework for Airborne Multispectral Point Cloud Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09123)
*Xian Li,Yanfeng Gu,Aleksandra Pižurica*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个基于注意力机制的增强几何-光谱特征学习框架，用于解决机载多光谱点云分类中的高维异构、样本不平衡和类间相似性等问题，在两个数据集上验证了方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多光谱点云（MPC）在土地覆盖分类中潜力巨大，但面临三大挑战：高维异构空间-光谱信息的表示能力有限、样本分布不平衡、以及类间光谱相似性，现有模型难以有效应对。

Method: 提出两流特征融合框架：第一流通过融合自注意力提取位置编码的全局光谱特征；第二流通过多核点卷积和特征聚合注意力提取光谱引导的几何特征；并设计了残差注意力融合块整合最有信息的几何-光谱特征，同时提出联合损失函数提升对不平衡和类间相似样本的学习能力。

Result: 在两个机载MPC数据集上的实验结果表明，所提方法在分类性能上优于现有的最先进方法。

Conclusion: 基于注意力的两流特征融合框架能有效提升多光谱点云分类的表示能力，联合损失函数有助于缓解样本不平衡和类间相似问题。代码和数据集已开源。

Abstract: Multispectral point cloud (MPC) is composed of 3D spatial-spectral information, which holds tremendous potential for accurate land-cover classification. However, the representation power of classification models is limited by inherent high-dimensional and heterogeneous spatial-spectral information, unbalanced sample distribution, and inter-class spectral similarity of airborne MPCs. We build two MPC datasets and propose an enhanced geometric-spectral feature learning framework based on attentions for airborne MPC classification. A key component in our model is a two-stream feature fusion method with attention mechanisms, which enhances the representation capability of spatial-spectral features from high-dimensional heterogeneous MPCs. The first stream aims to extract position-encoded global spectral features with fusion self-attention, and the second stream comprises a multikernel point convolution and feature aggregation attention to extract spectral-guided geometric features. We then develop a residual attention fusion block to integrate the most informative geometric-spectral features from the two parallel streams. Another important contribution of this work is a joint loss function to improve the learning ability on unbalanced and interclass similar samples. Experimental results on two airborne MPC datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method compared with the state-of-the-art methods. Furthermore, the codes and datasets used in this paper will be made available freely at https://github.com/HITlixian/TGRS_GSFF.

</details>


### [124] [Decoding Pedestrian Crossing Intention from Egocentric Vision via Vision Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09142)
*Danya Li,Xiang Su,Yan Feng,Rico Krueger*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文研究从短时第一人称视频片段中解码行人过街意图，将其建模为闭集视觉问答任务，利用视觉语言模型进行预测。零样本测试表现一般，但通过参数高效微调，模型性能大幅提升，超过专用Transformer基线9%；结合自我运动、车辆运动和眼动等上下文线索后，Qwen3-VL-2B模型准确率提升14.5%，达到新SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 第一人称视角在交通安全性预测中的潜力尚未被充分挖掘，现有方法缺乏对行人过街意图的有效解码能力。

Method: 将行人意图解码构建为闭集VQA任务，采用视觉语言模型（VLMs）进行零样本评估，随后使用参数高效微调（PEFT）适配目标任务，并融合自我运动、车辆运动和眼动等多模态上下文线索。

Result: 微调模型相比零样本模型性能显著提升，超过专用Transformer基线9%；结合眼动和自身运动的Qwen3-VL-2B模型提升14.5%，达到新SOTA。

Conclusion: 视觉语言模型结合参数高效微调与多模态上下文线索，能够有效解码第一人称视角下的行人过街意图，为交通安全预测提供了新范式。

Abstract: Egocentric vision offers a first-person view of human perception and decision making, yet its potential for traffic-safety prediction remains underexplored. In this work, we study the decoding of pedestrian crossing intentions from short egocentric video clips. We approach this by formulating the task as a closed-ended visual question answering (VQA) problem and leveraging vision language models (VLMs) to predict the pedestrians' intent. We first benchmark three families of state-of-the-art VLMs in a zero-shot setting, finding that they achieve moderate gains over random guessing but exhibit limited higher-level traffic reasoning. Motivated by these findings, we further adapt VLMs to the target task using parameter-efficient fine-tuning. Our results show that the fine-tuned models substantially outperform their zero-shot counterparts and achieve a 9\% accuracy improvement over a specialized transformer-based baseline. Finally, we demonstrate that incorporating additional contextual cues, including ego motion, vehicle motion, and eye gaze, further improves predictive performance. In particular, the fine-tuned Qwen3-VL-2B model guided by eye gaze and ego motion achieves a 14.5% accuracy improvement over the transformer baseline, establishing a new state of the art for egocentric pedestrian intent decoding.

</details>


### [125] [WaveDiT: Distribution-Aware Wavelet Flow Matching for Efficient 3D Brain MRI Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08670)
*Danilo Danese,Angela Lombardi,Giuseppe Fasano,Matteo Attimonelli,Tommaso Di Noia*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: WaveDiT提出了一种在3D Haar离散小波变换系数空间中进行条件流匹配的框架，通过分解时空注意力与波段异方差不确定性建模，实现了在单GPU上全分辨率3D脑MRI合成，在脑龄预测和解剖一致性上优于现有基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模且人口统计学平衡的神经影像数据集对可靠的生物标志物至关重要，但全分辨率3D脑MRI合成要么计算成本过高，要么依赖有损潜压缩损害解剖细节，缺乏实用高效的3D生成增强方案。

Method: 在3D Haar离散小波变换系数空间上构建条件流匹配框架；采用分解的时空注意力机制；利用高阶小波统计量进行波段异方差不确定性建模，将预测的对数方差直接集成到流目标函数和条件通路中。

Result: 在单GPU上实现全分辨率3D合成；多站点队列评估显示生成与真实MRI分布对齐更好；在脑龄预测和区域级解剖一致性上优于扩散模型、潜空间模型及基于小波的基线方法。

Conclusion: WaveDiT通过小波域流匹配与自适应不确定性建模，在有限计算资源下实现了高质量的全分辨率3D脑MRI合成，为数据增强提供了实用方案。

Abstract: Large and demographically balanced datasets are essential for reliable neuroimaging biomarkers. Full-resolution 3D brain MRI synthesis can support data augmentation in this setting, but existing approaches either incur prohibitive computational cost at volumetric scale or rely on lossy latent compression that may compromise anatomical detail. As a result, practical 3D generative augmentation often requires specialized compute infrastructure. We propose WaveDiT, a conditional flow matching framework operating in the coefficient space of a 3D Haar Discrete Wavelet Transform. The model combines factorized spatio-depth attention with band-wise heteroscedastic uncertainty modeling derived from higher-order wavelet statistics. Predicted log-variance is integrated directly into both the flow objective and conditioning pathway, enabling adaptive precision consistent with the heavy-tailed and input-dependent variance structure of anatomical detail. This formulation supports full-resolution 3D synthesis under practical memory and time constraints on a single modern GPU. Evaluation on a multi-site cohort demonstrates improved alignment between generated and real MRI distributions, together with enhanced downstream brain age prediction and region-level anatomical agreement relative to diffusion, latent, and wavelet-based baselines. Code is available at https://github.com/sisinflab/WaveDiT

</details>


### [126] [Distortion-Aware PETR for BEV Object Detection with Mixed Pinhole-Fisheye Cameras](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08680)
*Xiangzhong Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出DAPETR，一种针对鱼眼相机3D目标检测的投影无关方法，通过可学习的畸变感知位置编码和双向特征-几何协同调制模块，在KITTI-360基准上超越基线，并发现可学习策略与显式几何重参数化存在负交互。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 鱼眼相机因低成本和大视场角被广泛用于自动驾驶感知系统，但其严重的径向畸变破坏了BEV检测器的均匀采样假设，现有方法未能充分利用其潜力。

Method: 提出DAPETR框架，包含两个可学习自适应模块：1) 统一畸变感知位置编码（将鱼眼几何结构融入位置编码）；2) 双向特征-几何协同调制模块（使图像特征与3D位置编码相互自适应）。

Result: 在KITTI-360基准上，DAPETR优于基线PETR和PolarPETR；同时发现可学习自适应与显式几何重参数化（极坐标变换）结合时存在负交互，两者策略会相互冲突。

Conclusion: DAPETR推进了鱼眼BEV检测的研究，证明除图像校正外，有效的畸变感知3D感知设计是可行方向，并为后续设计提供关键洞察。

Abstract: Fisheye cameras are widely deployed in autonomous driving perception suites for their low cost and full-coverage field of view (FOV), yet their potential remains underleveraged in 3D object detection. Severe radial distortion challenges most BEV detectors by violating the fundamental assumption of uniform sampling. To bridge this gap, we propose Distortion-Aware PETR (DAPETR), a projection-free detector tailored for mixed pinhole-fisheye camera setups. DAPETR incorporates two key learned-adaptive modules: a unified distortion-aware positional embedding that harmonizes positional encodings for image representations with fisheye geometry, and a bidirectional feature-geometry co-modulation module that mutually adapts image features and 3D positional embeddings. In our experiments on a converted KITTI-360 benchmark, we systematically compare our learned adaptive approach against PETR in polar coordinates (PolarPETR). We find that while both methods improve over the baseline, our learned modules achieve superior performance. Crucially, we uncover a negative interaction when combining both strategies, revealing that learned adaptation and explicit geometric reparameterization can conflict. Our final DAPETR model significantly advances the research and benchmark for fisheye BEV detection, providing critical insights into effective distortion-aware 3D perception design other than image rectification.

</details>


### [127] [BLUE: Toward Better Language Use in Efficient Vision-Language-Action Models for Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08684)
*George Ling,Lijin Yang,Hao Yang,Zhongzhan Huang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: BLUE是一种轻量级方法，通过在冻结的VLA隐藏状态上训练仅0.11M参数的“门控”模块，按帧决定是否激活语言生成，在自动驾驶中实现2.54倍推理加速和SOTA性能（Bench2Drive 76.2%成功率，Longest6 v2 36驾驶分数）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型每帧都生成语言描述，但语言仅在少数路线上有用，大部分计算被浪费在不需要语言的帧上。作者希望找到一种高效方法，仅在需要时激活语言生成。

Method: 在冻结的VLA隐藏状态上训练一个轻量级门控模块（0.11M参数），根据每帧隐藏状态判断是否激活语言生成，若不需要则直接预测动作，无需修改骨干网络或额外人工标注。

Result: Bench2Drive上76.2%成功率，Longest6 v2上36驾驶分数，2.54倍推理加速，相比骨干网络提升8.9%成功率。

Conclusion: VLA模型可以在保持语言优势的同时大幅降低计算成本，BLUE提供了一条实用的高效语言增强自动驾驶路径。

Abstract: We present BLUE, a minimal method for better language use in vision-language-action (VLA) models for autonomous driving (AD). Through extensive analysis, we reveal that language matters on only a small fraction of routes, but on those routes it can greatly improve or degrade performance. Generating language at every frame is therefore inefficient, since most computation is spent on frames that do not benefit from language. We further show that pretrained VLA hidden states potentially already encode whether language will benefit a given frame, even though scene complexity and kinematic features alone struggle to predict this. Based on this finding, BLUE trains a lightweight gate on frozen VLA hidden states to decide per frame whether to activate language generation or predict actions directly, without modifying the backbone or requiring additional human annotation. With just a 0.11M-parameter gate, BLUE sets a new state of the art on both benchmarks, achieving 76.2% success rate on Bench2Drive and 36 driving score on Longest6 v2, while delivering 2.54x inference speedup and 8.9% success rate improvement over the backbone. BLUE provides a practical path toward efficient language-augmented AD, showing that VLA models can retain the benefits of language at a fraction of the cost. Our code, data, logs and checkpoints are fully available on https://github.com/George-Ling3/BLUE.

</details>


### [128] [Shift-Dependent Asymmetry: Orthogonal Inverse Low-Rank Adaptation for Federated Medical Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08687)
*Xingyue Zhao,Wenke Huang,Linghao Zhuang,Haoran Wu,Anwen Jiang,Zhifeng Wang,Wenwen He,Ming Feng,Mang Ye,Bo Xu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出逆非对称调优（IAT）方法，通过模块级个性化与子空间正交正则化，解决联邦LoRA在医学图像分割中编码器-解码器非对称性问题，提升泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦LoRA在医学图像分割中面临编码器-解码器非对称性：编码器受外观偏移主导，解码器受监督变化主导。统一聚合规则会混淆共享解剖结构与站点特定偏差，损害模型泛化。

Method: 1) IAT：通过个性化编码器模块吸收外观偏移，个性化解码器模块适应站点依赖监督，保留共享路径传递可迁移共识。2) 子空间正交正则化器：惩罚共享-局部更新方向间的共线性，缓解LoRA双线性参数化导致的站点特定信息泄漏。

Result: 在多个医学图像分割任务上，IAT方法持续优于强联邦LoRA基线及参数高效联邦学习基线。

Conclusion: 针对联邦LoRA在医学分割中的编码器-解码器非对称问题，IAT通过结构解耦与正则化约束有效分离共享与站点特定信息，提升联邦泛化性能。

Abstract: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) enables efficient federated fine-tuning of segmentation foundation models for medical imaging. However, most federated LoRA methods adopt a uniform aggregation rule, which breaks under the encoder-decoder asymmetry in medical segmentation: the encoder is dominated by appearance shifts, while the decoder is dominated by supervision variations. This mismatch entangles shared anatomy with site-specific biases and harms generalization. To address this, we propose Inverse Asymmetric Tuning (IAT). IAT aligns adaptation with heterogeneity sources by personalizing module-specific components in the encoder to absorb appearance shifts and in the decoder to accommodate site-dependent supervision, while retaining a shared pathway for transferable consensus. However, structural separation alone is insufficient under LoRA's bilinear parameterization, where multiplicative coupling can still cause site-specific updates to leak into the shared direction. We therefore introduce a Subspace Orthogonality Regularizer that penalizes shared-local collinearity in the effective update space, mitigating leakage without extra communication. Experiments show consistent improvements over strong federated LoRA and parameter-efficient FL baselines.

</details>


### [129] [EgoTactile: Learning Grasp Pressure for Everyday Objects from Egocentric Video](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09243)
*Yuan Zeng,Yujia Shi,Tiao Tan,Xingting Li,Yaqi Qin,Zongqing Lu,Wenming Yang,Jing-Hao Xue,Qingmin Liao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出EgoTactile基准数据集和EgoPressureDiff条件扩散框架，从第一人称视频中估计全手抓取压力，通过结合预训练视频扩散先验和物理信息特征修正层，实现了对复杂3D物体交互中接触模式的有效推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于视觉的手部压力估计方法多局限于平面表面或指尖接触，难以泛化到复杂3D物体交互；而密集触觉传感依赖侵入式硬件，缺乏从自然场景中推断全手抓取压力的能力。

Method: 构建EgoTactile基准（含裸手迁移子集），提出EgoPressureFormer作为判别基线；进一步提出EgoPressureDiff条件扩散框架，适配大规模预训练视频扩散骨干，结合物理信息特征修正层注入语义约束，解决部分观测下的不确定性。

Result: 所提方法在基准上性能优越，且能鲁棒迁移到野外真实场景。

Conclusion: 视觉+扩散先验+物理约束的结合能有效从第一人称视频推断全手抓取压力，为沉浸式VR和机器人操作提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Estimating full-hand grasp pressure from egocentric video is critical for immersive VR and robotic manipulation, yet dense tactile sensing often relies on intrusive hardware. Existing vision-based methods predominantly rely on planar surfaces or fingertip contacts, failing to generalize to complex 3D object interactions. Therefore, we introduce EgoTactile, a benchmark pairing egocentric video with full-hand pressure supervision for diverse everyday objects, incorporating a bare-hand transfer subset to enable generalization to natural scenarios. Leveraging this benchmark, we first establish EgoPressureFormer as a discriminative baseline. Beyond this, to explicitly address the uncertainty in partial observations, we propose EgoPressureDiff, a conditional diffusion framework that adapts a large-scale pre-trained video diffusion backbone. By combining rich world knowledge priors with a Physically-Informed Feature Rectification layer to inject semantic constraints, our approach effectively infers plausible contact patterns and resolves visual-physical ambiguities. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance on the benchmark and robust transferability to in-the-wild scenarios. Our project page is available at https://egotactile.github.io/.

</details>


### [130] [PRPO: Perception-Reinforced Policy Optimization via Token-Level Dynamic Advantage Reshaping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08708)
*Qiming Li,Tianlun Li,Xiaolong Cheng,Hangyu Li,Ruiyan Gong,Kangning Niu,Kaitao Jiang,Mu Xu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出PRPO，一种令牌级强化学习框架，通过识别和强化多模态推理中关键的感知令牌，解决传统RLVR粗粒度信用分配问题，在7个基准测试上显著提升LVLM推理性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RLVR方法对轨迹级结果奖励进行粗粒度信用分配，所有生成令牌获得相同学习信号，这与多模态推理不匹配——只有稀疏的感知令牌与视觉证据因果关联，关键感知令牌被语言先验或推理模板令牌淹没，监督信号薄弱。

Method: 提出感知强化策略优化(PRPO)：1) 鲁棒视觉依赖(RVD)指标，识别既视觉依赖又扰动稳定的令牌；2) 感知优势重塑(PAR)，令牌级信用分配技术，放大感知信息令牌信号，同时保持非感知令牌梯度稳定。

Result: 在7个多模态推理基准上，3B和7B模型规模分别平均提升23.3%和21.1%，达到SOTA，训练效率更高且跨任务泛化更强。

Conclusion: 细粒度信用分配对于可扩展的多模态强化学习至关重要。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has become an effective paradigm for improving the reasoning capability of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs). However, existing RLVR methods primarily rely on trajectory-level outcome rewards, which assign identical learning signals across all generated tokens. This coarse-grained credit assignment is fundamentally mismatched to multimodal reasoning, where only a sparse subset of tokens is causally grounded in visual evidence. Consequently, these pivotal perceptual tokens receive weak supervision and are often overwhelmed by language priors or reasoning-template tokens. To address this limitation, we propose Perception-Reinforced Policy Optimization (PRPO), a token-level reinforcement learning framework that explicitly identifies and reinforces pivotal perceptual tokens within long-horizon multimodal reasoning trajectories. PRPO introduces Robust Visual Dependency (RVD), a principled metric that identifies tokens whose predictions are both visually grounded and perturbation-stable, filtering out brittle or noisy visual tokens. Based on RVD, we further propose Perceptual Advantage Reshaping (PAR), a token-level credit assignment technique that amplifies perceptually informative tokens while preserving stable gradients for non-perceptual tokens. Extensive experiments on seven multimodal reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that PRPO consistently outperforms strong LVLM baselines across both 3B and 7B model scales, achieving average gains of 23.3% and 21.1%, respectively. PRPO achieves state-of-the-art performance with improved training efficiency and stronger cross-task generalization. Our findings highlight the importance of fine-grained credit assignment for scalable multimodal reinforcement learning.

</details>


### [131] [Proposal Refinement for Few-Shot Object Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09245)
*Yuan Zeng,Bin Song,Jie Guo,Yuwen Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种通过优化提案分布不均衡问题来提升小样本目标检测性能的方法，包括基础训练阶段的refinement loss和微调阶段的refinement branch，在不增加推理时间的情况下实现SOTA，比基线方法提升1%~6%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有小样本目标检测算法大多依赖小样本分类性能，忽略了新颖类与基类之间区域提案分布不均衡的问题。本文旨在通过缓解这种不均衡分布来提升检测性能。

Method: 提出提案精炼方法：(1) 基础训练阶段设计refinement loss，增强模型对新颖类的敏感性；(2) 微调阶段引入refinement branch作为RPN的辅助分支，生成更多新颖类提案。通过重新平衡提案分布来改善检测效果。

Result: 在现有基准上，该方法比基线方法提升约1%~6%，且不增加任何推理时间，达到了新的SOTA。

Conclusion: 通过聚焦提案分布不均衡问题而非依赖分类性能，本文提出的提案精炼方法有效提升了小样本目标检测的性能，证明了平衡提案分布是该任务中的关键因素。

Abstract: Few-shot object detection has gained widely attention in recent years. Some excellent algorithms have been proposed to handle this task. However, most of these algorithms rely on the performance of few-shot classification. Unlike previous attempts, our work focuses on the problem of unbalanced distribution of region proposals between the novel classes and the base classes. In order to alleviate this unbalanced distribution, we propose the proposal refinement approach for different training phases. Specifically, refinement loss is designed for the base training phase to enhance sensitivity of the model to novel classes, and refinement branch is introduced as an auxiliary branch for RPN (Region Proposal Networks) to generate more novel proposals in the fine-tuning phase. By rebalancing the proposal distribution, the proposed approach outperforms the baselines methods by roughly 1\%$\sim$6\% on current benchmarks without increasing any inference time. Through extensive experiments, we prove that we establish a new state-of-the-art method for the few-shot object detection task.

</details>


### [132] [Thinking Without Images: Internalizing Visual Manipulation with On-Policy Self-Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08719)
*Yishuo Cai,Jiahui Liu,Yuanxin Liu,Haobo Deng,Linli Yao,Yuhao Zheng,Kun Ouyang,Zhimo Li,Ziyue Wang,Xu Sun,Haoli Bai,Xiaohui Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出Imagine-OPD框架，通过想象式推理内化"图像思维"的优势，在不实际调用视觉工具的情况下实现细粒度视觉推理，既保持性能又降低推理开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有"图像思维"方法虽然通过放大相关区域实现细粒度视觉推理，但存在工具调用冗余、推理轨迹长、中间结果噪声大等问题。作者想探索能否通过内部想象过程来内化这种推理能力，避免实际工具调用的开销。

Method: 提出Imagine-OPD框架，基于在线策略自蒸馏：教师模型在训练时使用标注区域提供的特权放大视图（"图像思维"推理器），监督学生模型自身的想象推理轨迹。无需外部教师或高质量想象演示。

Result: 在视觉中心基准测试中，Imagine-OPD在对比模型中取得最佳平均性能，同时相比"图像思维"方法显著降低推理开销。

Conclusion: 想象式推理可以内化"图像思维"的推理优势，在不牺牲性能的前提下大幅减少工具调用和推理成本，为高效细粒度视觉推理提供了新范式。

Abstract: ''Thinking with Images'' has emerged as an effective paradigm for fine-grained visual reasoning: by explicitly zooming into relevant regions and reasoning over crops, models can access local evidence that is difficult to recover from a single global image. However, this benefit comes with redundant tool invocations and longer inference traces. Moreover, when such behaviors are learned mainly from outcome reward, the resulting intermediate crops or visual cues can be noisy or fail to faithfully capture task-relevant visual evidence. In this work, we ask whether the reasoning benefits of ''Thinking with Images'' can be internalized through Thinking with Imagination: an internal process that decides where to look and imagines what visual cues closer inspection would reveal without actually invoking tools. We propose Imagine-OPD, an on-policy self-distillation framework in which a teacher plays the role of a ''Thinking with Images'' reasoner during training: it receives privileged zoomed evidence views derived from annotated regions, and supervises the model's own imagination reasoning trajectories. Imagine-OPD does not require an external teacher or high-quality imagination demonstrations. Experiments on vision-centric benchmarks show that Imagine-OPD achieves the best average performance among compared models while significantly reducing inference overhead compared with ''Thinking with Images'' methods.

</details>


### [133] [AUCp: Pseudo-AUC for Inference Model Selection with Unlabeled Validation Data in Abnormality Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08742)
*Md Mahfuzur Rahman Siddiquee,Fazle Rafsani,Jay Shah,Teresa Wu,Catherine D Chong,Todd J Schwedt,Baoxin Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出AUCp指标，用于无监督/自监督异常检测的模型选择，无需标注验证集，通过将测试集所有样本视为阳性计算AUC来评估模型，实验证明其优于传统指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有无监督异常检测方法虽无需标注训练数据，但模型选择时仍依赖标注验证集，而许多疾病缺乏标注数据且获取成本高。因此需要一种无需标注即可进行模型选择的指标。

Method: 提出AUCp指标：假设测试集中所有未标注样本均为异常/阳性，基于此伪标签计算传统AUC分数。在大量正常样本组成的代表性训练集上，数学和实验证明该指标可用于无监督/自监督方法的模型选择。

Result: 在神经疾病检测（两种无监督方法）以及多个数据集的自我监督方法上，AUCp能有效识别最优推理模型，显著提升异常和疾病检测性能，优于传统评价指标。

Conclusion: AUCp是一种有效且实用的无监督异常检测模型选择指标，摆脱了对标注验证集的依赖，适用于标注稀缺的医学图像分析场景。

Abstract: Abnormality detection is a crucial yet challenging task in medical image analysis. Distinguishing abnormalities from normal data by learning to reconstruct normal-only data alleviates the reliance on labeled datasets. However, many studies, even if unsupervised, rely on a labeled validation set to select the best model for inference from multiple training iterations. For many diseases labeled data are unavailable and substantially time consuming to obtain. To address this, AUCp - a novel metric that supports abnormality detection for unsupervised and self-supervised methods is proposed. Instead of evaluating the realism of reconstructed images to select the best of model for inference, it focuses on actual detection performance and without requiring an annotated test set. Assuming the pseudo ground truth of all unannotated samples in the test set as abnormal/positive and using traditional AUC calculation, AUCp scores are derived. Given a large and representative training set of normal samples, we show mathematical and empirical evidence that model selection using AUCp scores improves disease detection in terms of unsupervised and self-supervised methods over conventional metrics. Using two unsupervised methods for neurologic disease detection and self-supervised methods on diverse datasets, our results demonstrate that the AUCp score effectively identifies the optimal model for inference, significantly enhancing abnormality and disease detection. The corresponding implementations are available in https://github.com/mahfuzmohammad/AUCp.

</details>


### [134] [MB-Loc: Multi-planar Bird's-eye-view Localization in outdoor LiDAR scenes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08744)
*Ayaan Choudhury,Preet Savalia,Anirudh Pydah,Avinash Sharma*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MB-Loc提出了一种轻量级且视角鲁棒的LiDAR全局定位框架，通过将3D点云投影为2.5D多平面鸟瞰图表示，结合KL正则化潜变量瓶颈和3D空间增强，在NCLT数据集上实现了超越现有最先进方法的实时定位性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于场景坐标回归（SCR）的LiDAR定位方法存在两大瓶颈：处理原始3D几何数据时计算效率极低，以及在不同传感器视角下性能显著下降。

Method: 1) 将输入LiDAR点云沿Z轴切片，投影为2.5D多平面鸟瞰图（BEV）表示，利用标准2D CNN处理；2) 引入KL正则化潜变量瓶颈，显式建模空间稀疏不确定性；3) 在平面投影前应用3D空间数据增强，强制网络学习视角不变特征。

Result: 在公开NCLT数据集上，MB-Loc优于当前最先进方法，且达到实时推理速度，计算效率显著超越传统3D-SCR架构。

Conclusion: 通过2.5D BEV表示替代重3D卷积，结合不确定性建模和视角增强，有效解决了SCR计算效率低和视角鲁棒性差的问题，为LiDAR全局定位提供了一种轻量级实用方案。

Abstract: Global LiDAR localization is a fundamental task for autonomous navigation systems. Recent methods perform Scene Coordinate Regression (SCR) and achieve superior accuracy over Absolute Pose Regression (APR) solutions by predicting dense 3D world coordinates. However, SCR approaches introduce two major bottlenecks: severe computational inefficiency from processing raw 3D geometries and significant performance degradation under varying sensor viewpoints. To address these limitations, we present MB-Loc, a lightweight and viewpoint-robust SCR framework. Instead of relying on heavy 3D convolutions, we project the input LiDAR scan into a 2.5D Multi-planar Bird's-Eye View (BEV) representation. By slicing the point-cloud along the Z-axis and mapping signed depths into discrete 2D planes, MB-Loc retains essential 3D geometric structures while exploiting the computational tractability of standard 2D CNNs. To handle the inherent sparsity of outdoor LiDAR, we introduce a KL-regularized latent bottleneck that explicitly models spatial uncertainty without injecting stochastic noise. Finally, to ensure rotation robustness, we apply 3D spatial augmentations prior to planar projection, forcing the network to implicitly learn viewpoint-invariant features. We perform extensive experiments on the publicly available NCLT dataset and demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms the current state-of-the-art. Operating at real-time inference speeds, MB-Loc significantly outperforms traditional 3D-SCR architectures in computational efficiency.

</details>


### [135] [Stain-Aware Wavelet Regularization for Instant Adversarial Purification in Histopathology](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08745)
*Zhe Li,Bernhard Kainz*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出Stain-Aware Wavelet Regularization (SAWR)框架，利用Haar变换的多级小波域正则化，在组织病理学图像中分层分离对抗扰动与诊断结构信息，并将频谱约束扩展到单个组织化学通道，实现与H&E染色生物学特性一致的频率调控，在保持纹理和频谱保真度的同时，将对抗鲁棒性提升高达10.69%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习在计算病理学中广泛应用，但神经网络对对抗扰动的敏感性带来了临床部署的安全隐患。在组织病理学图像中，高频对抗噪声与细微的诊断相关组织结构难以区分，这一问题尤为严峻。

Method: 提出Stain-Aware Wavelet Regularization (SAWR)框架：基于Haar变换的多级小波域正则化，分层解耦对抗扰动与诊断结构信息；将频谱约束扩展到H&E单个组织化学通道，实现与染色生物学特性一致的频率调控。

Result: 在即时净化框架中集成后，SAWR相比基线方法将对抗鲁棒性提升高达10.69%，同时在对抗扰动下保持纹理和频谱保真度。

Conclusion: SAWR通过小波域正则化与染色感知的频率调控，有效解决了组织病理学图像中高频对抗噪声与诊断结构难以区分的问题，为计算病理学的安全部署提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Deep learning has become prevalent in computational pathology pipelines that support tasks such as cancer screening and digital pathology analysis. However, the susceptibility of neural networks to adversarial perturbations raises safety concerns for reliable deployment in clinical practice. In histopathological images, this challenge is exacerbated by the difficulty of distinguishing high-frequency adversarial noise from subtle and diagnostically relevant tissue structures. To address this issue, we propose Stain-Aware Wavelet Regularization (SAWR), an adversarial purification framework that leverages multi-level wavelet-domain regularization based on Haar transform to hierarchically disentangle adversarial perturbations from diagnostic structural information. This spectral constraint is further extended to individual histological channels, enabling stain-specific frequency regulation consistent with the biological properties of Hematoxylin and Eosin. When integrated into an instant purification framework, SAWR improves adversarial robustness by up to 10.69\% over the baseline approach, while maintaining texture and spectral fidelity under adversarial perturbations.

</details>


### [136] [Less Is More: Training-Free Acceleration Framework of 3D Diffusion Models for Low-Count PET Denoising via Global-Local Trajectory Reduction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08751)
*Yuhan Liu,Scott M. Leonard,Marlee Crews,Muhannad Fadhel,Jinkui Hao,Tianqi Chen,Ryan J. Avery,Bo Zhou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种无需训练、即插即用的全局-局部跳步加速策略（Global-Local Skipping Strategy），通过全局去噪步跳跃和局部特征复用，在保持甚至提升重建质量的同时，将扩散模型用于3D PET去噪的推理速度提升一个数量级以上。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低计数PET可降低辐射剂量和缩短采集时间，但图像质量下降；扩散模型虽能恢复图像质量，但其迭代采样过程在3D高分辨率PET上计算代价极高，推理延迟大，阻碍临床部署。

Method: 提出无需重新训练的即插即用加速策略：(i) 全局跳步：利用噪声一致性变换从中间步骤初始化逆向扩散过程，大幅减少所需去噪步数；(ii) 局部特征重用：在相邻去噪步骤间复用变化缓慢的高层U-Net特征，减少单步计算量。

Result: 在18F-FDG、68Ga-DOTATATE、18F-PSMA等多种PET示踪剂上验证，加速超过一个数量级，重建性能相比全步基线提升或相当；盲法读者研究进一步确认了临床信心和感知诊断质量的提升。

Conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了扩散模型在低计数3D PET去噪中的推理延迟瓶颈，兼具加速与质量提升，具有良好的临床部署潜力。

Abstract: Accurate quantification and uptake measurement in PET are critical for assessing disease progression and supporting clinical decision-making. While high-count PET provides reliable image quality, the associated radiation dose and prolonged acquisition remain significant clinical concerns, motivating the adoption of low-count protocols. Diffusion-model-based methods have demonstrated strong potential for restoring low-count PET to near high-count quality, but their iterative sampling procedure becomes prohibitively expensive when applied to high-resolution 3D PET volumes, introducing substantial inference latency that limits practical clinical deployment. To address these challenges, we propose a training-free Global-Local Skipping Strategy that accelerates diffusion model-based 3D PET denoising while simultaneously improving reconstruction quality. The proposed method is plug-and-play and directly applicable to pre-trained diffusion models without retraining or architectural modification. Specifically, we introduce: (i) a global denoising step skipping strategy that initializes the reverse diffusion process from an intermediate denoising step using a noise-consistent transformation of the low-count input, substantially reducing the number of required denoising steps; and (ii) a local feature reuse shortcut that reuses slowly-varying high-level U-Net features across neighboring denoising steps, further reducing per-step computation while preserving image fidelity. We evaluate the proposed approach on multiple PET tracers from in-house and public datasets, including 18F-FDG PET, 68Ga-DOTATATE PET, and 18F-PSMA PET, demonstrating consistent acceleration of over an order of magnitude alongside improved or comparable reconstruction performance relative to the full-step baseline. Blinded reader studies further confirm enhanced clinical confidence and perceived diagnostic quality.

</details>


### [137] [Beyond Humans: Multispecies Animal Face Recognition Using Transfer Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09353)
*Maria De Marsico,Anil K. Jain,Annalaura Miglino*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文探讨利用预训练深度学习模型（FaceNet和Vision Transformer）进行迁移学习，实现基于面部识别的个体动物识别。在狗、灵长类和牛三类数据集上实验，ViT在狗数据集上表现最佳（验证准确率96.85%），整体上迁移学习在不同动物和任务上表现各异，部分超越现有最优方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有动物个体识别多依赖物理设备（如微芯片），存在侵入性强、难以远程实施等局限。面部识别可作为非侵入性、可远程且防伪的替代方案，但缺乏足够大的动物面部数据集来训练深度学习模型，因此需要探索迁移学习的可能性。

Method: 采用两种预训练模型作为骨干网络进行迁移学习：FaceNet（在大规模人脸数据库上预训练）和Vision Transformer ViT（在ImageNet上预训练）。在三个差异显著的动物面部数据集（狗、灵长类、牛）上进行验证和识别任务实验，并与各自领域当前最优的专门训练深度网络进行对比。

Result: 狗数据集上ViT达到最高性能：验证准确率96.85%，Rank-1识别率84.34%。灵长类结果尚可但性能因类别和任务而异，未全面超越SOTA。牛数据集上ViT超越SOTA，FaceNet也具竞争力。图像质量从高到低依次为狗、牛、灵长类。

Conclusion: 迁移学习在动物面部识别中具有潜力，尤其在狗和牛数据集上表现优异；但效果因动物类别、图像质量和任务类型而不同，需进一步研究针对特定场景的模型选择与优化。

Abstract: Individual animal recognition can be useful in the search for lost or stolen pets, the tracking of individuals of endangered species, and the recognition of animals in crowded farms. Present recognition techniques mostly use physical devices, e.g., microchips, often impractical and difficult to apply. These could be replaced by remote recognition via the animal's face; if accurate enough, it provides several advantages: it is non-invasive, can work at a distance, and is difficult to counterfeit, as, for instance, in the case of substituting sick animals for healthy ones in the food industry. The few existing datasets with sufficient per-subject images annotated with a single animal identity are not large enough to train current deep learning architectures. We rather investigate the possibility of transfer learning, exploiting pre-trained network models as backbones. Our experiments compared FaceNet, which is specifically trained on large databases of human faces, with the Vision Transformer (ViT) pre-trained on ImageNet, i.e., on object categories. We used three face datasets of very different animals: dogs, primates (lemurs, golden monkeys, and chimpanzees), and cattle. We report the results and, for each dataset, compare them with the state of the art (SOTA) ad hoc-trained deep networks. The capture conditions differ among the three datasets. Image quality (resolution, motion blur, diverse poses, etc.) decreases from dogs to cattle to primates. The best performance was achieved with dogs, where ViT reached a mean verification accuracy of 96.85% and a Rank-1 Identification Rate of 84.34%. The results for endangered primates are still encouraging, but performance varies across animal classes and tasks (verification or identification), and does not always outperform SOTA. For cattle, the ViT results outperform SOTA, while FaceNet is still competitive.

</details>


### [138] [Beyond Consistency: Preserving Temporal Structure in Zero-Shot Video Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08780)
*Deyin Liu,Yisheng Ding,Zhe Jin,Xiatian Zhu,Anjan Dutta,Lin Wu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 针对现有零样本视频编辑方法无法保留原始时间结构的问题，本文提出一种新方法，通过自适应视频分区、锚帧选取、clip-自适应令牌合并和交替组合策略，在保持语义连贯性的同时实现高效编辑，达到SOTA效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有零样本视频编辑方法虽能实现空间控制和基本时间一致性，但无法保留视频的原始时间结构（即高级叙事、节奏和语义流），导致长视频编辑结果叙事故意、语义模糊。

Method: 1) 基于特征相似性自适应将视频分割为语义不同的片段；2) 为每个片段选取代表性锚帧；3) 设计clip-自适应令牌合并策略，利用锚帧的语义主导性稳定编辑；4) 采用交替组合策略确保片段间无缝过渡同时保持语义区分。

Result: 实验结果表明该方法达到SOTA，成功平衡了原始时间结构保留与计算效率，为零样本视频编辑保真度设立了新基准。

Conclusion: 本文首次明确聚焦于保留源视频的时间结构，提出的方法有效解决了长视频编辑中的叙事连贯性和语义清晰度问题。

Abstract: Existing zero-shot video editing methods rely on pre-trained diffusion models, successfully achieving spatial control and basic temporal consistency but fundamentally fail to preserve the video's original temporal structure.This distinction is critical: temporal consistency ensures visual smoothness, but temporal structure dictates the video's high-level narrative, rhythm, and semantic flow. Without this preservation, the edited output, especially for long videos with complex semantic variations, becomes narratively incoherent and semantically ambiguous. To address this limitation, we introduce a novel zero-shot editing approach that, for the first time, explicitly focuses on preserving the source video's temporal structure. We achieve this by adaptively partitioning the video into semantically distinct clips based on feature similarity and selecting a representative anchor frame for each clip. To enhance both intra-clip fidelity and computational efficiency, we design a clip-adaptive token merging strategy which leverages the anchor's semantic dominance to stabilize the editing. Furthermore, we employ an alternating combination strategy that ensures seamless inter-clip transitions while maintaining semantic distinction. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art results, successfully balancing the preservation of original temporal structure with computational efficiency, and setting a new benchmark for zero-shot video editing fidelity.

</details>


### [139] [PhysScene: A Scene Graph Dataset for Scientific Visual Reasoning in Physics Experiments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09368)
*Minghao Zou,Qingtian Zeng,Shangkun Liu,Yanda Meng,Guanghui Yue,Baoquan Zhao,Abdulmotaleb El Saddik,Wei Zhou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出PhysScene，首个面向物理实验的场景图数据集，专注于科学实验场景中的仪器、装置和功能关系，为科学视觉推理提供新基准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有场景图数据集主要关注通用自然场景，缺乏对科学实验场景这种领域特定、功能导向场景的覆盖，限制了科学实验场景下的关系推理评估及智能监控分析应用的发展。

Method: 构建PhysScene数据集，聚焦物理实验场景中的专业仪器、结构化实验装置和功能关系，强调强语义约束和高关系密度，而非追求大规模数据量。

Result: PhysScene补充了现有基准，对已有场景解析算法提出新挑战，并为科学视觉推理提供了有价值的测试平台。

Conclusion: PhysScene作为首个物理实验场景图数据集，弥补了领域空白，通过强调功能逻辑依赖而非空间共现，推动了科学场景中的关系推理研究发展。

Abstract: Scene Graphs (SGs) provide structured representations of visual scenes by modeling objects and their pairwise relationships. Despite recent progress, existing datasets primarily focus on generic natural contexts, leaving domain-specific and function-oriented scenes largely underexplored. This limitation restricts the evaluation of relational reasoning in scientific experimental scenes, thereby hindering the development of intelligent monitoring, analysis, and related applications in such scenes. To address this gap, we introduce PhysScene, the first SG dataset tailored to physics experiments. PhysScene encompasses specialized instruments, structured experimental setups, and functional relations intrinsic to experimental environments, enabling reasoning that extends beyond spatial co-occurrence to logical dependencies. Rather than pursuing large data scale, PhysScene focuses on strong semantic constraints and high relation density in experimental scenes, posing new challenges for existing scene parsing algorithms while offering opportunities for further improvements. Extensive analyses and experiments show that PhysScene complements existing benchmarks and establishes a valuable testbed for advancing scientific visual reasoning. The dataset is publicly available at https://github.com/ZMH-SDUST/PhysScene.

</details>


### [140] [DeepMine-Mamba: Mitigating Information Dilution in Mamba-Based State Space Models for Document Image Binarization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08781)
*Sheng-Wei Chan,Yung-Che Wang,Hsin-Jui Pan,Chia-Min Lin,Jen-Shiun Chiang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出DeepMine-Mamba，一种基于Mamba的文档图像二值化框架，通过抗稀释门(Anti-Dilution Gate)解决状态空间传播中弱前景信号被稀释的问题，在DIBCO/H-DIBCO基准上取得竞争性表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文档图像二值化方法以CNN、Transformer或生成模型为主，Mamba-based状态空间模型尚未被充分探索；且直接使用Mamba进行特征传播时，弱前景信号（如淡墨迹、断裂字符、边界敏感笔画）会在长程建模中被稀释，导致细节丢失。

Method: 提出DeepMine-Mamba框架，核心组件为Anti-Dilution Gate（抗稀释门），该门控机制估计传播引起的特征变化，选择性恢复对笔画敏感的局部响应，同时抑制不必要的背景增强。

Result: 在DIBCO/H-DIBCO基准上采用严格的留一年份测试协议，整体性能具有竞争力，平均FM和Fps表现优异；消融实验证明Anti-Dilution Gate能有效改善笔画保存并减少感知上显著的二值化误差。

Conclusion: Mamba架构经适当增强（如抗稀释门）可有效应用于文档图像二值化任务，为未来在该方向上的进一步探索提供了基础。

Abstract: Document image binarization aims to separate foreground text from degraded backgrounds while preserving thin, broken, and low-contrast strokes. Although deep learning methods have improved binarization performance, most existing approaches rely on convolutional, transformer-based, or generative architectures, while Mamba-based state space models remain largely unexplored for this task. In this work, we investigate Mamba-based feature propagation and observe that direct state-space propagation may dilute weak foreground cues during long-range modeling, especially faint ink traces, fragmented characters, and boundary-sensitive stroke details. To address this problem, we propose DeepMine-Mamba, a Mamba-based binarization framework equipped with a novel Anti-Dilution Gate that estimates propagation-induced feature changes and selectively restores stroke-sensitive local responses while suppressing unnecessary background enhancement. Experiments on DIBCO/H-DIBCO benchmarks under a strict leave-one-year-out protocol show that DeepMine-Mamba achieves competitive overall performance, with strong average FM and Fps across benchmark years. Ablation results further demonstrate that the Anti-Dilution Gate improves stroke preservation and reduces perceptually significant binarization errors.

</details>


### [141] [MaskAlign: Token-Subset Representation Alignment for Efficient Diffusion Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08788)
*Lianyu Pang,Tianlin Pan,Cheng Da,Changqian Yu,Huan Yang,Kun Gai,Song Guo,Wenhan Luo*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 论文提出MaskAlign方法，通过随机token子集对齐和pre-mask token mixing，解决扩散模型与预训练视觉模型表示对齐中因噪声输入与干净图像特征不匹配导致的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有表示对齐方法存在根本性不匹配：扩散模型处理噪声输入（不同时间步可用信息不同），而参考特征来自干净图像。这种全token对齐可能让模型过度依赖完整token集合，影响训练稳定性和效率。

Method: 提出MaskAlign方法：1）在训练时对随机采样的token子集进行表示对齐，而非全token对齐；2）引入轻量级pre-mask token mixing模块，在masking前跨token共享信息，缓解直接丢弃token导致的信息损失。

Result: 发现全token对齐下，大对齐梯度范数的token呈现稳定空间偏好，说明对齐目标对token影响不均匀。MaskAlign通过token子集扰动使对齐行为更稳定。

Conclusion: MaskAlign通过token子集对齐策略减少了表示对齐对完整token集的依赖，配合token mixing模块，在保持对齐效果的同时提升了训练稳定性和生成质量。

Abstract: Representation alignment with pretrained vision models has recently shown strong potential for accelerating diffusion transformer training. By aligning intermediate diffusion features with clean-image representations from self-supervised vision encoders, existing methods improve convergence and generation quality. However, such alignment also introduces a non-trivial constraint: diffusion models operate on noisy inputs whose usable information varies across timesteps, while the reference features are extracted from clean images. In this paper, we revisit this mismatch from a token-level perspective. We find that, under full-token representation alignment, tokens with large alignment-gradient norms exhibit a stable spatial preference, suggesting that the alignment objective does not affect all tokens uniformly and may encourage the model to rely on the complete set of clean-image tokens. To address this issue, we propose MaskAlign, a token-subset representation alignment method that applies alignment to randomly sampled token subsets during training. By exposing the model to different token subsets across iterations, MaskAlign reduces the dependence of representation alignment on the complete token set and encourages alignment behavior that is more stable under token-subset perturbations. To mitigate the information loss caused by directly dropping tokens, we further introduce a lightweight pre-mask token mixing block that shares information across tokens before masking.

</details>


### [142] [PairWise Image Finder: An Open-source Tool for Finding Visually Aligned Street-Level Image Pairs for Urban Perception Studies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08795)
*Jussi Torkko*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了PairWise image finder工具，整合特征检测、匹配和语义分割，用于从街景影像中找出视觉对齐的图像对，支持纵向变化分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 仅靠元数据不足以可靠地找到视觉对齐的图像对，因此需要一种自动化的方法来量化不同时期街景图像之间的视觉对齐程度。

Method: 整合特征检测与匹配技术，并利用语义分割掩码来量化两张不同时期图像的视觉对齐质量，输出匹配特征比例、特征距离、覆盖率和语义掩码对齐度等指标。

Result: 通过纵向变化对比展示了工具的可用性，强调了视角在量化变化时的重要性。工具能够准确研究显式纵向变化并减少人工工作。

Conclusion: 该方法提供了一个可扩展的开源工具，帮助研究人员和利益相关者为城市分析、感知研究及相关应用找到高质量的图像对。

Abstract: Change detection and scene recognition techniques have been widely applied to Street View Imagery (SVI) to understand changes in scenes across the years. However, metadata alone is often insufficient to reliably find visually aligned image pairs. This study introduces the PairWise image finder, a tool that integrates feature detection and matching, supported by semantic segmentation masks to quantify the visual alignment of two images of varying time periods. The tool outputs the share of matched key features, the matched feature distance and coverage, and the alignment of semantic masks, which enables the user to filter image pairs depending on the alignment quality and use case. The visually aligned pairs derived from the tool can be used to accurately study explicit longitudinal change and help reduce manual effort for perception studies. The usability of the tool is demonstrated through a comparison of longitudinal changes, highlighting the importance of perspective when quantifying changes. The proposed method provides a scalable and open tool for researchers and stakeholders to find high-quality image pairs for urban analysis, perception and related applications.

</details>


### [143] [Real-time body pose non-verbal communication with a consistency-based reliability measure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09390)
*Alina Marcu,Dragos Costea,Cristina Lazar,Marius Leordeanu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文研究了仅通过2D人体姿态识别交流意图，发布了包含十种交流意图的真实人体姿态数据集，在嵌入式GPU上进行了多种模型的基准测试，并证明模型的自回归自一致性可作为无监督可靠性信号。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有资源未能独立研究身体运动这一信号：情感语料库通常结合了面部、声音和文本，而骨架动作识别数据集标注的是动作类别而非传达的信息。在需要低功耗、实时的人-机器人远距离通信场景（如救援任务）中，身体运动是可靠信号，但缺乏专用数据集和模型。

Method: 1) 发布包含十种交流意图的真实人体姿态数据集；2) 与多种其他数据集（真实/合成）进行对比；3) 在嵌入式GPU上进行多种模型（从骨架图分类器到联合运动预测网络）的基准测试；4) 提出自回归自一致性作为无监督可靠性信号并给出理论证明。

Result: 报告了各模型在嵌入式GPU上的性能指标和帧率；证明了自一致性预测正确的概率随一致步数增加而增长，并识别了自信预测仍可能出错的边界条件。

Conclusion: 身体运动是远距离人-机器人通信的有效信号；模型的自回归自一致性可作为无需监督的可靠性信号，其正确概率可被理论界定的方式。

Abstract: Body movement communicates intent at distances and in conditions where neither the face, nor speech can be captured. We study the recognition of communicative intent from 2D body pose alone. We argue that body motion is a reliable signal especially in scenarios that require real time low-cost on-device person-to-robot communication in long distance environments, such as rescue missions. However, existing resources do not isolate this signal. Affective corpora combine body, face, voice and text, while skeleton action-recognition benchmarks label the action performed rather than the message conveyed. We release a dataset of real frames of full-body pose covering ten communicative intents and we compare it against other real (IPC) and synthetic (MotionLCM, VEO3.1, Kimodo) ones that span a range of difficulty. We target systems that can run on a robot's limited onboard hardware. We benchmark multiple models, from skeleton graph classifiers to joint motion-forecasting networks, and report performance metrics together with frame rate on an embedded GPU (NVIDIA Orin~Nano), since speed matters as much as accuracy in our scenario. Finally, we show that a model's own autoregressive self-consistency works as an unsupervised reliability signal. We give a short proof that bounds the probability that a self-consistent prediction is correct, show that this probability grows with the number of consistent steps, and identify the conditions under which a confident prediction can still be false, benchmarked against industry-standard metrics.

</details>


### [144] [Classifying galaxies in the Galaxy10 DECals dataset using Inception and Residual CNNs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08826)
*Lanz Anthonee A. Lagman,Prospero C. Naval,Reinabelle C. Reyes*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文比较了ResNet101和InceptionV4在星系形态分类任务上的性能，两者均达到约90%的准确率，其中ResNet101表现更优，可作为未来星系图像分类pipeline的有效基础架构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着未来星系形态图像数据在数量和质量上的持续增长，需要探索在图像分类任务中成本效益高的深度学习架构。

Method: 在空间增强的Galaxy10 DECals数据集上，分别使用ResNet101和InceptionV4进行十类星系分类，并调整了各类别的图像数量。

Result: ResNet101和InceptionV4均达到约90%的准确率；在性能指标上，ResNet101优于InceptionV4。

Conclusion: 两种CNN架构均可作为未来巡天项目星系图像分类专用pipeline的稳健基础。

Abstract: Image data regarding galactic morphology is expected to increase both in quantity and quality for the next foreseeable years; thus it is important to explore which deep learning architectures adapted for image classification tasks are cost-effective. Residual and Inception networks are ideal for exploring classification convolutional neural networks (CNNs) due to their computational efficiency, achieved through techniques such as residual connections and parallelized inception modules, enabling deeper networks without excessively increasing computational complexity. In this work, we analyze the performance of ResNet101 and InceptionV4 on a spatially-augmented Galaxy10 DECals dataset. Retaining the ten-class classification of galaxies, we modify the image count of each class. We find that ResNet101 and InceptionV4 models achieved accuracies of $\sim$ 90%, comparable with reported performance in the literature. In terms of performance metrics, ResNet101 is superior to InceptionV4. Our results indicate that either of these CNN architectures could serve as a robust foundation for specialized pipelines for classification of galaxy images from upcoming surveys.

</details>


### [145] [CSFlow: Aligning Flow Matching with Human Contrast Sensitivity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08833)
*Malgorzata Galinska,Bart Pogodzinski,Jan Eric Lenssen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出CSFlow权重方案，将人眼对比敏感度函数(CSF)与流匹配的迭代去噪步骤相结合，通过调整不同频率的生成时序来提升图像生成质量，在FID、Inception Score和GenEval指标上分别提升4.7%、2.2%和2.5%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 真实图像的能量集中在低频，导致低频在扩散过程中比高频更早达到高信噪比，这自然形成了一种傅里叶空间中的软自回归结构。同时人眼对不同空间频率的对比敏感度不均匀（极低和极高频率需要更高对比度才能感知）。作者希望将这两个观察融合，提升生成图像的视觉真实感。

Method: (1) 提出一个度量方法，用于估计在每个反向流区间生成了哪些频率成分；(2) 通过将各噪声层级生成的频率与人眼对比敏感度对齐，得到时间步权重(CSFlow weights)。该方法仅需推理时的时间步修改或短时间微调即可应用。

Result: FID降低4.7%，Inception Score提升2.2%，GenEval得分提升2.5%。定性上生成图像视觉真实感更强，卡通感减弱。

Conclusion: 通过将人类视觉感知特性融入扩散模型的时序设计，可以显著提升生成图像的感知质量和真实感，且无需大量额外训练。

Abstract: We introduce Contrast Sensitive Flow (CSFlow), a weighting scheme that connects the human eye's Contrast Sensitivity Function (CSF) to the iterative denoising steps of flow matching. Because real-world images concentrate signal at low spatial frequencies, these components reach high signal-to-noise ratio earlier during continuous diffusion than high-frequency components. When generating images with diffusion or flow matching models, this induces a soft autoregressive structure in Fourier space, where coarse image content stabilizes before fine detail. Meanwhile, the human visual system is unequally sensitive to spatial frequencies: very low and very high frequencies require significantly higher contrast to be perceived. We for the first time merge these observations through two contributions: (1) a metric that estimates which frequencies are generated at each reverse flow interval and (2) timestep weights obtained by aligning the frequencies generated at each noise level with human contrast sensitivity. We validate our contributions experimentally showing that these weights can improve generative performance by lowering FID by 4.7%, increasing Inception Score by 2.2% and improving GenEval scores by 2.5% using inference-only timestep modification or short fine-tuning. Qualitatively, we find that our CSFlow weights lead to better visual realism and less cartoonish appearance of generated images.

</details>


### [146] [Geometry-Aware Fisheye-LiDAR Fusion for Robust 3D Object Detection in Low-Overlap Setups](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08844)
*Xiangzhong Liu,Xihao Wang,Hao Shen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出GA-HF框架，通过极坐标BEV网格提升鱼眼相机与LiDAR融合的3D检测性能，在三个基准上超越已有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有BEV融合算法将鱼眼图像强行映射到笛卡尔网格，导致严重特征畸变和信息损失；缺乏针对鱼眼-LiDAR融合的专用方法。

Method: 提出GA-HF框架，包含：(1) 畸变感知LSS模块将鱼眼特征提升至极坐标BEV网格；(2) 双注意力扭曲校正模块通过空间和通道注意力抑制畸变伪影；(3) 保留LiDAR特征的笛卡尔空间处理。

Result: KITTI-360上NDS提升4.2%；Dur360BEV上超越LiDAR-only和BEVFusion，显著降低朝向误差；Fisheye3DOD上达到最高检测分数。

Conclusion: GA-HF是首个LiDAR-鱼眼相机融合方法，证明了极坐标BEV表示和注意力校正机制对稀疏视角传感器配置的有效性。

Abstract: As autonomous systems expand from capital-intensive robotaxis to cost-sensitive logistics, sensor configurations are increasingly optimized for coverage-per-cost.
