TL;DR: 提出了一套基於CGFD的低資源微調流程，用於繁體中文IEP自動生成，在無GCD推理路徑下達到了超越GPT-5.4等強基線的BERTScore F1=0.779，且實現了完全本地化的隱私保護推理解決方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 撰寫IEP是一項高勞動強度、知識密集的文書負擔；生成式AI雖能顯著減少草擬時間，但繁體中文領域因數據稀缺、隱私法規嚴格、缺乏評估基準而幾乎未被探索。

Method: 提出CGFD低資源微調流程：(1)基於tau閾值與flag-aware評分選取25份雙專家高分種子；(2)從種子提取FeatureProfile注入LLM提示搭配多樣性控制；(3)以15份專家黃金種子為擴散錨點，生成567份有效擴展樣本形成582份訓練集，用QLoRA微調Breeze-7B；(4)推理時可選GCD強制約束層級式SMART目標階梯結構。

Result: 在55樣本測試中，無GCD路徑達成100% schema通過率且延遲降低34%；在10份正式留出集上，無GCD推理路徑BERTScore F1=0.779，超越GPT-5.4 (0.726)等所有零樣本基線。

Conclusion: 填補了繁體中文特殊教育NLP的空白，提供了在工業工程範式下可擴展、隱私保護的本地推理解決方案，並揭示了GCD在繁體中文token預算下反效果的新發現。

Abstract: Writing Individualized Education Programs (IEPs) is a high-labor, knowledge-intensive document burden; English-language research has demonstrated that generative AI can significantly reduce drafting time, yet automated IEP generation in Traditional Chinese remains virtually unexplored due to domain data scarcity, strict privacy regulations, and the absence of local evaluation benchmarks. We propose a low-resource fine-tuning pipeline centered on Corpus-Grounded Feature Diffusion (CGFD): (1) 25 dual-expert high-score seed transcripts are selected via a tau threshold with flag-aware score caps; (2) a FeatureProfile (sentence length, structure, quantification templates) is extracted from seeds and injected into LLM prompts alongside Verbalized-Sampling-style diversity control to drive diffusion; (3) 15 expert gold seeds are used as diffusion anchors, targeting 585 samples; 567 valid diffusion samples are obtained, yielding a 582-sample training set used to fine-tune Breeze-7B with QLoRA; (4) schema-constrained inference via Grammar-Constrained Decoding (GCD) enforces a hierarchical SMART Goal Ladder schema at inference time. Ablation results on a 55-sample schema stress set reveal an unexpected finding: GCD is counterproductive under Traditional Chinese token budgets -- the no-GCD path achieves 100% schema pass rate at 34% lower median latency, outperforming GCD on both reliability and speed. On the n=10 formal hold-out, the no-GCD inference path achieves BERTScore F1 = 0.779, exceeding GPT-5.4 (0.726), DeepSeek-V3.2 (0.703), Gemini-3-Flash-Preview (0.703), and Llama-4-Maverick (0.700) zero-shot baselines while maintaining fully local, air-gapped inference. This system addresses a gap in Traditional Chinese special-education NLP and offers a scalable, privacy-preserving local inference solution under an industrial engineering paradigm.

</details>


### [369] [AGENTSERVESIM: A Hardware-aware Simulator for Multi-Turn LLM Agent Serving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09613)
*Rakibul Hasan Rajib,Mengxin Zheng,Qian Lou*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出AGENTSERVESIM，一个面向多轮LLM智能体服务（含工具调用）的硬件感知模拟器。它通过程序级粒度模拟（程序编排器、工具模拟器、会话感知路由、KV驻留模型）来评估服务策略，在CPU上即可达到6%以内的真实系统复现精度，避免了昂贵加速器的部署成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多轮LLM智能体的服务负载涉及程序级上下文（回合依赖、工具调用间隙、KV缓存复用），现有LLM服务模拟器仅针对无状态请求，缺失智能体服务的核心动态（多轮程序执行、跨回合缓存局部性、工具间隙期间的KV驻留）。直接在真实系统上评估策略成本过高，因此需要一个可扩展、低成本的模拟方案。

Method: AGENTSERVESIM由四个可组合模块构成：(1) 程序编排器-维护程序身份与回合顺序；(2) 工具模拟器-模拟工具调用导致的间隙；(3) 会话感知路由器-维护程序到实例的亲和性实现缓存感知调度；(4) KV驻留模型-追踪策略定义的KV放置（HBM/主机DRAM/CXL/驱逐）。

Result: 在真实服务部署与多种硬件配置下，AGENTSERVESIM在关键性能指标上与真实系统的误差在6%以内，且完全运行在普通CPU上。

Conclusion: AGENTSERVESIM能够在不依赖昂贵加速器大规模部署的情况下，实现对智能体服务策略的受控、可重复探索，为LLM智能体服务系统的研究与优化提供了高效模拟基础。

Abstract: Multi-turn LLM agents interleave model calls with external tool invocations, shifting serving from stateless request processing to stateful program execution. Serving these workloads requires scheduling, KV-cache management, and routing policies that use program-level context, including turn dependencies, tool-induced gaps, and reusable KV state. Evaluating such policies directly on real systems is costly, since each design point may require dedicated accelerator time across arrival rates, model scales, serving-instance counts, and memory hierarchies. Simulation offers a scalable alternative, but existing LLM serving simulators target stateless request-level workloads and therefore omit the core dynamics of agent serving: multi-turn program execution, cross-turn cache locality, and KV-cache residency during tool gaps. We present AGENTSERVESIM, a hardware-aware simulator for multi-turn LLM agent serving. AGENTSERVESIM evaluates serving policies at program granularity through composable modules: a Program Orchestrator preserves program identity and turn order, a Tool Simulator materializes tool-induced gaps, a Session-Aware Router maintains program-to-instance affinity for cache-aware dispatch, and a KV Residency Model tracks policy-defined KV placement across HBM, host DRAM/CXL, and eviction. Across real serving deployments and hardware configurations, AGENTSERVESIM reproduces real-system behavior within 6% error across key performance metrics while running entirely on commodity CPUs. These results show that AGENTSERVESIM enables controlled, repeatable exploration of agent-serving policies without requiring exhaustive deployment on costly accelerators.

</details>


### [370] [Civil Court Simulation with Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09632)
*Yifan Chen,Haitao Li,Kaiyuan Zhang,Yueyue Wu,Qingyao Ai,Yiqun Liu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出一个面向中国民事案件的多智能体法庭模拟框架，通过五阶段民事审判流程、记忆模块和法条检索机制，实现了可靠的责任分配与多项目裁决，并系统分析了影响模拟可靠性的五大因素。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有法庭模拟主要聚焦刑事案件，而民事案件更为常见、诉讼请求更灵活、责任认定与救济方式更复杂，目前缺乏有效的可扩展模拟方案。

Method: 构建多智能体法庭模拟框架，采用五阶段民事审判程序组织角色交互，集成记忆模块（Memory Module）和法条检索（Statute Retrieval）机制来支持长流程审判。

Result: 框架能够产生可靠的民事判决，在责任分配和多项目裁决方面表现突出；记忆质量显著影响下游模拟质量；通过五层因素框架分析了法律基础、信息条件、司法能力与角色导向、组织压力及社会语境对模拟可靠性的影响。

Conclusion: 提出的多智能体框架对民事法庭模拟有效，数据集和代码已开源。

Abstract: Court simulation bridges legal education and judicial practice, yet human-based simulations are costly and difficult to scale. Large language models (LLMs) offer a scalable alternative, but existing court-simulation research mainly focuses on criminal cases. Civil litigation is more common in practice and harder to simulate because its claims, liability, and remedies are more flexible. We present a multi-agent court simulation framework for Chinese civil cases. The framework organizes role-based interaction through a five-stage civil trial procedure and integrates memory module and statute retrieval to support long-process adjudication. Experiments show that the framework produces reliable civil judgments, with clear strengths in liability allocation and multi-item adjudication. Further experiments show that memory quality substantially affects downstream simulation quality. Through a five-layer factor framework, we analyze how legal grounding, information conditions, judicial capability and role orientation, organizational pressure, and social context affect the framework's reliability and behavior. These results support the effectiveness of the proposed framework for civil court simulation. The dataset and code are available at: https://github.com/foggpoy/Civil-Court.

</details>


### [371] [Gradient-Guided Reward Optimization for Inference-time Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09635)
*Hankun Lin,Ruqi Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出GGRO，一种轻量级的推理时对齐方法，通过在解码过程中利用梯度信号注入引导令牌，在不确定区域进行最小干预，从而提升LLM在分布漂移下的安全性、helpfulness和推理能力，并增强对reward hacking的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有推理时对齐方法（如Best-of-N、拒绝采样）受限于两个问题：1）性能受限于基座模型的生成质量；2）依赖不完美的奖励模型，易受reward hacking影响。需要一种更轻量、干预更精准的推理时对齐方法。

Method: GGRO方法在解码时监控token级熵，识别高不确定性区域（表示漂移或对齐问题）；检测到后，利用现成奖励模型的梯度信号生成"引导令牌"（nudging tokens），主动调整生成轨迹，而非事后重排序样本。

Result: 在安全、helpfulness和推理等多个基准测试上，GGRO持续提升推理时对齐效果；增加了高质量响应的覆盖率，增强了对reward hacking的鲁棒性，且计算开销极小。

Conclusion: GGRO提供了一种高效、鲁棒的推理时对齐替代方案，通过梯度引导的定向干预克服了传统方法的根本局限，适用于分布漂移下的实际部署场景。

Abstract: Ensuring the reliability of Large Language Models (LLMs) under distribution drift requires inference-time adaptation. While inference-time alignment methods such as Best-of-$N$ and rejection sampling are widely used, they frame the task as a sampling-intensive, reward-guided search, leading to two key limitations: their performance is bounded by the base model's generation quality, and their reliance on imperfect reward models makes them vulnerable to reward hacking. To address these challenges, we introduce Gradient-Guided Reward Optimization (GGRO), a lightweight inference-time method that performs targeted, minimal intervention during decoding via gradient guidance. Specifically, GGRO monitors token-level entropy to identify high-uncertainty regions indicative of drift or misalignment. Upon detection, it responds by injecting nudging tokens, generated using gradient signals from an off-the-shelf reward model, to steer the generation trajectory rather than merely re-ranking samples. Experiments show that GGRO consistently improves inference-time alignment across safety, helpfulness, and reasoning benchmarks. It also increases coverage of high-quality responses and robustness to reward hacking, with minimal computational overhead. Code is available at https://github.com/lhk2004/GGRO.

</details>


### [372] [Where Does the Answer Come From? Benchmarking View-Level Visual Evidence Identification in Multi-View MLLMs for Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09644)
*Yimu Wang,Yee Man Choi,Barry Zhang,Mozhgan Nasr Azadani,Sean Sedwards,Krzysztof Czarnecki*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个用于多视角自动驾驶场景的视觉问答基准，专门评估MLLM是否基于正确的相机视角证据来回答问题，而非仅看答案正确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MLLM在多视角驾驶场景中可能给出看似合理的答案，但实际依据了错误的相机视角（即grounding错误），而传统仅看答案准确率的评估方式无法发现这一问题。

Method: 基于NuScenes数据集构建了122个冲突导向的问答对，涵盖因果推理、反事实推理和意图预测；通过自动冲突挖掘和人工标注确定支持性相机视角；设计了三种评估设置（视角选择、oracle QA、联合预测），并采用精确匹配和LLM评判两种评估方式。

Result: 该基准能够暴露仅靠答案准确率评估无法发现的grounding失败问题，即模型可能答对问题却依据了错误的相机视角。

Conclusion: 将视觉来源识别与答案正确性分离评估，能更有效地诊断MLLM在多视角场景中的视觉推理缺陷，推动更可靠的自动驾驶视觉推理评估。

Abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) achieve strong results on visual reasoning benchmarks, but answer accuracy alone does not indicate whether a model relied on the correct visual evidence. This gap is particularly important in multi-view driving scenes used for autonomous driving, where a model can produce a plausible answer while grounding it in the wrong camera view. We introduce a multi-view visual question answering benchmark for evaluating evidence-source identification: given six synchronized NuScenes views and a question, the model must identify the supporting camera view and answer the question. The benchmark contains 122 conflict-centric question-answer pairs from 73 scenes, spanning causality, counterfactual reasoning, and intent prediction. View labels are proposed by an automatic conflict-mining pipeline and manually verified by annotators. We evaluate three settings: camera-view selection, oracle QA given the golden view, and joint prediction in which the model selects a view and answers in one pass. Answers are evaluated in both multiple-choice and free-form formats, using exact match for structured predictions and an LLM judge for free-form responses. By explicitly separating visual-source identification from answer correctness, the benchmark exposes grounding failures that answer-only evaluation misses.

</details>


### [373] [Beyond Accuracy: Community Perspectives on Machine Translation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09655)
*Yujun Wang,Ehud Reiter,Shimei Pan,Steffen Eger,Wei Zhao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文首次大规模分析四个利益相关社区（AI开发者、专业译者、语言学习者、语言服务商）在社交媒体上对机器翻译技术的讨论，发现这些社区在翻译质量、效率、可靠性等话题上存在显著分歧甚至冲突，原因在于AI社区将其视为技术问题，而非AI用户社区更关注质量细节、时间节省、用户信任和社会议题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器翻译技术进步显著，但非AI社区对MT系统存在越来越多的担忧，技术发展与真实用户需求之间存在明显差距。研究者关注基准性能，而最终用户关心伦理、信任、可靠性和成本等问题。作者认为倾听不同用户社区的需求至关重要，以使研究努力朝着社区真正关心的问题方向推进。

Method: 收集了2019至2025年间来自Reddit、Facebook、Bluesky和Mastodon的79,286条帖子和评论，分析四个利益相关社区（AI开发者、专业译者、语言学习者、语言服务商）在社交媒体上对MT技术的讨论，考察这些社区在哪些问题上存在分歧、分歧的方式及原因。

Result: 各社区在翻译质量、效率和可靠性等话题上经常存在分歧，甚至因情感极化而表现出强烈冲突。AI社区将这些问题框架化为技术和计算问题，而非AI（用户）社区更关注质量细微差别、时间节省、用户信任和更广泛的社会议题。

Conclusion: 为了缩小技术发展与用户需求之间的差距，MT研究应更多地倾听不同用户社区的声音，关注非AI社区所关心的质量细节、信任和社会议题，而不仅仅是追求基准性能的提升。

Abstract: Despite remarkable progress in machine translation (MT), non-AI communities have raised growing concerns about MT systems, suggesting a noticeable gap between technical advancement and the needs of real-world users. For instance, while NLP researchers focus on benchmark performance, end users care about ethical concerns, trust, reliability, costs, and more. We argue that listening to various user communities is essential so that research efforts would be directed towards the problems that the communities care about. To this end, we present a large-scale analysis, for the first time, that investigates what four stakeholder communities (AI developers, professional translators, language learners, and language service providers) post about MT technology on social media. To do so, we construct a dataset of 79,286 posts and comments from Reddit, Facebook, Bluesky, and Mastodon from 2019 to 2025, and analyse where these communities disagree, and how and why. Overall, we find that communities often disagree, and even show strong conflicts due to polarised sentiments on topics such as translation quality, efficiency, and reliability. This is because these communities approach these topics differently: the AI community frames them as technical and computational problems, while non-AI (user) communities care more about quality nuances, time savings, user trust, and broader social issues.

</details>


### [374] [End-to-End Context Compression at Scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09659)
*Ang Li,Sean McLeish,Haozhe Chen,Nimit Kalra,Zaiqian Chen,Artem Gazizov,Venkata Anoop Suhas Kumar Morisetty,Bhavya Kailkhura,Harshitha Menon,Zhuang Liu,Brian R. Bartoldson,Tom Goldstein,Sanae Lotfi,Micah Goldblum,Pavel Izmailov*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Latent Context Language Models (LCLMs)，一种编码器-解码器压缩器，通过架构搜索和预训练（350B tokens），在压缩比1:4、1:8、1:16下，在通用任务性能、压缩速度和峰值内存使用上改进了帕累托前沿，可有效支持长上下文智能体。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长上下文语言模型推理受限于KV缓存随上下文长度增长而带来的内存瓶颈。现有KV缓存压缩方法要么严重降低模型质量，要么需要大量时间和计算来压缩单个长提示，且与现代生产推理引擎不兼容。编码器-解码器压缩器理论上很有吸引力，但现有方案在精度-效率前沿上不如KV缓存压缩。

Method: 1) 进行架构搜索，从头预训练多种变体以确定最佳的编码器-解码器压缩器设计和训练方式。2) 基于搜索发现，持续预训练一组0.6B编码器+4B解码器的模型，每个模型在超过350B tokens上训练，采用1:4、1:8和1:16的压缩比。3) 提出LCLMs（Latent Context Language Models）模型族。

Result: LCLMs在通用任务性能、压缩速度和峰值内存使用三个维度上均改进了帕累托前沿。作为长上下文智能体的骨干网络时，允许智能体快速浏览压缩后的长上下文，并按需自适应扩展相关片段。

Conclusion: 通过系统性的架构搜索和大规模预训练，重新审视并弥合了编码器-解码器压缩器与KV缓存压缩之间的差距，证明了LCLMs在长上下文推理中的有效性，特别是在长上下文智能体场景下。

Abstract: Long-context language model inference is bottlenecked by memory, as the KV cache grows with context length. Recent techniques to compress the KV cache fall short: they either degrade model quality substantially or require considerable time and compute to compress a single long prompt. Furthermore, many methods require the input to fit within the target model's context window, and are generally incompatible with modern production inference engines. Encoder-decoder compressors, which map a long token sequence to a shorter sequence of latent embeddings consumed by a decoder, are an appealing alternative in principle. However, existing approaches are not competitive with KV cache compression on the accuracy-efficiency frontier. In this work, we revisit encoder-decoder compression and close this gap. We first perform an architecture search, pre-training many variants from scratch to determine how best to design and train encoder-decoder compressors. Guided by our findings, we continually pre-train a family of 0.6B-encoder, 4B-decoder models on over 350B tokens each, at compression ratios of 1:4, 1:8, and 1:16. We introduce Latent Context Language Models (LCLMs), a family of compressors that improve the Pareto frontier across general-task performance, compression speed, and peak memory usage. We demonstrate that LCLMs serve as efficient backbones for long-horizon agents, letting the agent skim through a compressed long context and adaptively expand relevant segments on demand.

</details>


### [375] [When Built-in Thinking Helps and Hurts: Constraint-Level Error Shifts in Instruction Following](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09662)
*Sai Adith Senthil Kumar*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了推理模式（Thinking ON/OFF）对指令遵循能力的影响，发现思维链虽不显著改变整体通过率，但会导致10-20%的提示在通过/失败间翻转，且不同约束类型呈现相反趋势：Planning类提升、Precision类下降。通过注意力激活修补等技术进一步揭示了不同错误模式背后的机制差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型推理模型在数学和代码任务上表现优异，但其对指令遵循能力的影响尚不明确。已有研究多关注推理模型对结构化问题的提升，但指令遵循任务（如格式约束、计数要求等）是否受益于思维链尚待探索。

Method: 使用Qwen3系列模型（1.7B-32B）进行同权重的Thinking ON/OFF对照实验，辅以四个Hunyuan模型进行跨族验证。采用IFEval评估基准，引入cross-encoder相关性指标分析思维轨迹与合规性的关系，并通过激活修补（activation patching）分析不同错误类型的可恢复性。

Result: 整体通过率变化微小（-0.55到-3.52个百分点），但10-20%的提示在模式间翻转；Planning类（全局计数、结构、协调）在推理模式下改善，Precision类（精确局部形式）持续恶化，该模式在Hunyuan模型上方向一致；思维链改变输出长度，匹配长度分析后Precision惩罚大幅减少但仍存在残余；不同错误类型在思维轨迹相关性、激活可恢复性上呈现三种不同模式。

Conclusion: 推理模式不会均匀地损害或改善指令遵循，而是改变错误模式：对不同约束类型产生方向性相反的影响。Planning类受益于全局推理而Precision类因过度思考受损。研究揭示了推理与指令遵循之间的复杂权衡关系。

Abstract: Large reasoning models (LRMs) often improve math and coding performance, but their effect on instruction following is unclear. We study IFEval with Qwen3 models (1.7B-32B), using same-weights Thinking ON/OFF controls; four Hunyuan models provide directional cross-family support. Aggregate pass-rate changes are small (-0.55 to -3.52 pp), yet 10-20% of prompts switch between pass and fail across modes, suggesting that thinking changes the pattern of errors--some prompts improve while others worsen--rather than uniformly degrading performance. Under a post-hoc Qwen3-derived grouping, constraint types separate into Planning (global counting, structure, coordination), which improves at the class level under thinking, and Precision (exact local form), which consistently worsens; the class-level Planning/Precision sign pattern holds directionally for all four Hunyuan models despite Hunyuan's opposite aggregate direction. Thinking also changes final-answer length; matched-length analyses substantially reduce the Precision drop, but a residual penalty remains. Analyzing thinking traces with a cross-encoder relevance metric reveals three patterns: Neutral shows a positive relevance-compliance link (r approximately 0.15); Planning shows near-zero predictive correlation (r approximately 0.02) despite measurable trace engagement, consistent with an execution gap between CE-measured trace relevance and final-answer compliance; Precision shows a small negative correlation (r approximately -0.05), with failing instances having higher mean relevance than passing ones. Activation patching across four model sizes (1.7B-14B) shows that Precision flip instances are more often restored than Planning flip instances (32-58% vs. 14-40% mean layer-restoration), with the largest gap at 14B (about 30 pp).

</details>


### [376] [PsychoSafe: Eliciting Psychologically-Informed Refusals in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09697)
*Gianluca Barmina,Federico Torrielli,Sven Harms,Jacob Nielsen,Felix Mächtle,Stine Lyngsø Beltoft,Peter Schneider-Kamp,Thomas Eisenbarth,Lukas Galke Poech,Anne Lauscher*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出PsychoSafe框架，将大模型的拒绝机制重构为基于心理学的支持性沟通，在5个高风险领域提升拒绝质量28.1%，但存在域外泛化局限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在处理高危交互（危机、胁迫、意图升级）时，简单粗暴的拒绝虽能防止直接伤害，却无法满足请求者背后的真实需求，存在"帮助性与安全性"权衡的困境。

Method: 构建包含8019条提示-回复对、覆盖5个心理风险领域的语料库，采用提示工程和参数高效微调方法对Qwen 3.5 27B进行训练，并用LLM裁判及人工评分进行验证。

Result: 提示工程使拒绝质量整体提升28.1%（外部资源转介+46.8%，心理依据+34.8%）；微调实现近乎完美的拒绝与资源转介率，但降低了回复相关性；在SORRY-Bench和XSTest上域内鲁棒性强但域外泛化有限。

Conclusion: 结构化支持性拒绝是可行的改进方向，但未来需丰富微调数据的多样性，帮助模型学会选择性而非模式化地应用干预策略。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) routinely face requests that should be refused, creating a trade-off between helpfulness and harm prevention. However, refusals themselves can be helpful. In high-risk interactions involving crisis, coercion, or escalating intent, blunt non-compliance may prevent direct harm while still failing to support the needs of the person behind the request. We present PsychoSafe, a psychologically-informed refusal framework that reframes refusal as structured supportive communication grounded in evidence-based intervention strategies. To develop PsychoSafe, we construct a corpus of 8019 prompt-response pairs spanning five psychologically salient risk domains and apply prompting and parameter-efficient fine-tuning to Qwen 3.5 27B. On a balanced validation set of 500 prompts, evaluated with an LLM judge and validated through human ratings, PsychoSafe prompting improves overall refusal quality by 28.1% over a generic baseline, with particularly strong gains in external resource referral (+46.8%) and psychological grounding (+34.8%), while preserving downstream performance on non-refusal tasks. Fine-tuning achieves near-perfect refusal and resource-referral rates but reduces response relevance. Additional evaluations on SORRY-Bench and XSTest show strong in-domain robustness but limited out-of-domain generalization, suggesting that future work should diversify fine-tuning data to help models apply interventions selectively rather than schematically.

</details>


### [377] [Learning to Attack and Defend: Adaptive Red Teaming of Language Models via GRPO](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09701)
*Blake Bullwinkel,Eugenia Kim,Amanda Minnich,Mark Russinovich*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了AdvGRPO框架，通过密集多通道奖励和去耦优势归一化，使GRPO在攻防协同训练中变得可行，并产生高效可迁移的攻击和更鲁棒的防御模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI红队需要不断适应不断演进的攻击者和防御者，现有方法如PPO和DPO在协同训练中有效，但GRPO在该场景下不稳定。

Method: AdvGRPO框架：使用密集多通道奖励和去耦优势归一化，通过从单轮到闭环多轮攻击的课程学习，再启动交替更新的攻防协同训练。

Result: 该方法能产生高效且可迁移的攻击，协同训练的防御者在安全基准上优于基线模型。

Conclusion: AdvGRPO成功使GRPO适用于攻防协同训练，提升了攻击有效性和防御鲁棒性。

Abstract: AI red teaming must continually adapt to evolving attackers and defenders. Reinforcement learning offers a promising approach to discovering novel attacks, and co-training methods can produce more robust defenders in tandem. Recent works have demonstrated the efficacy of attacker-defender co-training by applying PPO and DPO, but report that GRPO is unstable in this setting. We introduce AdvGRPO, a co-training framework that makes GRPO viable for joint attacker-defender optimization using dense multi-channel rewards and decoupled advantage normalization. Training progresses through a curriculum from single-turn to closed-loop multi-turn attacks before bootstrapping co-training, where attacker and defender models are updated in alternation. We show that our method can produce highly effective and transferable attacks and that co-trained defenders outperform baselines on safety benchmarks.

</details>


### [378] [IS-CoT: Breaking the Long-form Generation Collapse via Interleaved Structural Thinking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09709)
*Zechen Sun,Yuyang Sun,Zecheng Tang,Juntao Li,Wenpeng Hu,Wenliang Chen,Zhunchen Luo,Guotong Geng,Min Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出IS-CoT框架，通过嵌入动态"规划-写作-反思"循环，解决LLM在长文本生成（>2000词）中的长度崩溃问题，训练IS-Writer-8B模型在长文本基准上取得SOTA效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM（包括推理增强模型）在开放域长文本生成中严重退步，超过2000词后性能急剧下降，原因是静态层次规划无法为长上下文提供动态指导。

Method: 提出Interleaved Structural Chain-of-Thought (IS-CoT)框架，内嵌动态Plan-Write-Reflect循环，通过多教师管道构建交错推理轨迹数据集，训练IS-Writer-8B模型。

Result: IS-Writer-8B在LongBench-Write上比DeepSeek-V3.2高出+3.08，长度合规性和连贯性与更大规模专有模型竞争。

Conclusion: 动态交错推理范式有效解决了长文本生成的长度崩溃问题，小模型也能通过该方法实现与大型专有模型相当的性能。

Abstract: Generating coherent and controllable long-form content remains a persistent challenge for Large Language Models (LLMs). While reasoning-enhanced models have demonstrated success in logic-intensive domains, our evaluation reveals that they suffer from a severe length collapse in open-ended writing, where performance degrades sharply as target lengths exceed 2,000 words. We attribute this failure to the limitation of static hierarchical planning, which struggles to provide dynamic guidance over extended contexts. To bridge this gap, we introduce the Interleaved Structural Chain-of-Thought (IS-CoT) framework. Unlike external agentic workflows, IS-CoT embeds a dynamic Plan-Write-Reflect cycle into the generation process, enabling continuous strategy adaptation and global alignment without additional assistance. Based on this framework, we construct a high-quality dataset of interleaved reasoning traces via a multi-teacher pipeline and train IS-Writer-8B. Experiments demonstrate that IS-Writer-8B achieves state-of-the-art performance on challenging long-form benchmarks (e.g., +3.08 vs. DeepSeek-V3.2 on LongBench-Write), exhibiting robust length compliance and coherence competitive with significantly larger proprietary models.

</details>


### [379] [The Neutral Mask: How RLHF Provides Shallow Alignment while Leaving Partisan Structure Intact in a Large Language Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09735)
*Wendy K. Tam*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文通过研究Llama 3.1 8B模型在RLHF前后的内部表征，发现RLHF并未移除模型中的党派倾向结构，而是通过切断党派几何特征到输出生成的因果路径来实现功能性的政治中立。这种对齐是功能性的而非结构性的，因此可以被轻易绕过。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RLHF（基于人类反馈的强化学习）是对齐训练的核心机制，但其编码"人类价值观"的过程不透明。研究者想揭示RLHF究竟编码了什么价值观、谁的价值观，以及它是如何编码的。

Method: 以Llama 3.1 8B模型为案例，比较基础模型和经过RLHF的Instruct模型在党派政治倾向上的内部表征差异。使用稀疏自编码器分解特征，并进行特征级引导实验。

Result: RLHF并未移除基础模型中的党派方向结构，而是压缩了党派信号的方差以生成平衡输出。基础模型中零星激活的政策编码特征在Instruct模型中完全失活。特征级引导实验证实了因果链条被切断。

Conclusion: RLHF通过切断而非移除价值相关结构来实现对齐，导致对齐模型的行为比其输出所显示的要脆弱。这种功能性的中立可以被轻易绕过，例如通过推断和放大用户的党派身份。

Abstract: The ambition behind alignment training is to make large language models safe and useful. The primary mechanism, reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF), shapes the behavior of deployed language models by aligning them with ``human values.'' Yet the process is opaque. What values are being encoded; whose values are they; and how does RLHF encode them? A growing body of evidence suggests that RLHF produces only functional compliance rather than deep alignment. We offer a mechanistic case study of this phenomenon for partisan political orientation with a comparison of the internal representations of Llama 3.1 8B before and after RLHF. We show that RLHF does not remove the structured partisan direction in the base model. Instead, it compresses the variance of the partisan signal to generate consistently balanced and non-partisan output. Sparse autoencoder decomposition reveals that policy-encoding features, which activate sporadically in the base model, are completely inactive in the Instruct model. Feature-level steering experiments confirm the causal disconnect. RLHF thus encodes a norm of political neutrality, not by erasing the model's knowledge of partisanship, but by severing the causal pathway from partisan geometry to output generation. Importantly, this neutrality is functional, not structural so that the underlying geometry that enables partisan steering remains intact. The mechanisms that bypass RLHF's guardrails, such as inferring and amplifying a user's partisan identity, reactivate partisan generation. If RLHF operates by disconnecting rather than removing value-laden structure, then the same pattern may hold for other value domains, and the aligned model's behavior may be more fragile than its outputs suggest.

</details>


### [380] [Data Synthesis and Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning for Low-Resource NMT: A Case Study on Q'eqchi' Mayan](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09767)
*Alexander Chulzhanov,Soeren Eberhardt,Arjun Mukherjee*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文针对数字低资源原住民语言神经机器翻译中的数据稀缺问题，提出了一种无需爬取目标语言平行文本的数据合成方法。以Q'eqchi'玛雅语为例，将社区词典转化为大规模合成语料，结合LoRA适配器对mT5-base进行参数高效微调。域内评估表现良好（BLEU 42.02），但对有机词汇评估效果极差（BLEU 0.59），暴露出结构-语义鸿沟。研究表明合成引导是高效的结构入门，但需要真实数据进行语义精炼。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低资源原住民语言的神经机器翻译受限于极端数据稀缺，传统做法依赖网络爬取平行文本，但这可能侵犯数据主权。因此需要一种在不爬取目标语言平行文本的前提下，构建NMT模型的数据合成方法。

Method: 使用社区词典生成大规模合成语料，采用参数高效微调（PEFT）技术，通过LoRA适配器在mT5-base模型上进行训练。同时进行消融实验，探索多任务学习架构的影响。

Result: 在域内评估中BLUE达到42.02，表明模型成功习得复杂的黏着形态和VOS语序；但在有机词汇评估中BLUE仅为0.59，模型保持了语法完整性但缺乏自然语言的词汇基础。多任务学习导致负迁移，辅助任务与主任务在LoRA适配器的有限参数容量中竞争。

Conclusion: 合成引导是高效的结构入门方法，但需要真实数据通过课程学习进行语义精炼。现有方法存在结构-语义鸿沟，模型对合成模板的有限结构方差过拟合，难以适应自然语言的句法灵活性。

Abstract: Neural machine translation for digitally low-resource Indigenous languages is often hindered by extreme data scarcity, prompting reliance on extractive web-scraping. To ensure data sovereignty, this study introduces a data synthesis methodology to bootstrap NMT models without scraping target-language parallel text. Focusing on Q'eqchi' Mayan, we transformed community-sourced dictionaries into a massive synthetic corpus, utilizing Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) via LoRA adapters on an mT5-base model.
  In-domain evaluation demonstrates high structural acquisition (BLEU 42.02), proving that synthetic constraints effectively teach complex agglutinative morphology and VOS word order. However, evaluation against an organic glossary reveals a structural-semantic gap (BLEU 0.59), where the model maintains grammatical integrity but lacks the lexical grounding of natural language. The model exhibits overfitting to the constrained structural variance of the synthetic templates; despite high semantic entropy in the pipeline, it struggles with the syntactic fluidity of natural language, forcing organic inputs into rigid learned patterns. Furthermore, an ablation study utilizing a Multi-Task Learning architecture resulted in negative transfer, suggesting that auxiliary tasks competed for limited parameter capacity within the LoRA adapters, causing over-optimization for synthetic markers at the expense of organic flexibility. Ultimately, we establish that synthetic bootstrapping is a highly effective structural primer, but requires authentic data for semantic refinement via Curriculum Learning.

</details>


### [381] [Causally Evaluating the Learnability of Formal Language Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09822)
*Vésteinn Snæbjarnarson,Anej Svete,Josef Valvoda,Reda Boumasmoud,Brian DuSell,Ryan Cotterell*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文通过形式语言（概率有限自动机）作为受控实验平台，引入binning半环代数工具实现因果干预，证明标准的相关性评估方法在衡量子任务可学习性时存在根本性缺陷，并警告自然语言处理中的相关性陷阱。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究任务特定数据频率与可学习性之间的因果关系，解决自然语言场景中任务边界模糊、混杂因素干扰导致的评估困难。

Method: 1) 利用概率有限自动机生成形式语言作为受控实验环境；2) 提出binning半环（代数对象）精确控制目标属性在采样语料中的出现频率；3) 构建因果图模型形式化实验流程；4) 推导分解的KL散度指标衡量子任务可学习性。

Result: 因果干预下发现：不使用因果干预的相关性分析会因混杂变量得出错误结论；频率与可学习性之间的关系只有在因果框架下才能正确识别。

Conclusion: 标准相关性评估在子任务可学习性分析中具有根本性缺陷，必须采用因果推断方法；该结论对自然语言处理中的评估实践具有警示意义。

Abstract: Language models, as multi-task learners, acquire a wide range of abilities during training. A fundamental question is how much task-specific data is needed to learn a given task. Answering this for natural language is difficult: tasks are hard to delineate and can confound one another. To rigorously investigate the relationship between data frequency and learnability, we turn to a controlled setting using formal languages induced from probabilistic finite automata. These serve as a methodological testbed to demonstrate that standard correlational evaluation practices are inherently flawed. To enable causal analysis, we introduce the binning semiring, an algebraic object that lets us control how often a targeted property occurs in a sampled corpus. We formulate the experimental pipeline as a causal graphical model and derive decomposed Kullback-Leibler divergence metrics to measure the learnability of specific sub-tasks. Our experiments show that evaluating learnability without causal intervention leads to incorrect conclusions due to confounders in correlational analysis, and serve as a warning about correlational pitfalls in natural-language settings.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [382] [Offline Reinforcement Learning for Plasma Control in Nuclear Fusion: Codebase and Benchmark](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07550)
*Yang Fu,Haomin Bao,Rohit Sonker,Xiaoyan Hu,Aravind Venugopal,Jeff Schneider,Jiayu Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了RL4F，一个用于核聚变等离子体控制的离线强化学习基准，包含四个全剖面跟踪任务和基线比较，发现离线基于模型的RL方法在大多数目标上表现最佳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离线RL为从历史托卡马克数据开发等离子体控制器提供了有前景的途径，但由于缺乏标准化的离线RL基准来衡量进展，该方向的研究进展难以评估。

Method: 基于DIII-D托卡马克历史放电数据构建动力学环境，设计了旋转、密度、温度和压力四个全剖面跟踪任务，系统评估了多种模仿学习和离线RL基线方法。

Result: 离线基于模型的RL方法在大多数目标上获得最佳平均性能，但没有单一方法在所有任务中占优。

Conclusion: 动态建模在复杂长程等离子体控制任务中至关重要；开源了代码、数据集和评估框架，为聚变社区和离线RL算法开发提供了标准化基准。

Abstract: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) offers a promising route for developing plasma controllers from historical tokamak data, since online trial-and-error on real devices is costly and risky. However, progress in this direction remains difficult to measure due to the lack of a standardized offline RL benchmark for realistic multi-actuator, long-horizon plasma control problems in nuclear fusion. We introduce RL4F, an Offline Reinforcement Learning Benchmark for Plasma Control in Nuclear Fusion, providing closed-loop evaluation environments and baseline comparisons across four full-profile tracking tasks: rotation, density, temperature, and pressure. The dynamics function underlying the evaluation environment is built from historical discharge data from DIII-D, a real-world Tokamak. We evaluate a broad set of imitation learning and offline RL baselines under a unified protocol. We find that offline model-based RL methods obtain the best average performance on most objectives, although no single method dominates all tasks, highlighting the importance of dynamics modeling in complex, long-horizon plasma control tasks. To foster further research, we open-source the codebase, datasets, and evaluation framework, providing a benchmark not only for the fusion community but also for algorithm development in offline RL.

</details>


### [383] [MedicalRec: Medical recommender system for image classification without retraining](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07553)
*Roghayeh Taghavi,Aysa Hasanazde Bashkandi,Amir Ali Bengari,Mohammad Amin Raji,Mohammad Salahi Ardekani,Parisa Mardukhian,Parvaneh Rezaei,Ramin Mousa*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对医疗影像分类中深度学习模型选择耗能高、浪费多的问题，提出了一个基于Transformer的模型推荐系统MedicalRec，并构建了包含5000多条实验记录的公开数据集MedicalRec-Bench，在多个评估模式下最高HitRate@100达到75.5%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前机器学习/深度学习在医疗领域广泛应用，但模型选择依赖试错法，导致大量计算资源、能源消耗和碳排放浪费。研究者需要一种高效的方法来推荐最优分类模型，减少不必要的计算浪费。

Method: 1. 从3000篇医疗影像分类论文中收集数据，构建MedicalRec-Bench数据集（含5000+条记录，覆盖皮肤癌、肿瘤、伤口、乳腺癌、MRI等分类任务）。2. 按特征数量分为四个模式（MedicalRec I-IV，5-18个特征）。3. 采用Transformer架构的推荐模型MedicalRec进行物品推荐（item recommendation）。

Result: MedicalRec模型在数据集评估中表现优异，最高HitRate@100达到75.5%，并在与12个基线的对比中取得显著效果。

Conclusion: MedicalRec能够有效推荐医疗影像分类模型，减少试错带来的能源浪费；MedicalRec-Bench数据集为后续研究提供了基准资源。

Abstract: The emergence of machine learning and deep learning has revolutionized the efficiency of diagnostic, therapeutic, and administrative systems in healthcare. However, this rapid adoption has come at the cost of requiring significant computing power and energy consumption, as well as e-waste disposal and carbon emissions. One of the challenges of these models is choosing the right model for classification tasks. To this end, researchers attempt to identify the optimal model using their data through trial and error, which involves energy consumption and waste. The goal of this study is to develop a model-based recommender system for medical image classification. For this purpose, a data set was collected from 3,000 articles in the field of medical image classification. This dataset, publicly available under the name MedicalRec-Bench, contains over 5,000 records of models tested in various tasks, including Skin Cancer Classification, Tumour Classification, Wound Classification, Breast Cancer, and MRI classification. The dataset was evaluated in four different modes, depending on the number of features: MedicalRec I (5 features), MedicalRec II (9 features), MedicalRec III (11 features), and MedicalRec IV (18 features). Collecting all values for the features is challenging due to non-reporting by the authors; hence, the dataset contains significant amounts of missing values. The Medical Recommender System (MedicalRec) is a transformer-based model used for item recommendations in this study. This model achieved remarkable results in the evaluation on the dataset and in the evaluation with 12 base models. This model achieved a maximum HitRate@100 of 75.5%. The dataset and implementations are available through the GitHub link: https://github.com/Ramin1Mousa/MedicalRec

</details>


### [384] [SPIN: Decentralized Swarm Control via Tensorized Policy Coordination](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07557)
*Zhaowen Fan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SPIN框架，通过张量网络分解（MPS链）将多智能体联合策略评估从指数复杂度降至线性复杂度，并采用离线预训练+在线零样本重加权（Radon-Nikodým导数）的混合神经符号控制管线，实现了资源受限边缘平台上高效的去中心化群集智能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有去中心化多智能体群集协同在边缘平台上面临两大瓶颈：联合动作空间指数级扩展导致的计算爆炸，以及高延迟通信开销。亟需一种既能降低计算复杂度又无需高功耗在线训练的轻量级方案。

Method: 1) 将局部多智能体小团的联合策略张量分解为矩阵乘积态（MPS）链，将复杂度从$O(n^m)$降为$O(m·n·χ^2)$；2) 设计解耦的混合神经符号控制管线：离线预训练的多层神经网络将几何描述符映射为抽象环境目标度量；3) 运行时利用Radon-Nikodým导数作为零样本重要性重加权滤波器，实现即时行为适应。

Result: 在离散时间多智能体仿真沙箱中，涵盖追踪、去中心化分散/区域覆盖、多目标协同等任务。定性遥测显示：稳定的目标导向运动、去中心化约束下的抗坍塌空间扩散，以及跨多个目标的结构化子群形成。

Conclusion: SPIN框架为在资源受限、低功耗的边缘平台上实现可解耦的群集智能提供了一条数学上严谨的路径，通过张量网络压缩与离线-在线混合管线的结合，有效解决了计算与通信瓶颈。

Abstract: Decentralized multi-agent swarm coordination on resource-constrained edge platforms remains fundamentally bottlenecked by the exponential scaling of joint action spaces and high-latency communication overhead. This paper introduces the Swarm Policy Interference Network (SPIN) framework, an architectural paradigm that bypasses these limitations by modeling swarm topologies as a compressed tensor network. We factorize the joint policy tensors of local multi-agent cliques into Matrix Product State (MPS) chains, reducing the computational complexity of evaluation from an exponential $O(n^m)$ wall to a strictly linear $O(m \cdot n \cdot χ^2)$ constraint. To bridge local continuous spatial geometry with this discrete algebraic backend without requiring power-intensive online training loops, we introduce a decoupled, hybrid neuro-symbolic control pipeline. Local multi-layered neural networks operate as structural coordination encoders, pre-trained offline to nonlinearly map hand-engineered geometric descriptors into abstract environmental target measures. At runtime, edge agents execute instantaneous behavioral adaptations by applying the Radon-Nikodým derivative directly as a zero-shot importance-reweighting filter. We validate the framework within a discrete-time multi-agent simulation sandbox spanning tracking, decentralized dispersion/area coverage, and multi-goal coordination regimes. Qualitative telemetry demonstrates that the integrated pipeline achieves stable target-directed motion, anti-collapse spatial spreading under decentralized constraints, and structured subgroup formation across multiple targets, providing a mathematically grounded route to tractable, low-power edge swarm intelligence.

</details>


### [385] [Boundary Variance Inflation Causes Acquisition Bias in Gaussian Processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07561)
*Maria Bånkestad,Sanna Jarl,Jens Sjölund*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 高斯过程在有限域中使用平稳核会导致边界附近后验方差膨胀，进而引发采集函数偏差。本文通过几何机制解释了这一现象的原因，展示了不同采集函数的偏差模式，并提出了无函数依赖的选择轮廓诊断方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长期以来，高斯过程在有限域边界处的方差膨胀现象（以及由此导致的贝叶斯优化中过度探索问题）已被认识，但其根本原因和具体影响机制尚未被充分研究。

Method: 从几何机制入手，将边界偏差归因于核相关邻域在边界处被截断；分析三类采集函数（方差最大化、负积分后验方差、期望预测信息增益）的偏差模式；提出无目标函数的诊断工具来量化边界诱导的采集偏差。

Result: 方差最大化将采集点集中在角落；负积分后验方差和期望预测信息增益将采集点拉向轴对齐的内部壳层。这些模式与目标函数无关，采集行为可能被核几何主导而非任务相关的不确定性。

Conclusion: 边界诱导的采集偏差是核几何结构的系统性问题，且随维度增加而恶化；提出的诊断方法可适用于任意采集函数、核函数和有限域几何。

Abstract: Gaussian processes with stationary kernels on bounded domains exhibit inflated posterior variance near the boundary. Despite being a long-recognized artifact in geostatistics and a source of over-exploration in Bayesian optimization, the causes and effects of boundary-induced acquisition bias are underexplored. We trace the root cause to a simple geometric mechanism: the truncation of the kernel correlation neighborhood at the domain boundary creates an observation-independent distortion that worsens with dimensionality. We show how this distortion manifests across three acquisition classes: variance maximization concentrates selections at the corners, whereas negative integrated posterior variance and expected predictive information gain move selections inward to axis-aligned interior shells. These patterns arise without reference to any objective function, meaning that acquisition behavior can be dominated by kernel geometry rather than the desired task-specific uncertainty. To quantify this, we introduce a function-free selection-profile diagnostic for arbitrary acquisitions, kernels, and bounded-domain geometries.

</details>


### [386] [Emergence via Phase Transitions: Mechanism Landscapes and Universal Convergence Across Complex Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07563)
*Truong Xuan Khanh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出层次涌现框架（HEF），将涌现建模为机制景观中的相变，证明其物理可行性与收敛性，并通过111个模算术变换器实验验证——权重范数在grokking前系统性地达到峰值（92%运行），归一化精度塌缩为tanh扭结，所有grokked模型收敛到相同精度（0.9745±0.014），与初始化等条件无关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器学习、生物学和物理学中，独立演化系统往往在微观细节截然不同的情况下趋向于高度相似的高层结构（如grokking电路在不同随机种子下收敛、进化谱系重新发现类似代谢方案、重整化流趋向共同不动点）。现有理论缺乏一个统一的数学框架来解释这些跨学科的收敛现象。

Method: 提出HEF，将涌现建模为受热力学和信息论约束的机制景观中的相变。引入临界能量阈值Ec将过程分为探索机制竞争区与唯一最小成本机制收敛区，证明度量严格收缩和不依赖初始条件的唯一不动点表示，并通过有效信息（EI）和机制竞争熵连接因果涌现。在111个模算术grokking实验中验证。

Result: 1）92%实验观察到权重范数在grokking前系统性达到峰值，符合Ec相变指纹；2）归一化精度曲线塌缩到tanh扭结（R²=0.93），与Landau-Ginzburg普适类一致；3）所有grokked模型收敛到0.9745±0.014，不依赖初始化、权重衰减或训练比例（ANOVA p>0.13）。

Conclusion: HEF作为一个可证伪的数学框架，为跨复杂系统的收敛现象研究提供了统一视角。它不是普适的涌现理论，而是一个经过实验验证的严谨数学脚手架，特别在grokking现象上展现出强的预测能力和普适性。

Abstract: Across machine learning, biology, and physics, independently evolving systems often converge toward strikingly similar high-level structures despite radically different microscopic details. Grokking circuits converge across random seeds, evolutionary lineages rediscover similar metabolic solutions, and renormalization flows approach common fixed points. We propose the Hierarchical Emergence Framework (HEF) as a candidate universality framework for such convergence phenomena. HEF models emergence as a phase transition in a mechanism landscape constrained by thermodynamic and information-theoretic laws. The framework introduces a critical energy threshold Ec separating an exploration regime with competing mechanisms from a convergence regime governed by a unique minimum-cost mechanism. Under structural assumptions, we prove physical feasibility, derive strict metric contraction, and establish convergence toward a unique fixed-point representation independent of initial conditions. We further connect this convergence structure to causal emergence through Effective Information and mechanism competition entropy. To test the framework, we study delayed generalization ("grokking") in modular arithmetic transformers across 111 experiments. We identify a reproducible empirical fingerprint of the Ec transition: the weight norm peaks systematically before grokking in 92% of runs. Normalized accuracy curves collapse onto a tanh kink (R^2=0.93) consistent with a Landau-Ginzburg universality class, and all grokked models converge to 0.9745+/-0.014 regardless of initialization, weight decay, or training fraction (ANOVA p>0.13). HEF is not presented as a universal theory of emergence, but as a falsifiable mathematical scaffold for studying convergence phenomena across complex systems.

</details>


### [387] [STARIXNet: Multivariate and Multi-attribute Deep Learning Approach to Real-Time Resource Allocation in Cloud Platforms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07565)
*Ahmed Abdulaal,Maruf Aytekin,Thilaga kumaran Srinivasan,Tomer Lancewicki*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: STARIXNet是一个轻量级神经网络，通过在多元空间捕捉系统指标间的时空关系来指导微服务资源分配决策，在沃尔玛生产环境中实现了10%-50%的成本节省，同时提升了服务稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有微服务扩缩容方案局限于单变量（如仅CPU）、忽略多指标间的时空关联，且要么作为纯预测任务忽视低估风险，要么计算复杂难以实时部署。亟需一个轻量且考虑多变量关系的解决方案。

Method: 提出STARIXNet轻量神经网络，建模季节性(S)、时序(T)、自回归整合(ARI)和外生变量(X)等多重准依赖属性，通过聚合策略将服务稳定性置于首位、成本效率次之，而非追求原始预测精度。

Result: 在真实世界中与现有方案对比验证，部署于沃尔玛关键生产微服务后实现10%-50%的显性成本节省，并带来服务稳定性和客户体验提升等隐性收益。

Conclusion: STARIXNet通过多变量时空建模和以稳定性为先的聚合策略，在兼顾实时性与轻量化的前提下，显著优于现有单变量/纯预测方案，兼具成本效益与服务可靠性。

Abstract: Intelligent scaling of microservices in cloud platforms is crucial for mitigating escalating compute costs while avoiding service disruptions. Current solutions are limited to the univariate space, typically focusing on CPU usage alone to drive scaling decisions. Moreover, they address the problem as a purely forecasting task, focusing on prediction precision while neglecting the greater risks of underestimation and delays in system responsiveness. Alternative solutions are computationally complex, making them impractical for large-scale, real-time deployments. To address these challenges, we present STARIXNet, a lightweight neural network that guides resource allocation decisions in the multivariate space by capturing spatio-temporal relationships among multiple system metrics. STARIXNet models multiple quasi-dependent attributes, in particular the (S)easonal, (T)emporal, (A)uto-(R)egressive (I)ntegrated, and e(X)ogenous patterns, then implements an aggregation policy to finalize scaling decisions, prioritizing service stability, followed by cost-efficiency, over raw forecast accuracy. We empirically demonstrate the performance of STARIXNet by benchmarking against existing solutions in real-world settings. STARIXNet is deployed for critical production microservices at Walmart achieving tangible savings ranging from 10\% to 50\%, in addition to intangible benefits through improved service stability and customer experience.

</details>


### [388] [INFUSER: Influence-Guided Self-Evolution Improves Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09052)
*Siyu Chen,Miao Lu,Beining Wu,Heejune Sheen,Fengzhuo Zhang,Shuangning Li,Zhiyuan Li,Jose Blanchet,Tianhao Wang,Zhuoran Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: INFUSER 是一个迭代式协同训练框架，包含共同演化的生成器（从文档池中生成题目和参考答案）和求解器（通过训练提升推理能力）。生成器通过 DuGRPO（双重归一化 GRPO）优化，奖励信号基于影响力分数（衡量题目对求解器提升的实际贡献），而非简单的难度启发式。实验表明，在 Qwen3-8B-Base 上，INFUSER 在 Olympiad 和 SuperGPQA 上相对提升超 20%，且 8B 生成器优于冻结的 32B 思考型生成器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自我进化方法要么依赖大量人工或教师生成数据，要么在无监督生成时仅用难度启发式作为奖励信号，这些启发式并不一定能真正提升求解器的推理能力。

Method: INFUSER 提出双角色协同训练：生成器从文档池中生成题目和参考答案，求解器基于标准正确率奖励进行训练；生成器则通过影响分数（衡量题目对求解器目标分布性能的实际提升）得到奖励，并采用 DuGRPO（双重归一化 GRPO）优化该连续、高噪声的影响分数。

Result: 在 Qwen3-8B-Base 上，INFUSER 在 Olympiad 和 SuperGPQA 基准上相对提升超 20%；8B 生成器优于冻结的 32B 思考型生成器；消融实验验证了各设计组件的必要性；扩展到指令微调锚点和规则可验证的 RLVR 数据进一步展示了框架的灵活性。

Conclusion: INFUSER 通过将文档池转化为自适应课程，优先选择对当前求解器真正有用的题目而非单纯困难的题目，实现了更强的自我进化推理能力，且框架具有良好的通用性和可扩展性。

Abstract: Self-evolution offers a scalable path to stronger reasoning: a pretrained language model improves itself with only minimal external supervision. Yet existing methods either depend on extensively curated or teacher-generated training data, or, when the generator runs unsupervised, reward it by a difficulty heuristic that need not improve the solver. We introduce INFUSER, an iterative co-training framework with two co-evolving roles: a Generator that drafts questions and reference golden answers from a pool of unstructured, automatically collected documents, and a Solver that improves by training on them. The solver is trained with standard correctness rewards against the generator-provided answers, while the generator is rewarded by an optimizer-aware influence score that measures whether each proposed question would actually improve the solver on the target distribution. Because this continuous, noisy influence score is poorly served by standard GRPO, we propose DuGRPO, a dual-normalized variant of GRPO, for generator training. Together, these turn the document pool into an adaptive curriculum that favors questions useful to the current solver, not just hard ones. On Qwen3-8B-Base, INFUSER outperforms strong self-evolution baselines with over 20% relative improvement on Olympiad and SuperGPQA benchmarks, and an 8B INFUSER co-evolving generator outperforms a frozen 32B thinking generator on math and coding. Ablations confirm each design choice is necessary, and two extensions, applying INFUSER to an instruction-finetuned anchor and augmenting it with rule-verifiable RLVR data, further demonstrate the flexibility and generalizability of the framework. Code is available at https://github.com/FFishy-git/INFUSER.

</details>


### [389] [TriHead-GAN: A Generative Adversarial Network with Triple-Head Discriminator for Carbon Emission Time Series Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07569)
*Zesen Wang,Lijuan Lan,Yonggang Li,Chunhua Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出TriHead-GAN，一种三头判别器的Transformer对抗框架，用于生成高质量的城市级碳排放时间序列数据，解决真实数据稀缺问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 城市级高频碳排放监测数据极度稀缺，限制了深度学习模型的应用；现有时间序列生成方法（GAN、扩散模型）未能充分保留碳排放数据的领域结构特征，如跨变量相关性和步进式波动特性。

Method: 提出TriHead-GAN，其生成器结合全局自注意力、局部时间卷积、逐步噪声注入和抗平滑损失；判别器采用三头设计：Wasserstein批判器监督分布真实性、无泄漏回归监督跨变量依赖、相邻差异预测监督步进时间平滑性。

Result: 在自收集的长沙碳排放数据集、两个公共碳排放数据集（中国、美国）以及ETTh1基准上，TriHead-GAN在绝大多数设置下优于主流基线方法，且生成的合成窗口能提升低资源碳排放监测场景中的下游预测准确度。

Conclusion: TriHead-GAN通过三头判别器联合监督三个互补方面，有效解决了碳排放时间序列生成中跨变量相关性和步进波动保持不足的问题，在数据稀缺场景具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: Accurate carbon emission monitoring is critical for climate policy and emerging regulatory mechanisms such as the EU Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism, yet city-level high-frequency monitoring data remain extremely scarce, severely limiting data-hungry deep learning models. Time series generation is a natural remedy, but existing GAN and diffusion-based generators often provide limited explicit supervision for the domain structure of carbon emission data: they may match marginal distributional statistics while insufficiently preserving cross-variable correlations between CO$_2$ and co-emitted pollutants and meteorological factors, and tend to collapse the first-difference statistics of atmospheric measurements, producing sequences that are smooth on average but lack the realistic step-wise variability of the underlying signals. We propose TriHead-GAN, a Transformer-based adversarial framework whose triple-head discriminator jointly supervises three complementary aspects of the joint distribution: distributional authenticity via a Wasserstein critic, cross-variable dependency via leakage-free regression of the target variable, and step-wise temporal smoothness via adjacent-difference prediction. The generator combines global self-attention with local temporal convolution, per-step noise injection, and an anti-smoothing loss that matches first-difference statistics. Experiments on the self-collected Changsha Carbon dataset, two public carbon datasets (China, US), and the ETTh1 benchmark show that TriHead-GAN achieves favorable performance over mainstream baselines on the vast majority of settings, and that the resulting synthetic windows improve downstream forecasting accuracy in low-resource carbon monitoring scenarios.

</details>


### [390] [Enabling KV Caching of Shared Prefix for Diffusion Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07571)
*Younghun Go,Jaehoon Han,Changyong Shin,Chuk Yoo,Gyeongsik Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对扩散语言模型（DLM）中共享前缀的KV缓存问题，提出了bicache方法，通过动态识别安全层深度重用前缀KV，避免现有LLM缓存技术导致的精度崩溃，提升服务吞吐量36.3%-98.3%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM的KV缓存技术假设KV一旦计算便保持不变，但DLM中双向注意力机制使得更新任意token会改变整个上下文及其KV，导致共享前缀KV被破坏，模型准确率几乎降为零，因此需要专为DLM设计的共享前缀KV缓存技术。

Method: 基于对DLM中共享前缀KV行为的综合分析：浅层中共享前缀KV保持稳定可重用，且浅层深度取决于每请求中共享前缀token的比例；据此动态识别安全层深度，在该深度以上重用共享前缀KV，消除冗余计算。

Result: 相比现有技术，bicache将服务吞吐量提升36.3%-98.3%，且无精度崩溃（精度差异仅0-1.8%）。

Conclusion: bicache是首个针对DLM共享前缀的KV缓存方案，有效解决了双向注意力场景下KV缓存失效问题，实现了高吞吐DLM服务。

Abstract: Key-value (KV) caching for shared prefixes is essential for high-throughput large language model (LLM) serving, but it faces critical challenges in emerging diffusion language models (DLMs). In DLMs, bidirectional attention means that updating any token dynamically alters the entire context and its corresponding KVs. Thus, existing caching techniques developed for LLMs, which assume that KVs remain invariant once computed, corrupt the shared prefix KVs. Our experiments show that applying these techniques to DLMs causes model accuracy to collapse to near zero.
  To unlock high-throughput DLM serving, we propose bidirectional prefix caching, bicache, the first KV caching technique for shared prefixes in DLMs. bicache is designed based on key observations from our comprehensive analysis: shared prefix KVs remain stable and reusable in shallow layers, while the depth of shallow layers depends on the fraction of shared prefix tokens in each request. Thus, bicache dynamically identifies a safe layer depth for reusing shared prefix KVs and eliminates redundant computation. Evaluations demonstrate that bicache significantly improves serving throughput by 36.3%-98.3% compared to existing techniques without accuracy collapse (only 0-1.8% difference).

</details>


### [391] [When Should an AI Scientist Stop? Verifiable Experiment Steering and Refusal for Autonomous Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07576)
*Neel Tushar Shah,Manglam Kartik*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出CARTOGRAPH验证层，通过选择（select）、解析（resolve）和拒绝（refuse）三个机制改进AI科学家的实验验证能力，在多个测试中显著优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI科学家系统缺乏严格的实验验证与不确定性管理机制，导致结果可信度不足，尤其在高维或模型失配场景下容易产生虚假发现。

Method: 提出CARTOGRAPH框架，包含三个核心模块：(1) Select：基于未解析子空间的实验导向；(2) Resolve：显式模糊性解析；(3) Refuse：基于残差的库不充分性检测。在局部线性-高斯桥假设下推导出不解析Fisher信息迹等理论量，并给出CARTOGRAPH-A最优规则。

Result: 在5个测试平台上，CARTOGRAPH-A在d=8的复制级联结构下以129W/0T/15L击败原始投影（p<10^-21）；能识别并撤回3个库外药代动力学机制；在低维药代动力学和EPA过滤场景中理论预测与观测一致；在A-Lab材料系统40个阳性声明的回顾审计中，拒绝防护识别出全部4个后来被判定为不确定的声明，并通过32/36个确认声明。

Conclusion: CARTOGRAPH为AI科学家提供了有效的验证层，能显著提升实验导向的可靠性、检测模型库不充分性，并过滤虚假阳性发现，对自主科学发现的可信度提升具有重要意义。

Abstract: We present CARTOGRAPH, a verification layer for AI scientists that couples unresolved-subspace experiment steering (select), explicit ambiguity closure (resolve), and residual-based library inadequacy detection (refuse). Under a local linear-Gaussian bridge, raw unresolved projection is the isotropic unresolved Fisher-information trace, while CARTOGRAPH-A is the exact unresolved A-optimal rule; closed-form EIG and Box-Hill arise as local comparators rather than global equivalents. Across five testbeds, CARTOGRAPH-A beats raw projection 129W/0T/15L at d = 8 (p < 10^-21) in a replicated structured cascade. More distinctively, the framework tentatively identifies three out-of-library pharmacokinetic mechanisms and then revokes those identifications as residuals expose structural misfit, while one perturbed in-library control stays identified throughout. In low-dimensional pharmacokinetic and filtered EPA settings, near-ties against disagreement are predicted by theory and observed. Finally, in a retrospective audit of 40 positive claims from the published A-Lab autonomous materials system, the refuse guard flags all 4 claims later marked inconclusive under manual reanalysis while passing 32/36 confirmed claims. Code is available at https://github.com/ai4science-boed/cartograph.git

</details>


### [392] [MST-Direct at Scale: Multivariate and Conditional Geostatistical Simulation via Sinkhorn Optimal Transport](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07578)
*Tcharlies Bachmann Schmitz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文扩展了MST-Direct方法，通过稀疏化的Sinkhorn匹配器解决可扩展性问题，支持多变量、条件模拟和大规模网格，能够精确再现多元联合分布和空间相关性，相比PPMT方法具有零直方图误差的优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 原始MST-Direct方法仅限于双变量、无条件和小规模网格场景，存在三个主要局限性：可扩展性差（仅支持数千节点）、无法处理多变量、无法进行硬数据条件化。本文旨在解决这些限制，使其适用于实际地质统计模拟中的大规模多变量条件模拟问题。

Method: (i) 提出稀疏、候选受限的Sinkhorn匹配器，具有O(nC)内存复杂度，突破可扩展性瓶颈；(ii) 通过将目标值元组匹配到独立的FFT-MA高斯骨干上，扩展至多变量场景，该骨干能再现预设的变异函数；(iii) 通过克里金法对骨干进行条件化，并在空间位置固定观测数据元组，实现硬数据条件化。传输计划保持为目标元组的排列，从而精确保留多元联合分布。

Result: 在六变量、异方差、强非线性参考分布上，对无条件（200x200网格）和条件（100x100网格，200个硬数据样本）两种场景进行验证。MST-Direct方法零直方图误差再现联合分布，精确拟合硬数据，准确再现预设空间相关性结构；而PPMT方法仅为近似。

Conclusion: MST-Direct成功克服了原始方法的三大局限性，在大规模多变量条件模拟中实现了对联合分布的精确保留和空间相关性的准确再现，且性能优于PPMT方法，为地质统计模拟提供了更优的解决方案。

Abstract: This paper extends MST-Direct, a Matching-via-Sinkhorn-Transport approach for multivariate geostatistical simulation, from the original bivariate, unconditional, small-grid formulation to multivariate, conditional, and large-grid settings. We address the three main limitations identified in the original work: (i) scalability beyond a few thousand nodes through a sparse, candidate-restricted Sinkhorn matcher with O(nC) memory complexity; (ii) extension to multiple variables by matching target value tuples onto an independent FFT-MA Gaussian backbone that reproduces a prescribed variogram; and (iii) hard-data conditioning by fixing observed data tuples at their spatial locations while conditioning the backbone through kriging. Because the transport plan remains a permutation of the target tuples, the multivariate joint distribution is preserved exactly.
  The method is validated using the same six-variate, heteroscedastic, strongly nonlinear reference distribution employed in Direct Multivariate Simulation (DMS), under both unconditional (200x200) and conditional (100x100, 200 hard-data samples) scenarios, and is benchmarked against the Projection Pursuit Multivariate Transform (PPMT). Results show that MST-Direct reproduces the joint distribution with zero histogram error, exactly honours hard data, and accurately reproduces the prescribed spatial correlation structure, whereas PPMT remains an approximation.
  Index Terms-Optimal transport, Sinkhorn algorithm, geostatistical simulation, multivariate simulation.

</details>


### [393] [Training-Inference Kernel Contracts: Bounding Divergence in Post-Training and Deployment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07581)
*Bruce Changlong Xu,Lan Wu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出“内核契约”（kernel contracts）框架，用于规范训练内核与推理内核之间的数值偏差，通过契约条款和边界推导确保强化学习后训练中策略梯度偏差可控。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代后训练流水线中，同一策略在训练和推理时使用不同内核（自动求导优化 vs. 低精度融合批处理），有限精度下分布差异集中在基准测试未充分覆盖的切片上，缺乏形式化的偏差管控机制。

Method: 提出契约框架 C=(N,S,R,O,Pi) 包含数值、统计、运行时和可观测性条款以及升级策略；推导从 logit 漂移到总变分距离再到有界奖励漂移的误差链，并专门针对 RL 后训练给出基于重要性比率漂移的策略梯度偏差界。

Result: 推导了从 logit 漂移到策略梯度偏差的完整误差传播链；给出了四阶段晋升流水线、在线路由循环和最小 YAML DSL 的设计。

Conclusion: 本文属于框架与词汇论文，未进行生产级实证验证，但为训练-推理内核偏差的规范化管理提供了理论基础和工程原型。

Abstract: A modern post-training pipeline often writes one symbol for its policy, pi_theta, while evaluating it through two different programs: a training kernel optimized for autograd and an inference kernel optimized for low-precision, fused, dynamically batched serving. In finite precision, these kernels can induce different distributions at identical weights, with the gap concentrated on slices that aggregate benchmarks under-represent. This paper proposes kernel contracts: a contract-first framework for specifying acceptable divergence between K_train and K_inf. A contract C = (N, S, R, O, Pi) combines numerical, statistical, runtime, and observability clauses with an escalation policy from violations to routing actions. We derive a chain of bounds from logit drift to total-variation distance to bounded reward drift, and specialize it to RL post-training, where per-token importance-ratio drift yields a bound on policy-gradient bias under explicit support and norm assumptions. We also describe a four-stage promotion pipeline, online routing loop, and minimal YAML DSL for contract artifacts. This is a framework and vocabulary paper; we do not report production-scale empirical validation.

</details>


### [394] [Customer Churn Prediction on Structured Data Using FT-Transformer and Stacking Ensembles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07582)
*Joyjit Roy,Samaresh Kumar Singh,Laxmi Shaw*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合特征标记化Transformer（FT-Transformer）和XGBoost的混合架构，通过校准感知堆叠进行集成，在银行客户流失预测数据集上取得了优于MLP基线的性能（F1 62.10%，AUC 0.861），并解决了以往研究中统计验证、概率校准和可重复性不足的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 客户流失预测在保险、数字银行、电商等数据驱动行业中至关重要，但面临类别不平衡、非线性特征交互和异构特征类型等挑战。现有研究在统计验证、概率校准和可重复性方面存在不足，需要一种更稳健且可复现的预测架构。

Method: 提出混合架构：FT-Transformer利用自注意力机制捕获高阶特征交互，XGBoost通过梯度提升捕获决策边界。使用类别加权损失函数处理类别不平衡，避免合成过采样。通过OOF堆叠结合逻辑回归元学习器进行集成，校准过自信的基模型输出并学习最优组合权重。

Result: 在公开银行客户流失数据集上，混合模型达到62.10% F1、0.861 AUC-ROC、0.647 PR-AUC，在5x5交叉验证下相比MLP基线提升3.37个F1点和0.027 AUC，报告了95%置信区间。消融实验表明Transformer组件和堆叠策略均有实质性贡献。

Conclusion: 该方法提供了一个可复现、可扩展的参考架构，适用于结构化表格数据上的现代客户流失预测任务。

Abstract: Customer churn prediction is essential across data-driven industries such as insurance, digital banking, eCommerce, and subscription platforms, where retaining existing customers is typically more cost-effective than acquiring new ones. Predicting churn on structured datasets remains challenging due to class imbalance, nonlinear feature interactions, and heterogeneous feature types. Tree-based ensemble methods consistently demonstrate strong performance in these contexts, often outperforming conventional neural networks. This study introduces a validated hybrid architecture that integrates feature-tokenized transformers (FT-Transformer) with gradient-boosted trees through calibration-aware stacking. The proposed framework addresses persistent gaps in statistical validation, probability calibration, and reproducibility found in prior research. The FT-Transformer captures higher-order feature interactions using self-attention, while XGBoost captures gradient-boosted decision boundaries with complementary inductive biases. Class imbalance is handled using class-weighted loss functions, thereby avoiding synthetic oversampling and preserving minority-class distributions. The models are ensembled using out-of-fold (OOF) stacking with a logistic regression meta-learner, which recalibrates overconfident base model outputs and learns optimal combination weights. On a public bank churn dataset, the hybrid model achieves 62.10% F1, 0.861 AUC-ROC, and 0.647 PR-AUC, outperforming the Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) baseline by 3.37 F1 points and 0.027 AUC under 5x5 cross-validation with 95% confidence intervals reported. Ablation studies demonstrate that both the transformer component and stacking strategy contribute materially to performance. The proposed methodology offers a reproducible and extensible reference architecture for contemporary churn prediction on structured tabular data.

</details>


### [395] [Outage Detection in Self-Healing Smart Grids Using Reinforcement Learning with Spectral Graph Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07583)
*Lihui Liu,Mucun Sun,Caisheng Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于谱图强化学习的配电网故障恢复框架，利用谱图神经网络学习最优恢复策略，在三个IEEE测试系统上实现接近最优的实时性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统机器学习方法响应慢、计算成本高，而现有基于图神经网络（GNN）的强化学习方法仅在空间域操作，无法捕获对电力网络全局结构建模至关重要的频域信息。

Method: 采用谱图神经网络（Spectral GNN）作为策略网络，在频域中学习配电网的全局结构模式和系统级交互，构建强化学习框架来自动执行网络重构和负荷恢复操作。

Result: 在IEEE 13-bus、34-bus和123-bus三个测试系统上验证，方法实现了接近最优的实时性能，并在多种故障场景下具有良好的泛化能力。

Conclusion: 谱图强化学习能够有效利用频域信息提升智能电网故障恢复的效率和鲁棒性，为实际配电网的实时韧性增强提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Self-healing smart grids can quickly adjust their network configuration during outages to minimize power disruptions. During an outage, several actions can be taken, such as network reconfiguration through switching operations and emergency load shedding. However, traditional machine learning methods for outage mitigation are not well suited for smart grids due to their slow response time and high computational cost. To address these challenges, recent studies have explored reinforcement learning to automatically perform network reconfiguration. In these approaches, the control policy is typically modeled using a graph neural network (GNN). However, conventional GNNs operate in the spatial domain and may fail to capture important relationships in the frequency domain. Frequency-domain information is particularly useful for modeling global structural patterns and system-wide interactions in power networks. In this paper, we propose a spectral graph reinforcement learning framework for outage management in distribution networks to enhance system resilience. Our model learns the optimal power restoration policy using a spectral graph neural network. We evaluate the proposed method on three modified IEEE test systems: the 13-bus, 34-bus, and 123-bus networks. Experimental results show that our approach achieves near-optimal performance in real time and generalizes well across a wide range of outage scenarios.

</details>


### [396] [From Human Guidance to Autonomy: Agent Skill System for End-to-End LLM Deployment on Spatial NPUs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07586)
*Jiajie Li,Erwei Wang,Zhiru Zhang,Samuel Bayliss*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一个两阶段方法论，在AMD XDNA 2 NPU上实现端到端LLM部署：第一阶段通过人类引导的智能体辅助开发参考部署（Llama-3.2-1B），相比手工优化基线实现prefill 2.2倍、decode 4.0倍加速；第二阶段将经验蒸馏为包含八个阶段的智能体技能系统，自动将8个解码器-only LLM（0.5B-4B）端到端部署在AMD NPU上，每个部署在0.5-4小时内完成且几乎无需人工干预，其中3个模型达到或超越参考部署的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有空间NPU上的LLM部署主要聚焦单核优化，缺乏高效的端到端部署方案；尽管AI编码智能体降低了开发成本，但尚未有研究利用智能体实现资源受限空间NPU上的端到端LLM部署。

Method: 两阶段方法论：第一阶段，通过人类引导的智能体辅助开发Llama-3.2-1B参考部署，记录优化轨迹和经验文档；第二阶段，将文档蒸馏为包含八个阶段的智能体技能系统，编排优化和调试技能集，每阶段严格强制执行数值正确性，实现对其他LLM的自主端到端部署。

Result: 参考部署相比手工优化基线实现prefill 2.2倍、decode 4.0倍加速；智能体系统成功自主部署8个未见过的LLM（0.5B-4B），每部署耗时0.5-4小时，无人工干预，通过数值正确性门控；其中3个模型达到或超越参考部署的持续性能。

Conclusion: 提出的智能体技能系统实现了从单模型人工优化到多模型自主部署的泛化，证明了基于经验蒸馏的智能体方法可以有效降低空间NPU上LLM端到端部署的人力成本，同时保持有竞争力的性能。

Abstract: Spatial neural processing units (NPUs) provide an energy-efficient platform for edge LLM inference, but efficiently deploying an LLM end-to-end on such hardware remains labor-intensive. Although AI coding agents have begun to lower this cost, existing studies have largely focused on single-kernel optimization rather than end-to-end LLM deployment on resource-constrained spatial NPUs.
  We present a two-stage methodology, instantiated on the AMD XDNA 2 NPU, that progresses from human-guided development to agent autonomy. In the first stage, we develop a reference deployment of Llama-3.2-1B through human-guided agent assistance. The resulting implementation achieves a speedup of 2.2x on prefill and 4.0x on decode over the hand-optimized baseline, with the optimization trajectory and its lessons recorded as structured documentation throughout. In the second stage, we distill the documentation into an agent skill system consisting of eight phases, orchestrating the optimization and debugging skill sets, with numerical correctness strictly enforced at each phase.
  Using our agent skill system, we autonomously deploy eight additional decoder-only LLMs (Llama-3.2-3B, SmolLM2-1.7B, Qwen2.5-{0.5B, 1.5B, 3B}, Qwen3-{0.6B, 1.7B, 4B}) end-to-end on the AMD XDNA 2 NPU using the open-source compiler stack. To our knowledge, these models have not previously been deployed on AMD NPUs via any open-source software stack. Each deployment completes in 0.5-4 hours of agent wall time with almost no human guidance, and passes the numerical-correctness gates, demonstrating functional generalization to previously unencountered LLMs. Three of the eight match or exceed the sustained performance of our Llama-3.2-1B reference deployment, suggesting that the resulting implementations can be competitive without additional model-specific human engineering.

</details>


### [397] [The Routing Plateau: Understanding and Breaking the Accuracy Limits of LLM Routers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07587)
*Yifan Lu,Qiyue Zhang,Shenrun Zhang,Zhibo Yu,Zhuang Wang,Hanjie Chen,Jiarong Xing*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了21种LLM路由方法，发现了一个普遍现象——“路由平台期”：大多数方法（如kNN）性能相近，都远低于理想路由器的上限。平台期主要由“可预测性瓶颈”导致：当前路由器主要学习全局平均模型性能，而非细粒度的查询特定路由信号。增大训练集、更强的编码器和端到端微调可以进一步改善路由精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM路由已成为一种通过为每个查询动态选择模型来改善成本-质量权衡的流行方法，但现有路由方法存在性能瓶颈，作者希望系统性地研究这一现象并寻找突破方向。

Method: 对5个基准上的21种路由方法进行了广泛研究，包括聚类路由、学习分类器、成对排序和基于置信度的方法。通过分析路由平台期的成因，发现可预测性瓶颈是关键。

Result: 发现“路由平台期”现象：多种方法（如kNN）精度相似，收敛到远低于oracle路由器的狭窄性能范围。平台期主要由可预测性瓶颈导致——路由器学习全局平均性能而非查询特定信号。增大训练集、更强编码器和端到端微调可提升路由精度。

Conclusion: 当前路由方法存在共同局限：它们能解决重叠的简单查询，但共同在需要实例级路由决策的困难查询上失败。研究为构建更有效的路由系统提供了见解和可行方向。

Abstract: LLM routing has become a popular approach to improve the cost-quality trade-off of LLM services by dynamically selecting a model for each query. Recent work has explored a broad range of routing methods, including clustering-based routers, learned classifiers, pairwise ranking, and confidence-based approaches. Our extensive study of 21 routing methods across five benchmarks reveals a consistent phenomenon that we call the routing plateau: many methods, including kNN, achieve very similar accuracy and converge to a narrow performance range that remains far below the oracle router. Our investigation shows that the plateau is largely caused by a predictability bottleneck: current routers mainly learn global averaged model-performance trends rather than fine-grained query-specific routing signals. As a result, they solve overlapping easy queries but collectively fail on hard queries that require instance-specific routing decisions. We further study how to move beyond the plateau and find that larger training datasets, stronger encoders, and end-to-end fine-tuning can further improve routing accuracy. These findings characterize the common limits of current routing methods and provide insights and actionable directions for the community to build more effective routing systems.

</details>


### [398] [Optimality of Sequential Filtering Under Independent Cost and Selectivity Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07589)
*Hrishikesh Paranjape,Abhishek Mandal,Xian Sun*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文形式化了序列过滤管道中的最优排序问题，并证明在独立模型下，按成本与拒绝概率之比递增排序过滤器可以最小化期望总成本，蒙特卡洛模拟验证了该排序策略优于常见启发式方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 序列过滤管道是大规模系统中的常见设计模式（如排序系统、级联机器学习推理、欺诈检测），但过滤器排序往往依赖启发式方法而缺乏形式化保证。

Method: 将序列过滤问题形式化为期望成本目标下的优化问题；在独立性假设下，推导出按成本与拒绝概率之比递增排序的最优策略；通过蒙特卡洛模拟进行验证。

Result: 证明最优排序为按成本/拒绝概率比值递增；蒙特卡洛模拟表明该最优排序在期望值和完整分布上均严格优于常见启发式方法。

Conclusion: 该工作为序列过滤管道的过滤器排序提供了理论最优性保证，具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: Sequential filtering pipelines are a common design pattern in large-scale systems, where a large population of items is progressively reduced by a sequence of stages that each incur cost. Despite their prevalence in ranking systems, cascaded machine learning inference, and fraud detection, filter ordering is often determined by heuristics without formal guarantees. We formalize sequential filtering under an expected-cost objective and prove that, under an independence model, ordering filters by increasing ratio of cost to rejection probability minimizes expected total cost. Extensive Monte Carlo simulations show that the optimal ordering strictly dominates common heuristics across all runs, both in expectation and across the full distribution of outcomes.

</details>


### [399] [ResearchClawBench: A Benchmark for End-to-End Autonomous Scientific Research](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07591)
*Wanghan Xu,Shuo Li,Tianlin Ye,Qinglong Cao,Yixin Chen,Hengjian Gao,Yiheng Wang,Qi Li,Kun Li,Sheng Xu,Shengdu Chai,Fangchen Yu,Xiangyu Zhao,Zhangrui Zhao,Weijie Ma,Zijie Guo,Haoyu Zhou,Haoxiang Yin,Lixue Cheng,Chaofan Hu,Haoxuan Li,Lu Mi,Xuxuan Xie,Yifan Zhou,Ruizhe Chen,Zhiwang Zhou,Xingjian Guo,Yuhao Zhou,Xuming He,Shengyuan Xu,Xinyu Gu,Jiamin Wu,Mianxin Liu,Chunfeng Song,Fenghua Ling,Dongzhan Zhou,Shixiang Tang,Yuqiang Li,Mao Su,Peng Ye,Siqi Sun,Bin Wang,Xue Yang,Zhenfei Yin,Tianfan Fu,Guangtao Zhai,Wanli Ouyang,Bo Zhang,Lei Bai,Wenlong Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了ResearchClawBench基准，用于评估自主科学研究能力。涵盖10个科学领域40个任务，基于已发表论文构建。评估结果显示当前最强自主Agent（Claude Code）平均分仅21.5，前沿LLM均值仅26.5，距离可靠的科学发现还有很大差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI编程智能体越来越多用于科研工作，但它们的端到端自主研究能力难以验证。现有评估方法缺乏标准化、可复现的基准来衡量自主科学研究的进展。

Method: 构建ResearchClawBench：40个任务来自10个科学领域，每个任务基于已发表论文，提供相关文献和原始数据，隐藏目标论文。专家设计多模态评分标准，将目标科学产物分解为加权标准，支持重发现评估同时允许新发现空间。通过统一协议评估7个自主研究Agent，并通过轻量级ResearchHarness评估17个原生LLM。

Result: 最强自主Agent（Claude Code）平均21.5分，最强ResearchHarness LLM（Claude-Opus-4.7）平均20.7分，LLM前沿均值仅26.5。错误集中在实验方案不匹配、证据不匹配和科学核心缺失。

Conclusion: 当前自主研究系统远未达到可靠的科学重发现水平。ResearchClawBench为衡量自主科学研究的进展提供了可复现的评估基准。

Abstract: AI coding agents are increasingly used for scientific work, but their end-to-end autonomous research capability remains difficult to verify. We present ResearchClawBench, a benchmark for evaluating autonomous scientific research across 40 tasks from 10 scientific domains. Each task is grounded in a real published paper, provides related literature and raw data, and hides the target paper during evaluation. Expert-curated multimodal rubrics decompose the target scientific artifacts into weighted criteria, enabling evaluation of target-paper-level re-discovery while leaving room for new discovery. We evaluate seven autonomous research (auto-research) agents under a unified protocol and seventeen native LLMs through the lightweight ResearchHarness. Current systems remain far from reliable re-discovery: the strongest autonomous agent, Claude Code, averages 21.5, and the strongest ResearchHarness LLM, Claude-Opus-4.7, averages 20.7, with an LLM frontier mean of only 26.5. Error analysis shows that failures concentrate in experimental protocol mismatch, evidence mismatch, and missing scientific core. ResearchClawBench provides a reproducible evaluation frontier for measuring progress toward autonomous scientific research.

</details>


### [400] [UNIQ: Conformal Calibration for Adaptive Conservatism in Offline Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07592)
*Aditya Upadhyay*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: UNIQ提出了一种基于共形预测的状态自适应保守性方法，通过多分位值集成和不确定性估计，在保持接近IQL内存开销的同时，提升了离线强化学习的性能-效率权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离线强化学习方法对所有状态施加固定且均匀的保守性惩罚，忽略了不同状态间数据覆盖程度的差异，导致在数据覆盖好的区域过度保守，在数据稀缺区域保守性不足。

Method: 基于Implicit Q-Learning (IQL)框架，训练多分位值集成模型，利用分裂共形预测计算无分布假设的不确定性估计，然后根据不确定性信号动态调整每个状态的期望分位数——数据覆盖好的区域放松保守性，数据边界附近的不确定区域加强保守性。

Result: 在D4RL MuJoCo基准上，UNIQ持续优于IQL，在Walker2d和replay-heavy任务上提升最为显著。峰值VRAM约250MB，与IQL接近，相比EDAC降低约10倍内存开销。

Conclusion: UNIQ被定位为一个实用的机制贡献，它不追求全面最优的SOTA性能，而是致力于改善离线强化学习中的性能-效率权衡，提供一种轻量级、自适应且有效的保守性调节方案。

Abstract: Offline reinforcement learning requires careful conservatism to mitigate distribution shift, yet most existing methods apply a fixed penalty uniformly across all states regardless of local data coverage. We present UNIQ (Uncertainty-Informed Quantile), an offline RL method that introduces state-adaptive conservatism through conformally calibrated uncertainty estimation. Built on the Implicit Q-Learning (IQL) backbone, UNIQ trains a multi-expectile value ensemble, computes distribution-free uncertainty estimates using split conformal prediction, and maps the resulting signal to a state-dependent expectile that relaxes conservatism in well-covered regions while strengthening it in uncertain regions near the data frontier. On D4RL MuJoCo benchmarks, UNIQ consistently improves over IQL, with the largest gains observed on Walker2d and replay-heavy tasks. At the same time, UNIQ operates at near-IQL memory cost (approximately 250 MB peak VRAM), providing roughly a 10x reduction compared to EDAC. Rather than pursuing overall state-of-the-art performance, we position UNIQ as a practical mechanism contribution that improves the performance-efficiency trade-off in offline reinforcement learning.

</details>


### [401] [Shortcuts in the Tail: Debiasing via Post-Hoc Spectral Compression of Fine-Tuning Updates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07596)
*Edward Sun,Dmitrii Troitskii*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种简单的后处理方法——截断 ΔW（微调权重与基础权重之差）的 SVD 尾部，即可在不需重训练、群体标签或反事实数据的情况下，减少模型对虚假关联的依赖，消除高达 5 倍的群体偏差，且准确率损失小于 2 个百分点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 微调常引入虚假关联，导致模型在代表性不足的群体上系统性失败。现有缓解方法需要重训练、群体标签或反事实数据，成本高昂且不普适。因此，作者希望探索一种无需这些资源的简单后处理方法来减少捷径依赖。

Method: 计算微调前后权重差 ΔW = W_ft - W_base，对其进行奇异值分解（SVD），然后截断奇异值排序中的尾部（top-k 截断），仅保留前 k 个奇异成分，丢弃尾部成分。该方法作为后处理步骤直接应用于已微调模型。

Result: 在 3 个指令微调模型（0.5B-7B）和 4 个分类基准上，top-k 截断在所有实验设置中均减少了群体偏差差距，准确率损失小于 2pp；在 CivilComments 上偏差差距降低达 5 倍。控制实验（bottom-k、random-k 截断及匹配秩的 LoRA）排除了低秩近似或秩约束训练作为解释的可能性。

Conclusion: 捷径响应位于 ΔW 奇异值排序的尾部，截断尾部可有效消除捷径。ΔW 的奇异基是研究微调所学内容的有效坐标系。该结果为理解微调行为提供了初步证据。

Abstract: Fine-tuning often introduces spurious correlations alongside task knowledge, causing systematic failures on underrepresented groups. Existing mitigations require retraining, group labels, or curated counterfactual data. We show a simple post-hoc intervention reduces shortcut reliance without any of these: truncating the tail of the SVD of $ΔW = W_\mathrm{ft} - W_\mathrm{base}$ reduces the spurious-group gap while preserving task accuracy. Across three instruction-tuned models ($0.5$B--$7$B) and four classification benchmarks, top-$k$ truncation reduces the gap on every cell at $<2$ pp accuracy loss, by up to $5\times$ on CivilComments. We propose this works because the shortcut response sits in the tail of the singular ordering of $ΔW$, a claim about how truncation behaves rather than about the raw singular values, which are broadly distributed and look the same across all four datasets. A controlled boundary case in which fine-tuning has only a shortcut to learn shows the predicted FT-to-base collapse, and bottom-/random-$k$ and matched-rank LoRA controls rule out generic low-rank approximation and rank-constrained training as the explanation. We read this as preliminary evidence that the singular basis of $ΔW$ is a useful coordinate system for studying what fine-tuning has learned.

</details>


### [402] [Repetition Mismatch: Why Data Mixture Experiments Don't Scale and How to Fix Them](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07597)
*Kevin Zhou,Lisa Alazraki,Kris Cao,Marek Rei*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现预训练数据混合比例优化失败的主要原因是重复率不匹配：高质量小数据集在训练预算增加时重复率变化，导致小规模实验无法准确预测最优混合。提出通过子采样匹配目标重复率来控制该效应，在少量实验下即可逼近最优混合。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 预训练数据混合通常通过小规模实验外推到大预算，但当高质量数据稀缺需重复使用时，外推常失败，但失败根源未被隔离。本文旨在揭示并解决这一问题。

Method: 提出重复率控制（repetition control）的子采样方法，使小规模实验的重复率与目标训练预算下的重复率匹配。通过两源和三源数据实验验证，比较有/无重复控制下的混合优化效果。

Result: 两源场景下，仅用1/16目标token的一次重复控制实验即可达到最优混合（误差0.05），而无重复控制时误差达0.75；三源场景下两次重复控制实验即可恢复最优混合，优于基线方法。

Conclusion: 重复动力学（而非仅规模）决定小规模混合实验是否可泛化；数据重复应被视为混合优化的一等变量，而非不便的副作用。

Abstract: Pre-training data mixtures are commonly tuned by running small-scale experiments and extrapolating to the target training budget. When high-quality data is scarce and must be repeated, this extrapolation frequently fails, but the source of the failure has not been isolated. We show that a primary culprit is a repetition mismatch: because high-quality datasets are small, their repetition rate changes as the training budget grows, shifting the optimal mixture in ways that small-scale proxy experiments do not anticipate. A subsampling procedure that matches the target repetition rate controls for this effect. In a two-source setting combining limited high-quality data with web crawl, a single repetition-controlled experiment using only 1/16 of the target tokens recovers a mixture within 0.05 of the optimum for a 757M parameter model, compared to an error of 0.75 without repetition control. Achieving comparable accuracy without repetition control requires three to four horizons, consuming 44 to 94% of the target token budget. With three data sources, the larger mixture space requires more than a single experiment to constrain, but the approach remains effective: at the 757M scale, just two repetition-controlled horizons recover the optimal mixture, outperforming baselines that instead require the full two-source experiments to construct. Our results reveal that repetition dynamics, not scale alone, shape whether small-scale mixture experiments generalize.
