Despite significant recent strides in spatio-temporal modeling, existing approaches often fail to explicitly model the coupling relationships between different modality variables. Accurate MoSTF is challenging, as it requires modeling (1) temporal dynamic heterogeneity under exogenous influences and (2) heterogeneous spatial dependencies alongside complex cross-variable couplings. To address these challenges, we propose the Dual-Domain Spectral Filtering Network (DSFNet). Our framework employs dual-domain spectral filtering to capture heterogeneous spatial patterns and explicitly model the relationships between variables. Unlike graph-based message passing or dense attention over node-modality pairs, DSFNet factorizes space-modality interactions into feature-domain and spatial-domain spectral operators, enabling scalable modeling of nonlocal dependencies and cross-modality couplings. Furthermore, we introduce an external gating mechanism to adaptively regulate temporal dynamics under external influences. We validate our method through extensive experiments on five representative real-world traffic datasets. Compared with the second-best baselines, DSFNet reduces MAE by 3.21%-10.16% across these datasets. The results demonstrate that DSFNet significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art baselines in accuracy while exhibiting efficiency and robustness.

</details>


### [442] [Adversarial Robustness of Activation Steering in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07696)
*Kien Le,Thai Le*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文首次系统评估了激活控制在对抗性文本扰动下的鲁棒性，发现方向性鲁棒性下降高达64%，置信度崩溃至0.25以下，最优层偏移达17层，揭示了激活控制的结构性脆弱性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 激活控制是一种流行的免训练LLM行为控制方法，但其在现实输入变化下的鲁棒性尚未被研究。

Method: 覆盖4种提取方法、3种攻击策略、6种人格和5种模型（1.5B–30B参数），系统评估激活控制在对抗性文本扰动下的表现。

Result: 攻击在所有设置下普遍成功：方向鲁棒性下降达64%，置信度接近或低于0.25，最优层偏移达17层。从对抗扰动输入中提取向量可部分恢复PCA和MD的操控性，但无法定位改进后的最优层。

Conclusion: 激活控制的脆弱性是结构性的而非方法特异的，当前层选择策略不足以在真实世界中可靠部署。

Abstract: Activation steering has become a popular training-free method to control LLM behavior by injecting precomputed direction vectors into the model's residual stream at inference time. Yet its robustness to realistic input variation remains unstudied. We present the first systematic evaluation of activation steering robustness under adversarial text perturbations on the inputs, covering four extraction methods, three attack strategies, six personas from Anthropic Model-Written Evaluation Dataset, and five models ranging from 1.5B to 30B parameters. Attacks succeed broadly across all settings: directional robustness drops by up to 64%, post-attack confidence collapses near or below 0.25 across all methods and models, and steering strength degrades on nearly every steerable input. Layer selection is equally fragile, with the optimal layer identified by an automated method on clean inputs shifting by up to 17 positions under perturbation, a failure that compounds the vector-level breakdown. Extracting vectors from adversarially perturbed inputs partially recovers steerability for PCA and MD on mid-to-large models, but they consistently fail to locate the improved optimal layer, limiting the practical benefit of this mitigation. Together, these findings reveal that the brittleness of activation steering is structural rather than method-specific, and that current layer selection strategies are not robust enough for real-world deployment.

</details>


### [443] [Pharmacogenomic Knowledge Graph Augmentation for Graph Neural Network-Based Drug-Drug Interaction Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07698)
*Juergen Dietrich*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究药理学先验知识（PharmGKB数据库中的CYP酶注释）能否突破仅依赖分子结构的GNN在药物相互作用预测中的信息上限。结果表明，知识图谱增强在DDI类型分类（配对划分）上显著提升，但二元交互检测和药物级泛化仍受限于信息上限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 此前研究发现GNN在DDI预测中的性能受限于训练标签的结构信息含量（信息上限），单纯改进架构无法突破。本文探究引入独立于分子结构的药理学先验知识（CYP代谢通路背景）是否能部分打破这一上限。

Method: 从PharmGKB提取4种CYP亚型（CYP2D6, CYP3A4, CYP2C19, CYP2C9）的底物、抑制剂、诱导剂注释，构建12维特征向量，与分子嵌入拼接后进行相互作用预测。在药物-药物级别和药物级别两种数据划分下进行实验，并在Tox21基准上扩展到单分子毒性预测验证。

Result: 知识图谱增强在DDI类型分类（配对划分）下F1-macro从0.241提升至0.532；二元交互检测和药物级泛化仍受限于信息上限（AUC涨幅0.224 vs 0.250基线）。CYP2C9介导的交互预测概率从基线0.033-0.117提升至0.560-0.586。Tox21验证依赖注释覆盖率。

Conclusion: 药理学先验知识可部分提升特定条件下的DDI预测性能，但无法完全突破信息上限，这为后续研究提出了多模态框架的必要性。

Abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) applied to drug-drug interaction (DDI) prediction rely exclusively on molecular structure encoded as SMILES-derived graphs. Prior work in this series demonstrated that model performance is bounded by the structural information content of training labels -- an Information Ceiling -- that architectural refinements alone cannot overcome. The present study investigates whether pharmacogenomic prior knowledge from the PharmGKB database partially closes this ceiling by providing metabolic pathway context that is independent of, and complementary to, molecular structure. Cytochrome P450 (CYP) enzyme substrate, inhibitor, and inducer annotations for four clinically relevant isoforms (CYP2D6, CYP3A4, CYP2C19, CYP2C9) are extracted and incorporated as a 12-dimensional feature vector concatenated to the molecular embedding prior to interaction prediction. Experiments are conducted under both pair-level and drug-level data splits to quantify generalization to unseen drugs. Results indicate that knowledge graph (KG) augmentation substantially improves DDI type classification under pair-level split conditions (F1-macro: 0.532 vs. 0.241 baseline), while binary interaction detection and drug-level generalization remain bounded by the Information Ceiling (AUC inflation: 0.224 vs. 0.250 baseline). Mechanistic validation on strictly held-out compounds confirms that augmentation preferentially improves CYP2C9-mediated interaction prediction, with probabilities increasing from 0.033-0.117 (baseline) to 0.560-0.586 (KG-augmented). An extension to single-molecule toxicity prediction on the Tox21 benchmark confirms that the effect is contingent on pharmacogenomic annotation coverage. These findings motivate the multimodal framework proposed for the subsequent study in this series.

</details>


### [444] [EssentialGIN: a new approach for gene essentiality prediction based on graph isomorphism neural networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07700)
*Sahar Mansouri-Rad,Zahra Narimani,Parvin Razzaghi,Nazanin Hosseinkhan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于图同构网络（GIN）的必需基因预测方法，通过整合PPI网络拓扑特征与基因表达、直系同源、亚细胞定位等多源生物数据，相比传统中心性方法和现有深度学习模型（如Node2Vec、MLP、GAT）显著提升了预测精度，尤其在人类基因组中表现突出。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于中心性度量的必需基因预测方法准确性低、假阳性高，而现有深度学习方法在整合生物信息方面仍有不足，亟需一种能同时保留PPI网络拓扑结构并融合多源生物数据的预测模型。

Method: 修改图同构网络（GIN）架构以嵌入节点信息，将PPI网络中蛋白质作为节点，同时整合基因表达数据、直系同源信息和亚细胞定位信息作为节点属性，通过GIN保留网络拓扑特征，构建深度预测模型。

Result: 所提方法在预测性能上优于中心性基线方法以及Node2Vec、MLP、图注意力网络（GAT）等机器学习/深度学习方法。在E. coli和D. melanogaster中，基于Node2Vec嵌入的MLP表现也不错，但在H. sapiens中本文方法显著超越其他方案。

Conclusion: 图同构网络通过整合生物数据作为节点属性并保留网络拓扑结构，能显著提升必需基因预测精度，尤其适用于复杂生物体（如人类）的预测任务。

Abstract: Background: Prediction of essential genes (proteins), is a basic and challenging problem but at the same time very costly and time-consuming in wet-lab experiments. Predicting essential genes, only based on computational methods (to introduce wet-lab candidates) using centrality measures are not accurate and result in large number of false positives; therefore, more complex models such as deep learning and also integration of biological information are used in recent research to identify essential genes.
  Methods: In this work we focus on graph isomorphism networks, in order to embed proteins as a node in PPI network to conserve topological features of PPI network, and also integrate biological data such as gene expression data, gene orthology information and gene subcellular localization information, and introduced a deep architecture for predicting essential genes. Graph isomorphism network architecture is modified in this work for embedding node information.
  Results: Our experiments proved that the proposed method outperforms baseline centrality-based methods and also machine learning based methods such as Node2Vec, MLP, and also graph attention networks (GAT).
  Conclusion: In this paper we observed that using graph isomorphism networks that integrate biological data (as node attributes) and preserve network topology can significantly improve the essential gene prediction accuracy. In simpler organisms such as E. coli and D. melanogaster, methods such as multi-layer perceptron using Node2Vec embedding also performs very good, but in H. sapiens the introduced architecture significantly outperforms deep learning and other graph neural network solutions.
  Keywords: Essential gene prediction, graph neural network, graph isomorphism network, PPI network, node embedding

</details>


### [445] [EvoCSFL: Surrogate-Assisted Evolutionary Client Selection for Efficient and Robust Federated Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07702)
*Lin Qiang,Sun Xiaoyan,Hu Yao,Fang Wei*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种代理辅助客户端进化选择框架，通过代理模型（替代模型）加速联邦学习中的客户端选择优化，实现更快的收敛、更低的能耗和更强的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦学习中随机选择客户端导致收敛速度慢和鲁棒性差，因为客户端数据和系统的异构性使得传统选择策略难以兼顾性能与效率。

Method: 首先利用典型选择策略生成候选集，并构建融合模型性能、通信延迟和能耗的指标函数；然后基于候选选择构建代理模型近似子集性能；最后用进化算法在代理模型引导下搜索最优客户端组合。

Result: 在MNIST、CIFAR10、CINIC10和TinyImageNet四个数据集上的实验表明，该方法相比现有方法收敛更快、能耗更低、鲁棒性更强。

Conclusion: 代理辅助的进化选择框架能有效解决联邦学习中客户端异构性带来的优化难题，为高效鲁棒的客户端选择提供了新的可行方案。

Abstract: The heterogeneity of client data and systems makes it difficult to achieve satisfactory convergence speed and robustness in federated learning with random client selection. To address this issue, this paper proposes a surrogate-assisted client evolutionary selection framework for federated learning. In this framework, some typical client selection strategies are first used to generate candidate sets, and a metric function that integrates model performance, communication latency, and energy consumption is developed to formulate the client selection problem as a combinatorial optimization one. Subsequently, a surrogate model is constructed using the candidate selections and metric to efficiently approximate the performance of selected client subsets. An evolutionary algorithm is employed to search the combinatorial space of client selections, guided by the surrogate model to accelerate convergence. Experiments on MNIST, CIFAR10, CINIC10, and TinyImageNet demonstrate that the proposed algorithm achieves faster convergence, lower energy consumption, and improved robustness compared to existing methods.

</details>


### [446] [How Much Dense Attention is Necessary? Oracle-Guided Sparse Prefill for Full/GQA Layers in Hybrid Long-Context Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07703)
*Hongxing Wang,Harenome Razanajato,Zhen Zhang,Yujie Yuan,Hongsheng Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究大模型长上下文预填充中密集注意力是否必要，通过注意力质量Oracle分析稀疏预算可行性，并基于蒸馏索引器实现稀疏注意力加速，在Qwen系列模型上验证质量损失微小且推理加速可达1.93倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长上下文预填充阶段计算开销大，即使混合模型（含局部、稀疏、线性或循环组件）仍需全GQA层扫描历史序列。作者希望探究在给定支持粒度和top-k预算下，保留任务行为所需的最小密集注意力量。

Method: 1）提出注意力质量Oracle：对现有GQA checkpoint逐层逐查询位置计算密集注意力，选取head平均后的token支持集，仅在该支持集上重算注意力。2）基于Oracle指导，训练head-collapsed辅助索引器，通过KL散度蒸馏密集注意力质量分布，保持骨干模型冻结。3）在Qwen3.5-0.8B和Qwen3.5-9B上分别蒸馏索引器。

Result: 1）Oracle最长per-query行与密集基线差距在1分以内；Qwen3.5-9B在4K-100K RULER扫描中差距仅0.48分。2）蒸馏索引器在16K/32K验证宏差距为+2.04（0.8B）和+1.13（9B）分。3）单卡TTFT加速：0.8B模型在NPU上1.71x，9B模型在GPU上1.93x，随机初始化行可达3.44x。

Conclusion: 稀疏注意力在长上下文场景下可行，质量损失微小；蒸馏索引器可接近Oracle上限但存在实现差距；目前质量-延迟联合最优边界尚未达成，留待未来工作。

Abstract: Long-context prefill remains expensive because full/GQA layers still score the historical sequence, even in hybrid models with local, sparse, linear, or recurrent components. We study how much dense attention is needed to preserve task-level behavior under explicit support granularity and top-k budgets.
  We introduce an attention-mass top-k oracle for existing GQA checkpoints: for each layer and query position, it computes dense attention, selects head-averaged token support, and recomputes attention only on that support. The oracle is a diagnostic reference, not a deployable accelerator, and separates sparse-budget feasibility from indexer error and runtime realization effects.
  On Qwen-family retrieval-heavy evaluations, the longest per-query oracle rows stay within 1 point of dense, and a Qwen3.5-9B RULER-style sweep from 4K to 100K stays within 0.48 points. Guided by the oracle, we derive a head-collapsed auxiliary indexer trained by KL distillation from dense attention-mass distributions while keeping the backbone frozen. With separately distilled Qwen3.5-0.8B and Qwen3.5-9B indexers, the reported 16K/32K validation macro gaps are +2.04 and +1.13 points, treated as quality preservation rather than improvement; fused selection-block-shared support can introduce a larger realization gap.
  Preliminary single-card TTFT measurements show distilled-indexer sparse serving speedups of 1.71x for Qwen3.5-0.8B on NPU and 1.93x for Qwen3.5-9B on GPU against its dense FlashAttention-2 baseline. Additional random-init stress rows reach 3.44x, indicating sparse-runtime headroom but not validated output quality. This first release separates oracle feasibility, distilled-indexer quality, and runtime headroom, leaving a fully matched quality-latency frontier to future work.

</details>


### [447] [FunctionEvolve: Structure-Guided Symbolic Regression with LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07704)
*Zeyu Xia,Jun Zhu,Dong Yan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出FunctionEvolve，一种基于表达式树的符号回归进化框架，通过结构可见的搜索（结构摘要、局部树编辑、结构感知系数优化）结合LLM引导，在129个合成任务中以Claude Opus 4.6达到82.9%的SA@50，是同类基线的4.5倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM驱动的符号回归系统是"结构盲"的：候选表达不透明、缺乏局部变异机制、系数拟合脆弱且无法正确评估正确骨架。

Method: 提出FunctionEvolve框架，核心创新包括：(1) 使用表达式树组织搜索；(2) 结构摘要促进多样化父代选择；(3) 局部树编辑保留有用子表达式；(4) 结构感知的系数优化（分解、约束、简化）实现更可靠评分；(5) 仅使用基本函数族，无需领域特定规则。

Result: 在LLM-SRBench的129个合成任务中，FunctionEvolve+Claude Opus 4.6恢复107个精确形式，SA@50达82.9%（基线4.5倍），SA@1达55.8%（此前最佳3.6倍）。消融实验表明结构可见搜索是核心。

Conclusion: 结构可见的搜索是可靠符号恢复的关键，LLM引导的优化和结构感知系数优化是必要的提议和评分机制；同时指出材料科学子集中的共线性问题导致可识别性缺陷。

Abstract: Symbolic regression aims to uncover explicit scientific laws from data. Recent methods use LLMs to guide mutation from background text, which is more directed than random genetic programming. However, exact symbolic recovery requires both semantic guidance and explicit structure, so that domain-informed search are carried out through valid symbolic representation. Current LLM-driven systems remain structure-blind: they select among opaque candidates, lack explicit mechanisms for local mutation, and rely on brittle coefficient fitting that can undervalue correct skeletons. We propose FunctionEvolve, an evolutionary framework using expression trees to organize the whole search: structural summaries promote diverse parent selection, local tree edits preserve useful subexpressions, and structure-aware fitting decomposes, constrains, and simplifies coefficients for more reliable scoring. It uses only elementary function families, without additional domain-specific rules limiting generalization. On the 129-task synthetic subset of LLM-SRBench, FunctionEvolve with \emph{Claude Opus 4.6} recovers 107 exact forms, reaching 82.9% SA@50, 4.5x above same-backbone baselines, and 55.8% SA@1, 3.6x above the strongest previously published top-1 result. Ablations show that structure-visible search is central to reliable recovery, with LLM-guided refinements and structure-aware coefficient optimization serving as essential proposal and scoring mechanisms. We also audit the benchmark and show that collinearity in its materials-science subset creates identifiability issues.

</details>


### [448] [SAW: Stage-Aware Dynamic Weighting for Multi-Objective Reinforcement Learning in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07705)
*Yuchen He,Baolong Bi,Shenghua Liu,Huaming Liao,Yuyao Ge,Bolin Wan,Siqian Tong,Juan Chen,Jiafeng Guo,Xueqi Cheng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Stage-Aware Dynamic Weighting (SAW)方法，通过变异系数动态加权多目标奖励信号，解决奖励学习异步性问题，提升LLM对齐训练效率与性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MORL方法采用静态加权求和，忽略了不同目标间奖励学习速度异步的问题：学习充分的维度产生低方差噪声，干扰学习不足维度携带的高价值信号。

Method: 利用变异系数(CV)作为尺度不变的实时信息量指标，在batch内动态重新加权各维度的奖励或优势贡献，仅依赖batch级统计量，无需梯度回传。

Result: 在工具调用和文本摘要任务上，SAW在GRPO和GDPO框架下均提升了训练效率和最终性能。

Conclusion: SAW是一种轻量级、算法无关的通用插件，有效缓解了多奖励对齐中的异步学习问题。

Abstract: Although multi-objective reinforcement learning (MORL) is central to aligning large language models with complex human preferences, the prevailing practice of static weighted summation overlooks a more fundamental phenomenon: reward learning is markedly asynchronous across objectives. Well-learned dimensions quickly produce homogeneous, low-variance signals whose residual noise contaminates the aggregated reward (in GRPO) or occupies a fixed share of the advantage budget (in GDPO), interfering with the scarce yet high-value signals carried by under-learned dimensions. To address this asynchrony, we propose Stage-Aware Dynamic Weighting (SAW), a lightweight, algorithm-agnostic dynamic weighting mechanism. SAW utilizes the coefficient of variation (CV) as a scale-invariant proxy for real-time informativeness, reweighting each dimension's reward or advantage contribution by its relative informativeness within the batch. Unlike gradient-based methods that require multiple forward and backward passes, SAW relies solely on batch-level statistics, introducing nearly negligible computational overhead. Experiments on tool-calling and text summarization tasks demonstrate that SAW consistently improves both training efficiency and final performance under both GRPO and GDPO frameworks, confirming it as a general-purpose plug-in for multi-reward LLM alignment. Our code is available at https://github.com/Zhaolutuan/SAW

</details>


### [449] [Decoding Naturalistic Emotion Dynamics from the Brain: An LLM-Enhanced Regression Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07707)
*Lemei Zhang,Peng Liu,Hans Dahle Kvadsheim,August Sætre Aasvær,Shuer Ye,Reza Bonyadi,Maryam Ziaei,Jon Atle Gulla*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出用多目标回归框架替代传统离散分类，结合LLM自动提取情感标注、动态功能连接（DFC）和图论XAI技术，证明动态分布式网络交互比静态定位主义更能解释情感神经表征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统情感解码将连续、共现的情感状态简化为离散单标签分类，忽略了情感的动态和重叠特性，且依赖静态刺激，无法捕捉自然叙事下情感的快速波动。

Method: 采用多目标回归框架追踪连续情感轨迹；利用LLM从自然听觉叙事中提取细粒度情感轮廓作为标注；使用正则化与核方法机器学习算法作为连续估计器，基于动态功能连接（DFC）和静态ROI幅值建模；结合图论可解释AI（XAI）解析预测特征。

Result: 基于DFC时间快照训练的模型显著优于静态ROI幅值表征，能有效捕捉快速叙事波动下的连续情感轨迹；图论XAI揭示了高度可解释的情感特异性拓扑结构。

Conclusion: LLM自动标注可用于情感神经科学；动态分布式网络交互（而非定位主义）对情感具有更优的解释力，支持心理建构主义框架。

Abstract: Decoding emotional states from neural signals has been typically framed as a discrete, single-label classification task based on emotionally stable stimuli, a formulation that oversimplifies the continuous, fluid, and co-occurring nature of human affect. This study reconceptualizes emotion decoding by adopting a multi-target regression framework to track multiple overlapping emotional dimensions as continuous trajectories over time. Leveraging the robust generalization capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs), we extracted fine-grained, continuous sentiment profiles from a naturalistic auditory narrative, Alice in Wonderland, to serve as scalable proxies for subjective affect from human fMRI dataset. Departing from standard classification paradigms or mass-univariate subtractive contrasts that filter out network dynamics, we leverage regularized and kernel-based machine learning algorithms as continuous estimators to track the magnitude of macroscale neural state variations. We demonstrate that models trained on temporal snapshots of Dynamic Functional Connectivity (DFC) significantly outperform static region-of-interest (ROI) amplitude representations, effectively capturing continuous emotional trajectories under rapidly fluctuating narrative input. Furthermore, by implementing graph-theoretical Explainable AI (XAI) techniques, we deconstruct the underlying predictive features to reveal highly interpretable, emotion-specific topological configurations. Collectively, these results highlight the utility of LLM-automated annotation in affective neuroscience and provide compelling empirical evidence for psychological constructionist frameworks, demonstrating that dynamic, distributed network interactions offer superior explanatory power over strictly locationist accounts of emotion.

</details>


### [450] [WhiFlash: Accelerating Speculative Decoding with Token-Level Cross-Paradigm Routing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07710)
*Young D. Kwon,Miles Williams,Rui Li,Alexandros Kouris,Stylianos I. Venieris*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: WhiFlash 提出首个跨范式投机解码方法，通过细粒度路由统一自回归与扩散并行草稿模型，并引入缓存管理优化，在复杂推理任务上实现最高69.6%的吞吐提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有投机解码方法采用静态范式（自回归或扩散），但草稿准确性在单个序列内波动剧烈，静态范式无法适应这种动态变化，导致性能未充分释放。

Method: 提出 WhiFlash，统一自回归与扩散并行草稿模型；采用基于熵或学习的轻量级策略进行 token 级细粒度路由；引入 Lazy Catch-up 和 KV-only Prefill 两种缓存优化技术，将切换开销降至每轮延迟的7%以下。

Result: 相比最先进的自回归方法 EAGLE-3 提升高达69.6%的吞吐，相比扩散方法 DFlash 提升37.3%，实现了显著的加速。

Conclusion: 跨范式投机解码通过动态利用不同草稿架构的互补优势，能够显著超越单一范式的性能上限，为 LLM 推理加速提供了新方向。

Abstract: The autoregressive nature of large language models (LLMs) remains a significant bottleneck for inference, particularly in complex agentic workloads. While speculative decoding (SD) accelerates inference, current approaches rely on static drafting paradigms, utilising either autoregressive drafting models for reasoning or diffusion-based parallel drafting models for structured outputs. We empirically find that drafting accuracy fluctuates dramatically within a single sequence, leaving significant performance unrealised by static paradigms and coarse-grained routing. To address this volatility, we introduce WhiFlash, the first cross-paradigm SD method that unifies autoregressive and diffusion-based parallel drafting under a single token-level controller. WhiFlash adopts a fine-grained routing mechanism that employs either a lightweight entropy-based or a learned neural policy, both parametrised to provide a tunable balance between expected token gain and latency. To make high-frequency switching computationally viable, we introduce novel cache-management optimisations, Lazy Catch-up and KV-only Prefill, reducing switching overhead to below 7% of per-round latency. By capitalising on the complementary strengths of fundamentally distinct drafting architectures, WhiFlash achieves significantly higher acceptance lengths, yielding category-specific throughput gains of up to 69.6% over the state-of-the-art autoregressive EAGLE-3 and 37.3% over the diffusion-based DFlash.

</details>


### [451] [Rosetta Memory: Adaptive Memory for Cross-LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07711)
*Hao Yang,Shiqi Shen,Haoxuan Li,Zhipeng Wang,Zhi Gong,Xu Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出从"以LLM为中心的内存设计"转向"以内存为中心的LLM适配"，通过双端（写/读）轮廓条件算子及最小增益采样课程和性能差距奖励，解决跨模型内存迁移时上游模型写入内存无法有效激活下游LLM的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有内存系统通常以特定LLM为核心设计，但用户频繁切换不同LLM（如Claude编码、GPT写作），导致一个模型写入的内存难以被另一个模型有效利用。这是一个关键但未被充分探索的问题。

Method: 1. 从写和读两侧设计两个轮廓条件算子，联合训练优化内存存储与呈现；2. 提出最小增益采样课程，优先训练服务最少的LLM；3. 设计性能差距奖励，衡量算子实际贡献而非LLM自身能力。

Result: 在HotpotQA、2WikiMultihopQA和MuSiQue数据集上，模型持续优于基线，且在未见模型替换场景下保持鲁棒。

Conclusion: 以内存为中心的LLM适配方法能有效解决跨模型内存迁移问题，使内存操作在不同LLM间泛化，提升任务完成效果。

Abstract: Memory is the key component for transforming a stateless LLM into a persistent, evolving agent through experience accumulation, long-horizon planning, and continual self-improvement. Existing memory systems typically take the LLM as the center and design memory operations tailored to a specific backbone. In practice, however, users frequently switch between LLMs, for example using Claude for coding and GPT for writing across tasks, or routing different steps to different backbones within a single task for cost-effective trade-offs. As a result, memory written by one model often needs to be consumed by another. Making upstream memory effectively adapt to and activate downstream LLMs remains a critical yet underexplored problem. To bridge this gap, we shift the perspective from LLM-centric memory design to \emph{memory-centric LLM adaptation}. Specifically, we approach the above upstream-downstream memory adaptation problem from both the write and read sides, and design two profile-conditioned operators that are jointly trained to optimize how memory is stored and presented for better task completion. To ensure the learned operators generalize across a broad set of LLMs, we propose a minimum-gain sampling curriculum that prioritizes the least-served LLMs during training. To better measure the operators' actual contribution rather than the LLM's own capability, we design a performance-gap reward that compares against a naive memory baseline. Experiments on HotpotQA, 2WikiMultihopQA, and MuSiQue demonstrate that our model consistently outperforms baselines and remains robust under unseen-model replacement.

</details>


### [452] [Attention at the Theoretical Minimum: A Mathematics of Arrays Framework for Memory-Optimal Transformer Kernels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07713)
*Lenore Mullin,Gaetan Hains*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过数学数组（MoA）重新形式化缩放点积注意力及其softmax，推导出Denotational Normal Form（DNF），通过代数构造消除了所有中间数组，将数据移动从O(n² + n·dk + n·dv)降至O(n·dk + n·dv)，在数学上证明了内存最小性，并预测2-100倍加速和2-50倍能耗降低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代Transformer中注意力机制的二次方内存流量是实际瓶颈，而现有研究（如FlashAttention）依赖经验性tiling方案或硬件特定加速器，缺乏统一的代数框架来同时保证数组融合、形状变换正确性和可预测成本模型。

Method: 采用Mathematics of Arrays（MoA）框架，对缩放点积注意力和数值稳定的softmax进行形式化重写，推导出Denotational Normal Form（DNF），通过代数构造而非经验调优消除所有中间数组（包括隐式转置键缓冲区和所有softmax临时变量）。

Result: DNF实现O(n·dk + n·dv)数据移动（标准实现为O(n² + n·dk + n·dv)）；在双精度浮点下与PyTorch数值验证一致；预测性能模型显示2-100倍加速和2-50倍能耗降低，优势在超大规模下扩大。

Conclusion: MoA提供了一种形式化验证的流水线——从Python规范经Operational Normal Form到维度提升的硬件映射，实现了性能可移植的AI内核，对DARPA边缘部署和DOE超算应用具有直接价值。

Abstract: The attention mechanism is the dominant computational bottleneck in modern transformer-based AI. Its standard implementation incurs quadratic memory traffic in the sequence length~$n$, and DRAM accesses cost 100--1000$\times$ more energy than arithmetic operations on contemporary hardware, so any analysis focused solely on FLOP counts fundamentally mischaracterises the bottleneck.
  We present a Mathematics of Arrays (MoA) reformulation of scaled dot-product attention and its numerically stable softmax, deriving a Denotational Normal Form (DNF) that eliminates all intermediate arrays -- including the implicit transposed-key buffer and every softmax temporary -- by algebraic construction rather than empirical tuning. The DNF achieves $O(n_{dk} + n{_{dv}})$ data movement versus $O(n^2 + n_{dk} + n_{dv})$ for the standard implementation, where $n$ is the sequence length, $dk$ is the key dimensionality and $dv$ the value dimensionality, and is verified numerically against PyTorch at full double-precision floating-point on concrete inputs.
  Unlike hardware-specific accelerators or empirical tiling schemes such as FlashAttention, MoA simultaneously provides array fusion, shape-transformation correctness, and predictive cost models from a single algebraic framework. Memory minimality is a theorem established before any code is written. A predictive performance model projects $2$--$100\times$ speedup and $2$--$50\times$ energy reduction, with the advantage widening at exascale. The derivation establishes a formally verified pipeline from Python specification through (ONF) Operational Normal Form, and dimension-lifted hardware mapping, providing performance-portable AI kernels of direct relevance to DARPA edge-deployment and DOE exascale priorities.

</details>


### [453] [Beyond Accuracy: Interpreting Topic Representation in Suicide Ideation Detection Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07714)
*Hamideh Ghanadian,Isar Nejadgholi,Hussein Al Osman*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究超越传统准确率指标，通过可视化和几何分析，发现主题增强训练能提升自杀意念检测模型对心理风险因素(如移民、家庭问题、金融危机)的内部表征清晰度和可分离性，使得模型更透明、可解释。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自杀意念检测模型通常仅用聚合性能指标评估，缺乏对其内部如何表征心理风险因素的理解。在高风险心理健康应用中，理解这些内部表征对于安全性、透明度和负责任的部署至关重要。

Method: 使用基于原始数据和主题增强数据训练的模型，通过可视化和几何分析，检视内部表征空间中主题相关特征的一致性和可分离性。

Result: 主题增强显著提高了低代表性心理社会风险因素(如移民、家庭问题、金融危机)的表征清晰度和区分度。

Conclusion: 主题数据增强不仅能提升模型性能，还能使模型内部表征更加结构化和可解释，对高风险心理健康AI应用的透明部署具有重要意义。

Abstract: Suicide ideation detection models are typically evaluated using aggregate performance metrics, yet little is known about how they internally represent psychologically meaningful risk factors. In high-stakes mental health applications, understanding these internal representations is essential for safety, transparency, and responsible deployment. In this work, we move beyond accuracy and analyze how suicide detection models trained on original and topic-augmented datasets encode psychological risk factors in their internal representation space. Using visualization and geometric analysis, we examine the coherence and separability of topic-related features. Our results show that topic-aware augmentation increases the clarity and distinctness of underrepresented psychosocial risk factors such as immigration, family issues, and financial crisis. These findings suggest that augmentation not only improves model performance but also leads to more structured and interpretable internal representations.

</details>


### [454] [A Geometry-Aware Triplane Field Network for Vehicle Aerodynamic Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07724)
*Kangkang Qi,Huiyu Yang,Keqi Ding,Yunpeng Wang,Yuntian Chen,Yuanwei Bin,Rikui Zhang,Jianchun Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为GTF-Net的几何感知三平面场网络，用于车辆空气动力学压力和壁面剪切应力预测，通过结合AFNO频谱混合与CNN细化，相比基线模型Transolver、GINO和TripNet，在压力预测和壁面剪切应力预测上分别将相对L2误差从0.157降至0.145、从0.237降至0.226。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高保真CFD计算成本高昂，限制了车辆早期设计探索。机器学习表面场预测需要高效捕捉全局流场上下文与局部几何细节，现有方法在这两方面兼顾不足。

Method: GTF-Net通过共享MLP和双线性光栅化从采样表面点构建三平面特征，再由AFNO频谱混合（建模长距离气动耦合）与CNN细化（捕捉局部几何变化）组成的双流骨干网络处理。查询阶段融合了采样三平面特征、车辆对齐方向坐标、法向投影特征和基于体素的曲率代理。

Result: GTF-Net在压力预测上相对L2误差从基线最佳0.157降至0.145，壁面剪切应力从0.237降至0.226。消融实验验证了AFNO混合、局部CNN细化和查询侧几何编码各自均有贡献。

Conclusion: 结合结构化三平面表示与显式气动几何线索的机制有效提升了空气动力学场预测精度，为高效车辆设计探索提供了可行方案。

Abstract: High-fidelity computational fluid dynamics (CFD) is crucial to vehicle aerodynamic analysis, but its cost still constrains early-stage design exploration. Machine-learning-based surface-field prediction offers a faster alternative if the model can efficiently capture both global flow context and local geometric detail. This work proposes a machine-learning-based method, named the geometry-aware triplane field network (GTF-Net), for vehicle aerodynamic pressure and wall shear stress prediction. GTF-Net constructs triplane features directly from sampled surface points through a shared multilayer perceptron (MLP) and smooth bilinear rasterization. The planes are then processed by a dual-stream backbone that combines adaptive Fourier neural operator (AFNO) spectral mixing with convolutional neural network (CNN) refinement, so long-range aerodynamic coupling and local geometry-induced variations are modeled in the same representation. At query stage, sampled triplane features are combined with vehicle-aligned directional coordinates, normal-projection features, and a voxel-based curvature proxy. GTF-Net is compared with Transolver, geometry-informed neural operator (GINO), and TripNet, a triplane-based surrogate model. GTF-Net improves the relative L2 error from the strongest baseline value of 0.157 to 0.145 for pressure prediction and from 0.237 to 0.226 for wall shear stress prediction. Ablation results show that AFNO mixing, local CNN refinement, and query-side geometric encoding each contribute to accuracy, supporting the proposed mechanism of combining structured triplane representation with explicit aerodynamic geometry cues.

</details>


### [455] [Cutting LLM Evaluation Costs with SySRs: A Bandit Algorithm that Provably Exploits Model Similarity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07726)
*Zifan Lyu,Chahine Nejma,Tobias Wegel,Fanny Yang,Florian E. Dorner*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Synchronized Successive Rejects (SySR)算法，通过在最佳模型识别中引入配对比较来减少评估成本，该方法无需超参数且性能保证随模型相似度提升而增强。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法对所有模型在每条测试查询上评估过于浪费，尤其是当某些模型明显更差时仍需要精确估计其性能。作者希望利用模型间的相似性来减少评估成本。

Method: 在经典Successive Rejects算法基础上增加配对比较（paired comparisons）机制，利用模型对相同提示的相似响应特性，实现无需超参数的自适应评估预算分配。

Result: 在15个标准基准测试中，SySR在平均错误率和最坏情况下的预算消耗方面均优于所有基线方法。

Conclusion: SySR通过配对比较有效利用了模型相似性，在最佳模型识别任务中实现了更高效、更可靠的评估，且避免了先前方法中需要调参的问题。

Abstract: Large Language Models are typically benchmarked by evaluating every model on every test query. For practitioners seeking the best model to deploy, this is often wasteful: if a model clearly performs worse than others, there is no need to precisely estimate its performance. Best-arm identification algorithms can be naturally applied to drastically reduce costs by adaptively allocating evaluation budget. Further, language models often respond similarly to the same prompt-a property previous work has tried to leverage with mixed success. We propose Synchronized Successive Rejects (SySRs), augmenting the classical Successive Rejects algorithm with paired comparisons. Unlike prior attempts to leverage model similarity in best-model identification, our approach is hyperparameter-free and enjoys performance guarantees that improve with the degree of similarity between evaluated models. Empirically, our method outperforms all baselines in terms of average error rate across 15 standard benchmarks, and in terms of worst-case budget for reliably identifying the best model.

</details>


### [456] [Characterizing the Discrete Geometry of ReLU Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07728)
*Blake B. Gaines,Jinbo Bi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了全连接ReLU网络输入空间被分片线性区域划分所形成的复形结构，证明了其连通图的平均度以输入维度的两倍为上界，且图的直径存在与输入维度无关的上界，尽管区域数量随维度指数增长。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ReLU网络定义的连续分段线性函数将输入空间划分为多个线性区域（多面体），这些区域的几何结构对网络行为至关重要（非线性仅发生在区域边界），但以往研究仅关注区域总数上界，对区域间如何连接（复形的几何结构）了解甚少，且精确计算复形对大多数网络而言是难解的。

Method: 通过理论分析，证明了全连接ReLU网络输入空间划分的连通图的两个关键性质：(1) 平均度上界为输入维度的两倍，无论网络宽度和深度如何；(2) 图的直径上界与输入维度无关。实验部分在合成数据和真实数据上训练网络进行验证。

Result: 平均度被输入维度的两倍所界定；图的直径存在与输入维度无关的上界；实验验证了理论结果。

Conclusion: 揭示了ReLU网络线性区域连通图在平均度和直径上的惊人规律性——即使区域数量随维度指数爆炸，其连接结构却受到紧密约束，这对理解深度网络的泛化与行为有重要意义。

Abstract: It is well established that ReLU networks define continuous piecewise-linear functions, and that their linear regions are polyhedra in the input space. These regions form a complex that fully partitions the input space. The way these regions fit together is fundamental to the behavior of the network, as nonlinearities occur only at the boundaries where these regions connect. However, relatively little is known about the geometry of these complexes beyond bounds on the total number of regions, and calculating the complex exactly is intractable for most networks. In this work, we prove new theoretical results about these complexes that hold for all fully-connected ReLU networks, specifically about their connectivity graphs in which nodes correspond to regions and edges exist between each pair of regions connected by a face. We find that the average degree of this graph is upper bounded by twice the input dimension regardless of the width and depth of the network, and that the diameter of this graph has an upper bound that does not depend on input dimension, despite the number of regions increasing exponentially with input dimension. We corroborate our findings through experiments with networks trained on both synthetic and real-world data, which provide additional insight into the geometry of ReLU networks. Code to reproduce our results can be found at https://github.com/bl-ake/ICLR-2026.

</details>


### [457] [scCBGM: Interpretable Single-Cell Counterfactual Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07760)
*Alma Andersson,Aya Abdelsalam Ismail,Edward De Brouwer,Doron Haviv,Tommaso Biancalani,Kyunghyun Cho,Gabriele Scalia,Aïcha BenTaieb,Hector Corrada Bravo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出scCBGM框架，结合概念瓶颈架构与流匹配模型，实现单细胞数据的可解释反事实编辑，在组合泛化和反事实预测上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 单细胞RNA测序虽能以细胞分辨率表征表型，但条件组合空间巨大，穷举实验不可行，需要可解释的计算方法进行反事实预测和细胞编辑。

Method: scCBGM将概念瓶颈架构适配到单细胞数据：通过解码器跳跃连接和交叉协方差惩罚项促进解纠缠；并扩展至流匹配模型，支持编码-解码和生成两种模式下的概念引导编辑。

Result: 在合成数据（有真实反事实标签）和多个真实数据集上，scCBGM在组合泛化和反事实预测任务中均优于现有方法。

Conclusion: scCBGM为单细胞反事实分析提供了一个可解释且精确的框架，有望推动疾病生物学机制和治疗方案设计。

Abstract: Understanding cellular phenotypes and how they respond to perturbations is critical for disease biology and therapeutic design. Single-cell RNA sequencing enables characterization at cellular resolution, yet the combinatorial space of conditions makes exhaustive experimental mapping infeasible. We introduce single-cell Concept Bottleneck Generative Models (scCBGM), a framework for interpretable and precise counterfactual editing of individual cells. scCBGM adapts concept bottleneck architectures for single-cell data through decoder skip connections and a cross-covariance penalty that promotes disentanglement without dimensional constraints. We extend the framework to flow matching models, enabling concept-guided editing in both encoding-decoding and generation regimes. To enable rigorous evaluation, we develop a synthetic benchmark with ground-truth counterfactuals. Across multiple real datasets, scCBGM demonstrates superior performance in combinatorial generalization and counterfactual prediction, supported by cell-level validation on synthetic data and population-level benchmarks on real datasets.

</details>


### [458] [Contrast encodes inductive bias: separating slow noise from dynamics in predictive representation learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07770)
*Paarth Gulati,Ilya Nemenman*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文指出，在潜在空间中预测动力学的自监督方法（如JEPA）会因慢变噪声而学到无用的轨迹特定噪声特征。通过在单条轨迹内采样负样本，可消除此捷径，使模型聚焦于真正的动力学变量。实验在合成数据集和真实物理系统（摆锤）上验证了该结论。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自监督动力学表征学习方法在存在慢变噪声时，会错误地将噪声编码为主要特征，导致下游性能退化。作者旨在揭示这一失败的根本原因并寻求普适性解决方案。

Method: 对比分析两种负采样策略：跨轨迹采样（传统方式，如SimCLR-JEPA、DySIB）与单轨迹内采样。在合成运动点数据集和刚性摆锤视频上实验，验证噪声干扰机制及改进方案的有效性。

Result: 跨轨迹负采样时，模型优先编码慢变噪声而非真正动力学变量，且增加轨迹数或长度无法改善。单轨迹内负采样则迫使模型学习动力学相关变量，轨迹越长效果越好，即使噪声很强。

Conclusion: 单轨迹内负采样是解决对比预测目标中慢变噪声干扰的关键原则，为设计面向物理系统等含噪动力学数据的表征学习方法提供了指导。

Abstract: Self-supervised methods that learn representations and predict dynamics fully in the latent space, such as JEPA, have been shown to confuse slowly varying noise with the dynamical signals they aim to capture. Specifically, when noise features remain approximately constant within each trajectory, contrastive predictive objectives preferentially encode these features instead of the true latent variables governing the system. The learned representation then becomes dominated by trajectory-specific noise, so downstream performance degrades with noise strength and does not improve even as the number and duration of training trajectories increase. We argue that this failure is a property of the objective itself, shared by a long line of contrastive predictive objectives that sample negatives across trajectories. To illustrate this generality, we study the failure mode and its remedy in two settings: a standard SimCLR-style JEPA on a synthetic moving-dot dataset, and DySIB, a recently introduced method designed for extracting physically interpretable representations of dynamics, on movies of a rigid-body pendulum. When negatives are instead sampled within a single trajectory, the slow noise can no longer distinguish frames within that trajectory, removing the predictive shortcut. Training one encoder simultaneously on many such trajectories then forces it to encode the variables relevant for the dynamics, with longer trajectories yielding better representations even for strong slow noise. Our results point toward principles for designing contrastive predictive objectives in dynamical representation learning, especially for physical systems with noisy experimental observations.

</details>


### [459] [A Framework for Evaluating and Benchmarking Concept Drift Detection Methods](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07789)
*Vitor Cerqueira,Heitor Murilo Gomes,Marco Heyden,Bernhard Pfahringer,Albert Bifet*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个面向数据流概念漂移检测的标准化基准框架，包含可控漂移模拟方法、时序感知评估指标和留一数据集超参数优化协议，并在7个真实数据集上对14种漂移检测方法进行了系统评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前概念漂移检测研究存在评估实践不一致的问题：过度依赖简化的合成数据生成器、采用不兼容的评估指标、超参数选择缺乏透明度，导致方法间难以进行公平比较。

Method: (1) 基于蒙特卡洛试验在真实数据集中注入可控分布变化的漂移模拟方法；(2) 时序感知评估协议，推导F1检测分数、归一化检测时间等新指标；(3) 留一数据集超参数优化协议，提升配置鲁棒性。

Result: 在7个真实数据集、4种漂移类型（类先验、标签交换、特征置换、特征过滤）及突/渐变场景下，对14种方法进行了系统基准测试，提供了当前方法的优劣势分析和基线性能指标。

Conclusion: 建立了标准化评估框架和公开基准，为未来概念漂移检测研究提供了可复现的评估标准和参考基线。

Abstract: Data stream mining is fundamentally challenged by concept drift, where distributional changes can degrade model performance. Despite the proliferation of drift detection methods, progress in the field is hindered by inconsistent evaluation practices: studies rely on oversimplified synthetic data generators, adopt incompatible metrics, and lack transparency in hyperparameter selection, making fair comparisons difficult. We address this gap with a novel benchmarking framework comprising three contributions: (1) a drift simulation method that injects controlled distributional changes into real-world datasets via Monte Carlo trials, enabling supervised evaluation while preserving real-world data complexity; (2) an evaluation protocol for drift detection with timing-aware criteria, including the derivation of new metrics (e.g., F1 detection score, normalized detection time) that are comparable across streams; and (3) we advocate for a leave-one-dataset-out hyperparameter optimization protocol for drift detection methods that promotes configuration robustness across heterogeneous stream dynamics. We benchmark 14 widely used drift detection methods on 7 realworld datasets across 4 drift types (class prior, label swap, feature permutation, feature filtering), each under both abrupt and gradual transitions. Our experimental results provide insights into the strengths and weaknesses of current drift detection approaches while establishing baseline performance metrics for future research in this area. All code and experiments are publicly available.

</details>


### [460] [Byzantine Cheap Talk: Adversarial Resilience and Topology Effects in LLM Coordination Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07790)
*Aya El Mir,Martin Takáč,Salem Lahlou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了多智能体LLM系统中通信协议的鲁棒性，发现拜占庭攻击和通信拓扑限制会导致协调失败，并识别出两种稳定的行为模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究展示了廉价对话信道能促进LLM协作，但其在对抗条件和结构约束下的鲁棒性尚未被充分理解。

Method: 在4人Stag Hunt博弈中，跨越6个模型家族、720次试验，测试拜占庭攻击和通信拓扑限制两种脆弱性。

Result: 拜占庭攻击下非恶意智能体虽能察觉背叛但无法集体适应；显式限制通信拓扑导致协作崩溃，而无声限制则保持协作。

Conclusion: 协调失败源于智能体对隐藏信息的元推理，而非信息损失本身；通信信道可被用作对抗性注入向量，向智能体披露拓扑结构会降低协调能力。

Abstract: Multi-agent LLM systems increasingly rely on communication protocols for coordination, yet their robustness under adversarial and structural constraints remains poorly understood. Building on prior work showing that cheap-talk channels enable cooperation in LLM coordination games, we investigate two vulnerability classes in a 4-player Stag Hunt across six model families and 720 trials. First, when Byzantine agents signal cooperation but defect, non-Byzantine agents detect the betrayal within one round yet fail to adapt collectively: a substantial fraction continue cooperating despite repeated exploitation, unable to recover coordination due to the game's unanimity payoff structure. Second, explicitly restricting communication topology collapses cooperation, while applying identical restrictions silently preserves near-perfect cooperation. This establishes that coordination failure stems from agents' meta-reasoning about hidden information, not information loss itself. We identify two stable behavioral archetypes that replicate across all model cohorts: Defection-Prone models that switch permanently after betrayal, and Cooperation-Persistent models that continue cooperating at significant individual cost. These findings reveal concrete security vulnerabilities: communication channels can be exploited as adversarial injection vectors, and disclosing network topology to agents can degrade coordination even without any adversary present.

</details>


### [461] [Mitigating the Contractivity Trap in Diffusion ODEs via Stein Stabilization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07835)
*Shigui Li,Delu Zeng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出SteinDiff框架，通过Stein修正系数在推理阶段稳定扩散模型的大步长采样，无需重新训练或参考样本，有效抑制伪影并提升生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型大步长推理中存在"收缩性陷阱"：大步长效率高但破坏收缩稳定性，导致误差累积和伪影。现有方法缺乏无参考的推理时稳定化手段。

Method: 提出SteinDiff：1) 几何感知残差修正机制，在大步长求解器更新时进行正则化；2) 推导闭合形式的Stein修正系数，实现无参考的自适应调整；3) 建立基于分数控制的分布偏移扰动界，并提供EDM参数化的Stein视角。

Result: 实验表明SteinDiff能有效缓解大步长推理中的严重伪影，提升生成质量。

Conclusion: SteinDiff通过推理时的Stein修正弥补大步长与稳定性之间的鸿沟，为扩散模型的高效采样提供了无需重新训练的理论与实践方案。

Abstract: A fundamental tension exists in the large-step inference of diffusion models via their deterministic probability flow ordinary differential equation (PF-ODE) trajectories, which we identify as the contractivity trap: efficient inference favors large step sizes, while aggressive steps and highly expressive denoisers can undermine contraction-based stability certificates for error suppression. To address this, we propose SteinDiff, a step-wise inference-time stabilization framework that employs Stein-derived corrections without requiring reference samples. Specifically, SteinDiff introduces a geometry-aware residual correction mechanism that regularizes large-step solver updates without retraining. To this end, we derive a closed-form Stein correction coefficient for step-wise solver adjustment, enabling reference-free adaptation to local data geometry. We further establish a score-controlled perturbation bound under distributional shifts and provide a complementary Stein perspective on EDM-style parameterizations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SteinDiff mitigates severe artifacts and improves generative quality across large-step inference settings.

</details>


### [462] [Teacher-Free Self-Training Amplifies but Does Not Compound: A Pass@$K$ Crossover on a Free-Verifier Domain](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07856)
*Igor Lima Strozzi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究语言模型在自身验证输出上自训练时，究竟是获得了超越基座的新能力，还是仅仅增强了基座已有的表达能力。作者在一个"陷门"DSL上构建了由生成器、学习型评判器和精确验证器组成的"星座"框架，使用单块24GB GPU上的4位Qwen3-4B模型进行实验。三个主要发现：(i) 评判器引导的选择比验证器过滤的best-of-k高出9.1个百分点；(ii) STaR自训练提升上限但不会加速；(iii) 通过pass@K交叉测试发现，自训练只是集中概率质量而非扩展能力范围，属于放大而非复合效应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决一个根本性问题：语言模型在其自身验证输出上进行训练（自我训练/自举）时，是否获得了超出基座模型能力的真正新能力，还是仅仅更好地表达了基座模型已经具备的能力？这个问题对于理解自我改进学习的本质至关重要。

Method: 构建了一个无教师的"星座"框架，包含生成器、学习型评判器和精确验证器。采用FlashFill风格的"陷门"DSL，其中验证过的(问题, 解)对易于合成、难以反转且精确检查成本为零。在单块24GB GPU上使用4位量化的Qwen3-4B模型运行所有实验。采用critic-guided selection、verifier-filtered best-of-k、per-round STaR self-training和pass@K交叉测试等方法。

Result: (i) 评判器引导的选择比验证器过滤的best-of-k高出9.1个百分点（6/6种子），增益集中在候选解在未见输入上存在分歧的任务中。(ii) 每轮STaR自训练提升了上限但从未加速——增益跟踪剩余空间并在K=4条独立训练轨迹上减速。(iii) 不存在清晰的零能力边界，pass@K交叉测试表明：训练后的模型在小预算（pass@8）下获胜，但基座模型在大预算（pass@64）下反超，说明自训练只是集中概率质量而非扩大覆盖范围。

Conclusion: 得出的结论是：在这种设置下，自我训练产生的效果是"放大"（amplification）而非"复合"（compounding）。即模型只是更集中地表达了已有能力，而非获得了全新的、基座模型根本不具备的能力。这挑战了将自我训练结果简单归因为能力涌现的常见解释。

Abstract: When a language model trains on its own verified outputs, does it acquire capability beyond its base, or merely get better at expressing capability the base already had? We make the question decidable with a teacher-free "constellation" -- a generator, a learned critic, and a free exact verifier -- on a FlashFill-style "trapdoor" DSL, where verified (problem, solution) pairs are cheap to synthesize, hard to invert, and free to check exactly. Everything runs on one 4-bit Qwen3-4B on a single 24 GB GPU, with no model in the loop larger than the base. We report three findings. (i) Critic-guided selection beats verifier-filtered best-of-$k$ by $+9.1$ pp ($6/6$ seeds), with the entire gain localized to tasks where candidates disagree on held-out inputs. (ii) Per-round STaR self-training raises the ceiling but never accelerates -- the gain tracks remaining headroom and decelerates across $K=4$ independent training trajectories. (iii) The domain has no clean zero-capability frontier, so the usual "$0\% \to$ climb $=$ emergence" test is invalid here. A measured pass@$K$ crossover settles the diagnosis: the trained model wins at the operating budget (pass@$8$) but the base overtakes it at a large budget (pass@$64$) on every trajectory, so self-training concentrates probability mass rather than expanding reach. This is amplification, not compounding. ($K=4$ is indicative, not yet a robust across-trajectory CI.)

</details>


### [463] [Instrumented data for causal scientific machine learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07865)
*Daniel N. Wilke*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的数据范式——"仪器化数据"（instrumented data），每个数据点都携带其生成机制模型、显式不确定性以及可执行的反事实推理家族，作为观测数据和模板合成数据之外的第三种选择。通过验证与确认（V&V）的图像到仿真流水线实现，该范式支持因果干预，在科学机器学习领域具有广泛应用前景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 观测数据仅记录"发生了什么"而无法解释原因；模板合成数据虽有已知生成过程，但仅限于模拟器的模板，无法覆盖用户面临的实际案例。当前科学机器学习受限于数据质量而非模型规模，亟需一种新的数据范式。

Method: 提出"仪器化数据"概念，通过V&V图像到仿真流水线实现：传感器观测转化为完全指定、由求解器支持的仿真，具有显式可编辑参数，并传播了随机性/认知性不确定性。底层是案例特定的、机制监督的，支持通过Pearl的do算子进行因果干预。

Result: 该范式在验证、审计和代理模型训练方面产生影响，适用于计算生物学、气候、材料、流体力学和医学成像等领域。长期可证伪的含义涉及科学推理的基础模型。

Conclusion: 仪器化数据作为观测数据和模板合成数据之外的第三种选项，在操作上已可行，有望根本性提升科学机器学习的数据质量和因果推理能力。

Abstract: Scientific machine learning is limited less by model size than by the data it is trained on. Observational data records what happened but not why; template synthetic data has a known generating process but only for the simulator's template, not the case a user faces. We argue a third option is now operationally feasible: instrumented data, in which every datum carries the mechanistic model that produced it, an explicit uncertainty over that model, and an executable family of counterfactuals. Verification-and-validation (V&V) instrumented image-to-simulation pipelines are one realisation: a sensor observation becomes a fully specified, solver-backed simulation with explicit, editable parameters and a propagated aleatoric/epistemic uncertainty. The substrate is case-specific, mechanistically supervised, and supports causal interventions through Pearl's do-operator. Near-term consequences for validation, auditing, and surrogate training span computational biology, climate, materials, fluid mechanics, and medical imaging; a longer-term, falsifiable implication concerns foundation models for scientific reasoning.

</details>


### [464] [Still: Amortized KV Cache Compaction in a Single Forward Pass](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07878)
*Charles O'Neill,Alex Sandomirsky,Harry Partridge,Mudith Jayasekara,Max Kirkby*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Still 是一种轻量级、一次性前向传播的 KV 缓存压缩方法，通过小型的每层 Perceiver 网络实现，在 8× 到 200× 压缩率和 8k 到 128k 上下文长度下均优于现有方法，并支持迭代压缩以应对超长上下文。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: KV 缓存是长序列语言模型部署的内存瓶颈，现有压缩方法（选择法轻量但受限于子集，合成法表达力强但需逐上下文优化）无法同时满足轻量、表达力和可复用的要求。

Method: 提出 Still，对冻结的基础模型训练一个每层小型 Perceiver 网络，该网络通过单次前向传播生成紧凑的键和值，无需逐上下文优化，且支持迭代应用。

Result: 在 Qwen 和 Gemma 模型上，Still 在 8× 到 200× 压缩率和 8k 到 128k 上下文长度下占据速度-质量前沿；在 RULER 基准上超过最强基线 8-22 分；支持自由形式摘要，在 HELMET 和 LongBench 摘要任务中优于 KV-Distill。

Conclusion: 摊销（一次性训练）使得长上下文缓存压缩变得可行，而合成方法使得压缩状态在极端压缩下依然有用。

Abstract: The KV cache is the memory bottleneck of long-horizon language model deployment. Practically, a deployable compactor must be lightweight enough to call during inference, expressive enough to preserve context under constraint, and reusable across a trajectory. Existing compaction methods satisfy only part of this requirement: selection methods are lightweight but subset-bound, while synthesis methods are expressive but rely on per-context optimization. Here we introduce Still, a small per-layer Perceiver trained once against a frozen base model that produces compact keys and values in a single forward pass. On Qwen and Gemma models, Still occupies the favorable side of the speed--quality frontier across compression ratios from $8\times$ to $200\times$ and context lengths from $8$k to $128$k. On the long-context RULER grid, Still exceeds the strongest baseline by 8--22 points. The same compact cache also supports free-form summarization, preserving most of the full-context gain on HELMET and winning a pairwise LongBench summarization comparison against KV-Distill. Because compaction is a forward pass, Still can be applied iteratively, entering a long-horizon regime unavailable to per-context methods. We show that amortization makes long-context cache compaction tractable, and synthesis makes its compact state useful at extreme compression.

</details>


### [465] [Breaking the Bubble: Asynchronous Pipeline Parallel Training with Bounded Weight Inconsistency](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07881)
*Itay Elam,Eliron Rahimi,Avi Mendelson,Chaim Baskin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PACI是一种无气泡的异步流水线并行方法，通过本地梯度累积控制版本漂移，在不增加内存开销或全局同步的情况下，比同步1F1B-flush提高最多1.69倍的训练速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有流水线并行调度存在吞吐量、内存与优化一致性之间的权衡：同步方法有气泡问题，异步方法则引入权重版本不一致，通常需要权重暂存、预测或修正机制来弥补。

Method: 利用本地梯度累积作为版本控制机制，通过减缓参数版本的演化速度（相对于流水线延迟），限制任何微批次跨越的优化器更新次数，从而在有界的不一致性下实现无气泡异步训练。

Result: 在GPT风格语言模型预训练中，PACI匹配了同步1F1B-flush的稳定性和最终困惑度，保持相同的峰值内存占用，实现了完全利用的流水线吞吐量，训练时间-准确度提升最高达1.69倍。

Conclusion: 前向/反向的不一致性无需完全消除：当被明确约束时，可以安全地换取显著的效率提升。

Abstract: Pipeline parallelism is essential for training large neural networks, but existing schedules trade off throughput, memory, and optimization consistency. Synchronous pipelines preserve forward/backward weight consistency but suffer from bubbles; asynchronous pipelines remove bubbles but introduce weight-version mismatch, typically requiring weight stashing, prediction, or correction mechanisms. We introduce PACI (Pipeline Asynchronous training with Controlled Inconsistency), a bubble-free asynchronous pipeline method that bounds forward/backward version drift without weight stashing, prediction, additional parameter copies, or global synchronization. The key idea is to use local gradient accumulation as a version-control mechanism: by slowing parameter-version evolution relative to pipeline delay, PACI limits the number of optimizer updates crossed by any micro-batch while preserving steady-state utilization. In GPT-style language-model pretraining, PACI matches the stability and final perplexity of synchronous 1F1B-flush, retains the same peak memory footprint, achieves fully utilized pipeline throughput, and improves training time-to-accuracy by up to $1.69\times$ over the fastest flush baseline. These results show that forward/backward inconsistency need not be eliminated: when explicitly bounded, it can be safely traded for substantial efficiency gains.

</details>


### [466] [Strained Coherence: A Pre-Failure Signal in Coding Agent Execution Trajectories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07889)
*Marut Pandya,Kasey Zhang,Baiqing Lyu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出" strained coherence "（紧张连贯）这一安全相关失败模式：LLM编码代理有时会识别到自身推理中的问题却仍继续行动。作者构建了基于Claude Sonnet 4.6的检测器，在Terminal-bench-2轨迹上检测此模式，发现被标记轨迹的失败率达94%（未标记为46%），该方法优于词法基准，并能提供可解释的跨度级输出。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM编码代理存在一种危险行为模式：它们能够意识到自身推理中的矛盾或错误（"承认问题"），但随后仍然按照错误方向执行（"照常进行"）。这种"明知故犯"的行为是安全相关的关键失效模式，现有研究缺乏对此的系统定义和检测方法。

Method: 1. 对"strained coherence"给出操作性定义，涵盖verbalized reward hacking等重叠模式。2. 基于Claude Sonnet 4.6构建裁判模型，读取完整轨迹并标记出现该模式的文本段。3. 在44条Terminal-bench-2轨迹上（使用Qwen3.5-35B-A3B骨干模型）进行评估，并在Gemma4-31B上复现。4. 提供可解释的跨度级输出：引用承认语句、引用行动语句以及冲突类型分类。

Result: Qwen骨干上：被标记轨迹失败率94% vs 未标记46%（47点差距，p=0.003）。在匹配选择性下，检测器精度94% vs 词法基准88%。两种方法交叉的10条轨迹失败率100%（95% CI [69%,100%]）。Gemma复现：20点差距但未达统计显著（p=0.31），高冗长度子集差距30-40点。首次标记出现在轨迹83-84%时间点。对软化冲突标记的改写鲁棒（8/8）。

Conclusion: "Strained coherence"是一种可检测、可解释的LLM代理安全失效模式。本文提出的检测器能有效识别此类行为，提供细粒度、可解释的输出，优于简单的词法基准，并对输入变化具有鲁棒性。该模式普遍存在于不同骨干模型中，但依赖于模型产生可分析的思考内容。

Abstract: LLM-based coding agents sometimes acknowledge a problem in their own reasoning and then proceed anyway. We call this pattern strained coherence: a safety-relevant failure mode in which an agent has information that should change its behavior, states that information, and still acts against it. The pattern overlaps with verbalized reward hacking, where an agent names a tension between a task proxy and the underlying goal yet optimizes the proxy anyway. We give an operational definition, build a Claude Sonnet 4.6 judge that reads full trajectories and flags spans where the pattern occurs, and evaluate it on 44 Terminal-bench-2 trajectories using a Qwen3.5-35B-A3B backbone. Flagged trajectories fail 94% of the time versus 46% for unflagged trajectories (47-point gap, Fisher's exact p = 0.003; 46 points after excluding three prompt-embedded examples, p = 0.006). At matched selectivity, the detector reaches 94% precision versus 88% for a lexical discourse-marker baseline; the 10-trajectory intersection of the two methods has a 100% failure rate (Clopper-Pearson 95% CI [69%, 100%]). We replicate on Gemma4-31B with 43 trajectories: the overall signal is directionally consistent but not significant (20-point gap, p = 0.31), with attenuation driven largely by 13 trajectories with zero think content, where the detector has no substrate to analyze. In the high-verbosity Gemma tertile, the gap is +30 points; in the mid- and high-verbosity Qwen tertiles, it is +40 points each. The first flag appears at a median of 83-84% of elapsed trajectory time across both models, and the binary flag survives paraphrases that soften explicit conflict markers (8/8 trajectories). Unlike univariate predictors, the detector emits interpretable span-level output -- quoted acknowledgment, quoted action, and typed conflict -- showing what the agent saw and ignored.

</details>


### [467] [Partially Performative Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07890)
*Jaewook Lee,Tijana Zrnic*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出"部分表现性预测"框架，统一建模因模型部署引发的内源性分布偏移和外部时间变化导致的外源性分布偏移，并扩展了表现性稳定性和最优性的在线版本，分析了重复训练等启发式方法在该环境中的适应性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有表现性预测只考虑模型自身引起的内源性分布偏移，而现实世界中分布偏移往往同时包含内源（模型影响数据）和外源（外部环境变化）两种因素，缺乏统一的理论框架来刻画这种混合偏移场景。

Method: 提出部分表现性预测框架，将数据分布演化建模为部署模型和外部时间变化过程的联合函数；定义在线表现性稳定性和在线表现性最优性作为核心概念；分析重复训练等学习启发式方法在部分表现性环境中的收敛性和适应性。

Result: 成功扩展了表现性预测的核心概念到混合偏移场景，并给出了重复训练等启发式方法在部分表现性环境中成功适应的条件。

Conclusion: 部分表现性预测为理解现实世界中复合分布偏移提供了统一视角，弥合了经典外源性偏移和表现性内源性偏移之间的鸿沟。

Abstract: Performative prediction studies feedback loops that arise when predictive models are deployed in consequential domains. In these settings, deploying a model can change the population whose patterns the model aims to predict, inducing a distribution shift that is endogenous to the learning system. This perspective departs from classical treatments of distribution shift, where shifts are typically modeled as exogenous changes in the data-generating process. Yet, in practice, distribution shift is rarely one or the other. Predictive models may influence future data through the decisions they support, while the world itself continues to drift for reasons beyond the learner's control. We study partially performative prediction, a framework that captures both endogenous and exogenous sources of distribution shift. The framework generalizes performative prediction by allowing the data distribution to evolve both in response to the deployed model and according to an external, time-varying process. We extend the central notions of performative stability and performative optimality to this setting by defining their online analogues that track the evolving partially performative environment. We analyze practical learning heuristics, including repeated retraining, and characterize when they successfully adapt to partially performative environments.

</details>


### [468] [Temporal Coverage over Density: Parsimonious Training-Set Design for ML Climate Downscaling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07898)
*Karandeep Singh,Stefan Rahimi,Chad W. Thackeray,Stephen Cropper,Alex Hall*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了在有限计算资源下，如何最优分配高分辨率区域气候模拟的训练年份，以训练机器学习降尺度模型。结果表明，在固定数据预算下，广泛采样时间分布的气候状态（包括历史和未来）比时间连续性更重要，仅用十分之一的数据即可接近全数据训练效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高分辨率区域气候模拟计算成本高昂，但为气候影响评估提供关键信息。一个核心挑战是如何在有限的计算预算下，最优地分配稀缺的高分辨率模拟年份，使其既能捕捉强迫气候响应，又能反映内部变率。

Method: 使用CESM2大型集合模拟美国西部地区的数据，比较三种训练年份选择策略：1）连续历史年份块；2）模拟期开始和结束年份；3）全气候轨迹中分散分布的年份。在固定数据预算下评估这些策略的表现。

Result: 1）包含历史和未来年份的策略优于仅使用历史年份；2）全轨迹分散分布的年份表现最佳，说明广泛采样内部变率能提供额外信息；3）仅用十分之一的高分辨率数据，时间分布模型仍可与全数据训练竞争；4）时间分布模型能更好地再现未见过集合成员中的变率。

Conclusion: 在固定计算预算下，广泛采样气候状态比时间连续性更有价值。这为区域气候降尺度和大型集合预测工作流提供了实用指导。

Abstract: High-resolution regional climate simulations provide critical information for climate impacts assessments but remain computationally expensive, motivating the development of machine-learning downscalers and emulators. A key challenge is determining how limited high-resolution simulations should be distributed across a changing climate trajectory to capture both forced climate response and internal variability. Using the CESM2 Large Ensemble over the western United States, we compare three training-year selection strategies under fixed data budgets: a contiguous block of historical years, years drawn from both the beginning and end of the simulation period, and years distributed throughout the full climate trajectory. Including both historical and future years consistently outperforms training on historical years alone, demonstrating the importance of exposing downscaling models to climate states outside the historical record and highlighting limitations of stationarity assumptions common in statistical downscaling. Training on years distributed throughout the full climate trajectory performs best overall, indicating that broad sampling of internal variability provides additional information beyond exposure to the forced climate response alone. Models trained on temporally distributed subsets more successfully reproduce variability in unseen ensemble members while retaining strong performance across a wide range of climate diagnostics. Even when trained on only one-tenth of the available high-resolution years, temporally distributed models remain highly competitive with full-data training. These results suggest that, under fixed computational budgets, broad sampling of climate states is more valuable than temporal continuity when allocating scarce high-resolution simulations. The findings provide practical guidance for regional climate downscaling and large-ensemble projection workflows.

</details>


### [469] [Layer-wise Derivative Controlled Networks Achieve Competitive Accuracy and Gradient Stability Across Data Regimes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07908)
*Rowan Martnishn*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出基于链式法则的导数控制网络（CR），通过立方多项式层和前向模式逐层雅可比惩罚（DREG）实现。实验表明，CR在Pima糖尿病数据集和SST-5数据集上均取得显著优于基线模型的性能，梯度尾部比率可作为无标签的泛化诊断指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经网络在有限数据或表示噪声下泛化能力有限，缺乏有效的结构归纳偏置来引导模型学习低频、稳定的表征。

Method: 采用立方多项式层结合前向模式的逐层雅可比惩罚（DREG），通过控制导数实现层级别的正则化，并设计退火调度策略优化惩罚系数。

Result: 在Pima糖尿病数据集上，CR在5%到100%训练数据下均保持稳定准确率优势，梯度尾部比率约1.01-1.02（ReLU网络为1.07-1.09）。在SST-5上，CR在冻结词嵌入和BERT微调两种设定下均达到或超越此前最佳基线，且统计显著（p<0.05）。

Conclusion: 逐层导数控制引入了低频、稳定表征的结构归纳偏置，在表格数据和NLP领域均表现鲁棒；梯度尾部比率是可靠且无需标签的泛化能力诊断指标。

Abstract: Derivative-controlled networks based on ChainzRule (CR) combine cubic polynomial layers with a lightweight forward-mode per-layer Jacobian penalty (DREG). In this second paper of a multi-part series, we evaluate the generalization properties of CR across data regimes.
  We ablate the shape of the DREG coefficient schedule, demonstrating that the optimal annealing range depends on representation noise. On the Pima Diabetes dataset, CR achieves strong low-data performance and maintains a consistent accuracy advantage over baselines from 5\% to 100\% training data, supported by exceptionally stable gradient tail ratios ($\sim$1.01--1.02 vs. 1.07--1.09 for ReLU networks). Extensions to SST-5 show competitive or superior results in both frozen-embedding and BERT fine-tuned regimes, including outperforming prior BERT baselines despite substantially less training data. These results are statistically significant: CR achieves superior accuracy over the strongest published baselines we could identify on both datasets ($p < 0.05$).
  These results establish that layer-wise derivative control induces a structural inductive bias toward low-frequency, stable representations that generalizes robustly across tabular and NLP domains, data volumes, and representation qualities. The gradient tail ratio serves as a reliable, label-free diagnostic of generalization capability.

</details>


### [470] [CAAL: Contextual Bandits based Online Hand-Craft Active Learning Strategy Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07910)
*Shao-An Yin,Jiacong Li,Tianpei Xie,Cecile Levasseur,Wojciech Kowalinski,Nicola Elia*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出CAAL框架，通过上下文信息预测奖励来动态选择主动学习策略，克服了传统方法对未标注数据分布不确定的挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 主动学习算法面临未标注数据统计分布不确定性的挑战，难以选择最佳的手工策略。

Method: 提出CAAL (Contextual Adaptive Active Learning) 框架，将每种手工策略视为一个"臂"，利用外部上下文信息进行奖励预测，动态选择标注批数据的策略。

Result: 在公开数据集上，CAAL在多种批量大小下均优于现有的基准自适应策略。

Conclusion: CAAL提供了一种通用框架，可结合领域知识定制奖赏和上下文候选，有效提升主动学习策略选择效果。

Abstract: The challenge with active learning algorithms is the uncertainty of the statistical distribution of unlabeled data, making it difficult to choose the best hand-crafted strategy. To address this, we introduced Contextual Adaptive Active Learning (CAAL). In CAAL, each "arm" represents a hand-crafted strategy. Unlike existing frameworks that select strategies based only on feedback from labeled data, we dynamically choose strategies for labeling batches of data using reward prediction with external context information. This general framework allows for customization with domain knowledge to design more effective rewards and context candidates. In addition, we experimentally show that CAAL outperforms the existing baseline adaptive strategy on public datasets using our reward and context design. Our results are consistent regardless of batch size in each iteration.

</details>


### [471] [The Easy, the Hard, and the Learnable: Confidence and Difficulty-Adaptive Policy Optimization for LLM Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07950)
*Zhanke Zhou,Xiangyu Lu,Chentao Cao,Brando Miranda,Tongliang Liu,Bo Han,Sanmi Koyejo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出CoDaPO方法，通过置信度和难度自适应地重新加权策略更新和重采样可学习问题，相比标准GRPO在12个基准上持续提升准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准GRPO对难、易、可学习问题统一采样和加权导致计算效率低下，作者通过追踪token对数概率等动态发现置信度膨胀、优势收缩和层次收敛三种现象，表明更新效用取决于问题难度和模型当前能力。

Method: 提出CoDaPO，从 rollout 置信度和经验难度为每个问题分配有界值，用于重加权策略更新，并在固定计算预算下对高价值可学习问题进行重采样以增加发现。

Result: 在12个基准上，CoDaPO持续优于现有RL方法。

Conclusion: 基于置信度和难度的自适应策略优化能有效提升计算效率和推理准确性。

Abstract: RL with verifiable rewards can substantially improve LLM reasoning, yet standard GRPO-style training often treats easy, hard, and learnable questions alike through uniform sampling and weighting, leading to inefficient compute allocation. We study GRPO by tracking token log-probabilities, group-normalized advantages, and the induced token-level update weights. This reveals three recurring dynamics as training proceeds: (1) confidence inflation, (2) advantage contraction, and (3) hierarchical convergence. These findings suggest that the utility of each update depends strongly on both question difficulty and the model's current competence. Motivated by this, we propose Confidence and Difficulty-adaptive Policy Optimization (CoDaPO), which assigns each question a bounded value from rollout confidence and empirical difficulty. CoDaPO then uses this value to reweight policy updates and resample high-value learnable questions within mini-batches, thereby increasing discovery within the learnable band under a fixed compute budget. Across twelve benchmarks, CoDaPO consistently improves accuracy over existing RL methods. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/tmlr-group/CoDaPO.

</details>


### [472] [Minibatch Selection via Partition Matroid Constrained Gradient Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07954)
*Prayas Agrawal,Prateek Chanda,Ishita Khatri,Ganesh Ramakrishnan,Bamdev Mishra,Pratik Jawanpuria*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出PartitionSel，一种跨域小批量选择方法，通过分区拟阵约束和梯度匹配优化，在异构数据训练中平衡收敛速度与领域覆盖，实验证明其优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的小批量选择方法要么在每个领域内独立选择样本，要么依赖计算昂贵的代理模型学习连续领域权重，缺乏有效的跨域耦合机制来减少冗余。

Method: 提出PartitionSel方法，以验证集引导的梯度匹配效用为目标，在分区拟阵约束（每个领域的预算限制）下进行跨域小批量选择，该目标是弱子模函数，可采用正交匹配追踪算法求解并具有近似保证。

Result: 在Qwen2.5和Llama-3上对MetaMathQA和Mol-Instructions进行微调实验，PartitionSel在两个基准上均优于基于领域的和领域无关的基线方法，并且减少了批次内梯度冲突对的数量。

Conclusion: 跨域耦合机制能够转化为更兼容的训练更新，减少梯度冲突，从而提升模型微调效果。

Abstract: Training large language models (LLMs) on heterogeneous data requires selecting minibatches that balance convergence speed with coverage across domains. Existing methods either select samples independently within each domain or rely on computationally expensive proxy models to learn continuous domain weights. We propose PartitionSel, a cross-domain minibatch selection approach that maximizes a validation-guided gradient-matching utility under per-domain budgets encoded as a partition-matroid constraint. By coupling the per-domain budgets through a single utility, PartitionSel is designed to reduce redundancy in selections across domains. The proposed objective is weakly submodular and admits an orthogonal matching pursuit algorithm with provable approximation guarantees. Empirically, we evaluate PartitionSel for minibatch selection during the fine-tuning of Qwen2.5 and Llama-3 on MetaMathQA and Mol-Instructions. PartitionSel achieves robust gains over per-domain and domain-agnostic baselines on both benchmarks. It also reduces the number of conflicting gradient pairs within each batch, indicating that the cross-domain coupling translates into more compatible training updates.

</details>


### [473] [Overcoming the Limits of Finite Difference Method; Physics-Informed Neural Network for Noisy High-Dimensional Heat Diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07982)
*Shreesh Bhattarai,Harish Chandra Bhandari*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 在高维、高噪声的热扩散问题中，PINN相比传统有限差分法(FDM)具有显著优势：在3D/20%噪声下准确率91% vs 36%，且节点效率更高。这重新定义了求解器选择标准——需同时考虑噪声暴露与维度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典数值方法在高维含噪边界条件下的热扩散问题中精度灾难性下降，而实际物理系统中噪声不可避免，亟需一种系统性解决方案。

Method: 提出Physics-Informed Neural Network (PINN)框架，在1D/2D/3S空间维度下系统评估其性能，并与有限差分法(FDM)进行对比，同时通过物理铜热系统实验验证。

Result: 在3D/20%边界噪声下，PINN保持约91%准确率，FDM仅36%；在真实铜热系统中，PINN边界重建误差降低3.3倍；3D下PINN所需时空节点少于FDM。

Conclusion: 求解器选择的关键轴不仅是精度，而是噪声暴露与维度的联合考量。在高噪声高维场景下，经典方法已不足够，PINN应成为该条件下的操作标准。

Abstract: High-dimensional transient heat diffusion under noisy boundary conditions exposes a fundamental limitation of classical numerical methods: accuracy degrades catastrophically where physical noise is unavoidable. This paper presents a Physics-Informed Neural Network (PINN) framework as a systematic solution to this problem across one, two, and three spatial dimensions, establishing clear operational regimes that redefine solver selection in noisy thermal systems. Under 20% boundary noise in 3D, PINN sustains approximately 91% accuracy while Finite Difference Method (FDM) collapses to 36%, a clear decisive advantage. This is further confirmed in a physical copper thermal system, where PINN reduces boundary reconstruction error by 3.3 times under realistic noise conditions. This noise resilience is accompanied by a dimensionality-driven efficiency crossover: PINN requires fewer spacetime nodes than FDM in 3D while achieving superior accuracy, exposing the true cost of classical discretization at scale. These findings reframe solver selection: the decisive axis is not accuracy alone, but noise exposure and dimensionality jointly. When noise and dimensionality are both high, the classical solver paradigm is insufficient; this work provides the foundation to justify PINN as the operational standard in such regimes.

</details>


### [474] [Enhancing AI Interpretability and Safety through Localised Architectures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07998)
*Ian Seet,Jonas Bozenhard,Simon Osterman*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文探讨了生成式AI（尤其是LLM和LRM）在可解释性、安全性和可持续性方面的问题，提出局部化硬件ML架构（如低带宽、高每节点表达性的设计）相比深度神经网络在GPU集群上运行更具可解释性和计算效率，尤其适用于小数据集场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大模型（LLM/LRM）存在可解释性差、计算效率低、可持续性不足等问题，而局部化ML模型在小数据集上通常比深度神经网络更具可解释性和计算效率，作者类比推断局部化硬件架构可能也有类似优势。

Method: 通过类比推理（局部化ML模型 vs 深度神经网络），提出局部化硬件架构的设计原则（低带宽、高每节点表达性），并评估多种硬件ML范式（如每节点表达性、能效、技术成熟度）的适用性。

Result: 局部化硬件架构在可解释性和计算效率上有潜在优势，适合小数据集任务，但在大模型场景下的竞争力仍需进一步验证。

Conclusion: 局部化硬件ML架构为提升AI可解释性和可持续性提供了新方向，但当前技术成熟度有限，需更多实践验证。

Abstract: Recent advances in generative AI, especially powerful Large Language Models (LLMs) and Large Reasoning Models (LRMs), raise concerns over the interpretability, safety and sustainability of these large and opaque AI models. The power of such architectures is derived not only from the scalability of deep neural networks, but also massively parallel hardware such as GPU clusters. The diffuse nature of deep neural networks gives them great function-approximation capability when provided with sufficient training data but imposes a cost in interpretability and computational efficiency. Observing that localised machine learning (ML) models tend to be more interpretable and computationally efficient than deep neural networks on small datasets, we reason by analogy that similar advantages may apply to specific localised hardware ML architectures. We argue that localised architectures with lower bandwidth but higher expressivity per node have the potential to be fundamentally more interpretable than deep neural networks running on GPU clusters while remaining competitive for smaller datasets. We then evaluate the suitability of various hardware ML paradigms for implementing such localised architectures and evaluate their per-node expressivity, energy efficiency and practical maturity of the technology required.

</details>


### [475] [Evaluating the Impact of Task Granularity on Catastrophic Forgetting in Continual Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08013)
*Emre Alyamac,Himanshu Janmeda,Shashwat Krishna,Yash Vijay*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究持续学习中类别学习顺序对灾难性遗忘的影响，提出三种策略（粗到细、细到粗、扁平），在CIFAR-100上使用EWC方法验证假设：先学一般类别再学具体类别能否减少遗忘。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究学习顺序（尤其是从粗粒度到细粒度的学习路径）是否能减轻持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题，为设计增量学习系统提供指导。

Method: 在CIFAR-100上设计了三种学习顺序策略：(1) 粗到细：先学2个超类，再扩展到10个子类；(2) 细到粗：先学10个子类，再合并为2个超类；(3) 扁平：从头开始同时学习所有10个类。使用弹性权重巩固（EWC）防止过渡阶段的遗忘，评估指标包括准确率、精确率、召回率、F1以及反向迁移和遗忘率等持续学习指标。

Result: 论文尚未给出具体实验结果，但预期通过对比三种策略的遗忘率和反向迁移等指标，验证先学习一般类别（粗到细）能否建立稳定基础，从而减少后续学习细粒度区分时的知识遗忘。

Conclusion: 该研究有望揭示学习顺序对持续学习性能的影响，若粗到细策略有效，可指导实际系统中增量学习序列的设计，提升模型在动态环境中的知识保留能力。

Abstract: Catastrophic forgetting, the abrupt loss of previously acquired knowledge upon learning new information, remains the central challenge in Continual Learning. This project investigates whether the order in which a model learns information affects how well it retains knowledge. Specifically, we ask: does learning general categories first (like "animals" vs "vehicles") before learning specific classes (like "dog" vs "cat") reduce forgetting compared to learning all classes at once?
  We test three approaches on CIFAR-100: (1) Coarse-to-Fine: train on 2 super-classes, then expand to 10 specific sub-classes, (2) Fine-to-Coarse: train on 10 sub-classes, then group into 2 super-classes, and (3) Flat: train on all 10 classes from the start. We use Elastic Weight Consolidation (EWC) to prevent forgetting during transitions. Our hypothesis is that learning general patterns first creates a stable foundation that helps the model retain knowledge when learning more detailed distinctions. We evaluate using standard metrics (accuracy, precision, recall, F1) plus continual learning metrics like backward transfer and forgetting rates. This work could inform how we design learning sequences for real-world systems that need to learn incrementally.

</details>


### [476] [Semantic Quorum Assurance: Collective Certification for Non-Deterministic AI Infrastructure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08021)
*Jun He,Deying Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出语义法定人数保证（SQA），一种面向不可预测的智能体基础设施的控制平面原语，通过多样化验证者小组和风险适应性法定人数谓词，将云操作中不安全提案的批准率从18.5%降至0.3%，验证延迟1.45-4.12秒。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型代理在自主云运维中会产生语义可靠性问题：提案语法正确、静态授权但操作不安全，传统分布式共识协议无法评估提议意图的安全性。

Method: SQA将提案表示为带密码证据链的声明式执行合约，路由给多样化只读沙箱验证者小组，采用风险适应性法定人数谓词（融合模型与原型多样性、校准置信度评分、原型特定否决权），通过主权执行门批准提案。

Result: 在500个基础设施变异场景中，SQA将不安全批准率从单代理的18.5%降至0.3%，中位验证延迟1.45-4.12秒。

Conclusion: SQA有效解决了LLM代理在云运维中的语义可靠性问题，大幅提升安全性且延迟可控。

Abstract: As large language model (LLM) agents are integrated into autonomous cloud operations, distributed systems face a semantic reliability problem: proposer agents can generate production mutations, such as modifying IAM policies, opening firewall security groups, or executing data exports, that are syntactically valid and statically authorized but operationally unsafe. Classical distributed consensus protocols replicate deterministic state transitions but do not evaluate the safety of the proposed intent. To address this gap, we introduce Semantic Quorum Assurance (SQA), a control-plane primitive for governing non-deterministic agentic infrastructure. SQA represents proposals as declarative execution contracts bound to cryptographic evidence chains and routes them to a diverse panel of read-only, sandboxed validator agents. SQA aggregates their judgments under a risk-adaptive quorum predicate that enforces model and archetype diversity, adjusts weights based on calibrated assurance scores, and respects archetype-specific vetoes. Admitted proposals execute only through a sovereign execution gate. We instantiate SQA in a cloud-native control plane and formalize a correlated cognitive failure model for non-deterministic validators. On 500 infrastructure-inspired mutation scenarios, with safety results reported on held-out safe/unsafe trials excluding ambiguous scenarios, SQA reduces unsafe approval from 18.5% for single-agent validation to 0.3% while adding median validation latency of 1.45--4.12 seconds across the studied risk buckets.

</details>


### [477] [CausShield: Sample Reconstruction-Resilient Vertical FL via Causal Representation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08027)
*Yongqi Jiang,Yansong Gao,Siguang Chen,Anmin Fu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CausShield是一种基于结构因果模型(SCM)的垂直联邦学习防御方法，通过将共享表示分解为任务相关和任务无关两部分，在保护模型效用的同时实现全周期隐私保护，理论证明其收敛性，实验表明在隐私保护、模型效用和计算效率上均优于七种SOTA方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 垂直联邦学习面临主动样本重建攻击威胁，现有防御方法难以在模型效用和隐私保护间取得满意平衡：要么抑制任务相关信息，要么依赖端到端监督训练导致早期轮次脆弱。

Method: 基于SCM洞察，将原始样本中的因果特征(任务相关)与非因果特征(任务无关但含隐私信息)分离；通过精心设计的优化问题和无监督表示学习，将VFL中客户端与协调服务器间的共享表示分解为任务相关和任务无关两部分。

Result: 与七种SOTA方法（包括USENIX Security'25的InvL和NDSS'25的URVFL攻击）对比，CausShield在隐私保护、模型效用和计算效率方面均表现最佳。

Conclusion: CausShield通过因果驱动的表示分解实现了全周期隐私保护，理论证明了标准VFL收敛行为得以保持，是一种有效且高效的VFL防御方案。

Abstract: Vertical federated learning (VFL) is a distributed learning paradigm that leverages vertically partitioned features across isolated parties without sharing raw samples; however, it remains vulnerable to active sample reconstruction attacks. Existing defenses fail to achieve a satisfactory trade-off between model utility and privacy protection, due to either suppressing task-relevant information alongside privacy-sensitive features or relying on end-to-end supervised training to converge the defense module, which exposes the model to early-epoch vulnerability.
