Depth pruning can reduce latency by skipping redundant Transformer blocks, but existing methods (i) provide limited control under user-specific compute budgets and (ii) typically fix the routing path, failing to adapt as the context grows during decoding. We propose Buddy, a budget-driven dynamic depth routing framework. Buddy uses a lightweight Decision Module to score intermediate layers conditioned on the input and deterministically executes the top-k layers to satisfy a given budget. To support decode-time adaptation, Buddy reuses the first-layer KV cache as a low-overhead global context source and pools it together with the newest token representation before each routing decision. When no explicit budget is provided, an optional Budget Predictor estimates an input-dependent compute level to balance quality and efficiency. Experiments on Llama-family and Qwen models show that Buddy is competitive with strong static pruning baselines and often improves the accuracy-compute trade-off, while uniquely supporting strict budget control, decode-time rerouting, and multiple budgets within a single trained model.

</details>


### [623] [Investigating Calibration Challenges in Probabilistic Electricity Price Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09517)
*Jan Niklas Lettner,Hadeer El Ashhab,Benjamin Schäfer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文指出当前概率电价预测中，由于过度关注预测的锐度而忽视校准性，导致预测模型过于自信、统计不可靠，并呼吁未来研究应转向校准感知的目标与架构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着可再生能源并网增加市场波动性，概率电价预测对风险管理至关重要，但现有评分规则偏重锐度而牺牲校准性，导致不确定性估计不可靠，存在理论与实践之间的关键差距。

Method: 通过理论分析揭示当前概率评分规则（proper scoring rules）在锐度与校准性之间的权衡问题，指出模型可能退化为确定性预测的代理，从而丧失分布完整性。

Result: 发现当前评分规则导向的模型虽然锐度高，但校准性差，生成过于自信且统计上不可靠的不确定性估计，无法真实反映市场风险。

Conclusion: 未来概率电价预测研究应转向校准感知的目标函数与模型架构，以确保预测的分布完整性，实现更可靠的风险管理。

Abstract: As renewable energy integration increases market volatility, probabilistic electricity price forecasting has become essential for effective risk management. However, current-proper-scoring rules often prioritize forecast sharpness at the expense of calibration, leading to overconfident and statistically unreliable uncertainty estimates. This work highlights the critical gap between theoretical scoring and practical calibration, demonstrating that models can become mere proxies for deterministic forecasts when reliability is neglected. We conclude that future research must shift toward calibration-aware objectives and architectures to ensure the distributional integrity of energy market forecasts.

</details>


### [624] [Efficient Traffic Prediction at Scale: A Systematic Study of STGCN Architectural Depth](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09539)
*Soban Nasir Lone,Mohamed Abouelela,Taeyoung Yu,Jiwon Kim,Constantinos Antoniou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过系统实验发现，标准STGCN（2-block）对于交通预测任务可能是过度参数化的：单块架构在短时预测上表现最优，计算成本显著更低（CPU推理延迟降低61%，吞吐量提升37%），而3-block架构仅带来不到0.5%的提升却增加了一倍以上的计算开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索STGNN架构本身是否过度参数化，为实际部署和效率优化提供指导。

Method: 在四个交通数据集上，系统比较1-block、2-block（标准）和3-block STGCN变体的预测性能与计算效率。

Result: 1-block在3/4数据集上对短时预测最优；相比1-block，2-block推理延迟增加61%，吞吐量降低37%；3-block计算成本翻倍但仅提升<0.5%。

Conclusion: 默认2-block STGCN对许多应用而言过度参数化，建议使用更浅的架构以平衡效率与性能。

Abstract: Spatio-temporal graph neural networks (STGNNs) have become the dominant approach for traffic prediction, yet their computational requirements pose challenges for practical deployment in intelligent transportation systems (ITS). While recent work has proposed efficient alternatives to STGNNs, a fundamental question remains unexplored: are these architectures themselves over-parameterised? We examine this question using the Spatio-Temporal Graph Convolutional Network (STGCN), one of the most widely adopted models in this domain. Through systematic experiments across four diverse traffic datasets, we compare 1-block, 2-block (standard), and 3-block STGCN variants. Our findings reveal that the single-block architecture achieves optimal performance for short-term prediction (10 mins) on three of four datasets, while incurring only marginal degradation ($\leq$1.8% relative error) at longer horizons. Crucially, the 2-block variant incurs 61% higher CPU inference latency and 37% lower throughput relative to 1-block -- substantial overhead for resource-constrained ITS deployment. The 3-block architecture offers no favourable tradeoff, more than doubling computational cost for $<$0.5% relative improvement. These results suggest that the default 2-block STGCN may be over-parameterised for many applications, with implications for both practitioners deploying traffic prediction systems and researchers benchmarking efficiency-focused methods.

</details>


### [625] [Safe-RULE: Safe Reinforcement UnLEarning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09559)
*Shixiong Jiang,Taozheng Zhu,Fanxin Kong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Safe-RULE框架，一种用于离线安全强化学习的防御机制，通过安全强化遗忘技术消除数据投毒攻击的影响，无需重新训练即可恢复策略安全性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离线安全强化学习依赖静态数据集，容易受到数据投毒攻击，导致策略行为不安全。现有防御方法需要从头重新训练或访问原始训练环境，成本高昂且不实用。

Method: 提出Safe-RULE（Safe Reinforcement Unlearning）框架，将强化遗忘扩展到离线安全RL场景，在遗忘过程中同时考虑任务性能和安全约束，消除中毒数据影响。

Result: 在多个基准安全RL任务上，Safe-RULE有效提升了面对数据投毒攻击时的安全性能。

Conclusion: Safe-RULE是一种有效的离线安全RL防御框架，能够在无需重新训练的情况下消除数据投毒影响，保障策略安全。

Abstract: Offline safe reinforcement learning (Safe RL) enables policy learning without online interactions, making it suitable for safety-critical systems such as robotics systems. However, its reliance on static datasets exposes offline Safe RL to data poisoning attacks, where adversaries inject malicious samples that compromise safety and induce unsafe policy behavior. In this work, we propose a new learning paradigm, named safe reinforcement unlearning (Safe-RULE), used as a defense framework to remove the influence of poisoned data without retraining from scratch or requiring access to the original training environment. We further extend reinforcement unlearning to offline Safe RL by explicitly accounting for both task performance and safety constraints during the unlearning process. Experiments across benchmark Safe RL tasks demonstrate that our approach effectively enhances safety performance against data poisoning attacks.

</details>


### [626] [On Choosing the $μ$ Parameter in Gaussian Differential Privacy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09582)
*Bogdan Kulynych,Antti Honkela*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了从纯差分隐私（ε）到高斯差分隐私（μ）的映射关系，通过匹配强对手成员推断攻击的最坏情况成功概率，基于三种指标（固定FPR下的乘法优势、固定召回率下的精确度、标准隐私剖面）建立原理性映射，推荐μ≈ε/5作为保守的通用转换公式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着GDP被用于报告隐私保护机器学习中的隐私保证，需要建立从纯DP（ε）到GDP（μ）的原理性映射关系，以便在不同隐私定义之间进行有意义的比较和转换。

Method: 通过匹配强对手成员推断攻击的最坏情况成功概率，基于三种指标：固定FPR下的乘法优势、固定召回率下的精确度、标准隐私剖面，推导出ε到μ的映射关系。

Result: 给出了在多个参数范围内的μ值表格，并推荐μ≈ε/5作为保守的通用转换公式。

Conclusion: 提供了从纯DP到GDP的原理性映射方法，并给出了实用的转换公式，有助于不同隐私定义之间的标准化比较。

Abstract: Recent work argues for using Gaussian differential privacy (GDP) to report the privacy guarantees in privacy-preserving machine learning. We provide principled mappings from pure-DP $\varepsilon$ to GDP $μ$ by matching the worst-case success of a strong-adversary membership inference attack in terms of three metrics: multiplicative advantage at fixed FPR, precision at fixed recall, and the standard privacy profile. We tabulate $μ$ values across a useful range of parameters and recommend $μ\approx \varepsilon/5$ as a conservative general-purpose conversion.

</details>


### [627] [Assessing Sample Quality in Conditional Generation under Compositional Shift](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09601)
*Berker Demirel,Valentino Maiorca,Marco Fumero,Theofanis Karaletsos,Francesco Locatello*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对条件生成模型在外推场景下的评估难题，提出了一种基于训练分布的后验样本信任评分方法，该评分结合全局真实性与属性忠实度，可在无目标分布的情况下有效筛选、排序和弃权条件生成样本，在生物成像和视觉基准上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有条件生成模型评估指标需要参考目标分布，但在外推生成（如探索未观测到的属性组合）场景下，目标分布不可得，形成了评估的循环困境。作者希望解决这一评估难题。

Method: 提出后验、逐样本的信任评分（trust score），包含两个可估计的分量：(1) 全局真实性（global realism），衡量样本与真实数据流形的兼容性；(2) 属性忠实度（attribute-wise faithfulness），衡量样本是否更接近请求的属性而非其他可行属性。在观测属性满足温和覆盖条件时，该评分可恢复有意义的跨外推生成比较。

Result: 在生物成像任务中，选出的样本更好地保留了真实形态结构并提升了下游预测性能；在受控视觉基准上也观察到类似提升。该评分还可用于生成过程中的提前弃权（full decoding之前）。

Conclusion: 本文提出的信任评分有效解决了条件生成模型在外推场景下的评估难题，无需目标分布即可实现有意义的比较，具备良好的实用性和通用性，可直接用于现成预训练模型，代码已开源。

Abstract: Conditional generators provide a natural tool for controllable generation, including settings where the desired condition is a new composition of observed attributes or experimental factors. In many applications, especially in scientific domains, such models are attractive to explore conditions for which real samples are rare, expensive, or not yet observed. However, this creates a circularity for evaluation: standard conditional quality metrics require a reference target distribution, but in the extrapolative regime that distribution is unavailable by definition. We address this problem with a post-hoc, per-sample trust score for assessing conditional samples using only the training distribution. The score combines two estimable quantities: global realism, measuring compatibility with the real data manifold, and attribute-wise faithfulness, measuring whether a sample is closer to the requested attributes than to plausible alternatives. We show that the score can recover meaningful comparisons across extrapolated generations, under a mild coverage condition on the observed attributes. These comparisons enable effective filtering, ranking, and abstention of generations and can be used directly on off-the-shelf pretrained models. In biological imaging, selected samples preserve real morphological structure better and improve downstream predictive performance, while similar gains are observed on controlled vision benchmarks. Finally, we show how the score can be applied during generation, enabling abstention before full decoding. Code is available at https://github.com/berkerdemirel/faithful-cond-gen.

</details>


### [628] [Closure-Validated Circuit Discovery in Attention Heads: Co-activation Proposes, Ablation Disposes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09607)
*Yongzhong Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了基于共激活统计的注意力头聚类是否能识别真实电路。实验表明，在密集模型中聚类能通过闭合测试，但在MoE模型中不行。结论：廉价信号只是电路候选，闭合测试才是验证关键。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 可解释性研究转向关注组件群体而非单个单元，常用共激活统计进行聚类。作者质疑这种廉价信号是否真的能识别注意力头电路。

Method: 采用稀疏自编码器聚类方法适配到注意力头，但使用因果消融而非重构进行验证。通过闭合测试（消融发现的社区并与随机对照比较）验证聚类结果。在密集模型（Pythia 1B, OLMo 1B）和MoE模型（OLMoE-1B-7B）上进行实验。

Result: 在密集模型中，聚类社区通过闭合测试。在MoE模型中，路由条件聚类能恢复统计信号，但未通过闭合测试（消融反而改善损失）。扩展训练中，注意力目标选择性和参与率与功能双向解耦。

Conclusion: 共激活聚类提供的廉价信号只是电路候选，不是已确认的电路。闭合测试是区分候选电路和真实电路的关键方法。

Abstract: Interpretability increasingly treats groups of components, not individual units, as the basic object, and proposes to find them by clustering co-activation statistics. We ask whether such a cheap signal actually identifies an attention-head circuit. Adapting a sparse-autoencoder clustering recipe to attention heads -- but validating by causal ablation rather than reconstruction -- we cluster heads and then run a closure test: ablate the discovered community and compare per-example damage to matched-random controls. Across two dense 1B-scale models (Pythia 1B, OLMo 1B) and two input distributions, the communities pass closure. In a Mixture-of-Experts model (OLMoE-1B-7B), route-conditional clustering recovers a statistically real signal that nonetheless does not survive closure -- ablation improves loss, the wrong direction. Extending closure across training, attention-target selectivity and participation ratio decouple from function in both directions. We conclude that a cheap signal is a circuit proposal, not a confirmed circuit; closure is what separates them.

</details>


### [629] [Constrained user-item allocation for e-commerce marketing campaigns](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09623)
*Maja Lindström,Natalija Glisovic,Jan von Pichowski,Tommy Löfstedt,Martin Rosvall*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种自动定向（auto-targeting）方法，用于联合选择用户和商品构建多个互不重叠的营销活动，并提出了三种互补策略：约束谱双聚类、贪心局部搜索和多臂老虎机框架。实验表明，双聚类方法在活动质量、提升度和公平性方面表现最佳，但大规模场景下基于老虎机的方法更具可扩展性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有营销活动方法要么假设预定义的活动结构，要么将商品选择与用户分配解耦，无法直接从联合交互模式中发现活动分组。因此需要一种能够联合选择用户和商品、自动构建多个不重叠营销活动的方法。

Method: 提出了三种互补策略：(i) 约束谱双聚类，用于在用户-商品亲和矩阵中发现稠密区域；(ii) 带成对交换的贪心局部搜索，用于组合优化；(iii) 多臂老虎机框架，通过探索跳出局部最优。

Result: 在合成数据、Amazon Reviews基准测试和大规模商业数据上评估，双聚类方法在活动质量、提升度和公平性得分上一致最优，但在大规模数据上运行时间显著增加；而基于老虎机的方法在超大规模数据上更具可扩展性。

Conclusion: 约束谱双聚类在小规模数据上表现优异，而多臂老虎机方法在大规模场景下提供了可扩展的替代方案，为营销活动中的自动定向问题提供了有效的求解框架。

Abstract: When running marketing campaigns, retailers must decide which products to promote and which users to target. These decisions are inherently coupled: effective campaigns match users and items with strong mutual affinity into non-overlapping groups of predefined sizes. However, existing approaches assume predefined campaign structure or decouple item selection from user assignment, and cannot discover campaign groupings directly from joint interaction patterns. We therefore formalize this campaign problem as auto-targeting: jointly selecting users and items to construct multiple disjoint campaigns. To solve this combinatorial problem, we propose three complementary strategies: (i) constrained spectral biclustering to find dense regions in the user-item affinity matrix, (ii) greedy local search with pairwise swaps for combinatorial refinement, and (iii) a multi-armed bandit framework to escape local optima through exploration. We evaluate these methods on a synthetic dataset, the Amazon Reviews benchmarks, and large-scale proprietary commercial data, and compare the results to simulated annealing as a baseline. The results show that biclustering consistently achieves the highest campaign quality, lift, and fairness scores. While biclustering runs efficiently on smaller datasets, its runtime increases substantially on very large ones, where bandit-based methods instead offer a scalable alternative.

</details>


### [630] [Data-driven discovery of governing differential equations across physical systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09638)
*Siyu Lou,Hao Xu,Wenguan Wang,Lu Lu,Hao Sun,Yang Liu,Linfeng Zhang,Dongxiao Zhang,Yuntian Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种以问题为导向的数据驱动微分方程发现视角，通过引入二维相图（结构复杂度 vs 系数复杂度）和REO框架（表示-评估-优化），系统梳理了该领域的发展脉络、方法论差异及未来挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 微分方程是科学发现的核心工具，但传统方法依赖第一性原理。数据驱动的方程发现方法虽日益重要，却在AI浪潮下发展分散、缺乏统一视角。本文旨在提供一个清晰的组织框架来理解该领域。

Method: 提出了二维相图（结构复杂度与系数复杂度）来刻画方程的可发现性；提出了REO框架（表示-评估-优化）作为发现过程的根本抽象，从问题本质而非具体算法层面统一理解方程发现。

Result: 二维相图揭示了该领域从稀疏方程+简单系数向更复杂结构+灵活参数化的演变趋势，并解释了不同方法在不同问题设置下成功或失败的原因。REO框架则提炼出跨算法的核心问题。

Conclusion: 数据驱动方程发现的下一挑战不仅是恢复方程，而是利用方程修正现有理论、提炼机制并形成新的科学概念。

Abstract: Differential equations play a critical role in scientific discovery because they provide a mathematical framework to describe the behaviour of physical phenomena. As a promising alternative to traditional first principles, data-driven differential equation discovery has attracted increasing attention for its ability to infer governing laws directly from experimental or simulated data, especially when the underlying physics is unclear. However, the field has expanded rapidly along diverse methodological directions, particularly with the emergence of AI-based approaches, and still lacks a clear organizing perspective. In this Review, we propose a problem-oriented perspective on data-driven differential equation discovery. We first introduce a two-dimensional phase diagram of equation discoverability, where discovery problems are organized according to structural complexity and coefficient complexity. This phase diagram shows how the field has moved from the discovery of sparse equations with simple coefficients toward more complex governing laws with richer structures and more flexible parameterizations. It also clarifies why different methodological families succeed or fail in different problem settings. We then present the representation-evaluation-optimization (REO) framework as a fundamental abstraction of the discovery process. By identifying the core problems of equation discovery that persist across algorithmic variations, REO shifts the discussion from individual algorithms to the fundamental principles that determine discoverability. We connect these perspectives to applications across physics and adjacent sciences, and argue that the next challenge is not merely recovering equations, but using them to revise existing theories, distil mechanisms and form new scientific concepts.

</details>


### [631] [A Unifying Framework for Concept-Based Representational Similarity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09653)
*Grégoire Dhimoïla,Victor Boutin,Agustin Martin Picard,Thomas Fel,Thomas Serre*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出概念对齐的统一框架，将其分解为表示vs概念、实例vs分布两个维度，并引入干预基准和耦合稀疏自编码器(CoSAE)，证明概念对齐本质上是多目标优化问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有概念对齐方法定义模糊、目标不统一，不同方法在同一术语下优化不同目标，导致实际对齐了什么并不清晰。

Method: 提出二维对齐框架（表示vs概念 × 实例vs分布）；构建InterVenchA干预基准分别测量提取质量、翻译质量和概念一致性；提出CoSAE（耦合稀疏自编码器）联合优化互补的对齐目标。

Result: 常用假设（不同对齐目标等价）在实践中不成立；仅靠无监督目标无法恢复有意义的实例级对齐；CoSAE中强对齐仅在联合优化时出现；仅需0.1%的配对数据即可锚定分布目标从而恢复实例级对齐。

Conclusion: 概念对齐本质上是多目标问题，必须被定义、测量和优化为多个目标的组合。

Abstract: Learned representations across models and modalities often exhibit striking structural similarities, suggesting shared underlying concept decompositions. However, concept alignment remains poorly defined: existing approaches optimize different objectives under the same terminology, obscuring what is actually aligned.
  We propose a unifying framework that decomposes alignment along two axes: what is aligned (representations vs. concepts) and at what level (instance-wise vs. distributional). This induces four corresponding properties -- instance-wise and distributional variants of translation and concept consistency -- and reveals precisely which of these guarantees existing methods provide. We further introduce \InterVenchA, an intervention-based benchmark that separately measures extraction quality, translation quality, and concept consistency. Through theory and experiments, we show that commonly assumed equivalences between alignment objectives fail in practice: optimizing one property does not reliably recover the others, and purely unsupervised objectives fail to recover meaningful instance-level alignment. We then propose the Coupled Sparse Autoencoder (CoSAE), which jointly enforces complementary alignment objectives. Strong alignment emerges only in this regime. Surprisingly, as little as 0.1\% paired data is sufficient to recover instance-level alignment when anchoring distributional objectives.
  Overall, our results show that concept alignment is fundamentally multi-objective: it must be defined, measured, and optimized as such.

</details>


### [632] [Muon Learns More Robust and Transferable Features than Adam](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09658)
*Tianyu Ruan,Fengzhuo Zhang,Shuche Wang,Shihua Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了Muon优化器在预训练大语言模型和视觉分类器时的特征学习优势，通过鲁棒性和迁移性分析，证明Muon学习到的特征比Adam和SGD更鲁棒且更易迁移，并从理论和实验两方面提供了支持。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Muon作为新兴优化器在效率上优于Adam和SGD，但其特征学习优势尚不明确，本文旨在从鲁棒性和迁移性角度揭示Muon的特征学习优势。

Method: 在图像和文本的损坏数据上评估预训练模型的鲁棒性；通过层探针分析logit margin；在下游任务上训练线性分类器或微调全模型评估迁移性；用有效秩衡量隐藏状态多样性；在多成分特征分类问题上进行理论证明。

Result: Muon学习的特征在不同架构（Transformer和CNN）上均比Adam和SGD更鲁棒；鲁棒性优势体现在更大的层间logit margin上；Muon特征迁移性更好，体现在更高隐藏状态有效秩上；理论上证明了Muon能获得更大margin和更高有效秩。

Conclusion: Muon在特征学习的鲁棒性和迁移性上均优于Adam和SGD，理论和实验共同支持了这一结论。

Abstract: Muon has recently emerged as a state-of-the-art optimizer for pretraining Large Language Models (LLMs) and vision classifiers. Despite its efficiency advantage over Adam and SGD, the feature-learning advantage of Muon remains unclear. This paper investigates Muon's feature-learning advantage through the lens of robustness and transferability. First, by evaluating pretrained models on corrupted images and texts, we show that features learned by Muon are consistently more robust than those learned by Adam and SGD across different architectures, including transformers and Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). Using trained layer-wise probes, we further show that this robustness advantage is reflected in larger logit margins across layers. Second, by training linear classifiers or fine-tuning full models from pretrained parameters on downstream tasks, we demonstrate that Muon-learned features transfer more effectively than those learned by Adam and SGD. This transferability advantage is further supported by the diversity of hidden states across layers, as measured by effective rank. Finally, in a representative classification problem with multi-component features, we prove that Muon attains larger margins and higher effective rank than Adam and SGD, providing theoretical support for our empirical findings.

</details>


### [633] [In-Context Learning for Latent Space Bayesian Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09664)
*Tuan A. Vu,Harri Lähdesmäki,Julien Martinelli*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对潜空间贝叶斯优化（LSBO）中表格基础模型作为代理时存在的分布不匹配问题，提出通过在分子VAE潜空间上生成合成优化任务进行持续预训练，并加入正则化项保持原有回归先验，从而提升分子优化性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LSBO中潜码到目标值的映射与表格基础模型预训练时的回归任务存在显著分布不匹配，导致模型作为贝叶斯优化代理时效果不佳。

Method: 在分子VAE潜空间上构建合成优化任务，对表格基础模型（如TabPFN、TabICL）进行持续预训练，并加入锚定正则化项以保留原始检查点知识，防止过拟合。

Result: 在留出的分子优化基准上，该方法取得了优异的性能，验证了LSBO特定适应对于上下文代理模型的相关性。

Conclusion: 通过针对LSBO场景的特定持续预训练，可以有效缓解分布不匹配问题，提升表格基础模型在潜空间贝叶斯优化中的代理能力。

Abstract: Bayesian optimization (BO) is a central tool for sample-efficient design, and latent-space Bayesian optimization (LSBO) extends it to structured objects such as molecules and proteins. In parallel, tabular foundation models such as TabPFN and TabICL now achieve state-of-the-art regression performance and are increasingly used as BO surrogates. Because their Bayesian behavior is induced by large synthetic pretraining collections, the composition of this pretraining distribution is crucial. LSBO creates a distinctive mismatch: the induced map from latent code to objective value differs markedly from the regression tasks used to train current in-context models. We address this mismatch by complementing the pretraining stage of tabular foundation model surrogates with synthetic optimization tasks defined on the latent space of a molecular VAE. The continued-pretraining objective features a regularizer that anchors the model to the original checkpoint, preserving its broad regression prior while avoiding overspecialization to the adaptation tasks. On held-out molecular optimization benchmarks, the resulting model achieves strong performance, supporting the relevance of LSBO-specific adaptation for in-context surrogates.

</details>


### [634] [Algorithm for Contextual Queueing Bandits with Rate-Optimal Queue Length Regret](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09668)
*Seoungbin Bae,Dabeen Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出CQB-η-2算法，将上下文队列赌臂问题的队列长度遗憾从Õ(T^{-1/4})提升到Õ(T^{-1/2})，并证明对应的极小化下界Ω(T^{-1/2})，从而在T的依赖上达到最优（忽略对数因子）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有上下文队列赌臂算法在随机上下文下只能达到Õ(T^{-1/4})的队列长度遗憾，能否进一步提高到更优的阶别是核心问题。

Method: 提出三阶段算法CQB-η-2：阶段一纯随机探索构建初始估计；阶段二η-随机探索结合UCB规则，在学习的同时维持负漂移；阶段三达到探索截止轮后纯用UCB。关键洞察是随机探索只需在精心选择的截止轮之前进行，而非整个时域。

Result: 队列长度遗憾上界达到Õ(T^{-1/2})，同时证明极小化下界Ω(T^{-1/2})，二者匹配到对数因子。

Conclusion: 成功刻画了上下文队列赌臂问题在时域T上的极小化最优依赖关系。

Abstract: Contextual queueing bandits provide a framework for learning to schedule heterogeneous jobs under unknown context-dependent service rates. Under stochastic contexts, existing algorithms achieve $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{-1/4})$ queue length regret, defined as the expected difference between the learner's and oracle's queue lengths at horizon $T$. In this paper, we improve this rate to $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{-1/2})$. The key observation is that random exploration is needed only up to a carefully chosen cutoff round, rather than throughout the entire horizon. We propose CQB-$η$-2, a three-phase algorithm: (i) pure random exploration to construct an initial estimator, (ii) $η$-random exploration combined with a UCB rule to continue learning while maintaining negative drift, and (iii) pure UCB after the exploration cutoff. Our proof decomposes the queue length regret at the cutoff round. Before the cutoff, negative drift suppresses queue length differences caused by suboptimal choices. After the cutoff, the first two phases provide sufficient random exploration samples, ensuring that UCB decisions incur small departure-rate gaps. Combining these two bounds yields queue length regret of order $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{-1/2})$. We further prove a minimax lower bound of order $Ω(T^{-1/2})$. The proof constructs two hard instances that are statistically indistinguishable up to the final service decision, and uses a queue-specific coupling argument to convert the resulting testing error into queue length regret. Together, our upper and lower bounds characterize the minimax dependence on the horizon $T$ up to logarithmic factors.

</details>


### [635] [Transition-Based Digital Twin Modelling for Alzheimer's Disease under Sparse Longitudinal Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09671)
*Yinyu Huang,Yilin Zhang,Sofia Michopoulou,Christopher Kipps,Rahman Attar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种个性化数字孪生框架，利用多模态纵向数据对阿尔茨海默病进行预测和情景分析。在ADNI数据集上评估了基于转换的局部建模和序列建模两种策略，发现局部转换建模在稀疏不规则数据上更高效、更鲁棒。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器学习方法多集中于静态分类或群体层面风险估计，缺乏对个体化建模和不确定性推理的支持，难以应对AD进展的高度异质性和数据稀疏不规则的特点。

Method: 构建个性化数字孪生框架，整合补充性建模策略（转换建模与序列建模），利用ADNI多模态数据（认知评估、临床变量、MRI衍生表型）预测认知状态和诊断类别，同时量化预测不确定性并支持患者特定"假设"轨迹分析。

Result: 在无泄漏的主题层级划分评估中，模型在分数预测和诊断分类上表现优异。在稀疏不规则的ADNI数据上，基于相邻访视的转换建模比序列建模预测精度更高，表明局部转换建模更具数据效率。

Conclusion: 局部转换建模在数据效率和鲁棒性上优于序列建模，而序列模型在不确定性感知的轨迹预测方面仍有价值。应将时序建模策略与临床数据结构对齐，基于转换的数字孪生框架为神经退行性疾病个性化预测提供了实用且可解释的途径。

Abstract: Alzheimer's disease (AD) progression is highly heterogeneous and is typically observed through sparse and irregular longitudinal data, posing challenges for prediction and personalised monitoring. Existing machine learning approaches have improved AD prediction using multimodal data, yet often focus on static classification or cohort-level risk estimation, providing limited support for subject-specific modelling and uncertainty-aware reasoning. To address these limitations, we present a personalised digital twin framework for AD prediction and scenario-based analysis using multimodal longitudinal data. The proposed approach integrates complementary modelling strategies to capture clinical transitions and temporal dependencies across visits. Using data from the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI), including cognitive assessments, clinical variables, and MRI-derived phenotypes, the framework predicts cognitive status and diagnostic categories while quantifying predictive uncertainty and enabling patient-specific what-if trajectory analysis. Evaluation on leak-free subject-level splits demonstrates strong performance in score forecasting and diagnosis classification. In this sparse and irregular ADNI setting, transition-based modelling of adjacent visits achieved higher predictive accuracy than the sequence-based branch, suggesting that local transition modelling may be more data-efficient. While sequence models remain valuable for uncertainty-aware trajectory forecasting, local transition modelling offers a more data-efficient and robust predictive strategy. These findings highlight the importance of aligning temporal modelling strategies with clinical data structure and suggest that transition-based digital twin formulations may provide a practical and interpretable approach for personalised disease forecasting in neurodegenerative disorders.

</details>


### [636] [AutoMegaKernel: A Statically-Checked Agent Harness for Self-Retargeting Megakernel Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09682)
*Jaber Jaber,Osama Jaber*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: AutoMegaKernel (AMK) 是一个自动将 Llama 系列模型编译为单个持久协作 CUDA 内核的系统，前向传播只需一次 launch。它通过静态验证器保证无死锁和无竞态，支持多种 GPU 架构，自动生成正确的 megakernel。在推理级 GPU（L4、L40S、A10G、RTX 5090）上，其 int8 (W8A16) megakernel 在 batch-1 decode 场景下超过了 CUDA-graphed cuBLAS bf16，但在训练级高带宽 GPU（A100/H100）上落后于 cuBLAS。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的大模型推理 kernel 通常需要针对不同模型和 GPU 架构手工编写 CUDA 代码，开发成本高且难以移植。同时，多 kernel launch 的开销和跨 SM 同步问题限制了推理性能。作者希望实现一个自动化的编译系统，无需手工 CUDA 即可生成高效的 megakernel。

Method: AMK 将 HuggingFace Llama 模型编译成单个持久协作 CUDA kernel，利用 frozen schedule-IR 验证器静态检查死锁和竞态（基于图检查而非形式化证明），在 7,160 个对抗性调度上零误接受。同一代码库可重新 target sm_80/sm_90/sm_120，自动为 10/10 的模型生成正确 megakernel。系统还具备 agent 驱动的自动搜索改进循环，可自优化 baseline 1.25-1.72x。

Result: 1) 调度验证器：7,160 个对抗调度（6,091 个不安全）零误接受，接受全部 360 个真实 lowering。2) 10/10 模型自动生成正确 megakernel。3) SmolLM2-135M 与 HuggingFace greedy decode token 级匹配（困惑度误差 2.5e-7）。4) 自优化 baseline 1.25-1.72x。5) int8 (W8A16) megakernel 在推理级 GPU 上超过 cuBLAS bf16：L4 最高 1.33x，L40S 1.25-1.27x，A10G 最高 1.08x，RTX 5090 1.19-1.23x。6) 在训练级 A100/H100 上落后于 cuBLAS（跨 SM 同步瓶颈）。

Conclusion: AMK 证明了无需手写 CUDA、通过自动化编译即可为 Llama 模型生成高效 megakernel 的可行性。其调度验证器在实践中足够可靠。AMK 在推理级 GPU 上优势明显，但在训练级高带宽 GPU 上存在跨 SM 同步瓶颈。论文贡献在于系统整体设计，而非纯粹的端到端速度。该工作为自动化大模型推理优化提供了新方向。

Abstract: AutoMegaKernel (AMK) compiles a HuggingFace Llama-family model into a single persistent cooperative CUDA kernel that runs the whole forward pass in one launch, with no per-model hand-written CUDA. The contribution is the system, not raw speed.
  A frozen schedule-IR validator statically certifies deadlock-freedom and race-freedom via static graph checks (not a mechanized proof), so an unsafe agent-proposed schedule is rejected before launch: across 7,160 adversarial schedules (6,091 unsafe) it had zero false-accepts and accepted all 360 real lowerings. The same source retargets sm_80/sm_90/sm_120 from one codebase, auto-generates correct megakernels for 10 of 10 supported models, and on a real SmolLM2-135M checkpoint reproduces HuggingFace greedy decode token-for-token (perplexity match 2.5e-7). An unattended, agent-drivable autoresearch loop self-improves the megakernel over its own baseline (1.25-1.72x).
  A search-found int8 (W8A16) megakernel beats CUDA-graphed cuBLAS bf16 at batch-1 decode across NVIDIA's datacenter inference fleet: L4 up to 1.33x, the current-gen L40S 1.25-1.27x, A10G up to 1.08x at scale, and the consumer RTX 5090 1.19-1.23x. The ordering is not a clean function of bandwidth (the 864 GB/s L40S beats the 600 GB/s A10G); the divide is inference-class vs training-class. AMK trails cuBLAS on the high-bandwidth training-class A100/H100, where the harness localizes the cross-SM-sync bottleneck; we report the gap plainly. This is a precision-asymmetric (W8A16 vs bf16) comparison at decode position 0; the largest real checkpoint is TinyLlama-1.1B. Code and the harness: https://github.com/RightNow-AI/AutoMegaKernel

</details>


### [637] [When Do Local Score Models Extrapolate Across Size? A Diagnostic Theory and Benchmark](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09705)
*Wenjie Xi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文揭示了科学生成模型中尺寸迁移（从小系统到大系统）的稳定性由高斯平滑得分的准局域性决定，而非仅由架构局域性决定。通过Tweedie公式，远距离扰动可通过后验协方差影响局部得分。作者证明了反向扩散下局部边际的尺寸均匀比较定理，并提出了有限深度局域流（FDLF）这一白盒诊断基准。实验验证了空间混合、平滑得分准局域性与模型感受野之间的相互作用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 科学生成模型常需从小系统训练后迁移到大系统评估，但架构局域性本身不足以保证稳定的尺寸外推。亟需理解何种性质真正控制这一稳定性。

Method: 通过Tweedie公式理论上分析高斯平滑得分的准局域性，证明反向扩散下局部边际的尺寸均匀比较定理；提出FDLF白盒诊断基准（提供精确得分、密度和可控响应范围），并通过实验验证空间混合、平滑得分准局域性与模型感受野的相互作用。

Result: 在空间混合条件下，平滑得分相对于感受野保持准局域性，实现稳定外推；当空间混合减弱时，得分局域性快速退化，导致尺寸迁移失败。

Conclusion: 尺寸迁移的稳定性由高斯平滑得分的准局域性主导，模型感受野需覆盖平滑得分的响应范围。空间混合是关键条件，其强度决定了得分局域性的保持与尺寸迁移的成功与否。

Abstract: Scientific generative modeling often requires size transfer, where models trained on small systems are evaluated on larger ones. While translation-invariant architectures enable this evaluation, we show that architectural locality alone does not guarantee stable size extrapolation. Instead, stable extrapolation is governed by the quasi-locality of the Gaussian-smoothed score. Through Tweedie's formula, far-away perturbations can influence local score components via posterior covariance, meaning a local model succeeds only if its receptive field covers the smoothed score's response range. We formalize this mechanism, proving a size-uniform comparison theorem for local marginals under reverse diffusion. We also introduce Finite-Depth Local Flow (FDLF), a white-box diagnostic benchmark with exact scores, densities, and controllable response ranges. Empirically, we validate the interplay between spatial mixing, smoothed-score quasi-locality, and model receptive fields. Under spatial mixing, the smoothed score remains quasi-local relative to the receptive field, enabling stable extrapolation. Conversely, when spatial mixing weakens, the score's locality rapidly degrades, causing size transfer to fail.

</details>


### [638] [Evaluating the Representation Space of Diffusion Models via Self-Supervised Principles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09718)
*Xiao Li,Yixuan Jia,Zekai Zhang,Xiang Li,Lianghe Shi,Jinxin Zhou,Zhihui Zhu,Liyue Shen,Qing Qu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出基于不变污染比（ICR）的框架，从自监督学习视角联合评估扩散模型的表示与生成能力，发现中间噪声水平下表示不变性最强、分类性能最佳，且ICR可作为训练早期记忆化的敏感指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型在生成和表示学习方面都表现出色，但两者之间的内在联系尚未被充分探索。受自监督学习启发，作者希望建立统一框架来联合评估这两种能力。

Method: 将特征分解为不变成分和残差成分，提出基于Fisher信息的ICR指标量化残差对不变信号的污染程度，从表示学习和生成学习两个角度分析扩散模型行为。

Result: 1）表示不变性在中间噪声水平达到峰值，此时下游分类性能最佳；2）ICR可作为训练过程中记忆化开始的敏感指标，仅需训练特征即可检测，无需外部评估器或测试集。

Conclusion: 扩散模型可以通过学习表示的几何结构从自监督视角进行监控，ICR为理解模型从泛化到记忆化的转变提供了有效工具。

Abstract: Diffusion models have demonstrated remarkable generative capabilities and have also emerged as powerful self-supervised representation learners, yet the connection between these two abilities remains less explored. Drawing inspiration from self-supervised learning (SSL), we introduce a framework for jointly evaluating the representation and generation capabilities of diffusion models. Specifically, we decompose features into invariant and residual components and derive the Invariant Contamination Ratio (ICR), a Fisher-based metric that quantifies how residual variation contaminates invariant signal in feature space. We use this framework to analyze both discriminative and generative behavior of diffusion models. On the representation side, we find that invariance peaks at intermediate noise levels, which also yield the best downstream classification performance. On the generative side, we study how training transitions from genuine generalization to memorization in data-limited regimes, and show that ICR serves as a sensitive training-time indicator of early learning: increasing residual energy along Fisher directions marks the onset of memorization, detectable from training features alone without external evaluators or held-out test sets. Overall, our results show that diffusion models can be monitored from a self-supervised perspective through the geometry of their learned representations.

</details>


### [639] [Disentanglement with Holographic Reduced Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09725)
*Jhonny J. Velasquez Olivera,Christo K. Thomas,Walid Saad*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于全息简化表示（HRR）的无监督学习算法，用于神经网络的解缠表征学习。不同于依赖连续表示的方法，该算法将解缠表征视为符号结构，利用HRR的解绑定操作作为归纳偏置来分离数据中的因子，并通过信息论分析证明了解绑定能产生近似独立的符号-值对，且给出了每槽容量界限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的解缠表征方法大多依赖连续表示（如VAE、GAN），难以捕捉概念之间的组合关系。将解缠表征视为符号结构更具优势，但学习离散符号结构同时保持可微性十分困难且需要复杂架构。作者希望设计一种既保持可微性又能学习离散符号结构的简单方法。

Method: 提出基于全息简化表示（HRR）的无监督解缠学习算法。HRR的解绑定操作为分离因子提供了归纳偏置，其潜在单元是向量求和而非标量维度。同时进行了信息论分析，证明解绑定能产生近似独立的符号-值对，并推导了每槽容量界限。

Result: 在潜变量遍历和解缠指标上取得了与基线方法竞争的结果。与标准自编码器模型相比，HRR表示对噪声更鲁棒，在多种信噪比下保持了重建质量。

Conclusion: 全息简化表示为神经解缠提供了一种新颖且有效的途径，其归纳偏置使得学习离散符号结构变得可行，且具有良好的噪声鲁棒性。

Abstract: Disentanglement, the separation of factors of variation in data using neural networks, remains a long-standing challenge in machine learning. Prior work has addressed this problem with variational autoencoders and generative adversarial networks that incorporate ideas from variational inference and information-theoretic constraints. In contrast to methods that rely on continuous representations, we propose a design that treats disentangled representations as symbolic structures, motivated by the compositional relationships among the concepts that make up samples from a distribution. However, learning discrete symbolic structures with neural networks while maintaining differentiability is difficult and often requires complex architectures. To address this, we introduce an unsupervised learning algorithm that uses holographic reduced representations (HRR) for neural disentanglement. We show that the HRR unbinding operation provides an inductive bias for separating factors and yields competitive results against baselines, as measured by latent traversals and disentanglement metrics. We complement these empirical findings with an information-theoretic analysis of the HRR unbinding channel. We prove that unbinding induces approximately independent symbol-value pairs and derive a per-slot capacity bound that quantifies how many distinct symbolic concepts can be reliably encoded, giving a quantitative account of the inductive bias toward disentanglement. The resulting representations differ from standard autoencoder-based models, in that their latent units are vectors that are summed together, rather than scalar dimensions of a low-dimensional latent vector. We show that this HRR representation is more robust to noise than other disentangled representations and maintains reconstruction quality across a range of SNRs.

</details>


### [640] [Tight Sample Complexity of Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09731)
*Chenxiao Yang,Nathan Srebro,Zhiyuan Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文严格刻画了深度L、参数总量W、输入序列长度T的Transformer的VC维，得到上界O(LW log(TW))和近匹配下界Ω(LW log(TW/L))；同时刻画了链式思维学习的样本复杂度，教师强制方法需O(LW log((T+T')W))样本，任何学习规则至少需Ω(LW log((T+T')W/L))样本，其中T'为自回归步数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 作者旨在严格量化Transformer的理论容量（VC维）以及链式思维（Chain-of-Thought）学习所需的样本复杂度，填补Transformer理论分析中关于统计学习复杂度的空白。

Method: 通过组合结构参数（深度L、参数量W、序列长度T）推导VC维的上下界；在链式思维场景中，分析教师强制（Teacher Forcing）策略的样本复杂度，并与任意学习规则的下界进行对比。

Result: VC维上界O(LW log(TW))，下界Ω(LW log(TW/L))，近乎匹配；链式思维学习中教师强制的样本复杂度上界O(LW log((T+T')W))，任意学习规则下界Ω(LW log((T+T')W/L))。

Conclusion: Transformer的统计容量主要由深度、参数规模和序列长度共同决定，且链式思维学习存在固有的样本复杂度下界，教师强制策略在理论上接近最优。

Abstract: We tightly characterize the VC dimension of depth-$L$ Transformers with a total of $W$ parameters, mapping an input sequence of length $T$ to a single output, establishing an upper bound of $O(L W \log (T W))$ and a nearly matching lower bound of $Ω(L W \log (T W / L))$. We further tightly characterize the sample complexity of chain-of-thought learning using such a Transformer, showing teacher forcing (i.e. selecting a predictor consistent with the entire chain-of-thought on training data) learns with sample complexity $O\left(L W \log \left(\left(T+T^{\prime}\right) W\right)\right)$ and that any learning rule that uses chain-of-thought data requires at least $Ω\left(L W \log \left(\left(T+T^{\prime}\right) W / L\right)\right)$ examples, where $T$ is the input length and $T^{\prime}$ is the number of autoregressive steps.

</details>


### [641] [Learning Dynamics Reveal a Hierarchy of Weight-Induced Layerwise Gram Metrics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09744)
*Claudio Nordio*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究具有固定读出的前馈ReLU网络在二次损失下的梯度下降动力学，揭示了残差在训练集空间中的集体演化规律：浅层网络可完全消除权重变量，深层网络则需要层级化的Gram算子层次结构来实现动力学封闭。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统观点将梯度下降视为权重空间中的动力学，但这种方法难以揭示网络训练的集体行为。作者希望从训练集空间中的场（fields）角度重新理解梯度下降，探索能否将权重变量消除，得到一个仅依赖于训练集上定义的量（如残差）的封闭动力学方程。

Method: 针对固定读出的ReLU网络，采用二次损失函数，通过分析前向传播和反向传播的结构，将梯度下降动力学重新表述为训练集空间上的集体动力学。对单隐藏层网络，成功从激活动力学中消去权重变量，得到关于残差的封闭方程，其中核函数分解为输入几何矩阵与动态共激活矩阵的乘积。对深层网络，揭示出跨越层的层级化Gram算子结构。

Result: 1) 单隐藏层网络：权重变量可从激活动力学中完全消除，残差演化由因子化核决定。2) 深度为2的网络：残差动力学仍保持清晰的逐层核结构。3) 深度≥3的网络：动力学封闭需要引入层间权重诱导的Gram算子层次结构，信息在不同层之间传输由这些算子中介。

Conclusion: 该工作为理解深度ReLU网络的训练动力学提供了新视角，揭示了从浅层到深层网络在动力学封闭性上的本质差异：浅层网络具有完全的封闭性，而深层网络需要更复杂的算子层级来描述信息跨层传输。这有助于理解深度网络训练的集体行为机制。

Abstract: We study feed-forward ReLU networks with fixed readout and quadratic loss. The aim is to rewrite gradient descent not primarily as a dynamics in weight space, but as a collective dynamics closed in terms of fields defined on the training-set space. For a single hidden layer, the weight variables can be eliminated from the activation dynamics, yielding a closed equation for the residuals governed by a collective kernel that factorizes into an input-geometric matrix and a dynamical co-activation matrix. For deeper networks, the residual dynamics retains a clean layer-wise kernel structure. However, from depth three onward, closure requires a hierarchy of weight-induced Gram operators that mediate information transport across layers.

</details>


### [642] [Perturbative Contrastive Physical Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09756)
*Kyungeun Kim,Amanuel Anteneh,Israel Klich,Olivier Pfister,J. M. Schwarz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出扰动对比物理学习（PCPL）框架，通过测量物理系统在不同扰动下的状态对比来实现学习，无需外部处理器或显式反向传播。在弹簧网络和光子电路两种平台上验证了分类与模拟乘法任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有物理学习范式（如均衡传播、频率传播）各有局限且缺乏统一视角，作者希望提出一个通用框架，统一这些方法，并实现无需外部梯度计算的自主物理学习。

Method: PCPL通过可控地改变输入、边界条件、参数或解释函数，对比由此产生的不同物理状态，从中提取对比信息用于更新系统参数。更新可反映局部灵敏度或全局逆问题结构，但无需集中式计算梯度，学习几何由系统自身的物理响应隐式定义。

Result: 在弹簧网络（通过测量位移和力更新键刚度）和连续变量光子电路（通过x正交测量和有限差分雅可比估计）两种平台上成功完成分类任务；光子电路还实现了模拟乘法运算。

Conclusion: PCPL提供了一个统一物理学习范式的通用框架，证明了无需外部处理器和显式反向传播即可实现有效的物理学习，向更自主的物理学习系统迈出了重要一步。

Abstract: Responses to perturbations are key to understanding physical systems. The ability to contrast such responses by comparing how a system reacts under slightly different conditions provides a mechanism for learning. Here, we introduce Perturbative Contrastive Physical Learning (PCPL), a general framework in which learning emerges from measurable contrasts between physical states produced by controlled changes to inputs, boundary conditions, parameters, or interpreter functions. PCPL unifies and extends prior approaches: Equilibrium Propagation is rooted in contrasts between free and nudged equilibria in energy-based systems, while Frequency Propagation corresponds to contrasts extracted from sinusoidally driven, frequency-demodulated responses. We show that contrast-driven updates can reflect either local sensitivities or global inverse-problem structure, yet do not require centralized gradient computation. Instead, effective learning geometry emerges implicitly from the system's own physical response, allowing learning behavior to arise without an external processor or explicit backpropagation. We demonstrate PCPL in two platforms: (i) spring networks that update bond stiffness using measured displacements and forces, and (ii) continuous-variable photonic circuits trained via x quadrature measurements and finite-difference estimates of the Jacobian. Both platforms successfully learn classification tasks. We further show that a continuous-variable photonic circuit can be trained to implement analog multiplication, illustrating a step toward more autonomous physical learning systems.

</details>


### [643] [Preserving Plasticity in Continual Learning via Dynamical Isometry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09762)
*Andries Rosseau,Robert Müller,Ann Nowé*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文将深度神经网络的可塑性（plasticity）与经验神经正切核（NTK）联系起来，发现动态等距（dynamical isometry）是保持可塑性的关键机制。作者提出了等距正则化方法（AdamO），并重新解释了现有方法的局限性，在多种持续学习基准上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 持续学习（非平稳环境下的网络训练）中，深度神经网络会逐渐丧失可塑性，最终限制进一步的学习能力。现有方法缺乏对可塑性丧失根本原因的理论理解，作者试图从动态等距的角度解释并解决这一问题。

Method: 1) 通过经验神经正切核（NTK）将可塑性与动态等距联系起来；2) 回顾了一类几乎处处等距的通用Lipschitz函数逼近网络；3) 提出高效的等距正则化方案，并能重新激活休眠的ReLU单元；4) 引入AdamO优化器，将等距正则化与梯度更新解耦；5) 从动态等距视角重新解释先前的可塑性保持方法。

Result: 在监督学习和强化学习的持续学习基准上，所提方法一致地达到或超过了现有方法的性能。

Conclusion: 动态等距是保持持续学习可塑性的核心机制，等距正则化与AdamO优化器能有效缓解塑性丧失，且对现有方法有统一的解释力。

Abstract: Continual training of deep neural networks under non-stationarity often leads to a progressive loss of plasticity, eventually limiting further learning. We relate plasticity to the empirical Neural Tangent Kernel, and identify dynamical isometry (the condition that layer-wise Jacobian singular values remain close to one) as a key mechanism for preserving plasticity in continual learning. We revisit a class of networks that are almost-everywhere isometric while remaining universal Lipschitz function approximators, demonstrating that near-dynamical isometry is compatible with expressive nonlinear representations. For general architectures, we propose an efficient isometry-promoting regularization scheme and identify a novel mechanism by which it can reactivate dormant ReLU units. Building on this, we introduce AdamO, an Adam-style adaptive optimizer that decouples isometry regularization from gradient updates, analogous to AdamW. We further reinterpret prior plasticity-preserving approaches through the lens of dynamical isometry, showing that they target only a partial measure of isometry. Across supervised and reinforcement-learning continual-learning benchmarks designed to induce plasticity loss, our methods consistently match or outperform existing approaches.

</details>


### [644] [Zero Touch Predictive Orchestration: Automating Time-Series Models for the Cloud-Edge Continuum](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09787)
*Abd Elghani Meliani,Arora Sagar,Adlen Ksentini,Raymond Knopp*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对云边连续体（CEC）中新发现节点缺乏历史数据导致的"冷启动"问题，提出了一种基于数据混合策略的全自动时间序列预测架构。通过轻量级Resource Exposer（RE）收集本地遥测数据，并将其与公开高分辨率数据集TimeTrack混合，经神经架构搜索（NAS）自动生成高精度基线模型，显著提升了预测准确率和收敛速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 云边连续体（CEC）的极端波动性需要主动式零接触管理，但新发现节点缺乏历史数据，无法训练本地化预测模型；而通用模型又无法捕捉独特的硬件和微服务行为模式，导致严重的"冷启动"问题亟待解决。

Method: 提出全自动时间序列预测架构：(1) 轻量级Resource Exposer（RE）动态发现节点并持续收集自定义遥测数据；(2) 将稀疏的本地样本与公开高分辨率数据集TimeTrack（45秒间隔）自动混合，利用其高频时间模式校准本地数据；(3) 通过神经架构搜索（NAS）引擎自动生成高精度基线模型。

Result: 实验表明，将目标数据与TimeTrack混合能有效缓解冷启动问题，在MSE、MAE、MAPE指标上显著提升预测准确率，并加速收敛。效果优于仅用稀疏本地样本、仅用通用数据集或混合其他标准数据集的方案。

Conclusion: 该数据混合策略为云边连续体冷启动问题提供了有效解决方案，为持续MLOps部署奠定了坚实基础。

Abstract: The Cloud-Edge Continuum (CEC) enables latency-critical applications by distributing resources to the far edge, but its extreme volatility makes proactive Zero Touch Management via time-series forecasting essential. However, orchestrators face a severe "cold start" problem: newly discovered nodes lack the historical data required to train localized predictive models, while generalized models fail to capture unique hardware and microservice behaviors. To solve this, we propose a fully automated time-series prediction architecture driven by a novel data-mixing methodology. At the infrastructure level, we introduce a lightweight, technology-agnostic Resource Exposer (RE) that dynamically discovers nodes and continuously collects customizable telemetry (e.g., compute, network, energy). To overcome the sparsity of these initial local samples, our framework automatically merges them with TimeTrack, our publicly available, high-resolution dataset collected at 45-second intervals. This synergizes TimeTrack's foundational, high-frequency temporal patterns with the precise calibration of the local node data. Processed through a Neural Architecture Search (NAS) engine, the system automatically generates highly accurate baseline models. Experimental results demonstrate that merging the target data with TimeTrack effectively mitigates the cold start challenge. This integration significantly improves forecasting accuracy measured in Mean Squared Error (MSE), Mean Absolute Error (MAE), and Mean Absolute Percentage Error (MAPE) and accelerates convergence compared to training on the sparse local samples alone, training solely on generic datasets, or mixing the target data with standard alternative datasets, establishing a robust foundation for continuous MLOps deployment.

</details>


### [645] [Bandits for Efficient Experimentation: Adapting to Control Group, Preferences, and Context Drifts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09802)
*Udvas Das,Waris Radji,Debabrota Basu,Odalric-Ambrym Maillard*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究面向群体用户的上下文漂移线性随机多臂老虎机问题，提出Dri-MED算法，在非平稳异方差噪声下实现实例依赖的遗憾界和约束违规保证，显著优于忽略漂移的保守基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实际应用中，推荐系统面临用户偏好动态漂移（如潮流变化）且需满足基线策略约束（如保证最低推荐质量），现有方法难以同时处理非平稳上下文分布、个性化偏好和安全性约束。

Method: 将群体推荐问题约化为具有平稳均值但异方差非平稳噪声的线性bandit问题；提出Dri-MED算法，基于MED线性策略并适配非平稳异方差噪声；利用异方差回归处理方差感知的乘性项κ；通过约束感知的次优性差距Δ̃推导遗憾界。

Result: 理论结果表明实例依赖的遗憾界为Õ(κ d² log(T)/Δ̃)，约束违规期望为Õ(d)；数值实验显示Dri-MED显著优于忽略漂移的保守基线方法。

Conclusion: Dri-MED有效处理了非平稳上下文分布下的安全约束推荐问题，为动态群体推荐系统提供了理论基础与实用算法。

Abstract: We consider a variant of the linear contextual stochastic multi-armed bandits, where the learner must provide recommendations to a group of users, each having its personalized preference vector, and in the presence of context distributions that are drifting over time. Under practitioner-friendly assumptions, we reduce this setting to linear bandit with stationary mean but heteroskedastic and non-stationary noise. We further study the case when the learner must ensure the mean reward of each decision must exceed that of a baseline strategy $\boldsymbolπ_0$ at each decision step. We introduce Dri-MED, an algorithm inspired from the linear version of the MED strategy, and carefully adapted to handle the non-stationary heteroskedastic noise. We show that the instance-dependent regret scales as $\tilde{\mathcal O}\left(\fracκ{\tildeΔ}d^2(\log(T)\right)$, where $\tildeΔ$ is the constraint-aware sub-optimality gap subject to policy $π_0$, with variance-aware multiplicative term $κ$ that we carefully handle using heteroskedastic regression. We further show Dri-MED enjoys $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(d)$ expected constraint violations. Our numerical results suggest that Dri-MED significantly outperforms conservative baselines that ignores the drift and preference structure.

</details>


### [646] [Topological Neural Operators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09806)
*Lennart Bastian,Samuel Leventhal,Mustafa Hajij,Tolga Birdal*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出拓扑神经算子(TNOs)，一种在复形上进行算子学习的框架，通过离散外微分实现跨维度特征耦合，并进一步提出分层版本(HTNOs)处理长程依赖，在PDE基准上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经算子局限于点和边上的函数，无法有效处理定义在不同维度单元(如面、体)上的物理量，且缺乏对几何支撑和守恒结构的显式建模。

Method: TNOs将数据表示为定义在不同维度单元上的特征，通过离散外微分(梯度、旋度、散度算子)实现跨维度显式耦合。关键设计原则是将信息流向(由固定拓扑算子决定)与信息变换(由学习模块决定)解耦。HTNOs进一步引入学习到的粗化复形来传播长程和拓扑依赖信息。

Result: 在多个PDE基准测试(包括不规则几何流问题)上，TNOs和HTNOs提升了精度；控制实验进一步验证了原生高秩和拓扑结构带来的收益。

Conclusion: TNOs统一了现有神经算子框架，为跨离散化的算子学习提供了统一视角，并且通过显式利用拓扑结构提升了性能。

Abstract: We introduce Topological Neural Operators (TNOs), a principled framework for operator learning on cell complexes that lifts neural operators (NOs) from functions on points and/or edges to topological domains. TNOs represent data as features defined on cells of varying dimension and model their interactions through Discrete Exterior Calculus, enabling explicit cross-dimensional coupling via gradient-, curl-, and divergence-type operators. The key design principle is to decouple where information flows, as governed by fixed topological operators, from how it is transformed (which is learned), yielding models that respect the geometric support of physical quantities and expose conservation and compatibility structure. We further propose Hierarchical TNOs (HTNOs), which incorporate learned coarse complexes to propagate long-range and topology-dependent information. Our framework subsumes existing NOs as a special case, providing a unified perspective on operator learning across discretizations. Across a range of PDE benchmarks, including irregular-geometry flow problems, TNOs and HTNOs improve accuracy; controlled studies further isolate the benefits of native higher-rank and topological structure. Project page: https://circle-group.github.io/research/TNO

</details>


### [647] [Rethinking the Divergence Regularization in LLM RL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09821)
*Jiarui Yao,Xiangxin Zhou,Penghui Qi,Wee Sun Lee,Liefeng Bo,Tianyu Pang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DRPO 通过平滑的优势加权二次正则化替代硬掩码，在保证信任区域几何结构的同时，为 LLM 强化学习提供更稳定高效的训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有 LLM 强化学习方法（如 PPO、GRPO）使用 ratio-clipping 控制信任区域，但重要性比率在长尾词汇分布中无法有效反映分布偏移；DPPO 改用基于散度的硬掩码，但一旦越过边界直接丢弃梯度，缺乏修正机制。

Method: 提出 Divergence Regularized Policy Optimization (DRPO)，用平滑的优势加权二次正则化项替代 DPPO 的硬掩码，在保持相同信任区域几何结构的同时，产生有界、连续的梯度权重，对发散更新进行衰减并提供边界外的修正信号。

Result: 跨模型规模、架构和精度设置的实验表明，DRPO 提升了 LLM 强化学习训练的稳定性和效率。

Conclusion: DRPO 通过软约束替代硬裁剪，在保持信任区域控制的同时克服了硬掩码的缺陷，是一种更稳定高效的 LLM RL 优化方法。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a key component of post-training large language models (LLMs). In practice, LLM RL is often off-policy because of training-inference mismatch and policy staleness, making trust-region control essential for stable optimization. Mainstream methods such as PPO and GRPO approximate this control with a ratio-clipping mechanism, but the importance ratio can be a poor proxy for distributional shift in long-tailed vocabularies. Recent work such as DPPO addresses this mismatch by replacing ratio-based clipping with a divergence-based mask, yielding a trust region defined by the sampled token's absolute probability shift. However, DPPO still relies on a hard mask: once a token crosses the trust-region boundary in a harmful direction, its gradient is discarded rather than corrected. To address this, we propose Divergence Regularized Policy Optimization (DRPO), which replaces the hard mask with a smooth advantage-weighted quadratic regularizer on policy shift. DRPO preserves the same trust-region geometry as DPPO while inducing bounded, continuous gradient weights that attenuate diverging updates and provide corrective signals beyond the boundary. Experiments across model scales, architectures, and precision settings show that DRPO improves the stability and efficiency of LLM RL training.

</details>


### [648] [An Agency-Transferring Model-Free Policy Enhancement Technique](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09825)
*Anton Bolychev,Georgiy Malaniya,Sinan Ibrahim,Pavel Osinenko*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种将次优基线策略嵌入RL训练的方法，通过仲裁机制逐步从基线转移权责到学习策略，在提升训练效率的同时保证最终策略超越基线，并在连续控制任务中实现高目标达成率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从头训练RL策略成本高昂（需精心设计奖励和环境、大量调参和算力），而许多控制问题已有可用的次优基线策略，但未被充分利用。

Method: 设计仲裁机制：训练初期依赖基线策略，逐步将控制权转移给可训练的学习策略，最终学习策略独立运行。形式化定义了基线策略的"功能性"（高概率到达并停留目标集），并利用该特性设计仲裁。

Result: 在连续控制基准上，该方法回报匹配或超越竞争方法，且在整个训练过程中（包括最终无基线阶段）保持最高的目标达成率。

Conclusion: 证明通过合理的基线嵌入和渐进式权责转移，可显著提升RL训练效率与策略性能，理论分析给出了最终无基线状态下目标达成概率的下界。

Abstract: Training reinforcement learning (RL) policies from scratch is
  costly: it requires careful reward and environment design,
  extensive tuning, and substantial computation.
  Yet many control problems already have a functional but
  suboptimal policy available as a baseline.
  This paper proposes a method for embedding such a baseline into
  the RL training process, simultaneously improving training
  efficiency relative to from-scratch methods and producing a
  learning policy that outperforms the baseline.
  At each step, the method arbitrates between the baseline policy
  and a trainable learning policy, initially relying strongly on
  the baseline policy and then progressively transferring agency to
  the learning policy.
  By the end of training, the learning policy is a standalone
  neural network that operates without baseline policy support.
  The paper formalizes what it means for the baseline policy to be
  functional: under this policy, the agent reaches a goal set and
  remains there with high probability.
  The proposed arbitration mechanism is designed to exploit this
  property during training, yielding high goal-reaching rates right
  from the beginning of training.
  A theoretical analysis provides a formal interpretation of this
  behavior under stated assumptions and extends it to the final
  baseline-free regime, where explicit lower bounds are derived for
  the goal-reaching probability of the standalone learning policy.
  Empirical results on continuous-control benchmarks show that the
  proposed method achieves returns that match or exceed those of
  competitive approaches, while maintaining the highest
  goal-reaching rates throughout training among the compared
  methods -- including in the final stage, where the learning policy
  operates without any baseline support.

</details>


<div id='cs.GT'></div>

# cs.GT [[Back]](#toc)

### [649] [Adverse Effects of V2V Adoption on Road Safety](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07873)
*Zhenqi Liu,Philip N. Brown,Keith Paarporn*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究了V2V通信技术在部分采用率下对道路交通安全的影响。通过修正现有模型并分析不同采用率下的系统行为，发现增加V2V采用率在某些情况下反而可能增加事故概率，但通过最优信号策略可以确保事故概率不随采用率增加而上升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 已有研究表明V2V信息共享在部分采用率下可能增加拥堵、降低安全性；因此作者希望系统性地研究V2V采用率本身（而非单纯的信息共享）对道路安全的影响。

Method: 修正现有V2V模型，提出校正版本；在不同采用率水平下进行行为分析；引入并分析最优信号策略。

Result: 在某些情况下，提高V2V采用率反而可能增加事故概率；但在最优信号策略下，可以保证事故概率不随采用率上升而增加。

Conclusion: V2V采用率提升并不必然带来安全改善，需要配合最优信号策略才能确保其安全效益。

Abstract: Vehicle-to-vehicle (V2V) communication is expected to improve road safety and reduce congestion. However, prior work shows that V2V information sharing under partial adoption may increase congestion and decrease safety. We study whether increasing V2V adoption itself affects road safety. We propose a corrected version of an existing model and analyze its behavior under varying adoption levels. We show that, in some cases, increased V2V adoption can increase accident probability. Moreover, under an optimal signaling policy, the system can ensure that accident probability is non-increasing in the adoption level.

</details>


### [650] [Post-AGI Economies: Superposition and the Second Fundamental Theorem of Welfare Economics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08267)
*Elija Perrier*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文在AGI经济背景下重新审视了第二福利定理，指出当涉及自主权、自我修改、身份连续性和叠加偏好时，该定理的经典版本可能失效，并提出了一个"自主限定"的第二福利定理，给出了使自主帕累托最优仍可去中心化认证的条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典第二福利定理依赖于凸性和福利关系的稳定性，但在后AGI经济中，自主权、自我修改和叠加偏好等要素不具商品属性，无法定义稳定的福利关系。因此即使支持超平面存在，该定理也可能失效，需要重新审视其适用条件。

Method: 通过理论分析，识别了自主帕累托最优仍可去中心化所需的一组联合条件：凸性、稳定道德地位、不可替代权利、福利选择、非操控性、受控自我修改和可验证性。同时区分了经济偏好叠加（基于上下文索引选择）与神经特征叠加。

Result: 提出了"自主限定第二福利定理"，明确了在AGI经济中自主帕累托最优仍可被认证去中心化的条件框架。

Conclusion: 经典福利经济学定理在AGI场景下需要重大修正，自主权等非商品要素的存在要求引入额外的伦理和制度条件才能维持去中心化效率。

Abstract: The classical Second Welfare Theorem decentralizes any Pareto efficient allocation through prices and transfers under convexity and regularity. In post AGI economies, autonomy rights, self-modification, identity continuity, and superposed preferences need not behave as commodities or define a stable welfare relation, so this reduction may fail even when a supporting hyperplane exists. We give an autonomy-qualified Second Welfare Theorem stating the joint conditions convexity, stable moral status, non-fungible rights, welfare selection, non manipulation, governed self modification, and verification under which an autonomy Pareto optimum remains certifiably decentralizable, distinguishing economic preference superposition, a hypothesis about context-indexed choice, from neural feature superposition.

</details>


### [651] [Strategyproof Mechanisms for Euclidean Facility Location Problems under $L_p$-norm Social Cost](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08621)
*Hau Chan,Jianan Lin,Chenhao Wang*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究了在欧几里得平面上策略proof的设施选址机制，证明了坐标中位数机制（CM）对于 $p\ge 2$ 的近似比恰好为 $2^{1-1/p}$，对于 $1\le p\le 2$ 为 $\sqrt{2}$；并提出了两种随机机制（URCM 和质心随机独裁机制），在某些参数范围内获得更优的近似比。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决 Goel 和 Hann-Caruthers [SCW 2023] 遗留的关于坐标中位数机制（CM）在 $L_p$ 范数社会成本下精确近似比的开问题，并探索随机机制能否获得更好的近似保证。

Method: (1) 精确分析坐标中位数（CM）机制的近似比，证明 $p\ge 2$ 时恰为 $2^{1-1/p}$，$1\le p\le 2$ 时为 $\sqrt{2}$；(2) 研究均匀旋转坐标中位数（URCM）机制，分析其在不同 $p$ 下的表现；(3) 提出质心随机独裁机制（以各1/2概率返回质心或随机独裁），并与CM和URCM进行比较。

Result: (1) 确认了CM机制在 $p\ge 2$ 时近似比恰为 $2^{1-1/p}$，$1\le p\le 2$ 时为 $\sqrt{2}$，紧界成立；(2) URCM机制在 $1\le p<2$ 时严格优于 $\sqrt{2}$，但对 $p\ge 2$ 无改进；(3) 质心随机独裁机制在 $p\gtrsim 1.6$ 时严格优于CM和URCM。

Conclusion: 完全解决了CM机制的近似比猜想，并展示了随机机制在设计更优策略proof设施选址算法中的潜力，同时用统一技术重新推导了 $p=1$ 和 $p=\infty$ 的经典结果。

Abstract: We study strategyproof mechanisms for eliciting agents' location preferences truthfully in the Euclidean plane $\mathbb R^2$ and locating a facility so as to minimize the $L_p$-norm social cost, defined as the $L_p$-norm of the vector of distances from the facility to the agents' preferred locations, for any $p \ge 1$. While the cases $p=1$ and $p=\infty$ have been well-studied, open questions remain about the optimal approximation ratios achievable by strategyproof mechanisms for general $p$.
  Our first result resolves an open question of Goel and Hann-Caruthers [Soc. Choice Welf. 2023]. They showed that the coordinate-wise median (CM) mechanism achieves an approximation ratio lying between \(2^{1-\frac{1}{p}}\) and \(2^{\frac{3}{2}-\frac{2}{p}}\) for $p\ge 2$, and they conjectured that it is exactly \(2^{1-\frac{1}{p}}\). We confirm this conjecture, and we further show that CM has a tight $\sqrt 2$-approximation for $1\le p\le 2$.
  Our second and third results demonstrate that two randomized mechanisms can yield better approximation ratios. In particular, we first consider the uniformly rotated coordinate-wise median (URCM) mechanism, and prove that, for \(1\le p<2\), its approximation ratio strictly improves over the deterministic bound \(\sqrt{2}\), while no such improvement is possible for $p\ge 2$. We then study the centroid random dictatorship mechanism that returns the average location (i.e., centroid) and the random dictatorship each with half probability, and show that its approximation ratio strictly improves over CM and URCM for every finite \(p\gtrsim 1.6\). Moreover, our analysis independently recovers the classical deterministic and randomized results for $p=1$ [Meir, SAGT 2019] [Barak, EC 2026] and $p=\infty$ [Goel and Hann-Caruthers, SCW 2023] [Tang et al., EC 2020] using significantly different techniques.

</details>


### [652] [EFX for Additive Chores: Nonexistence, Pareto Incompatibility, and Bi-Valued Existence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08872)
*Wentao He,Biaoshuai Tao*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文解决了不可分割家务公平分配中EFX分配存在性的长期开放问题，证明了当n≥4时，即使在三值加性成本函数下，也存在不存在EFX分配的实例，并探讨了双值实例中EFX与帕累托最优的不兼容性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决公平分配领域中关于不可分割家务的EFX分配存在性的长期开放问题，填补理论空白。

Method: 通过构造反例证明三值加性成本函数下EFX分配不存在；分析双值实例中EFX与帕累托最优的不兼容性；证明n=4时EFX分配一定存在。

Result: ①对于n≥4，三值加性成本函数下存在无EFX分配的实例；②对于n≥4，双值实例中存在EFX分配不帕累托最优的实例；③n=4时EFX分配保证存在。

Conclusion: 将EFX分配的存在性边界推向三值成本函数，揭示了三值情形下的不可能性，并首次证明在正成本下EFX与帕累托最优的不兼容性。

Abstract: We consider the fair division problem of indivisible chores and resolve the long-standing open problem for the existence of EFX allocations with additive cost functions. We show that, even for tri-valued additive cost functions, for every $n\geq 4$, there exists an instance with $n$ agents where no EFX allocation exists. Our counterexample only uses three types of chores, which is also tight on the number of types, as an EFX allocation is known to exist for two types of chores.
  We then consider bi-valued instances. We show that, for every $n\geq 4$, there exists an instance with $n$ agents where every EFX allocation is not Pareto-optimal. This is also the first example showing the incompatibility of EFX and Pareto-optimality when the costs of items are positive: existing examples showing the incompatibility of EFX and Pareto-optimal exploit items with $0$ costs. Our result shows such an example exists even for bi-valued instances. The number of agents $n$ is also tight: for $n\leq 3$, it is known that EFX is compatible with Pareto-optimality. Finally, we also show that an EFX allocation is guaranteed to exist for $n=4$.

</details>


### [653] [STON'R Converges to First-Order Nash~Equilibria of Multiplayer Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09565)
*Marika Kosohorská,Tomáš Kroupa,Tomáš Votroubek*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文扩展了STON'R算法，证明其在多人一般和博弈中收敛到一阶纳什均衡（FONE），统一了此前针对零和博弈与凹博弈的结论，并通过实验验证了算法有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非凹博弈中纳什均衡和局部纳什均衡存在性无保证，计算近似均衡属于PPAD难问题，亟需更广泛的均衡概念和可行算法。

Method: 基于STON'R算法（解决变分不等式问题），将收敛性从两人零和博弈与凹博弈推广到多人一般和博弈，证明其极限点对应一阶纳什均衡（FONE）。

Result: STON'R算法在多人一般和博弈中收敛到FONE，统一了多种博弈类型的均衡概念，并在多个文献实例中验证了算法的有效性和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: FONE是更通用的博弈论解概念，STON'R算法可有效求解此类均衡，为非凹博弈提供了可行的计算方法。

Abstract: Nonconcave games present a unique challenge, as neither pure Nash equilibria nor local Nash equilibria (LNE) are guaranteed to exist, even in zero-sum settings. Additionally, computing approximate LNE in smooth multiplayer games over bounded regions is PPAD-hard. These challenges, coupled with the inherent complexity, have driven recent research toward broader equilibrium concepts, such as min-max critical points, and first-order Nash equilibria (FONE), which correspond to solutions of specific non-monotone variational inequalities. This paper addresses general-sum multiplayer games with compact convex strategy sets and smooth, nonconcave utility functions. Daskalakis et al. introduced the STON'R algorithm for solving variational inequality problems and established convergence under smoothness assumptions. They further showed that the algorithm's limit points correspond to equilibria in specific classes of games, namely local minimax equilibria in two-player zero-sum games and Nash equilibria in smooth concave games. In this work, we extend the convergence result to multiplayer general-sum games and show that the variational inequality solutions targeted by STON'R correspond to first-order Nash equilibria (FONE), a general game-theoretic solution concept that unifies these previously studied cases. We demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of the algorithm on various examples from recent literature.

</details>


### [654] [Efficiently Restructuring Sovereign Debt via Arctic Auctions with Convex Costs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09631)
*Jugal Garg,Edwin Lock,Vijay V. Vazirani*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究了Arctic产品组合拍卖中的竞争均衡计算问题，该机制最初用于冰岛政府交换冻结金融账户，后被IMF用于主权债务重组。作者发现该拍卖对买方等价于拟线性Fisher市场，但卖方可通过显式成本与约束表达丰富供给偏好。针对可分离、阶梯递增边际成本这一自然且富有表现力的场景，作者利用多面体理论证明理性输入可导出理性值竞争均衡，并基于经典原始-对偶平衡流技术提出首个多项式时间算法，为具有复杂偏好的拍卖提供了稳健计算基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管Fisher市场的算法文献丰富，但卖方一侧（尤其是面临非平凡成本时）的竞争均衡计算鲜有研究，此前不存在多项式时间算法。

Method: 利用多面体理论分析理性性质，并将经典原始-对偶平衡流技术从线性Fisher市场扩展到具有阶梯递增边际成本的卖方场景。

Result: 证明理性输入产生理性值竞争均衡；开发了首个多项式时间算法。

Conclusion: 为具有复杂偏好的拍卖提供了稳健计算基础，助力全球金融中灵活且制度可行的市场设计。

Abstract: We study the problem of computing competitive equilibria in the Arctic product-mix auction, originally developed for the Icelandic government for exchanging blocked financial accounts, and more recently proposed by IMF staff for sovereign debt restructuring. From the buyers' perspective, the Arctic auction is equivalent to the quasi-linear Fisher market. However, unlike the standard Fisher model, the seller can express rich supply preferences through explicit supply-side costs and constraints. Despite extensive algorithmic literature on Fisher markets, the seller side has not received much attention, and no polynomial-time algorithm was previously known for computing competitive equilibrium when sellers face nontrivial costs.
  We examine the natural and expressive regime of separable, stepwise-increasing marginal costs that underlie the above-stated applications. Using polyhedral theory techniques, we first show that rational inputs lead to rational-valued competitive equilibria. Motivated by this result, we develop the first polynomial-time algorithm for this setting based on a non-trivial extension of classic primal-dual balanced-flow techniques for linear Fisher markets. Our work provides a robust computational foundation for auctions with sophisticated preferences, paving the way for flexible and institutionally feasible market designs in global finance.

</details>


<div id='cs.IR'></div>

# cs.IR [[Back]](#toc)

### [655] [PulseBench-Tab: A Multilingual Benchmark for Table Extraction with Graph-Based Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07534)
*Ritvik Pandey,Sid Manchkanti,Mohammed Wazir Adain,Mohammed Hadi,Dushyanth Sekhar*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: PulseBench-Tab是一个多语言表格提取基准，包含9种语言、1,820个人工标注表格，并提出T-LAG评估指标，测试了9个提取系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有表格提取基准多局限于单一语言或简单表格结构，缺乏多语言、复杂结构（如合并单元格）的标准化评估平台。

Method: 构建1,820个多语言表格数据集（9种语言、4种文字），提出T-LAG指标（将表格建模为有向图，通过最优二分匹配计算结构和内容保真度）。

Result: 在9个商用和开源表格提取系统上进行了评估，给出了各语言的性能分解结果。

Conclusion: 该基准和指标为多语言、复杂结构表格提取提供了标准化评估工具，数据集和代码已开源。

Abstract: We introduce PulseBench-Tab, an open multilingual benchmark for evaluating table extraction from document images. The benchmark comprises 1,820 human-annotated tables spanning 9 languages and 4 scripts (Latin, CJK, Arabic, Cyrillic), drawn from 380 real-world source documents including financial filings, government reports, and regulatory disclosures. Tables range from 2 to 1,183 cells, with 48.1% containing merged or spanning cells. Alongside the dataset, we propose T-LAG (Table Logical Adjacency Graph), a novel evaluation metric that models tables as directed graphs over cell adjacencies and computes structural and content fidelity in a single score via optimal bipartite matching. We evaluate 9 commercial and open-source table extraction systems across the benchmark and report per-language breakdowns. The full dataset, scoring code, and all provider outputs are publicly available.

</details>


### [656] [Bidirectional Semantic Complementary Tool Retrieval for Remote Sensing Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07538)
*Zeyuan Wang,Dongyang Hou,Cheng Yang,Xuezhi Cui,Linrui Xu,Bo Yu,Gaozhi Zhou,Ziyu Li,Liangtian Liu,Kai Ouyang,Wang Guo,Lili Zhu,Chao Tao*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向遥感智能体的双向语义互补工具检索方法（BSCTR），通过查询端基于规划的意图分解和工具端基于依赖图的上下文注入，解决自然语言查询与工具文档间的语义不对称问题，在遥感及通用数据集上取得显著效果提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM的遥感智能体依赖大量专用工具库，但工具文档常超出LLM上下文窗口限制，因此精确工具检索至关重要。现有检索方法面临"语义不对称"瓶颈：自然语言查询表达宏观意图缺乏工具级语义，而工具文档提供细粒度技术描述却缺少工作流操作上下文。

Method: 提出双向语义互补检索方法：(1) 查询侧：基于规划的查询增强机制，利用智能体推理能力将抽象意图分解为逻辑子任务，主动补充缺失的功能语义；(2) 工具侧：针对遥感工具链强耦合特性，构建具有持续学习能力的动态工具依赖图，通过邻域信息聚合机制将前驱工具上下文注入当前节点表示。

Result: 在遥感数据集GeoPlan-bench和通用数据集API-Bank上，该方法不仅显著提升了复杂遥感任务的工具检索准确率，还展现出良好的可迁移性，可扩展至通用领域任务。

Conclusion: BSCTR通过查询端和工具端的双向语义互补，有效弥合了自然语言查询与工具文档之间的语义鸿沟，为遥感智能体的精确工具检索提供了新范式，且具备跨领域泛化能力。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM)-based agents provide a novel paradigm for the automated processing of remote sensing(RS) data. Their success in complex RS tasks rely on extensive specialized tool libraries. However, tool documentation often exceeds the context window limits of LLMs, making precise tool retrieval essential for agentic workflows. Existing tool retrieval methods face "semantic asymmetry" bottleneck: natural language queries typically express macro-level intentions lacking tool-specific semantics, while tool documentation provides fine-grained technical descriptions lacking operational context for workflows. To bridge this semantic gap, this paper proposes a bidirectional semantic complementary tool retrieval method. First, on the query side, we introduce a planning-based query enhancement mechanism that leverages the reasoning capabilities of agents to decompose abstract intentions into logical subtasks, thereby actively supplementing the query with missing functional semantics. Second, on the tool side, addressing the strong coupling characteristics of RS tool chains, we construct a dynamic tool dependency graph with continual learning capabilities. By employing a neighborhood information aggregation mechanism, contextual information from precursor tools is explicitly injected into the current node representation, enriching tool descriptions with contextual semantics. Experimental results on the RS dataset GeoPlan-bench and the general-purpose dataset API- Bank demonstrate that the proposed method not only significantly improves tool retrieval accuracy for complex RS tasks but also exhibits robust extensibility for transfer to general-domain tasks. The source code and dataset are available at https://github.com/geox-lab/BSCTR.

</details>


### [657] [Beyond Item IDs: Scaling Short-Form-Video Recommendation via Semantic-Native Long Sequence Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07546)
*Ruixiao Sun,Diego Uribe Mora,Zhimeng Jiang,Yuanzhen Lin,Jiarui Wang,Yuening Li,Danfeng Guo,Zhizhong Chen,Chuan He,Liang Liu*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出了一套生产级框架，通过语义ID缓解表示瓶颈，以及全局感知压缩Transformer解决序列长度扩展问题，实现超长用户行为序列建模，在十亿用户规模上取得显著在线收益。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 短视频推荐中，捕捉超长用户观看历史中的兴趣面临两大瓶颈：原子化Video ID的语义稀疏性导致无法捕捉内容关系且需要巨大嵌入表；Transformer的自注意力二次计算复杂度限制了序列长度。

Method: 1. 采用基于内容的语义ID（Semantic IDs），通过深度截断的粗粒度语义ID缩小嵌入表大小，并利用共享语义前缀泛化到冷启动内容。2. 提出全局感知压缩Transformer（Global-Aware Compression Transformer），利用非参数时间折叠和统一全局查询集成有效压缩序列，缓解标准自注意力的内存和计算瓶颈。

Result: 离线评估显示峰值内存占用降低一个数量级，计算开销大幅减少。在线A/B测试中，用户满意参与度和满意内容消费均获得显著提升。

Conclusion: 该框架有效克服了短视频推荐中超长序列建模的表示和计算瓶颈，能在生产环境中以可承受成本支持更长序列长度，带来实质性的业务指标提升。

Abstract: Capturing user interests across extensive watch histories is critical for short-form video recommendation, yet scaling sequence length is limited by two bottlenecks: the semantic sparsity of atomic Video IDs and the quadratic computational complexity of Transformers. Traditional orthogonal Video IDs fail to capture content relationships and demand large embedding tables, while the quadratic complexity of self-attention restricts the maximum sequence length under strict industrial latency and resource constraints. In this work, we present a production-deployed framework for modeling ultra-long user behavior sequences at a billion-user scale. We first address the representation bottleneck by adopting content-native Semantic IDs. By utilizing depth-truncated, coarse-grained Semantic IDs, we shrink the embedding table size from corpus cardinality. This compact representation naturally generalizes to cold-start content through shared semantic prefixes. Second, to overcome the sequence scaling barrier, we introduce a Global-Aware Compression Transformer that leverages non-parametric temporal folding and unified global query integration to effectively condense the sequence, alleviating both the memory and computational bottlenecks of standard self-attention. Offline profiling on our computing infrastructure demonstrates an order-of-magnitude reduction in peak memory footprint and a drastic decrease in computational overhead. This efficiency gain enables supporting longer sequence lengths at an affordable cost in production, yielding substantial online gains in satisfied user engagement and satisfied content consumption in large-scale online A/B tests.

</details>


### [658] [Evaluating Advanced Prompting on Gemini Flash for Multi-Hop Biomedical QA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07548)
*Ahmed Bajaber,Mohammed Alliheedi*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文评估了Gemini Flash模型在MedHopQA医学多跳推理任务上的表现，发现精心设计的复杂提示工程（含角色扮演、多步思维链示例和格式规则）能显著提升性能（Concept Level Score从0.565提升至0.720），且Gemini 2.0 Flash搭配复杂提示的表现与Gemini 2.5 Flash几乎持平。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型在高风险的生物医学领域面临复杂多跳推理的严峻挑战，如何有效提升其推理能力是亟需解决的问题。

Method: 通过API直接评估Gemini Flash模型，设计了一套包含角色扮演、多步思维链示例和详细格式化规则的多组件复杂提示，并与基础提示进行对比实验。

Result: 复杂提示的Concept Level Score为0.720，显著优于基础提示的0.565，且Gemini 2.0 Flash的表现与下一代Gemini 2.5 Flash几乎相同。

Conclusion: 先进的提示工程是释放现代大语言模型完整推理能力的关键因素。

Abstract: The MedHopQA challenge presents a critical test for Large Language Models (LLMs): complex, multi-hop reasoning in the high-stakes biomedical domain. This paper details our direct API-based evaluation of Google's Gemini Flash models, focusing on the impact of advanced prompt engineering. We designed a sophisticated, multi-component prompt for Gemini 2.0 Flash that combined role-playing, explicit multi-shot Chain-of-Thought (CoT) examples, and detailed formatting rules. Our best run, using this complex prompt, achieved a Concept Level Score of 0.720. This result dramatically outperformed a baseline prompt which scored only 0.565. Remarkably, this performance on the efficient Gemini 2.0 Flash was almost identical to the result from the next-generation Gemini 2.5 Flash. Our findings demonstrate that sophisticated prompt design is a critical factor for unlocking the full reasoning capabilities of modern LLMs.

</details>


### [659] [MIRAGE: Metadata-Integrated Repository Analysis and Guided Enhancement for MSR Datasets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07611)
*Aabia Ather,Muhammad Usayd Ather,Qurat-Ul-Ain Somroo,Muhammad Khuram Shahzad*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种通过元数据丰富化、FAIRness评估和主题驱动分析来改进MSR数据集分析的方法，扩展了2013-2024年MSR论文的数据集目录，并揭示了托管站点和格式对引用模式及可用性的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的MSR数据集目录存在元数据不完善、可发现性和可重用性不足的问题，难以支持有效的数据集评估和复用。

Method: 利用Semantic Scholar API收集2013-2024年MSR论文元数据，采用LDA主题建模和统计分析，对数据集目录进行元数据丰富化（添加托管站点、格式、可访问性、可重用性、质量等属性）和FAIRness评估。

Result: 仓库托管站点和选择的数据格式会影响引用模式和数据集可用性；增强的注释方法改善了MSR数据集的分析和可发现性。

Conclusion: 通过元数据丰富化和主题分析，能有效支持MSR研究产物的复用和评估，提升数据集的可发现性与使用价值。

Abstract: This paper proposes an improved approach to the analysis of Mining Software Repositories (MSR) datasets via metadata enrichment, FAIRness assessment, and topic-driven analysis. This research expands upon an earlier dataset directory created specifically for the analysis of MSR datasets by adding new annotations to the datasets, enriching the metadata categories, and offering more advanced filtering options. The metadata of the MSR papers presented from 2013 to 2024 has been gathered using the Semantic Scholar API. The analysis is based on Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA) topic modeling and statistical analysis. Dataset-level attributes were included into the expanded dataset directory, namely repository hosting site, format, accessibility, reusability, and dataset quality. The study reveals that the choice of repository hosting sites and data formats influences citation patterns and dataset usability. Furthermore, the enhanced annotation approach improves the analysis and discoverability of MSR datasets, supporting more effective reuse and evaluation of research artifacts.

</details>


### [660] [TRACER: Token ReAssignment for Concept ERasure in Generative Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07688)
*Ziheng Chen,Jiali Cheng,Zezhong Fan,Hadi Amiri,Diyuan Wu,Gabriele Tolomei,Yang Zhang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 这篇论文提出TRACER框架，通过令牌重分配而非直接抑制共享语义ID，解决生成式推荐系统中概念遗忘与推荐效用保持之间的冲突问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的LLM遗忘方法无法直接应用于生成式推荐，因为语义ID是抽象标识符，被遗忘项和保留项共享，导致概念移除与推荐效用保持之间存在严重冲突。

Method: 提出TRACER端到端概念遗忘框架，核心是令牌重分配（Token Reassignment），将概念相关项重新分配给更有利于遗忘的替代令牌，并引入一致性正则化器来保持保留项的语义一致性。

Result: 在真实推荐数据集上的实验表明，TRACER能有效移除目标概念，同时比现有遗忘基线方法更好地保持推荐效用。

Conclusion: TRACER通过令牌重分配策略有效解决了生成式推荐中概念遗忘的独特挑战，在移除敏感概念的同时最大程度保护推荐性能。

Abstract: Generative recommendation formulates next-item prediction as autoregressive generation over semantic ID (SID) sequences derived from users' historical interactions, making modern recommender systems structurally similar to large language models (LLMs). As privacy and safety concerns grow, these systems increasingly require concept unlearning to remove sensitive or harmful concepts associated with items. However, existing LLM unlearning methods cannot be directly applied to generative recommendation. Unlike word tokens with explicit semantics, SIDs are abstract identifiers that are often shared by both forget and retain items, leading to severe conflicts between concept removal and recommendation utility preservation.
  To address this challenge, we propose TRACER, an end-to-end concept unlearning framework based on token reassignment. Rather than directly suppressing shared SIDs, TRACER reassigns concept-related items to alternative tokens that better facilitate forgetting while minimizing side effects on retained items.
