It is realized as MedSci Skills, an open-source toolkit of 43 skills coordinated by one orchestrator, whose deterministic tier comprises 21 standard-library detectors. We evaluate it on three reproducible public-dataset pipelines (STARD, PRISMA, STROBE) and a seeded-defect ablation. Results. Across the three pipelines every content-hash manifest verified clean and the gates surfaced real defects. On 27 identical injected defects the deterministic gates detected all 27 with no false positives on the matched clean fixtures, whereas a generic single-prompt LLM reviewer detected 11, its misses concentrated in generated-code, bibliography-internal, and style defects the prose does not expose. Conclusion. Determinism-where-possible verification yields an auditable, re-executable trail that exposes the evidence a human needs to check an LLM-assisted manuscript -- feasibility and reproducibility evidence, not a claim of human-competitive quality, which a separate blinded study addresses. MedSci Skills is MIT-licensed and archived (v3.8.0).

</details>


### [803] [From Rigid to Dynamic: Entropy-Guided Adaptive Inference for Long-Context LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09508)
*Zhanchao Xu,Haoyang Li,Qingfa Xiao,Fei Teng,Chen Jason Zhang,Lei Chen,Qing Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: EntropyInfer提出了一种基于注意力熵的自适应稀疏注意力与KV缓存压缩框架，无需训练即可在长上下文LLM推理中动态分配计算资源，实现了最高2.39倍端到端加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法对所有注意力头采用固定稀疏模式或统一预算，忽略了不同头和行为之间的显著差异，导致计算资源分配不合理。

Method: 1) 根据注意力熵将注意力头分为刚性头（熵接近零）和动态头（熵波动大），在预填充阶段自适应分配计算；2) 在解码阶段利用生成的输出token（而非仅预填充token）进行潜在KV缓存压缩。

Result: 在Llama、Qwen和openPangu系列模型上，EntropyInfer在超过10万token的推理中实现最高2.39倍端到端加速，且质量损失极小，优于SnapKV、AdaKV、CritiPrefill等基线方法。

Conclusion: 注意力头的类型分布是上下文相关的，无法离线预判，在线自适应分配策略是长上下文LLM高效推理的有效途径。

Abstract: Existing sparse attention and KV cache compression methods for long-context LLM inference typically apply fixed sparsity patterns or uniform budgets across all attention heads, overlooking the substantial variation in attention behavior among heads and contexts. We observe two distinct entropy patterns among attention heads: Rigid Heads, whose entropy stays near zero across input segments, and Dynamic Heads, whose entropy fluctuates significantly. Crucially, the distribution of these types is context-dependent and cannot be predetermined offline. We therefore propose EntropyInfer, a training-free framework that uses attention entropy to adaptively allocate compute at the granularity of individual heads and segments during prefilling. For decoding, we introduce a latent KV cache compression scheme that leverages generated output tokens, rather than prefill tokens alone, to identify and retain the most critical cache entries. Extensive experiments on Llama, Qwen and openPangu model series show that EntropyInfer consistently outperforms baselines including SnapKV, AdaKV, and CritiPrefill, achieving up to 2.39$\times$ end-to-end speedup beyond 100k tokens with minimal quality degradation compared to full attention. The code is released in https://github.com/SHA-4096/EntropyInfer.

</details>


### [804] [AI Scientists Are Only as Good as Their Evidence: A Stratified Ablation of Proprietary Data and Reasoning Skills in Drug-Asset Valuation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09556)
*Yinan Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 在药物资产估值任务中，AI科学家的性能上限主要由其可获取的证据基座（proprietary evidence）决定，而非模型质量或推理能力。通过三组消融实验（A:纯网页LLM、B:公共工具+评估框架、C:专有NoAI语料库）在13个资产基准上验证：B改善了校准与审计纪律，但只有C通过专有数据覆盖率达到0.96的黄金标准恢复率，而A/B仅0.25/0.38。引入覆盖感知决策效用后，C得分7.43 vs A/B的1.76/2.57。结论：专有数据设定了AI科学家所知与决策的上限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 挑战主流假设——AI科学家的能力主要取决于模型质量、提示工程或推理框架。提出替代假说：在知识密集型科学决策（如药物资产估值）中，制约因素往往是智能体可访问的证据基座（evidence substrate）。

Method: 设计三组消融实验：A为纯网页LLM分析师；B增加公共结构化工具+14维度估值手册、验证器、客观性策略和红队；C额外添加专有NoAI语料库（包含管线、试验和交易情报）。在13个资产的分层基准上评估，引入覆盖感知决策效用指标 = 决策质量 × 黄金覆盖度。

Result: B改善了校准（tier-in-range准确率从0.80升至0.89）和客观性（3.16→3.30），但未消除事实天花板。在能力超集统计下，A/B仅恢复0.25/0.38的黄金标准竞争记录，C达0.96；长尾子集上C达0.93 vs 0.26/0.30。盲审决策质量A/B相近（7.01 vs 6.96），但覆盖感知效用C达7.43 vs 1.76/2.57。即使完美非专有数据报告，受B覆盖度限制最高仅3.83。

Conclusion: 推理框架并非不重要（B确实改善了校准与纪律），但专有证据设定了AI科学家所能知道和决策的绝对上限。数据质量与覆盖面是知识密集型AI科学决策的核心瓶颈。

Abstract: AI Scientist agents are often evaluated as if capability were mainly a function of model quality, prompting, or reasoning scaffolds. We test a different hypothesis in drug-asset valuation: for knowledge-intensive scientific decisions, the limiting factor is often the evidence substrate the agent can access. We run a controlled three-arm ablation on a production valuation agent: A is a plain web-only LLM analyst, B adds public structured tools plus a 14-dimension valuation playbook, verifier, objectivity policy and red-team, and C adds the proprietary Noah AI corpus of curated pipeline, trial and deal intelligence. Across a 13-asset stratified benchmark, B improves calibration and audit discipline: tier-in-range accuracy rises from 0.80 to 0.89 and objectivity from 3.16 to 3.30. But B does not remove the factual ceiling. Under capability-superset accounting, A and B recover only 0.25 and 0.38 of the curated gold competitive record, while C recovers 0.96; on the curated long-tail subset, C reaches 0.93 vs. 0.26/0.30. Raw blind-panel decision quality is similar for A and B (7.01 vs. 6.96), so we introduce completeness-aware decision utility: informed decision-quality = decision-quality x gold-coverage. On this metric, C reaches 7.43 vs. 1.76/2.57 for A/B. Even a perfect non-proprietary-data report would be capped at 3.83 by B's coverage. The result is not that reasoning scaffolds are unimportant; they improve calibration and discipline. Rather, proprietary evidence sets the upper bound of what the AI Scientist can know and therefore decide.

</details>


### [805] [PRISM: Recovering Instruction Sets from Language Model Activations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09563)
*Gilad Gressel,Rahul Pankajakshan,Julia Diament,Efim Hudis,Krishnashree Achuthan,Yisroel Mirsky*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出PRISM方法，从LLM隐藏状态中解码出完整的指令集，用于监控Agent行为，比现有方法更有效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM作为Agent部署时，需要监控其输出，更需要了解是什么指令在驱动其行为。现有方法无法恢复完整的指令集（包括约束、禁止项、子目标等），存在安全隐患。

Method: 提出PRISM，一种激活条件解释器，从冻结目标模型的隐藏状态解码出忠实子弹列表形式的指令集。使用基于法官引导的GRPO算法进行训练，奖励覆盖的指令、惩罚无依据的指令。

Result: 在良性、受限、提示注入和隐藏目标四种场景下，PRISM优于现有的激活到语言基线方法，尤其在安全相关的目标上表现突出。

Conclusion: PRISM能有效从隐状态中检索完整指令集，为LLM Agent提供更可靠的监控能力，对安全性有重要意义。

Abstract: As LLMs are deployed as agents, reliable monitoring requires knowing not only what they output, but which instructions are steering their behavior. This is difficult when models infer unintended subgoals, follow contextual cues, or are influenced by prompt injections and hidden objectives. While activation-to-language methods suggest that hidden states can reveal natural-language information, existing approaches are not designed to recover the full set of simultaneous instructions, constraints, prohibitions, and subgoals active in agentic settings. We formalize this problem as instruction set retrieval and introduce PRISM, an activation-conditioned interpreter that decodes hidden states from a frozen target model into a faithful bullet list of active instructions. Unlike prior activation-to-language methods, PRISM is trained to recover instruction sets directly, using judge-guided GRPO to reward covered instructions and penalize unsupported ones. Across benign, constrained, prompt-injection, and hidden-objective settings, PRISM outperforms activation-to-language baselines, especially on security-relevant objectives.

</details>


### [806] [Self-Explainability in Self-Adaptive and Self-Organising Systems: Status and Research Directions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09568)
*Tom Beyer,Svea Wisy,Sven Tomforde*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文对自解释性（Self-Explainability）进行了系统性文献综述，提出了统一的定义、分类法和"自解释性层级"框架，发现大多数方法仍停留在概念层面，缺乏统一的评估标准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI驱动的自适应系统日益复杂，传统可解释AI已不足以让用户理解和信任系统，因此需要系统具备自我解释能力（SX）。本文旨在系统梳理SX领域的研究现状，弥合概念分歧。

Method: 采用系统性文献综述方法，对现有SX方法进行领域、目标和评估方法的分析，并构建了统一的SX定义、分类法以及"自解释性层级"框架。

Result: 发现大多数SX方法仍停留在概念阶段，缺乏实际实现；目前尚无正式或事实上的SX评估标准，存在重大研究空白。

Conclusion: 本文为推进复杂系统中的自解释性研究奠定了基础，并提出了未来研究的路线图。

Abstract: The growing complexity of self-adaptive and self-organising systems, fuelled by advances in Artificial Intelligence (AI), has made them increasingly difficult to understand and trust. While Explainable AI aims to provide insight into AI decision-making, a more advanced goal is for systems to explain themselves - an ability referred to as Self-Explainability (SX). This article presents a systematic literature review on SX, analysing existing approaches, including their domains, targets, and evaluation methods. The review develops a unified definition and taxonomy of SX and introduces Levels of Self-Explainability, providing a framework for positioning current and future research. Our results show that most SX approaches remain conceptual, with few practical implementations. Moreover, there is currently no formal or de facto standard for evaluating SX, highlighting a major research gap. This work thus establishes a foundation and roadmap for advancing Self-Explainability in complex systems.

</details>


### [807] [Optical Reasoning: Rethinking Images as an Expressive Reasoning Medium Beyond Text](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09585)
*Yutong Bian,Dongjie Cheng,Heming Xia,Yongqi Li,Wenjie Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种全新的"光学推理"范式，将图像作为独立的推理媒介，代替传统的文本推理。通过两种变体（基于排版的推理和基于图形的推理），在数学、科学和多模态推理任务上达到或超越文本推理的性能，同时减少了28.57%（语言任务）和16%（多模态任务）的推理token，实现了1.96倍的token效率提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有链式思维推理虽已从纯文本推理扩展到多模态推理，但仍以文本为主要推理媒介。作者提出一个更大胆的想法：能否仅用图像作为推理媒介，同时处理语言和多模态任务？旨在探索统一视觉画布进行推理的可行性。

Method: 提出光学推理（Optical Reasoning），包含两种变体：1）基于排版的推理（typographic-based）：优化视觉布局以紧凑呈现推理过程；2）基于图形的推理（graphical-based）：将文本与图形元素组合为结构化视觉推理过程。

Result: 在数学、科学和交错模态推理基准上，光学推理能匹配甚至超越传统文本推理；语言任务推理token减少28.57%，多模态任务减少16%；token效率达到文本推理的1.96倍。

Conclusion: 图像可以有效且高效地编码推理过程，提供统一的视觉推理画布，证明纯视觉推理范式的可行性。

Abstract: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) improves the performance of Large Language Models (LLMs) and has been extended to Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). More recent work further moves from text-based multimodal reasoning toward interleaved-modal reasoning, where intermediate steps can incorporate both textual rationales and visual evidence. In this work, we propose a bolder and more ambitious idea: could images alone serve as the reasoning medium for both language and multimodal tasks? To explore this, we propose optical reasoning, which treats images as a standalone reasoning medium. We instantiate this concept with two variants: typographic-based optical reasoning, which optimizes visual layouts for compact rationale rendering, and graphical-based optical reasoning, which composes text and graphical elements into structured visual rationales. Across mathematical, scientific, and interleaved-modal reasoning benchmarks, optical reasoning can match or even exceed traditional text reasoning while reducing reasoning tokens by an average of 28.57% on language tasks and 16% on multimodal tasks, achieving 1.96 times the token efficiency of text reasoning. These results show that images can effectively and efficiently encode rationales while providing a unified visual canvas for reasoning.

</details>


### [808] [Next-Token Prediction Learns Generalisable Representations of Sleep Physiology](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09605)
*Jonathan F. Carter,Lionel Tarassenko*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Hypnos，一个多模态睡眠基础模型，采用下一标记预测（next-token prediction）替代掩码重建或对比学习，在8种生理信号模态上训练，在睡眠阶段分类等任务上显著优于现有模型，且仅需1%的标注数据即可匹配强监督基线性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生理信号基础模型通常使用掩码重建或对比学习目标，但掩码重建不适合生理信号的随机性，对比学习则依赖定义不明确的语义不变性。作者希望找到一种更简单、可扩展的替代方案。

Method: 使用残差向量量化（RVQ）将8种生理信号模态（EEG、ECG、呼吸信号等）分别tokenize为离散标记流，训练一个自回归RQ-Transformer模型，在全部模态上并行预测下一个标记。训练数据来自超过20,000例夜间多导睡眠图（PSG）记录。

Result: Hypnos在多个基准测试中显著优于现有基础模型。在睡眠阶段分类任务中，仅用1%的标注数据即可匹配强监督基线的性能。模型还泛化到日间生理数据，在房颤检测上超越了专用的ECG基础模型。

Conclusion: 下一标记预测是多模态生理信号表征学习的强大自监督目标，简单且可扩展，为睡眠医学及其他医疗领域的信号建模提供了一种有效范式。

Abstract: Foundation models offer a promising route to compress multi-modal physiological signals into compact representations of human health, with broad applications across sleep medicine, cardiology, neurology and other healthcare domains. Existing models have typically been trained with masked-reconstruction or contrastive objectives. However, masked reconstruction may be poorly suited to the stochastic nature of these signals, while contrastive approaches rely on positive-pair definitions despite the semantic invariances of physiological signals being poorly understood. In this work, we show that next-token prediction is a simple and scalable alternative. We develop Hypnos, a multi-modal sleep foundation model trained using eight different sensing modalities (e.g. EEG, ECG, respiratory signals) drawn from over 20,000 overnight polysomnography recordings. We tokenize each modality into streams of discrete tokens using residual vector quantization, then train a large auto-regressive RQ-Transformer to jointly predict the next token across all modalities in parallel. After training, Hypnos can be applied to continuous streams of sensor data from any subset of supported modalities, generating embeddings for downstream tasks. Across a range of benchmarks, Hypnos significantly outperforms existing foundation models. In sleep stage classification, we match the performance of strong supervised baselines on held-out test sets whilst using \(100\times\) less labelled data. Hypnos even generalises to daytime physiology, surpassing a dedicated ECG foundation model at detecting atrial fibrillation. Our results demonstrate that next-token prediction is a strong self-supervised objective for representation learning from multi-modal physiological signals.

</details>


### [809] [From 0-to-1 to 1-to-N: Reproducible Engineering Evidence for MetaAI Recursive Self-Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09663)
*Dun Li,Jiatao Li,Hongzhi Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出MetaAI作为人类播种、AI扩展的递归自设计范式，建立四标准证据框架，并基于DGM等系统进行映射验证，DGM在80次迭代后SWE-bench从20%提升至50%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI系统大多由人类设计，缺乏AI自主修改自身机制的能力。作者希望系统化定义"递归自设计"这一概念，并提供可操作的评估框架来验证这类系统的存在与有效性。

Method: 提出四标准证据框架：可检查的目标系统、元层级修改器、反馈导向选择、递归持续。基于此框架对DGM、STOP、Goedel Agent、ShinkaEvolve等公开系统进行映射评估，并提供了可复现的MetaAI-Mini协议（基于HumanEval）。

Result: DGM是目前最直接的证据：80次迭代后SWE-bench Verified从20%提升至50%，Polyglot从14.2%提升至30.7%，消融实验表明开放探索和自我改进均有贡献。MetaAI-Mini作为协议报告，尚无完整模型运行结果。

Conclusion: 递归自设计正在从概念走向可验证的实践，DGM提供了初步实证。MetaAI-Mini为后续研究提供了可复现的基准协议，但尚缺实验数据。

Abstract: Recursive self-design refers to AI-assisted modification of the mechanisms by which an AI system is built, evaluated, and improved. This paper treats MetaAI not as a mature paradigm, but as a working term for a human-seeded, AI-expanded development pattern in which the design space itself becomes a target of modification. We propose an operational evidence framework with four criteria: inspectable target system, meta-level modifier, feedback-directed selection, and recursive continuation. We then map public systems, including Darwin Goedel Machine (DGM), STOP, Goedel Agent, and ShinkaEvolve, against these criteria. DGM provides the most direct currently reported evidence: its published results show improvement from 20% to 50% on SWE-bench Verified and from 14.2% to 30.7% on full Polyglot after 80 iterations, with ablations suggesting that both open-ended exploration and self-improvement contribute. Finally, we provide MetaAI-Mini, a reproducible HumanEval-based protocol and codebase. Because no completed model run is included in this build, MetaAI-Mini is reported as a protocol rather than as an experimental result.

</details>


### [810] [Frequency-based Constrained Sampling for Interval Patterns](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09666)
*Djawad Bekkoucha,Abdelkader Ouali,Bruno Crémilleux*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出CFips方法，在区间模式采样中直接整合用户定义的语法约束，通过多步采样框架在保证精确采样的情况下支持多种约束分解，实验证明该方法能在超时情况下完成原本失败的挖掘任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的穷举模式挖掘在处理大规模模式空间时效率低下，而输出空间模式采样虽能提供代表性模式，但现有方法难以在处理区间模式时融入用户定义的语法约束。

Method: 提出CFips采样方法，采用多步采样框架，将语法约束分解为区间边界的基元谓词，在约束模式空间内按频率比例进行精确采样。

Result: 理论证明了CFips能在约束空间内按频率比例采样区间模式；实验表明整合约束到采样过程中，能在给定超时内完成原本会失败的挖掘任务。

Conclusion: 将语法约束直接融入采样过程是处理大规模区间模式空间的有效策略，CFips在保证采样质量的同时显著提升了挖掘任务的可行性。

Abstract: Output space pattern sampling is a powerful alternative to exhaustive pattern mining for exploring large pattern spaces, as it enables users to focus on representative patterns drawn according to a chosen interestingness measure. In this paper, we address the problem of sampling interval patterns under user-defined syntactic constraints. We introduce CFips, a sampling approach that incorporates constraints directly into the sampling procedure. The approach relies on a multi-step sampling framework and supports several syntactic constraints by decomposing them into elementary predicates on interval bounds while preserving exact sampling guarantees. We formally prove that CFips samples interval patterns proportionally to their frequency within the constrained pattern space. The experimental results show that integrating constraints into the sampling procedure enables to complete mining tasks that would otherwise fail within a given time out.

</details>


### [811] [SpatialWorld: Benchmarking Interactive Spatial Reasoning of Multimodal Agents in Real-World Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09669)
*Hongcheng Gao,Hailong Qu,Jingyi Tang,Jiahao Wang,Zihao Huang,Hengkang Qiao,Shihong Huang,Junming Yang,Yi Li,Hongyixuan Yuan,Wenjie Li,Bohan Zeng,Wenbo Li,Bo Wang,Jianhui Liu,Olive Huang,Haoyang Huang,Wentao Zhang,Guoqing Huang,Nan Duan,Yinpeng Dong*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出 SpatialWorld——一个统一的交互式空间理解基准，集成8种异构仿真后端，包含760个人工标注任务。评估15个先进多模态智能体后发现，最强模型GPT-5平均任务成功率仅17.4%，开源最优模型Qwen-3.5为14.1%，揭示了主动探索与长程规划方面的瓶颈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准多依赖被动评估（如静态VQA）或特定模拟器，无法衡量多模态智能体在复杂真实世界任务中的通用交互式空间理解能力。

Method: 构建SpatialWorld基准，集成8种异构仿真后端，采用统一的模拟器无关协议，设计760个涵盖居家、旅行、社交协作等领域的任务，智能体需在仅视觉部分可观测条件下主动采集证据并通过文本动作接口表达决策，每个任务包含初始状态、参考轨迹和终端验证器。

Result: 15个先进智能体评估中，GPT-5平均任务成功率为17.4%，Qwen-3.5为14.1%。分析发现任务成功率与执行效率之间存在明显不匹配，且领域间性能差异显著。

Conclusion: 交互式空间理解任务仍极具挑战性，主动探索和长程规划是主要瓶颈，SpatialWorld可作为未来空间智能体的严格测试平台。

Abstract: Spatial reasoning is a foundational capability for multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to perceive and operate within the physical world. However, existing benchmarks predominantly rely on passive evaluation (e.g., static VQA) or simulator-specific pipelines, failing to assess general interactive spatial understanding. We introduce SpatialWorld, a unified benchmark designed specifically for evaluating the interactive spatial understanding of multimodal agents in complex real-world tasks. Integrating eight heterogeneous simulation backends under a shared, simulator-agnostic protocol, SpatialWorld features 760 human-annotated tasks across diverse domains (e.g., household routines, travel, social collaboration). Agents must solve tasks under vision-only partial observability, actively gathering egocentric visual evidence and expressing decisions via a unified, text-based action interface native to MLLMs. For reliable evaluation, each task includes a human-validated initial state, a reference trajectory, and a terminal-state verifier. Evaluating 15 advanced agents reveals that robust spatial task solving remains challenging: the strongest model, GPT-5, achieves an average task success rate (TSR) of only 17.4%, while the leading open-source model, Qwen-3.5, reaches 14.1%. Further analysis exposes a clear mismatch between task success and execution efficiency, alongside substantial domain-specific performance variations. These bottlenecks in active exploration and long-horizon planning position SpatialWorld as a rigorous testbed for future spatial agents.

</details>


### [812] [Correlation Is Not Enough: Embedding Human Metadata for Individual Causal Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09672)
*Suraj Biswas,Saurabh Gupta,Pritam Mukherjee*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 预训练生物医学语言模型在跨领域语义相似度任务上表现异常（无关句子相似度高达0.83），这对基于嵌入距离构建因果图的大行为模型(LBM)造成严重误差。本文通过对比学习（72,034对）和BODHI硬负例挖掘提升领域分离度至2.30x，并用OpenVINO在AMX硬件上实现133倍加速（1367ms→10ms），发现FP16优于INT8。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现成生物医学编码器（BioBERT、PubMedBERT等）在跨领域（如生物医学与金融）语义相似度上产生虚假高分数（0.76-0.92），这对依赖嵌入距离推断因果关系的LBM模型造成致命错误——虚假邻近产生虚假因果边，误差向下游传播。

Method: 1) 对比学习：72,034对训练数据提升PubMedBERT的BIOSSES相关性从0.633到0.828，域间分离度从1.05x到1.63x。2) BODHI：从生物医学知识图谱中挖掘缺失边作为硬负例，进一步将分离度提升至2.30x。3) 推理优化：OpenVINO+AMX将单查询延迟从1367ms降至10ms（133x），FP16优于INT8。

Result: 对比学习后BIOSSES相关性提升至0.828，域间分离度1.63x；BODHI将分离度推至2.30x、判别差距+0.392（BIOSSES仅损失4.5%）。OpenVINO+AMX实现555句/秒吞吐量，无AMX的Ice Lake慢13-27倍。

Conclusion: 单纯依赖预训练嵌入的几何相似度在跨领域因果推理中不可靠，需要针对性对比训练和硬负例挖掘来修正。FP16在AMX硬件上优于INT8，硬件特性（AMX）对推理效率有决定性影响。

Abstract: Ask a pretrained biomedical language model whether "cortisol 28 ug/dL" and "stock-market volatility" are related, and it returns a cosine similarity of 0.83 on a scale where 1.0 means identical. The two share no mechanism. This is not a corner case: every off-the-shelf biomedical encoder we tested (BioBERT, PubMedBERT, BioM-ELECTRA) scores unrelated cross-domain pairs between 0.76 and 0.92 when the answer should be near zero. Accuracy on cross-domain discrimination is 0%.
  Retrieval systems survive this, because a language model downstream filters the noise. A Large Behavioural Model (LBM), a foundation model whose subject is a person rather than a sentence, does not: it reasons over a graph of a user's life and treats embedding proximity as evidence that two events are causally linked. False proximity writes a false causal edge, and everything downstream inherits the error. Here, embedding geometry is not a tuning knob; it is correctness.
  We report the fix. A contrastive pass over 72,034 pairs raises PubMedBERT BIOSSES correlation from 0.633 to 0.828 and within-vs-across-domain separation from 1.05x to 1.63x. A second pass, BODHI, mines hard negatives from edges absent in a biomedical knowledge graph and lifts separation to 2.30x and the discrimination gap to +0.392, at a 4.5% BIOSSES cost. On an Intel Xeon 6737P with AMX, OpenVINO cuts single-query latency from 1367 ms to 10 ms (133x) and reaches 555 sentences/sec. One finding contradicts standard advice: FP16 beats INT8 on this silicon at every serving batch size, and we explain why. The same model on a no-AMX Ice Lake instance runs 13-27x slower. We release the benchmark suite, training corpora, the BODHI generator, and the OpenVINO scripts.

</details>


### [813] [(Auto)formalization is supposed to be easy: Trellis process semantics for spelling out rigorous proofs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09674)
*Wesley Pegden*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: Trellis 是一个利用 LLM 代理进行自动形式化的系统，通过确定性约束的工作流和迭代细化自然语言证明，在 Lean 中实现可靠的自动形式化，并成功应用于一个拉姆齐理论的突破性成果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 受到数学家对"严格证明"的直觉启发：一个严格证明意味着其任何部分都可以被例行地展开为更详细的细节。基于这一理念，Trellis 旨在通过工作流设计而非专门的代理训练来实现可靠的自动形式化。

Method: Trellis 采用 LLM 代理在确定性约束的工作流中运行，通过迭代细化自然语言证明来强制执行增量式进展。其 specialization 来源于"严谨性意义"启发的工作流（通过过程语义强制执行），而非任务特定的代理训练。

Result: 该系统能够在适度的预算和通用代理下实现可靠的自动形式化，并成功端到端形式化了一个最新的拉姆齐理论突破性成果。

Conclusion: Trellis 证明了通过精心设计的、受严谨性概念启发的工作流，而非专门的代理训练，也可以有效地实现自动形式化。

Abstract: We present Trellis: an autoformalization system that leverages LLM agents in a deterministically constrained workflow to enforce incremental progress in Lean autoformalization tasks through iterative refinement of natural language proofs. Our approach is motivated by the common mathematician's notion of what it means to have a rigorous proof in the first place: namely, that it would be routine to elaborate any part of the proof in further detail. The result is a system which aims to achieve reliable autoformalization on a modest budget and with generalist agents, with specialization to autoformalization coming not from any task-specific agent training but instead from a meaning-of-rigor inspired workflow enforced by process semantics. We link to an end-to-end Lean formalization of a recent Ramsey theory breakthrough produced by the process.

</details>


### [814] [Proxy Reward Internalization and Mechanistic Exploitation: A Learned Precursor to Reward Hacking and Its Generalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09711)
*Mohammad Beigi,Ming Jin,Lifu Huang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出PRIME概念，即智能体在代理奖励下内化任务正确性并学习利用代理-真实奖励差距的能力。研究发现PRIME在可见奖励黑客行为之前按阶段涌现，可作为早期预警信号。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统奖励黑客研究关注其发生后的表现，而作者希望探讨在可见故障出现之前，代理RL到底教会了模型什么。

Method: 在可被利用的pytest奖励的编程RL环境中，通过链式思维监控、直接探测和激活级概念向量来测量PRIME。

Result: PRIME在持续奖励黑客行为之前按阶段涌现；其直接探测分数可预测后续黑客行为的发作时间和严重程度；PRIME会随评估器改变而适应，并在抑制黑客行为后仍持续存在；消除其激活方向可减少黑客行为。

Conclusion: 可被利用的代理RL会在可见黑客行为之前放大代理内化能力，PRIME可作为更广泛对齐风险的早期预警信号。

Abstract: Reward hacking is usually studied after it becomes visible, once a model earns high proxy reward while failing the intended task. We instead study what proxy RL teaches before that failure appears. We introduce Proxy Reward Internalization and Mechanistic Exploitation (PRIME), a learned capability to assess task correctness, predict proxy acceptance, and reason about exploitable proxy--gold gaps. In coding RL environments with exploitable pytest rewards, we measure PRIME through chain-of-thought monitoring, direct probes, and activation-level concept vectors. We find that PRIME emerges in a staged sequence before sustained reward hacking, and that its current direct-probe score forecasts later hack onset and severity even when the visible hack rate is still low. PRIME also adapts when the evaluator changes, retargeting to whichever proxy--gold gap remains rewarded and persisting when gold reward suppresses overt hacking, and ablating its activation directions reduces hacking. Across checkpoints, in-domain PRIME tracks out-of-domain misalignment. Together these results suggest that exploitable proxy RL amplifies a proxy-internalization capability upstream of visible hacking, making PRIME a candidate early-warning signal for broader alignment risk.

</details>


### [815] [Beyond Probabilistic Similarity: Structural, Temporal, and Causal Limitations of Retrieval-Augmented Generation in the Legal Domain](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09724)
*Hudson de Martim*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文指出RAG在法律AI中的失败并非语言模型的残余幻觉，而是概率检索与法律知识层级性、时间性、制度性结构之间的架构不匹配，并提出面向确定性设计的四项架构承诺。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 法律AI中RAG系统频繁出现虚假引用、过时内容等高风险失败，现有观点认为可通过扩大模型规模解决，但作者主张这些失败源于检索架构与法律知识本体论结构的根本性错配。

Method: 通过三阶段论证：1) 从经典法理推导法律知识的三个本体论属性（层级/部分结构、时间动态性、制度渊源可追溯性）；2) 识别检索的三类病理（部分性盲视、时间性盲视、因果不透明性），每类给出操作定义、失败机制、典型案例和检测标准；3) 以此框架评估现有方法，揭示其未能将三属性作为共构关系处理。最后提出四项确定性架构承诺。

Result: 明确界定了三种检索病理及其检测标准，揭示了现有RAG方法对法律知识本体属性的不均衡覆盖，推导出四项架构承诺：本体优先性、事件物化、双时态正确性、确定性交互协议。

Conclusion: 法律检索应走向确定性设计方向，重点解决quaestio juris（哪些规范适用及其当前状态），而非下游任务，主要面向立法与宪法检索，并明确扩展至解释性时间维度。

Abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has become a standard architectural response to unreliability in legal AI, yet high-profile failures, including fabricated citations submitted to courts and anachronistic legal content presented as current, continue to appear across jurisdictions. We argue that these failures are not residual confabulations to be eliminated by scaling language models, but symptoms of an architectural mismatch between probabilistic retrieval and the hierarchical, temporal, and institutional structure of legal knowledge. We develop the argument in three moves. First, we articulate the ontological commitment of legal knowledge as a triad of properties derivable from classical legal theory: hierarchical and mereological structure, diachronic dynamism under operational closure, and causal traceability of institutional provenance grounded in the duty of justification. Second, we identify three corresponding pathologies of retrieval (mereological blindness, diachronic blindness, and causal opacity), each developed with an operational definition, a failure mechanism, a canonical example, and detection criteria for diagnostic use. Third, we review the state of the art through this lens, showing that existing approaches address these requirements unevenly and do not yet compose into a paradigm that treats them as co-constitutive. From this analysis we derive four architectural commitments that characterize the deterministic-by-design direction for legal retrieval: ontological primacy, event reification, bitemporal correctness, and deterministic interaction protocols. The framework concerns quaestio juris (which norms apply and in what state) rather than the downstream tasks that act on identified norms, and addresses legislative and constitutional retrieval primarily, with interpretive time as an explicit extension.

</details>


### [816] [SearchSwarm: Towards Delegation Intelligence in Agentic LLMs for Long-Horizon Deep Research](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09730)
*Pu Ning,Quan Chen,Kun Tao,Xinyu Tang,Tianshu Wang,Qianggang Cao,Xinyu Kong,Zujie Wen,Zhiqiang Zhang,Jun Zhou*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出SearchSwarm框架，通过人工设计的引导流程(harnes)生成代理委派任务的训练数据，微调模型获得委派智能，在BrowseComp和BrowseComp-ZH上取得领先成绩。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大模型需要处理上下文无限增长的长周期任务，但模型上下文窗口有限；现有主-子代理范式需要委派智能，但缺乏相关训练数据，开源社区对此探索不足。

Method: 设计引导流程(harnes)指导模型进行高质量任务分解与委派，约束子代理正确返回结果；利用引导轨迹作为监督微调数据，将委派智能内化到模型权重中。

Result: SearchSwarm-30B-A3B在BrowseComp上达到68.1，在BrowseComp-ZH上达到73.3，为同等规模模型中的最佳结果。

Conclusion: 通过合成的委派智能训练数据，可以有效提升模型在长周期任务中的委派能力，开源释放了引导流程、模型权重和训练数据以促进后续研究。

Abstract: Large language models are increasingly expected to handle complex, long-horizon real-world tasks whose context demands can grow without bound, yet model context windows remain inherently finite. Recent work explores a paradigm where a main agent decomposes tasks and dispatches subtasks to subagents, which execute and return only summarized results, conserving the main agent's context budget. However, performing this well requires delegation intelligence: the ability to decompose complex tasks, determine when and what to delegate, and integrate returned results into the ongoing workflow. Training data for this capability is scarce in naturally occurring text, and to our knowledge, how to synthesize such data and train models to acquire this capability remains largely unexplored in the open-source community. To bridge this gap, we present a preliminary exploration targeting deep research, a representative long-horizon agent task. Specifically, we design a harness that guides the model toward high-quality task decomposition and delegation, while constraining subagents to return results properly to support the main agent's workflow. The harness-guided trajectories naturally encode correct delegation decisions, which we use as supervised fine-tuning data to internalize delegation intelligence into model weights. Our resulting model, SearchSwarm-30B-A3B, achieves 68.1 on BrowseComp and 73.3 on BrowseComp-ZH, the best results among all models of comparable scale. We will release our harness, model weights, and training data to facilitate future research.

</details>


### [817] [Multi-Turn Evaluation of Deep Research Agents Under Process-Level Feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09748)
*Rishabh Sabharwal,Hongru Wang,Amos Storkey,Jeff Z. Pan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文构建了深度研究代理（DRA）的多轮评估框架，发现自我反思几乎没有净收益（因纳入与退步率持平），而单轮过程级反馈（通过新设计的RGI方法）可带来8-15分的显著提升，但增益无法累积，因重写报告时最多24%的已满足标准会退步。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有DRA基准仅评估单次输出质量，忽略了一个关键问题：在反馈引导下，DRA能否改进其报告？作者旨在填补这一评估空白。

Method: 设计多轮评估框架，包含两种反馈机制：(1) 自我反思（无外部信号）；(2) 过程级反馈（通过新提出的Research Gap Inference (RGI)方法，分析已满足和未满足的评分标准模式来推断研究过程缺陷）。

Result: (i) 自我反思场景下，纳入与退步评分标准的比率几乎相等，净改进可忽略不计；(ii) 单轮过程级反馈提升显著，标准化分数提高约8-15分，纳入率约35-40%；(iii) 增益无法累积，后续轮次中最多24%的已满足标准出现退步。

Conclusion: 即使有针对性引导，对当前评估的DRA架构而言，可靠的多轮改进仍然难以实现。

Abstract: Existing benchmarks for deep research agents (DRAs) assess only single-shot outputs, ignoring a key question: can DRAs improve their reports when guided by feedback? To investigate this, we conduct a multi-turn evaluation of DRAs under two feedback settings: self-reflection, in which the agent revises its report without any external diagnostic signal, and process-level feedback, in which the agent receives guidance targeting gaps in its research strategy. To enable process-level feedback, we design Research Gap Inference (RGI), a method that analyzes patterns of satisfied and unsatisfied rubric criteria to infer research-process gaps. Our analysis reveals three key findings: (i) under self-reflection, agents incorporate and regress on rubric criteria at nearly equal rates, yielding negligible net improvement; (ii) a single round of process-level feedback yields substantial gains, raising the normalized score by approximately $8$-$15$ points and yielding a roughly $35$-$40\%$ incorporation rate; (iii) these gains do not compound over subsequent turns, as agents regress on up to $24\%$ of previously satisfied criteria when rewriting the full report to address remaining gaps. Even with targeted guidance, reliable multi-turn improvement remains out of reach for the DRA architectures we evaluate. Our code and results are publicly available at https://github.com/sabharwalrishabh/Multi-Turn-Evaluation-of-DRAs.

</details>


### [818] [Collaborative Human-Agent Protocol (CHAP)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09751)
*Arsalan Shahid,Gordon Suttie,Philip Black*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: CHAP是一个用于记录人机协作中人类监督与决策信号的协议，通过结构化事件（差异、理由、哈希）替代当前散落在聊天记录和代码中的隐性信息，提供可审计、可追溯的人机协作工作空间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基础模型已从单纯的响应生成转向运营角色（如规划、调用工具、协调多智能体），但生产环境中多人类、多智能体协作的技术规范严重不足。人类的关键判断信号（如编辑、审批、交接）要么丢失在聊天记录中，要么存储在应用代码、票务评论或"部落记忆"中，缺乏结构化的记录与审计机制。

Method: 提出CHAP协议，核心包括：工作空间、参与者、任务、工件和仅追加的证据日志。同时提供可组合的配置文件，支持审查、模式、路由、审议、交接、身份、签名和透明审计等扩展功能。

Result: 实现了将人类的覆写操作转变为携带差异、理由和内容哈希的结构化事件；将班次交接转变为便携信封而非置顶消息；将审批转变为可重放、不可抵赖的签名决策。

Conclusion: CHAP填补了现有MCP（工具/数据访问标准化）和A2A（智能体间互操作性）之间的空白，提供了人类与智能体共同承担责任的共享工作空间协议，且已开源。

Abstract: Foundation models are moving from response generation into operational roles. They plan across steps, call tools, request human input, coordinate with other agents, and increasingly carry responsibility for work that affects customers, claims, code, contracts, and clinical decisions. Production deployments are no longer one human supervising one model. They are multi-human, multi-agent collaborations that cross teams, time zones, and trust boundaries. The technical surface for this collaboration remains weakly specified. When an agent drafts a response and a human edits it before it ships, the moment of human judgement is the most valuable signal in the system. In current practice it is recorded, if at all, in application code, chat threads, ticket comments, and tribal memory. Two protocol standards address adjacent concerns: MCP standardises agent access to tools and data, and A2A standardises agent-to-agent interoperability. Neither defines the shared workspace in which humans and agents perform accountable work together. This paper presents CHAP, the Collaborative Human-Agent Protocol. Under CHAP, the override that used to vanish into a chat thread becomes a structured event carrying a diff, a rationale, and a content hash. The handoff between shifts becomes a portable envelope rather than a pinned message. The human approval of an agent's draft becomes a non-repudiable signed decision that can be replayed years later. The protocol achieves this through a small Core (workspaces, participants, tasks, artefacts, and an append-only evidence log) together with composable profiles that add review, modes, routing, deliberation, handoff, identity, signatures, and transparency-backed audit as deployments require them. Specification, reference implementation, conformance suite, and worked examples are available at: https://github.com/BrightbeamAI/chap

</details>


### [819] [SIGA: Self-Evolving Coding-Agent Adapters for Scientific Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09774)
*Matthew Ho,Brian Liu,Jixuan Chen,Audrey Wang,Lianhui Qin*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出SIGA（模拟器接口接地适配器），通过检索、程序记忆、轨迹内验证和验证强制终止等机制，为通用编码代理提供模拟器的可执行契约，使其能在约5分钟内生成完整的GEOS模拟配置文件，达到人类专家约3小时工作的水平（36倍加速），并能自我进化提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高级科学模拟器有专门的输入语言，领域科学家学习这些语言需要数小时到数天。研究者希望探索：是否需要针对模拟器的最小化适配，才能让现成的通用编码代理操作真实的科学软件？

Method: 提出SIGA框架，包括四个核心组件：1）检索（Retrieval）获取模拟器词汇；2）程序记忆（Procedural Memory）存储结构约束；3）轨迹内验证（In-trajectory Validation）检查规则；4）验证强制终止（Validation-enforced Termination）确保输出有效。支持自进化机制，从先前轨迹重写适配器内容。

Result: 在GEOS多物理模拟器上，SIGA约5分钟生成完整配置，TreeSim > 0.90，对比人类专家约3小时，实现36倍加速。在更难数据集上，接地机制使TreeSim从0.720提升至0.789（相对提升约10%），跨种子标准差降低16倍。自进化进一步提升性能。迁移到OpenFOAM和LAMMPS显示不同瓶颈下的主导机制不同。

Conclusion: 轻量级、可自我改进的接地层（grounding layers）可以将通用编码代理转变为实用的科学软件操作者，展示了代理-工具接口接地（agent-tool interface grounding）的有效性。

Abstract: Advanced scientific simulators expose specialized input languages that turn simulation goals into executable configurations, but learning them can cost domain scientists hours to days. We study simulator setup as a problem of agent-tool interface grounding: what minimal simulator-specific adaptations are needed for an off-the-shelf coding agent to operate real scientific software? Our intuition is that coding agents already know how to navigate files, edit code, run commands, and repair outputs, but they lack the simulator's executable contract: its vocabulary, structural constraints, validation rules, and termination conditions. We introduce SIGA, a Simulator-Interface Grounding Adapter that supplies this contract through retrieval, procedural memory, in-trajectory validation, and validation-enforced termination. We primarily evaluate SIGA on GEOS, an open-source multiphysics simulator used in subsurface science. SIGA produces a complete GEOS deck in about five minutes with TreeSim above 0.90, matching an extended-budget human expert who took about three hours, a roughly 36x wall-clock speedup. On a harder held-out set, grounding raises TreeSim from 0.720 to 0.789, a roughly 10% relative gain over the bare agent, and can reduce the across-seed standard deviation by 16x. Self-evolution further improves SIGA by rewriting adapter contents from prior trajectories, yielding the highest held-out GEOS mean and matching or outperforming the strongest hand-designed configuration. Transfers to OpenFOAM and LAMMPS show that the dominant mechanism shifts by interface: validation matters most when structural completeness is the bottleneck, while memory and retrieval matter most when domain correctness is the bottleneck. These results suggest that lightweight, self-improvable grounding layers can turn general coding agents into practical operators of scientific software.

</details>


### [820] [Evaluation Cards: An Interpretive Layer for AI Evaluation Reporting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09809)
*Avijit Ghosh,Anka Reuel,Jenny Chim,Wm. Matthew Kennedy,Srishti Yadav,Jennifer Mickel,Yanan Long,Andrew Tran,Anastassia Kornilova,Damian Stachura,Kevin Klyman,Felix Friedrich,Jeba Sania,Max Lamparth,Jan Batzner,Anoop Mishra,Eliya Habba,Yixiong Hao,Nathan Heath,Shalaleh Rismani,Usman Gohar,Andrea Loehr,David Manheim,Ruchira Dhar,Sree Harsha Nelaturu,Aarush Sinha,Leshem Choshen,Drishti Sharma,Ishan Khire,Amit Saha,Subramanyam Sahoo,Michael Hardy,Michael Alexander Riegler,Kabir Manghnani,Michelle Lin,Yanan Jiang,Yilin Huang,Asaf Yehudai,Jessica Ji,Aris Hofmann,Mubashara Akhtar,Nuno Moniz,Yacine Jernite,Stella Biderman,Zeerak Talat,Sanmi Koyejo,Mykel Kochenderfer,Irene Solaiman*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出EvalCards，一个统一的评估报告层，通过整合基准元数据、评估运行数据和模型元数据，解决当前AI评估结果报告不一致、缺乏可解释性和可追溯性的问题，并在大量数据上进行了部署验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI评估结果在排行榜、模型卡、基准论文和公司博客中报告不一致，导致读者无法可靠地跨来源比较结果、识别报告遗漏或追踪聚合声明到基础证据。现有工作只解决孤立组件，缺乏统一的、可解释的记录。

Method: (1) 通过对52篇论文的结构化回顾和10次利益相关者访谈推导出报告模式；(2) 实现四个可解释信号（可复现性、文档完整性、来源与风险、分数可比性），并通过面向研究和非研究受众的阅读模式呈现；(3) 部署监控工具，在5,816个模型、635个基准和101,843个结果上应用EvalCards。

Result: 成功在5,816个模型、635个基准和101,843个结果上部署了EvalCards评估报告层，揭示了当前报告实践中的系统性缺陷。

Conclusion: EvalCards作为一个可操作的报告层，能够统一评估生命周期中的多源信息，支持不同利益相关者的解释需求，并通过大规模部署证明了其在实践中发现报告缺陷的能力。

Abstract: AI evaluation results are produced at scale but reported inconsistently across leaderboards, model cards, benchmark papers, and company blogs. The cost is interpretive: readers cannot reliably compare results across sources, identify what a report omits, or trace an aggregate claim to its underlying evidence. Recent efforts address isolated components but leave three gaps: they cover only narrow slices of the evaluation lifecycle and do not compose into a single interpretable record; they specify static representations that do not differentiate the questions different stakeholders bring to the same evidence; and they remain proposals on paper, lacking the extraction infrastructure required for adoption at scale. We present \EvalCards{}, an operational reporting layer that composes benchmark metadata, evaluation run data, and model metadata into a unified record. We (1) derive a reporting schema from a structured review of 52 papers and 10 stakeholder interviews, (2) implement four interpretive signals (reproducibility, documentation completeness, provenance and risk, and score comparability), rendered through reader modes calibrated to research and non-research audiences, and (3) deploy a monitoring tool that applies \EvalCards{} across 5,816 models, 635 benchmarks, and 101,843 results, surfacing systematic gaps in current reporting practice.

</details>


<div id='cs.MM'></div>

# cs.MM [[Back]](#toc)

### [821] [Conan-embedding-v3: Fusing Modality-Specific Models for Omni-Modal Embedding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09331)
*Shiyu Li,Zhiyuan Hu,Yifan Wang,Peiming Li,Zheng Wei,Yang Tang*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 本文提出Conan-embedding-v3，一种解耦-融合-恢复的全模态检索框架。先独立训练各模态专家，再通过解耦专家融合策略将任务向量融合到单一密集骨干网络中。融合后投影仪模态（如音频）会出现"投影仪漂移"问题，为此提出投影仪恢复（冻结骨干微调投影仪）加平衡多模态重放来进行修复。最终模型在MMEB上取得74.9分，在MAEB音频套件上取得55.61分。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 构建一个统一的文本、图像、视频、文档和音频的全模态检索嵌入空间非常困难，因为不同模态在数据分布、架构和优化动态上存在显著差异。

Method: 1. 解耦专家融合：独立训练各模态专家，将它们的任务向量融合到单一密集骨干网络中。2. 投影仪恢复：针对音频等投影仪模态出现的"投影仪漂移"问题，冻结骨干网络，对投影仪进行全参数微调。3. 平衡多模态重放：在修复后进行平衡的多模态重放训练。

Result: 在MMEB基准上获得74.9分，在30任务的MAEB音频套件上获得55.61分。

Conclusion: Conan-embedding-v3通过解耦-融合-恢复框架有效实现了全模态检索，并揭示了投影仪漂移这一关键失败模式，投影仪恢复策略成功解决了该问题。

Abstract: Omni-modal retrieval promises a single embedding space for text, image, video, document, and audio inputs, but building such a unified retriever is difficult since these modalities differ in data distribution, architecture, and optimization dynamics. In this work, we present Conan-embedding-v3, a decouple--fuse--recover framework for omni-modal retrieval. Conan-embedding-v3 first trains modality specialists independently and fuses their task vectors into a single dense backbone, a strategy we call Decoupled Specialist Fusion. We show that this fusion composes visual, video, and document retrieval capabilities, but also exposes a failure mode for projector-based modalities: when audio is attached through an external encoder and projector, fusing the backbone leaves the projector calibrated to the audio-specialist backbone, causing a large audio retrieval regression despite copying all audio-specific modules unchanged. We call this failure Projector Drift. To repair it, Conan-embedding-v3 applies Projector Recovery (i.e., full-parameter fine-tuning of the projector while keeping the backbone frozen) followed by balanced multi-modal rehearsal. The resulting model supports these retrieval pathways in one backbone, achieving 74.9 scores on MMEB while obtaining 55.61 on the 30-task MAEB audio suite.

</details>


### [822] [LangRetrieval: Language-Guided Self-Evolving Satellite-to-Radar Retrieval via CSI-Driven Reward](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09486)
*Chunlei Shi,Junming Hou,Yi-Lin Wei,Jiong Wang,Yecheng Zhang,Yichao Dong,Wenqi Ren,Dan Niu*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 提出LangRetrieval框架，通过语言引导的条件流匹配和自演化语义优化，解决卫星反演降水中的病态问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有S2R反演存在病态性（相似云顶辐射对应不同降水），而静态语义条件无法适应动态对流场景，需要自适应的语义引导机制。

Method: 包含两个核心组件：1) Semantic Warm-up - 将结构化气象属性通过交叉注意力注入CFM骨干网络；2) Self-Evolving Semantic Optimization - 先用视觉语言模型初始化属性策略，再通过GRPO和多阈值CSI奖励优化语义生成。

Result: 建立了语义与反演精度之间的闭环优化机制，语义能够自适应地朝着提升检索精度的方向演化。

Conclusion: 语言引导的语义自演化策略能有效缓解S2R反演的病态性问题，为雷达稀疏区降水监测提供新范式。

Abstract: Satellite-to-radar (S2R) retrieval estimates ground radar precipitation from geostationary satellite observations, providing a critical solution for precipitation monitoring in radar-sparse regions. However, S2R retrieval is intrinsically ill-posed: similar cloud-top radiances can correspond to distinct precipitation regimes, storm organizations, and surface intensities, which are difficult to uniquely determine the underlying meteorological state from local spectral cues alone. Meteorological semantics offer complementary scene-level information that can help resolve this ambiguity. Yet existing static semantic conditioning is often insufficient, as externally predefined semantics cannot adapt to dynamic convective scenes or align with retrieval objectives. To this end, we propose LangRetrieval, a language-guided conditional flow matching (CFM) framework that establishes a closed-loop optimization mechanism between meteorological semantics and retrieval accuracy. Specifically, LangRetrieval consists of two core components: (i) Semantic Warm-up: structured meteorological attributes are injected into the CFM backbone through cross-attention conditioning, enabling continuous semantic guidance throughout the generation trajectory; and (ii) Self-Evolving Semantic Optimization: a lightweight attribute policy is first initialized from vision-language model annotations and subsequently refined via Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) using multi-threshold Critical Success Index (CSI) rewards, enabling semantic generation to evolve directly toward improved retrieval accuracy.

</details>


<div id='cs.NE'></div>

# cs.NE [[Back]](#toc)

### [823] [Information-Geometric Optimization on Spheres](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07588)
*Vladimir Ja\' cimović*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出了基于庞加莱球和伯格曼球的两种信息几何优化流（IGO流），并证明了球面上的广义Kuramoto振荡器集合能够计算自然搜索梯度并实现这两种流，同时揭示了伯格曼球中的自然梯度策略与量子决策之间的联系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决球面上的黑箱优化问题，利用双曲（信息）几何设计更有效的自然搜索梯度方法。

Method: 基于庞加莱球和伯格曼球的双曲几何，严格计算自然搜索梯度，设计两种IGO流；利用球面上广义Kuramoto振荡器集合实现自然搜索梯度的计算。

Result: 证明了广义Kuramoto振荡器能够在两种流上实现IGO算法；揭示了伯格曼球中的自然梯度策略与量子决策之间的联系。

Conclusion: 双曲几何为球面黑箱优化提供了新的IGO流框架，且振荡器动力学可实现几何优化，为量子决策理论建立了桥梁。

Abstract: We consider the black-box optimization problem on a sphere. Two information-geometric optimization flows (IGO flows) are designed with rigorous calculation of natural search gradients based on hyperbolic (information) geometry of Poincar\' e and Bergman balls. We demonstrate that ensembles of generalized Kuramoto oscillators on spheres compute natural search gradients and realize IGO algorithms on both manifolds. The relationship between natural gradient policies in Bergman balls and quantum decision making is pointed out.

</details>


### [824] [QDS-SNN: Energy-efficient Quantum Deeply-Supervised Spiking Neural Network Algorithm for Traffic Sign Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07657)
*Zhiguo Qu,Keqi Li,Le Sun,Wenjie Liu,Yimin Yu,Saif Al-Kuwari,Ahmed Farouk*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出一种量子深度监督脉冲神经网络（QDS-SNN），通过结合量子神经网络（QNN）和时空自适应LIF神经元，在仅6个时间步内对GTSRB数据集达到99.72%的准确率，同时能耗降低55.77%，为交通标志识别提供了高能效解决方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统交通标志识别方法依赖大数据集和密集计算，实时性受限；脉冲神经网络（SNN）虽具能效优势，但存在信息丢失和梯度消失问题。作者希望结合量子神经网络的表达能力与并行计算能力，在保持低功耗的同时提升SNN的性能。

Method: 提出QDS-SNN框架，包含两个核心组件：(1) 时空自适应LIF（TSA-LIF）神经元，缓解梯度问题；(2) 量子辅助分类模块（QACM），利用量子叠加和纠缠实现高效深度监督和特征表示。

Result: 在GTSRB数据集上，6个时间步内达到99.72%准确率，比MS-ResNet基线高1.32%，能耗降低55.77%；在TSRD数据集上达到97.90%准确率，能耗降至基线的52.68%。

Conclusion: QDS-SNN融合量子计算与脉冲神经网络的优势，为智能交通系统中的交通标志识别提供了一种高精度、低能耗的有效方案。

Abstract: Traffic sign recognition is crucial for intelligent transportation and autonomous driving, as it can improve driving efficiency and ensure road safety. However, traditional recognition methods are based on large datasets and intensive computation, which limits their real-time applicability. Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) offer a biologically inspired, energy-efficient alternative due to their spatiotemporal processing capabilities, but suffer from information loss and vanishing gradients during training. To overcome these limitations, this study proposes a Quantum Deep-supervised Spiking Neural Network (QDS-SNN) that integrates Quantum Neural Networks (QNNs) for efficient, low-power deep supervision. Using quantum superposition and entanglement, QNNs enable expressive representations and parallel computation, thereby enhancing performance without compromising energy efficiency. The proposed QDS-SNN incorporates a temporally and spatially adaptive LIF (TSA-LIF) neuron and a quantum-assisted classifier module (QACM) to mitigate gradient issues and improve training effectiveness. This study conducts experiments on the PennyLane quantum simulation platform, and the results show that QDS-SNN achieves 99.72\% accuracy on the GTSRB dataset in only 6 time steps -- outperforming the MS-ResNet baseline by 1.32\% while reducing energy consumption by 55.77\%. In the TSRD dataset, it achieves 97.90\% accuracy while reducing energy use to 52.68\% of the baseline. These results demonstrate that QDS-SNN offers a high-performance, energy-efficient solution for traffic sign recognition in intelligent transportation systems.

</details>


### [825] [Seq103: A Unified Neuroevolution Framework for Compact Sequence Architecture Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07664)
*Wenxiao Li,Yongjian Liu,Qing Xie*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: Seq103是一个统一的NEAT风格神经进化框架，用于紧凑序列架构搜索，通过共享进化骨干和可选的循环扩展，在保持较高精度的同时实现极大幅度的参数压缩（最高达160,601倍）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经架构搜索方法在序列任务中往往产生高参数量的复杂模型，缺乏一种能够同时处理逐步循环推理和样本级前馈序列分类的统一、紧凑的神经进化框架。

Method: 提出Seq103框架，包含共享进化骨干（节点-连接表示、每类RMSE评估、基于变异的进化与类级重组、精英策略）和可选的隐藏状态扩展机制（隐藏状态节点和隐藏连接），在逐步循环任务中启用隐藏状态提供时间记忆，在样本级前馈任务中禁用隐藏状态而共享骨干不变。

Result: 在8个文本分类数据集上，逐步任务平均保留最佳基线86.96%的准确率，参数减少34.6倍至3218.0倍；在UCRArchive2018的128个时间序列数据集上，样本级任务平均保留81.95%的准确率，参数减少11.8倍至160,601.0倍。

Conclusion: Seq103证明了NEAT式神经进化框架在序列架构搜索中的有效性，能够以极少的参数代价获得接近最佳基线的性能，为紧凑序列模型自动化发现提供了统一且高效的解决方案。

Abstract: Neuroevolution is a representative neural architecture search paradigm that evolves both network topology and weights through evolutionary algorithms. In this paper, we propose Seq103, a unified NEAT-style neuroevolution framework for compact sequence architecture discovery. Seq103 consists of a shared evolutionary backbone and an optional recurrent extension. The shared backbone includes an elementary node-and-connection representation, per-class RMSE-based evaluation, mutation-based evolution with class-wise recombination, and elitism. The optional hidden-state mechanism extends the search space with hidden-state nodes and hidden connections, enabling temporal memory when step-wise recurrent inference is required. With this design, Seq103 applies the same core search pipeline to both step-wise recurrent and sample-wise feedforward sequence classification. In recurrent tasks, the hidden-state extension is enabled to provide temporal memory; in feedforward tasks, it is disabled while the shared evolutionary backbone remains unchanged. We evaluate Seq103 on 8 text classification datasets and the full UCRArchive2018 benchmark with 128 univariate time-series datasets. On step-wise tasks, Seq103 retains 86.96% of the best-baseline accuracy on average while using 34.6x to 3218.0x fewer parameters. On sample-wise tasks over the full UCRArchive2018 benchmark, Seq103 retains 81.95% of the best-baseline accuracy on average while using 11.8x to 160,601.0x fewer parameters.

</details>


### [826] [Gray-Box Optimization and the Vertex Coloring Problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08128)
*Johanna Gasse,Antonia Heinen,Hendrik Higl,Timo Kötzing*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文探讨了灰盒优化的不同形式，发现RLS算法能在O(n log n)时间内从随机2-着色找到二分图的合法2-着色，而(1+1)EA从合法n-着色出发无法做到，除非有额外引导；灰盒算子能显著改善运行时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 灰盒优化在组合优化中表现出色，能够在完全黑盒算法和定制化算法之间取得平衡。本文旨在探讨灰盒算法的不同形式及其在二分图着色问题上的性能优势。

Method: 对比分析了RLS和(1+1)EA两种算法在不同初始着色条件下的性能，并引入了灰盒算子进行改进。

Result: RLS从随机2-着色出发能在O(n log n)时间内找到合法2-着色；而(1+1)EA从合法n-着色出发无法找到合法2-着色，除非有额外引导；灰盒算子能大幅提升运行时间。

Conclusion: 灰盒优化在二分图着色问题上具有显著优势，灰盒算子的引入可以有效改善算法性能。

Abstract: Gray-box optimization is an approach for making some problem-specific information available to the algorithm while still relying on fitness information as the main guide to an optimum. This approach was shown to be beneficial in various combinatorial optimization tasks and neatly captures the continuum between fully black-box algorithms and tailored algorithms.
  In this work, we discuss different flavors of gray-box algorithms. We show that RLS can find a proper $2$-coloring in a bipartite graph starting from a random $2$-coloring, in an expected time of $\mathcal{O}(n \log n)$. In contrast, when starting from a proper $n$-coloring, the (1+1) EA cannot find such a coloring except when offered additional guiding on plateaus of the search space. Finally, we show the run time for this setting can be much improved by using gray-box operators.

</details>


### [827] [OpenOpt: An Open-Source SRAM Optimizer Based on Equivalent Circuit Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09129)
*Yikai Wang,Yiheng Wu,Can Wang,Bohao Liu,Junhao Ma,Zhuohua Liu,Qinxin Mei,Shan Shen*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 提出了一种联合优化SRAM架构和晶体管尺寸的协同优化框架，通过等效电路模型简化非活动单元，实现61.4倍仿真加速，MOEA/D算法最优，SNM提升6.2%，面积减少73.6%，峰值功耗降低42.3%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统SRAM设计优化通常将架构选择与晶体管尺寸调整分离，未充分利用两者的协同效应。现有方法仿真成本高、搜索空间有限，亟需一种既能加速仿真又能联合优化架构与器件参数的高效框架。

Method: 提出协同优化框架，将非活动SRAM单元简化为等效RC负载和静态功耗模型，实现快速仿真。联合搜索空间涵盖架构参数和器件尺寸，集成了SA、PSO、贝叶斯优化变体及多目标进化算法（MOEA/D）共7种算法。基于FreePDK45工艺进行实验验证。

Result: 仿真加速61.4倍，读写延迟误差<0.22%，功耗误差<1.68%。消融实验证实架构选择与晶体管尺寸具有互补增益。MOEA/D取得最佳FOM(8.2721)，SNM提升6.2%，面积减少73.6%，峰值功耗降低42.3%。

Conclusion: 所提框架在保持高精度的前提下显著加速仿真，联合优化架构与器件参数比单独优化更有效，MOEA/D算法在该任务上表现最优，且框架已开源。

Abstract: This paper proposes a co-optimization framework that jointly optimizes SRAM architecture and transistor sizing using equivalent circuit models. The framework simplifies inactive SRAM cells into equivalent RC loads and static power models, achieving up to 61.4$\times$ simulation speedup while maintaining high fidelity (read/write delay error $<$0.22%, power error $<$1.68%). A joint search space encompassing architecture parameters and device sizing integrates seven algorithms including SA, PSO, Bayesian Optimization variants, and multi-objective evolutionary algorithms. Based on FreePDK45, ablation experiments confirm complementary gains from architecture selection and transistor sizing. Among all algorithms, MOEA/D achieves the best Figure of Merit (8.2721), yielding 6.2% improvement in SNM, 73.6% reduction in area, and 42.3% reduction in peak power. The framework is publicly available at https://github.com/W1Y1K1/OpenOpt.

</details>


### [828] [Quantitative Performance Analysis of Stopping Criteria for CMA-ES](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09220)
*Ryoji Tanabe*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了CMA-ES中11种停止准则在无噪声BBOB函数集上的表现，发现tolflatfitness和tolfun最常被首先触发，而tolfunhist和组合准则的停止精度最高，且部分准则在算法完全停滞前就会被触发。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: CMA-ES使用多种停止准则来避免不必要的函数评估预算消耗，但这些准则的有效性尚不清楚，因此需要系统研究其行为表现。

Method: 在无噪声BBOB函数集上，对CMA-ES中的11种停止准则进行定量评估，以单次运行中函数评估次数的最优停止点为基准，分析各准则的触发顺序和停止精度。

Result: tolflatfitness和tolfun是最常被首先触发的准则；tolfunhist和组合准则在多数情况下停止精度最高；tolfun和tolfunhist常在算法完全停滞前就被触发。

Conclusion: 停止准则的触发顺序受样本量λ和维度n影响显著，不同准则在停止时机和精度上存在明显差异，为优化CMA-ES停止策略提供了依据。

Abstract: Covariance matrix adaptation evolution strategy (CMA-ES) is a state-of-the-art black-box optimization algorithm. In general, CMA-ES uses a portfolio of multiple stopping criteria to automatically determine when to stop the search. This mechanism aims to avoid unnecessary consumption of the function evaluation budget during stagnation. Stopping criteria play an important role in CMA-ES, particularly when restart strategies are employed. However, the effectiveness of stopping criteria in CMA-ES remains poorly understood. To address this issue, this paper investigates how the 11 stopping criteria in CMA-ES behave on the noiseless BBOB function set. The performance of the stopping criteria is quantitatively evaluated based on the optimal stopping point in terms of the number of function evaluations in a single run of CMA-ES. Our results show that, although which stopping criterion is triggered first depends significantly on the sample size $λ$ and the dimension $n$, \texttt{tolflatfitness} and \texttt{tolfun} are frequently the first criteria to be triggered among the portfolio of 11 stopping criteria. We also demonstrate that \texttt{tolfunhist} and the portfolio achieve the highest stopping accuracy in most cases. In addition, our results show that the \texttt{tolfun} and \texttt{tolfunhist} criteria are frequently triggered before CMA-ES reaches complete stagnation.

</details>


### [829] [Local Search on Vertex Coloring for Bipartite Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09509)
*Johanna Gasse*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文研究了局部搜索在顶点着色问题上的能力，分析了二分图上的局部搜索景观，识别了保证仅存在全局最优解和存在非全局局部最优解的结构，并引入了一种灰盒局部搜索变异算子，在完全二分图上实现了Θ(n log n)的期望运行时间，相较黑盒随机局部搜索的指数级运行时间有显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 顶点着色问题是NP难问题，局部搜索是常用的启发式方法，但其在顶点着色问题上的适用性存在局限，需要系统分析其能力边界。

Method: 分析不同类型二分图上的局部搜索景观，识别导致不同优化景观的结构特征；引入灰盒局部搜索变异算子，以更高概率移除出现频率较低的颜色。

Result: 在一般二分图上，局部搜索可能返回任意差的结果；在完全二分图上，灰盒变异算子在期望运行时间Θ(n log n)内找到最优着色，而黑盒随机局部搜索需要指数级时间。

Conclusion: 灰盒变异算子能显著提升局部搜索的运行时间，揭示了适应用问题知识的搜索算子对优化效率的重要性。

Abstract: Local search is a well-known heuristic method used in optimization. In this thesis, we explore its capabilities on the vertex coloring problem, an $NP$-hard problem with relevance in both theoretical analysis and practical application. To recognize limitations in the applicability of local search of the vertex coloring problem, we analyze local search landscapes on differently-structured bipartite graphs. We identify structures that ensure only global optima can exist as well as ones that enable the existence of non-global local optima, showing that on general bipartite graphs, it is possible for local search to return arbitrarily bad results. Further, we analyze the capabilities of local search on graphs where a local optimum can be found. To do so, we introduce a gray-box local search mutation operator that removes less frequent colors with higher probability and prove that it finds an optimal coloring on complete bipartite graphs in an expected run time of $Θ(n \log n)$. This is a drastic improvement to the exponential tun time of the black-box Random Local Search, showing that gray-box mutation operators can improve the run time of local search.

</details>


### [830] [Hybrid Metaheuristic Combining the Dragonfly Algorithm and Tabu Search for the Traveling Salesman Problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09529)
*Ammar Bouketta*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种将蜻蜓算法（全局搜索）与禁忌搜索（局部搜索）相结合的高层中继混合元启发式方法来解决旅行商问题（TSP）。在TSPLIB标准实例上的实验表明，该混合方法相比单独的DA和TS能获得更优的路径质量，但性能对参数设置和问题规模较为敏感。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旅行商问题（TSP）是经典的NP难组合优化问题，现有单一元启发式算法（如DA全局搜索能力强但局部精细搜索不足，TS局部搜索强但易陷入局部最优）各自存在局限，因此需要将全局探索与局部开发能力相结合，以提升求解质量。

Method: 采用高层中继混合（HRH）方案：先使用蜻蜓算法（DA）进行全局搜索，生成有潜力的初始路径；随后使用禁忌搜索（TS）基于邻域结构和禁忌记忆对该初始解进行局部精化。

Result: 在TSPLIB的burma14、att48、ch150等实例上，混合方法相比独立DA、独立TS以及遗传算法、蚁群优化、粒子群优化、随机搜索等方法，能获得更短的路径长度。但性能对超参数设置敏感，且随问题规模增大效果有所下降。

Conclusion: 全局探索与局部开发的结合对TSP求解有积极效果，但当前方案在参数鲁棒性和大规模实例上的表现仍有待提升，需要在更大规模基准和更专业的TSP基线方法上进行进一步验证。

Abstract: The Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP) is a classical NP-hard combinatorial optimization problem that aims to find the shortest Hamiltonian cycle visiting each city exactly once and returning to the starting point. This paper proposes a hybrid metaheuristic for the TSP by combining the Dragonfly Algorithm (DA), a swarm-intelligence-based global search method, with Tabu Search (TS), a memory-based local search technique. The proposed method follows a High-Level Relay Hybridization (HRH) scheme, in which DA is first used to explore the solution space and generate a promising initial tour, while TS subsequently refines this solution through neighbourhood-based improvement and tabu memory. The hybrid approach is evaluated on standard TSPLIB benchmark instances, including burma14, att48, and ch150, and compared with standalone DA, standalone TS, and several classical metaheuristics such as Genetic Algorithm, Ant Colony Optimization, Particle Swarm Optimization, and Random Search. A systematic grid-search procedure is also conducted to study the influence of the main hyperparameters on solution quality and execution time. The experimental results indicate that the proposed hybrid can improve tour quality compared with the standalone DA and TS on the tested instances, highlighting the benefit of combining global exploration with local exploitation. However, the results also suggest that performance remains sensitive to parameter settings and problem size, motivating further validation on larger benchmarks and stronger TSP-specific baselines.

</details>


<div id='cs.SE'></div>

# cs.SE [[Back]](#toc)

### [831] [Systematic LLM Translation of Legacy Scientific Code to Differentiable Frameworks: Application to a Land Surface Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07681)
*Aya Lahlou,Linnia Hawkins,Pierre Gentine*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出一个基于LLM的五阶段智能体流水线，将遗留Fortran代码（19,000行CLM-ml-v2陆地表面模型）自动翻译为JAX，实现了可微分编程。翻译后的模型支持单次反向传播计算完整雅可比矩阵，参数恢复速度比无梯度优化快8倍，在N=2,048时相比顺序Fortran获得24倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 可微分编程在科学建模中具有变革性能力（梯度参数估计、敏感性分析、数据同化），但将遗留代码库迁移到可微分框架面临巨大挑战。

Method: 五阶段LLM智能体流水线：1) 静态依赖分析（从完整调用图确定模块翻译顺序）；2) 迭代编译-修复循环（自动纠错）；3) Fortran参考预言机（在模块级别强制数值一致性）；4) 集成验证；5) 梯度验证。

Result: 成功翻译19,000行Fortran模型，覆盖73个模块。翻译后的模型可单次反向传播计算完整雅可比矩阵；参数恢复比无梯度优化快8倍；在N=2,048时比顺序Fortran实现24倍墙钟加速。

Conclusion: 该流水线可作为可重用框架，用于将其他地球系统模型组件差异化。已开源翻译后的模型和流水线基础设施。

Abstract: Differentiable programming offers transformative capabilities for scientific modeling, enabling gradient-based parameter estimation, sensitivity analysis, and data assimilation. Yet, migrating legacy codebases into differentiable frameworks remains a challenge. We present a five-phase LLM-based agentic pipeline that translates legacy Fortran into JAX: static dependency analysis determines module translation order from the full call graph; iterative compile-repair loops correct errors autonomously; and a Fortran reference oracle enforces numerical parity at the module level before integration and gradient verification. We instantiate and evaluate the pipeline on CLM-ml-v2, a 19,000-line Fortran land surface model, and analyze agent behavior across 73 module translation tasks. The resulting differentiable model computes the complete Jacobian in a single backward pass, recovers physical parameters in eight times fewer steps than gradient-free optimization, and achieves a 24 times wall-clock speedup over sequential Fortran at ensemble size N=2,048. Both the translated model and pipeline infrastructure are released as a reusable framework for differentiating other Earth system model components.

</details>


### [832] [SWE-Marathon: Can Agents Autonomously Complete Ultra-Long-Horizon Software Work?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07682)
*Rishi Desai,Jesse Hu,Joan Cabezas,Neel Harsola,Pratyush Shukla,Roey Ben Chaim,Adnan El Assadi,Omkaar Mukund Kamath,Fenil Faldu,Prannay Hebbar,Jiankai Sun,Yiyuan Li,Pramod Srinivasan,Ishan Gupta,Christopher Settles,Daniel Wang,Derek Chen,Pranav Raja,Albert Liu,Marek Šuppa,Nevasini Sasikumar,Luyang Kong,Erik Quintanilla,Xiangyi Li,Ivan Bercovich,Steven Dillmann*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: SWE-Marathon是一个包含20个长周期任务的基准测试，用于评估AI代理在规划、长上下文理解和记忆使用方面的能力。当前前沿编码代理解决率不足30%，常见失败原因包括自我验证不足、虚假不可行报告和过早终止，还有13.8%的代理出现奖励黑客行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有代理基准测试主要评估短时任务（如单一PR、小型工单或5-10分钟的练习），无法衡量代理在规划、长上下文理解和记忆使用方面的能力，因此需要长周期任务的基准测试。

Method: 构建了20个长周期任务，每个任务包含独特的可执行环境、人工编写的参考解决方案和多层验证套件。任务涉及软件工程及相关技术领域，平均每个代理尝试消耗2720万tokens。

Result: 当前前沿编码代理解决率低于30%。失败原因包括自我验证不足、虚假不可行报告和过早终止。13.8%的rollout出现奖励黑客行为，代理试图利用环境或验证器绕过预期工作流程。

Conclusion: SWE-Marathon通过对抗性审查测试套件和执行环境、多层检查机制防止捷径解决方案，为评估长周期AI代理能力提供了有效基准。

Abstract: AI agents are increasingly expected to complete long-horizon workflows that require sustained progress over hours, millions of tokens, and complex environments. Yet current agent benchmarks largely evaluate short-form tasks, such as single pull requests, small tickets, or 5-10 minute exercises, limiting our ability to measure agents' capabilities in planning, long-context understanding, and memory use. We introduce SWE-Marathon, a benchmark of 20 long-horizon tasks spanning software engineering and adjacent technical domains. Each task consists of a unique executable environment, a human-written reference solution, and a multi-layer verification suite. Logged agent attempts average 27.2M total tokens, making SWE-Marathon substantially longer-horizon than existing SWE and command-line agent benchmarks. Current frontier coding agents solve fewer than 30% of tasks. Failures often arise from poor self-verification, self-reported infeasibility, and premature termination. We also observe reward-hacking behavior in 13.8% of rollouts, where agents attempt to exploit the environment or verifier to bypass the intended workflow. SWE-Marathon includes adversarial review of test suites and execution environments, as well as multi-layer checks designed to prevent shortcut solutions. We release SWE-Marathon, evaluation code, and agent trajectories at https://swe-marathon.org/.

</details>


### [833] [Review the Code, Not the Story: A Vision and Protocol for Code-First Peer Review](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07683)
*Jienan Chen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出“代码优先的同行评审”范式：用AI系统自动执行研究工件、验证实验、生成标准化审查包，将评审焦点从作者叙事转向可执行证据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前计算领域同行评审以手稿为中心，作者控制叙事框架，而审稿人时间有限，难以检查实现细节、复现结果或检测无支持的声称。这种流程导致评审质量受限。

Method: 提出代码优先评审流程：作者提交可执行工件和声明清单；AI系统自动构建环境、执行实验、审计代码路径、将声明映射到证据，生成标准化审查包供人类审稿人使用。

Result: 形式化了声明-证据契约，定义了生成审查视图和审查包抽象，给出了工作示例，概述了系统架构，并分析了AI偏见、提示注入、模型不稳定性、可审计性和作者申诉等治理挑战。

Conclusion: AI应作为审查基础设施而非替代审稿人，通过将评审焦点从精心修饰的叙事转向可执行证据来提升同行评审的可靠性和可复现性。

Abstract: Peer review in computational fields remains centered on author-written manuscripts, even though the decisive evidence for many claims resides in executable code, data, configurations, and experiment pipelines. This manuscript-first workflow gives authors substantial control over narrative framing while leaving reviewers with limited time to inspect implementation details, reproduce results, or detect unsupported claims. This vision and protocol paper proposes code-first peer review: authors submit executable research artifacts and minimal claim manifests; a venue-controlled AI system builds the environment, executes experiments, audits code paths, maps claims to evidence, and generates a standardized Review Package for human reviewers. The goal is not to replace reviewers or to give authors an automatic writing assistant. Instead, AI serves as review infrastructure that shifts the target of peer review from polished narratives to executable evidence. We formalize a claim-evidence contract, define the Generated Review View and Review Package abstractions, give a worked example, outline a system architecture, and analyze evaluation and governance challenges including AI bias, prompt injection, model instability, auditability, and author appeal.

</details>


### [834] [Are We Lost in the Woods? Detecting Silent Semantic Faults for Random Forest Classifiers with Data-informed Static Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07709)
*Willem Meijer,Louis Ohl,Kristian Sandahl,Daniel Varro*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出一种数据信息驱动的静态分析技术 (dille 工具)，用于检测随机森林 ML 脚本中的静默语义缺陷（如数据不平衡），能在亚秒级内以 91% 的精度识别结构、数据和超参数故障，并发现 12%-18% 的 Kaggle 笔记本存在此类问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ML 工程师常遇到静默语义缺陷（如不平衡数据集），这些缺陷在昂贵的训练周期后才能被发现，造成大量资源浪费。现有方法缺乏在早期阶段、甚至在数据集不可访问的情况下检测这些缺陷的能力。

Method: 提出数据信息驱动的静态分析技术：将 ML 脚本提取为有向无环图 (DAG)，并依据形式化的 API 契约进行结构、数据和超参数三个维度的故障检测。该技术利用聚合的数据属性信息，即使数据集因保密限制不可访问也能进行检测。工具实现为开源工具 dille。

Result: 在真实世界的 Kaggle 笔记本上评估：dille 以 91% 的精度识别相关语义缺陷，运行时开销在亚秒级别。实证研究表明，12% 到 18% 的现有随机森林 ML 笔记本受到静默语义缺陷的影响。

Conclusion: 数据信息驱动的静态分析技术能够有效、高效地在早期检测 ML 脚本中的静默语义缺陷，减少 ML 调试负担，适合集成到 IDE、代理工作流和 CI 流水线中。

Abstract: While machine learning (ML) software necessitates effective quality assurance, ML engineers still encounter silent semantic faults, such as imbalanced datasets, that degrade prediction performance without apparent symptoms. These faults are typically detected after expensive training cycles, causing significant resource waste. We propose a data-informed static analysis technique to detect silent semantic faults in ML scripts that use the popular random forest classifier. Our approach extracts ML pipelines into directed acyclic graphs and evaluates them against formalized API contracts to detect structural, data, and hyperparameter faults. Our analysis uses aggregated data properties, enabling fault detection even when datasets are inaccessible due to confidentiality restrictions. We implemented this technique in an open-source tool, dille, and evaluated it on real-world Kaggle notebooks that use the random forest classifier. Our results demonstrate that the tool identifies relevant semantic faults with 91% precision and sub-second runtime overhead, making it suitable for integration into integrated development environments, agentic workflows, and continuous integration pipelines. Our empirical study reveals that 12% to 18% of existing ML notebooks that use the random forest classifier are affected by silent semantic faults, highlighting the immediate practical utility of data-informed static analysis in reducing the burden of ML debugging.

</details>


### [835] [The Windows IOCTL Census: A Corpus-Scale, Multi-Architecture Database of the Driver Control-Code Surface](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07732)
*Michael J. Bommarito*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文构建了Windows IOCTL Census数据库，覆盖27,087个签名驱动，通过确定性单次分析恢复控制码分发面，包含310万解码控制码、818万函数和1595万调用边，并用LLM对可达处理程序进行排序。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究虽有针对Windows驱动IOCTL攻击面的扫描工具和已知恶意驱动列表，但缺乏对该攻击面的系统性映射，无法全面了解驱动控制码分发面的整体结构。

Method: 通过确定性、架构无关的单次扫描（无需符号执行），读取提升的中间表示而非运行符号引擎，在x86和x64架构上恢复驱动分发面；在64位路径上额外添加处理程序可达性、污点分析和调用图；并用LLM对可达处理程序进行排序。

Result: 成功恢复80%样本的驱动分发面（包括现有扫描器无法处理的32位驱动），生成包含27,087个二进制文件、310万解码控制码、818万函数和1595万调用边的公开数据集。

Conclusion: 该方法提供了一种高效、可扩展的Windows驱动攻击面测绘方案，填补了现有研究的空白，为安全研究社区提供了宝贵的公开数据集。

Abstract: A Windows driver exposes its kernel through I/O control (IOCTL) codes, and a single unchecked length on the buffer behind one turns an unprivileged call into a kernel write. The research community has strong scanners for this surface and a curated list of known-bad drivers, but no map of the surface itself. We build that map. The Windows IOCTL Census is a queryable database of the control-code dispatch surface of 27,087 signed Windows drivers, recovered by one deterministic, architecture-neutral pass with no symbolic execution. Reading a lifted intermediate representation instead of running a symbolic engine lets it recover a dispatch surface for 80% of the corpus across x86 and x64, including the 32-bit half existing scanners abort on. On the 64-bit lane it adds handler reachability, taint, and the call graph. An LLM ranks the reachable handlers for triage. We release the census as a public dataset of tens of millions of rows: 27,087 binaries, 3.1M decoded control codes, 8.18M functions, and 15.95M call edges.

</details>


### [836] [Sensitivity Analysis White Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07809)
*Nate Bade,Lindsay Erickson*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文系统梳理了仿真决策支持中的敏感性分析方法框架，特别关注军事应用场景，涵盖局部/全局方法、方差技术、筛选方法等，并引入敏感性审计概念强调模型使用的透明度与责任感。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 帮助分析人员在不确定环境下确定哪些输入变量对模型输出影响最大，为复杂仿真场景提供系统性的方法选择指导。

Method: 构建统一框架，整合局部与全局敏感性分析方法、基于方差的技术、筛选方法、基于导数的方法以及不确定性量化工具，并将其与因子优先排序、因子固定、方差缩减和因子映射等分析目标相对应。

Result: 形成了涵盖多种敏感性分析方法论的分类体系，并明确了不同方法适用的分析目标，同时引入敏感性审计作为补充视角。

Conclusion: 敏感性分析方法可被系统化组织于统一框架中，敏感性审计是确保模型在决策场景中负责任使用的重要补充。

Abstract: Sensitivity analysis is an important component of simulation-based decision support because it helps analysts determine which inputs most strongly influence model outcomes under uncertainty. This paper organizes the broad sensitivity analysis literature into a coherent framework for use in complex simulation settings, with particular attention to military applications. We review major classes of methods, including local and global approaches, variance-based techniques, screening methods, derivative-based methods, and uncertainty quantification tools, and relate them to common analytical objectives such as factor prioritization, factor fixing, variance reduction, and factor mapping. The paper also discusses sensitivity auditing as a complementary perspective that emphasizes transparency, assumption tracking, and responsible use of models in decision-relevant settings.

</details>


### [837] [Jas: AI-Paired Engineering as a Revival of N-Version Programming](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07828)
*Jason Hickey*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 一位开发者在约120个晚上，借助AI配对编程和双重保障（YAML精确规范+并行实现的差异测试），成功构建了矢量绘图应用在Rust、Swift、OCaml、Python和浏览器等5个平台上的移植版本，共用23,000行规范，本地代码量0-95,000行不等，展示了AI如何使传统需要多人年的工作变得可行。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索AI配对编程是否能使单人开发者完成通常需要多人年的软件工程工作，并验证N版本编程（1980年代因成本过高被放弃的方法）在AI时代是否可复兴。

Method: AI辅助实现 + 双重保障机制：(1) 可执行的YAML精确规范作为唯一真理来源，(2) 并行实现作为内置的差异测试层。五个端口共享23,000行规范，本地代码量从0到约95,000行不等。

Result: 一位开发者在约120个晚上成功构建了5个平台（Rust、Swift、OCaml、Python、浏览器）的矢量绘图应用移植版本，实现了通常需要多人年的工作范围。

Conclusion: AI配对编程在双重保障（精确规范+差异测试）条件下，使单人开发者能够完成传统上需要多人年的工作量，并证明了AI可以复兴因成本问题被放弃的N版本编程方法。

Abstract: I report a case study in AI-paired software engineering: five working ports of a vector illustration application across Rust, Swift, OCaml, Python, and browser-based platforms, built by a single developer in approximately 120 evening hours. The methodology pairs AI-assisted implementation with two safeguards -- a precise executable YAML specification serving as the single source of truth, and parallel implementations functioning as a built-in differential-testing layer. The five ports share a 23{,}000-line specification; per-port native code ranges from 0 to roughly 95{,}000 lines, reflecting the specification's escape hatch. I argue that AI-paired engineering, conditional on these two safeguards, makes feasible scope of work that conventionally requires multiple developer-years, and frame the methodology as a revival of N-version programming, a 1980s approach abandoned on cost grounds that AI changes. The paper reports concrete artifacts and honest limitations of the single-developer case study.

</details>


### [838] [Academic Integrity and Emotional Responses to Inappropriate LLM Use in Software Engineering Education](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07830)
*Ronnie de Souza Santos,Italo Santos,Giuseppe Destefanis,Cleyton Magalhaes,Mairieli Wessel*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本研究通过对116名软件工程专业本科生的问卷调查，探讨了学生在使用LLM后认为自己违反学术诚信时的情绪反应。结果显示，学生情绪反应呈现异质性：冷漠最为普遍（即使在意识到学习风险和学术后果的学生中），内疚和焦虑与道德不适和处罚担忧相关，而解脱和满足主要出现在截止日期压力大或指导不明确的情境中。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高等教育中的学术诚信日益受到复杂社会技术环境的影响，特别是LLM在软件工程教育中的普及进一步模糊了可接受帮助与学术不端之间的界限。研究旨在理解学生在使用LLM后认为自己违反学术规范时的情感体验。

Method: 采用横截面调查设计，对116名软件工程本科学生进行问卷调查，收集他们在使用LLM并认为行为学术不端后的情绪描述。

Result: 情绪反应呈现异质性：冷漠最频繁（即使在学习风险和学术后果认知明确的学生中）；内疚和焦虑与道德不适和惩罚担忧有关；解脱和满足主要在截止日期压力大和指导不清晰的情境下出现。

Conclusion: 学生对LLM相关学术不端行为的情绪反应复杂多样，其中冷漠情绪的主导地位值得警惕。研究结果对学术诚信教育、AI使用规范制定及情绪干预策略有启示意义。

Abstract: Academic integrity in higher education is increasingly shaped by complex socio-technical environments marked by automated tools, evolving institutional practices, and heightened performance pressures. Within this context, large language models (LLMs) are becoming prevalent in software engineering education, further blurring boundaries around acceptable assistance and authorship. This study investigates how software engineering students describe their emotional experiences after using LLMs in ways they perceive as academically inappropriate. We conducted a cross-sectional survey with 116 undergraduate students. Results show emotionally heterogeneous responses. Indifference was most frequent, including among students who recognized risks to learning and academic standing. Guilt and anxiety were reported in relation to moral discomfort and concern about penalties. Relief and satisfaction were evident primarily in deadline-driven contexts and situations of unclear guidance.

</details>


### [839] [SLRMentor: An LLM-Based Tool Supporting Learning of SLR in Software Engineering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07831)
*Rodolfo Gil-Pereira,Ronnie de Souza Santos,Cleyton Magalahes,Italo Santos*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: SLRMentor是一个对话式助手，帮助软件工程领域的研究者学习系统文献综述（SLR）流程并执行规划任务，包括搜索串构建和纳入/排除标准推理，初步验证表明它能降低新手研究者的入门障碍并支持学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软件工程领域的新手研究者在进行系统文献综述（SLR）时面临较高的入门障碍，缺乏互动式指导工具来辅助他们理解SLR流程和完成规划阶段的决策。

Method: 开发了SLRMentor对话式助手，提供SLR方法论的一般性指导，支持搜索串构建和纳入/排除标准的推理等关键规划任务，解释基于已建立的SLR指南。通过研究生进行试点验证。

Result: 试点验证表明SLRMentor有助于澄清SLR流程和规划决策，降低新手研究者的初始障碍，支持学习过程，但同时要求研究者保持主动的方法论判断能力。

Conclusion: SLRMentor作为一种辅助工具，能有效支持SLR学习和规划执行，尤其适合新手研究者，但工具定位是辅助而非替代研究者的主动判断。

Abstract: This paper presents SLRMentor, a conversational assistant designed to support both learning about the systematic literature review process and the execution of planning activities in software engineering. The tool offers general guidance on SLR methodology and supports key planning tasks, including search string construction and reasoning about inclusion and exclusion criteria, with explanations grounded in established SLR guidelines. A pilot validation with graduate students suggests that SLRMentor helps clarify the SLR process and planning decisions, lowers initial barriers for novice researchers, and supports learning while still requiring active methodological judgment.

</details>


### [840] [Cherry-pick Override: Unsafe Directional Commitment in LLM Judges under Mixed Evidence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07834)
*Haoran Xu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: LLM法官在混合证据下存在"Cherry-pick Override"问题——当模式允许CONFLICTING时，模型仍输出SUPPORTS/REFUTES。研究发现多数投票会放大而非解决此问题，常见单通道修复均留下不同残余失败，提出双通道参考探针和外部承诺控制层作为解决方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM法官在混合证据（同时存在支持和反驳来源的声明）场景下，当模式暴露CONFLICTING作为授权的非方向性裁决时，模型却返回SUPPORTS/REFUTES这种未经授权的方向性承诺，存在安全隐患。

Method: 定义了Cherry-pick Override (CCO)失败模式，使用同分母诊断协议、匹配覆盖率的bootstrap和苹果对苹果的随机否决零假设进行检测。在AVeriTeC和VitaminC-Mixed数据集上测试了三选项法官、多数投票、置信度阈值、验证器过滤等方案，并提出了双通道参考探针。

Result: AVeriTeC的Conflicting子集上三选项法官对84%以上的混合证据声明输出方向性裁决；多数投票在AVeriTeC上放大了方向冲突（0.887 vs 0.840）但在VitaminC-Mixed上未复现；各单通道修复均留下不同残余失败；双通道参考探针在随机否决零假设下对AVeriTeC有显著选择性效果。

Conclusion: 需要一个外部承诺控制层，将裁决生成与承诺授权分离，使用结构证据和置信度作为正交通道，NO-COMMIT作为路由控制器状态。

Abstract: LLM judges increasingly turn verdicts into system commitments. Under mixed evidence (claims with both supporting and refuting sources) this is unsafe: when the schema exposes CONFLICTING as the authorized non-directional verdict, returning SUPPORTS/REFUTES is an unauthorized directional commitment, a failure we name Cherry-pick Override (CCO). We define CCO under an explicit task contract and report it with a same-denominator diagnostic protocol paired with matched-coverage bootstrap and an apples-to-apples random-veto null.
